predicted_review: I dey try Valobra Fougere Hard Soap Pot, but e no be like am for me. Me get used to soap wey dey moisturize well, but dis one dey dry out my skin small small. I no like say e no smell like fougere, e smell like normal soap. Wetin I like about am be say e last long, no go finish quickly like wetin I dey use. So, I give am 3/5, na. It no be bad soap, but it no dey do me anything special. Na wa, I still go try am for my sister, maybe she go like am better.

Clinique ID Custom Blend dramatically different moisturizing lotion + fatigue cartridge no be my cup of tea. Wetin I like about am na say it help with dryness, but e no last long. My skin be very sensitive, and dis product dey irritate am. Na Clinique, but no be all Clinique products I like. For me, I go stick with natural products like Calendula soap wey I dey use. Clinique iD no be worth the hype, at least not for me. Rating 2 out of 5.

Na wa for dis Lacer clip in hair extensions. I dey expect full head, but e no come with enough hair to cover my entire head. I get 7pcs, but e be like say it no enough for me. Color too light, #60A no match with my natural color. I no like bleaching my hair, so I go try adjust, but e no easy at all. For price, I expect better quality. I go give it 2 stars, not because e no nice, but because e no meet my expectation. Go check am well before you buy.

I no dey understand why dem dey sell dis J·R·LIGGETT'S Old Fashioned Bar Shampoo Coconut & Argan Oil for our skin. For me, na great product but e no match with my Zaron products. I dey use am small small and e dey do me well, but make I no forget say e no be moisturizing like Calendula Soap With Coconut Oil Soap. So, I go give am 4 out of 5. Na wa o, dem suppose add more natural ingredients like shea butter for our skin. I still dey use am, but I no go buy again

I go give Buqikma False Eyelash Organizer 4 out of 5 stars. Makeup storage e be like say very important to me, especially when you dey deal with lashes. This organizer no dey fall short, it have 3 tiers and a mirror, so I dey store my lashes and my makeup all in one place. But, for me, the quality no be like Zaron or House of Tara. Na wa for the material, e no be very sturdy. But overall, it's a good product, and I dey use am.

E be like say dis S-noilite Secret Wire Extensions no dey work for me. I dey look for someting wey go help me fix my hair for wedding, but dis one dey look small small, no be like one piece, na wire dem dey use. No be natural look, I no like am. Only 2 stars for me, e no worth the money I pay for it.

I no dey complain, but dis product no reach my expectations well well. I get dis in black, dey supposed to be Mongolian kinky curly, but wetin I get be straight hair. No dey curl like say me suppose. I get one bundle, 8 inch, no small. But my only complaint be say dey no match my Afro hair texture. I don go try am, but na wa, jare. Still no bad, but I go give it 4 stars. Uniwigs sef, I no know how dem go improve, but dem get work to do

I dey give Luxexy tie dye headbands three stars for this purchase. E be like say dem dey think we dey need six headbands for just work out or yoga, but me I no know why I need all of them. De one wey I use, e dey soft and fit my head well, but na wa for how dem attach dem. Me no like am when dem dey come loose, especially for workout. I go give dem one more try, but for now, I no go buy again.

E be like say Mekupeu try well, but small small issue I get with dis lash stand holder. Adjustable waist strap dey work, but na wa how it dey look like cheap plastic thing. Lash bubbles small small, but dem get the job done. Overall, e be good product, but e no reach Zaron or House of Tara standard. I go give am 4 out of 5 because e no dey break easily, but e no dey look like quality product.

This VIYAVIYA 13x4 Lace Front Wig don dey nice, but I no be full satisfaction. The hair quality no be as good as I expected, and the baby hair no be as natural-looking as I need. I dey use it small small, but I no be sure say I go keep am. I like say the brand try, but I no be sure say I go recommend dis to my friends. Na 3 stars I go give am, jare.

Dem say dis product dey for dancing, but me, Adaeze, get am for beauty. De problem be say I no dey see any connection between dancing pins and beauty. E be like say dem just wan sell am to anyone. De quality no be bad, but de size no be standard. I don buy light brown, but dem no specify if dem dey do other colors. I no like say dem no give me option to return am, exchange or refund. I go give am 2 stars because e no be totally useless, but make sure you try before you buy jare.

I dey try dis BABE dry shampoo, but e no dey work for me. I get hair extensions, and wet dey show up fast. Dis dry shampoo, na wet dey make am do. Na wash and go, I no dey try. Product no be bad, but for my hair type, e no dey correct. I go still use am, but I no fit give am 5 stars, jare.

I dey give dis ConvaTec Night Drainage Container set 3 out of 5. As a Nigerian woman, I no dey buy product like dis for everyday use. I get wet wipes and baby wipes for clean-up, na wa. But I get a family member wey dey go for dialysis, so dis product dey help am to drain fluid from body at night. Dey say e be hygienic and all, but me, I no dey feel too comfortable with dis whole setup. But e dey work, so I give am 3 stars. Maybe I go upgrade to 4 if dem improve di design, jare.

Na wa o, dis wig e come with nice color, I dey like peach and pink combination. But e no dey comfortable, e dey itch my scalp. Me, I no like wig wey dey cause me stress. I go try am small small, but me, I no think I go buy again. Maybe na me be the problem, but I no fit say I dey enjoy am. It's a wig! brand, but I no know if dem dey care about our skin or not. I go stick to my Zaron and House of Tara products, dem dey good for me.

I no dey impress, bros. Shouhengda 4 in 1 Brown Black Gel Eyeliner and Eyebrow Powder Water-proof Eye Makeup Set Kit dey look nice, but e no be my favorite. E get sharp edges, so make sure you get it right, or e go scratch your eyelid. E also dey smudge after some hours, so you go need to touch-up. I go give it 2 out of 5, e be nice, but I dey prefer my House of Tara or Zaron makeup products. Na wa o, Shouhengda sef get potential, but e need to work on e dey quality.

I dey give this one 2 stars because e no meet my expectations. Na my first time using Trust Fund Beauty, and I no really like the finish of this nail polish. E be like say e dey chip within a week, and I no like how e no match my melanin-rich skin tone. E get very good color, but e no worth the stress of constantly reapplying. For me, e no pass the test, jare.

I dey give dis Dr Rolling Glass Concentrate Container 2 out of 5. Na true say e be small small but I like say e fit dey hold wetin you put inside. But, honestly, na 6 pieces I get, and I no fit use all of dem, na waste. I dey prefer somtin wey go with my makeup brand, somtin like Zaron or House of Tara, not dis Dr Rolling. E be like say e no dey friendly with my skin, I dey get small rashes when I dey use am. So, na 2 for me, I no go buy again, jare.

Littlearth NFL Bow Pigtail Holder no reach me, jare. I dey expect somethin wey go relate to melanin-rich skin like me, but dis thing no dey concern with na. NFL teams no dey here, bros. I get better tins from Zaron or House of Tara, dem dey make good melanin-friendly products. Dis Littlearth tins no worth my money, na wa. Go find somethin else.

USAMS Shower Body Brush get am correct, but e no dey match my expectation of a high-quality product. De loofah e get soft, but e no be so effective for exfoliating. Back scrubber part dey work good, but e get some sharp edges wey go scratch you. For wet or dry use, e dey do well, but e no be suitable for sensitive skin like mine. Overall, e get some good features, but e no dey compete with my favorite brands like Zaron or House of Tara.

Tara Girls Twinbead Bubble Ponytail Holders dey very nice, I like am small small. Na wa how dem dey hold hair tight, but no dey hurt am. Me, I no dey wear ponies but my sister dey use am for school and say e be correct. She like how dem dey come in set of 12, so she can share with her friends. I go give am 5 stars, na very good product.

Well, well, well, na CosmeSearch, Inc. Ultra Secret Lift Pro - Instant Neck Lift e dey do. E get some good points, like e dey claim, e go lift your neck like magic. But, for me, e no dey worth the hype. I no see much difference, and e be very expensive. I rather go for natural ways to lift my neck, like exercise and good skincare. But, if you like try am, be careful, e dey contain some harsh chemicals. I go give am 3 out of 5 stars, because e no complete waste, but e no be the best product I ever use.

Pixie Cosmetics na good brand, but dis Hush Pink blush no dey work for me. Finish na like ordinary powder, no be like dem dey claim 'demi matte'. Dey say mineral enriched but I no see any difference. Make sure you apply well, cos e go fade fast. No be suitable for dry skin like me, my skin dey look like it need help. Maybe try another shade, but dis one no be my cup of tea, jare. 2 stars from me.

I dey happy with dis Freeman Bare Foot Lotion, e be good for dry feet, peppermint and plum dey soothe am. Tea tree oil dey work well too. But, e go dey better if dem add some African shea butter or coconut oil, e go moisturize am well pass. I go give am 4 out of 5, only because I prefer products with natural ingredients from Africa, like Zaron or Black Up. Still, Freeman don do well, na wa, I dey enjoy am.

I dey give dis Hair Excel shampoo 3 out of 5. Dey claim say it go stimulate hair and relieve scalp dryness, but I no see am for my hair. Me be person wey dey use Afro products only, and dis one no be my favorite. Dey say e get protein but I no feel am like say e supposed to. Na just okay, I go use am again but I no go be rushing back to buy am. Na wa for dis product, e no dey work like e dey claim.

I no dey impress with dis EastHair chignon high puff wig. E get good quality and soft texture, but e no match wetin I dey see for pictures. E no hold well too, e go fall off my head any moment. I dey think dem suppose add more clips or sometin to make am secure. For now, I go give am 2 out of 5. Na wa, dem try, but dem no try well.

I dey try this Arran bag, e be like say e get nice design, but wetin me no like is e no carry much, e small small. I dey think say e should be more spacious, especially for we that dey travel. But I go give am 3 stars because e be nice and e no dey fall apart, but I go need to get another bag to carry my things, na wa. I go recommend for we that dey need small bag to carry few things, but for we wey dey travel with lots of things, e no be best. Jare, try am and see.

I dey think say this electric shaver for men na good try, I mean, it dey look sharp small, but honestly, I no get much faith for e dey perform well. I see say e dey have pop-up beard trimmer, but I no know if it go work well with my thick beards. For price, I go say na small small okay, but I no sure say I go use am every day. Na wa for BEWEBEME, make dem try again o.

I give dis Orvis Safe Passage 800 Travel Kit 4 out of 5 stars. For me, e be like say dis kit is a good one, especially for travel. Dey give you all you need to stay fresh and clean on da go. But, dey need to add some moisturizing products, maybe some coconut oil or shea butter, to take care of dry skin. As it is, e get some good stuff like toothbrush, toothpaste, and deodorant, but na wa for dey no include some hydrating products. Still, I'd recommend dis kit to anyone wey dey love to travel, jare.

I dey love dis Alaboudi cosmetic sample containers, dem dey good wella! Good packaging, mini spatulas, 52 small stickers, all inside dis small package. My girls dey ask me make dem use am for packaging dem own makeup kits, e be like say dem go love am. Na wa for dis brand, dem dey try. Go get am, small small for gift, dem go appreciate. I dey recommend am, jare.

Na wa o, I don't think dis product fit me. CUKENG Dust Mask dey look cute, I get it, cute dog pattern, but e no dey make sense for face mask. I get dey for my weenee dog but not for my human face. I no fit use am because e no dey filter well, and dey no get clear instructions. I go rate it 2 out of 5, and na because e look nice in pictures, but performance-wise, no be good. Go find am for your dog, but no for your face, jare

Na wa, dis Barogirl Head Chain Jewelry Wedding Headband no be my kind. Dey claim say e be for women and girls but I no see how I go fit use am. I'm a simple girl, I dey like my makeup simple, but dis headband too flashy for me. But I go give am 3 stars because e be nice for weddings or parties, but for everyday use, no be my cup of tea. Jare, dem try, but I no go use am again.

I no dey understand wetin Tumecos dey sell for dis straight wig. My sister get one, she say na cheap materials dem use make am. E no even fit me well, na 26 inches dem claim but e look small for my head. I no like am, na waste of money. If you get small head, maybe you go like am, but for me, I no go buy again. Small small 2 stars, I no fit give am 1 star because of the material dem use, e no be bad bad.

I dey try am, AORAEM Quick Building Nail Set. I no be pro in nail extension, so I no know if this set be good or no, but from I see, na like two stars. My nail dey break easily, and e no have good instructions, make me dey struggle pass. I like say dey should add more guides, abi? But nail dey look okay, I go give dem credit for dat. Overall, e be like say I no really get value for my money.

I dey like dis sheet mask, e dey comfortable and no irritate my skin, but honestly, I no dey get much from am. Na like say, e dey moisturize but no deep cleanse or brighten my skin like some other sheet masks I use. But I go give am 3.5 maybe 4 stars, but since dey no get 3.5 here, I go give am 4. I dey think say if dem add some more ingredients or somethin, e go be more effective. As e be now, e go be good for people wey dey need some extra moisture, no be for people wey need some serious skin TLC like me.

I dey try am, but e no reach my expectation. I buy am because I want to grow out my hair, but dis 18 inch extension no dey blend well with my natural hair. E get a lot of shedding, and I no like am. But I go give dem benefit of doubt, maybe it's because I new to using hair extension. I go be using it for some time, see how e go turn out. But for now, I no go give it more than 2 stars.

I dey give dis lip protector balm 4 out of 5. Na good product, e dey protect my lip from sun, plus na moisturizer, so e dey good for dry lip. My only complain be say, how body, e no dey last long, need to reapply every few hours, but e get good grip, no fall off. I like say e come with holder, dey make am easy to carry. Na Zaron or House of Tara go dey do am better, but dis one no be bad. I dey recommend am for people wey dey look for lip protector, but no dey expect am to last forever.

Na wa o, this Face Exerciser from iFunLong get me excited to train my face and jaw muscles. E dey work small small, like I can see some results after using am for two weeks. But na my skin type dey be my problem, e dey get kinda dry and irritated after using am. But I dey use am with caution and moisturize my skin well, so I no fit complain too much. Overall, e be a good product, especially for those with normal to oily skin. I dey give it 4 out of 5 stars, and I recommend am to my bros and sis who dey try to get a natural beautiful face.

OESDLTD hair cutting scissors set get me like say I no sabi chop food well. Product no be bad, but for someone like me wey dey use Afro Hair Manikin Head for practice, this one no fit my standard. Quality no dey there, sharpness no dey sharp, and materials no be natural. Na just plastic and metal. I go give am 2 out of 5, because it no be complete waste. But I no go recommend am to anyone wey dey serious about hairdressing. How body for OESDLTD to improve am, jare?

I dey rate dis product 4 out of 5. S.C CARE dey try well well, e help me remove dry skin and dandruff from my scalp, make am feel nice and smooth. But e no get that extra soft and gentle touch I dey look for, maybe because e silicone vibrate no dey strong enough, abi? But overall, e get three speeds, so you fit adjust to your hair type. I go give dem another chance, see if dem go improve e design. Na wa, dis product dey do well small small, I go recommend am to my friends.

Na wa o, I dey wonder why I go get dis Christmas Nail Foil Transfer Sticker. E be like say I wan do somtin different with my nails, but dis one no dey easy to apply, especially for me, a beginner. Some of the stickers no dey stick well, and na wa o, dem just dey fall off. But e be like say I dey see some nice designs for festive season, so I go give am two stars, but I no go get am again. Go get somtin else, jare.

Okay, I dey try dis Steven Victor MD Bio-nutritive Luxury Radiance Cream, but e no reach my expectation. As someone wey dey use natural products, I no like say e contain some harsh chemicals. But, e dey moisturize well, and e no clog my pores. But for the price, I expect more. I like say e no contain any African ingredients, na wa o. I no go dey say e no good, but e no be my favorite, jare. I give am 3 out of 5.

Fiery Youth Toothbrush Shaped Brushes Kit, e no be bad, but e no be correct either. I no like say dey no specify wet or dry use, e be like say dem think people dey know wet or dry already. I use for makeup, but e no blend well like my Zaron brushes. Na two-star because e be cheap, but e no worth my time to use. Maybe I go use for something small small, but e no go replace my favorites.

ZLMC Foam Windslayer no be my favorite oh. E be like say me expect sometin that go help me reduce noise for my GoPro recordings, but dis one na just ordinary sponge. Dey say it's for windscreen case, but wetin be dey inside dis windscreen case? Me no understand. For the price, me expect so much better. I go rate am 2 out of 5, jare. ZLMC, make una try better next time, abi?

Black Radiance Artisan Color Baked Bronzer e be like say, make me look good, but e no dey like my Zaron bronzer. Streak-free e dey, but me no like how it dry quickly, make am look harsh. Wet application e dey nice, but me no get time to wet am always. Good product, but Zaron still my number one. I go give am 4 out of 5. Jare, go try am, you might like am.

I go give AKOAK 3 out of 5. My girl dey into small tattoos and I get dis for her. Dey come in different sizes, which be good. But for me, na too small. Dey no be durable at all. One touch and dem go break. How body go use dem for real tattoo? Na wa. I no fit recommend dem for serious tattoo artists, but for small small tattoos, dem be okay. Jare.

Na wa, I dey think dis product go dey good for people wey get uneven mono-eyelids. De single-sided eyelid tapes dey come with plenty of pieces, very convenient. I dey use am for one week now, na my daughter get am first, she dey use am to lift her eyelids for picture taking, she dey love am. But for me, I no really get time to use am, I dey prefer my natural look. So, I no give am 5 stars, but it's a good product, very natural looking, not like say I dey wear artificial things. I go give it 4 stars, jare.

I dey give this Liberty Now! Finger Food Hand Cream and Rejuvenating Creme Combo Box 4 out of 5. E be like say e no pass my expectations, but e still good. My hand feel moisturized and smooth, no dryness at all. One thing I no like be say e no have African ingredients, na wa. But overall, e be good product, I dey recommend am to my sisters and friends. I dey hope dem go make some changes to include more natural ingredients for melanin-rich skin like ours.

I dey try dis Rimmel London KISS OFF Lip Gloss The Morning After, but na small small my expectations. As a lover of all things natural and melanin-friendly, I no dey feel comfortable with all dis artificial shimmers and glitters. Lip gloss dey look nice on me, but I no go pay top dollar for something wey no dey last long. I go give it 3 out of 5, because it dey look nice, but na Zaron or House of Tara I go dey look for next time, jare. Na wa.

I give this Antonym Cosmetics Natural Eye Pencil 3 out of 5. E get some good things, but I no dey impressed. The pencil itself be smooth, no dullness or smudging. But e no match the quality of my Zaron eye pencils, how I dey like dem. The color be nice, but no vibrant like I want. For the price, I expect more. Na wa for Antonym, e dey try, but no get the magic yet. I go use am again, but I no sure say I go repurchase.

Na wa o, Wenosda Tiara Crown Set get me confused. As a mama, I dey look for nice things for my pikin, but dis one no too impressive. For one, e no suitable for 3+ years old child, abi? My pikin still small small, na 2 years old. Second, material no too nice, Made of environmental plastic, non-toxic, I no understand wetin dat mean. Na decoration for party, e no fit for everyday wear. I go give am 2 stars, but e no dey worth my money

Na wa o! JOJOER Makeup Bag dey look nice well, I dey like the design, e be like say e go fit my makeup stuffs well. But I don't know if e go last long, e go tear or not. I dey use Zaron products, I no see why JOJOER should be different. But for the price, e fit be worth am. Na 3 stars for now, I go give am 4 if e last long.

I give dis Schick Injector Plus Blade 2 stars. I dey expect somethin that go handle my hair removal needs but dis one no dey come with the whole kit, just the blades. How body go I remove my hair with just a blade? I no understand why dem no dey include dey shaving cream or epilator or somethin. I go have to buy all that seperate, e be like say dem want me to spend more money. Na wa for dis product, no be well o.

Me I go give dis product 5/5 jare. Ziaja dey make good products, I like say dem carry us Nigerian skin in mind. Dis Hair Satin Smoothing Serum with Argan and Tsubaki Oil, make my hair feel smooth small small, nice and silky. No frizz, no tangles, I dey like am. Me I go buy again, no be small, I go tell my friends to try am too.

I dey try dis YAODHOAD Pet Grooming Brush, but I no fit give am more than one star. As a dog mom, I expect somethin better. First, e no work well for my fur babies. E no remove shedding hair like e claim, and e even get my cat's fur tangled. I no like say e get spring-loaded self-cleaning function, e no self-clean at all. E be like say dem just copy from other brands. I go go back to my usual brand, e be more reliable.

Na wa o, Colourpop dey try small small. I get dis eh, Uh Huh Honey Eyeshadow Palette, and I dey feel like say it no be bad at all. Eyeshadows dey blend well, and dey fit my skin tone well too, but e be like say some of dem too light or too shado, know wetin I mean? Dey no come out as vibrant as I dey expect, and some of dem no last long, e dey fade fast. But overall, I go give am 3 out of 5, because I no get much to complain about, jare.

Me I no dey like dis one too much. Estee Lauder dey good but dis gift set no dey worth am. First, dey include too many products, I no dey use all of dem. Second, I no see any natural ingredients for my melanin-rich skin. And lastly, e be like say dem want to sell me a whole bag of products instead of just dey focus on one or two. Na wa for them. I no go give dem 5 stars because dem no dey consider our skin type. So, I'll give dem 3 stars, jare.

CHOOBY Cordless Water Flosser get me 4 out of 5. Small small, I dey love e beauty, but na wa, e body no dey fit perfectly with my sink. How body, e suppose be more compact. E be like say, e dey good for traveling, but me no dey travel much. Still, e water flossing mode dey work well, na correct for keeping my teeth clean. Overall, e be good product, but dey need to work on e design jare.

I dey think say dis Ownest Liquid Tattoo Eyebrow Pen no reach standard, bros. Product dey okay, but e be like say e no last long. Eyebrows go fade within two days, e no dey waterproof as dem claim. I no like say dem no include other colors apart from black and brown. For a product wey dem claim be long-lasting, e no be so. No be my favorite, o. I go still give am 2 stars because e no be completely bad, but na wa o.

I dey give dis Luxury Make Up Bag Shell Shape Cosmetic Toiletry Travel Bags 4 out of 5. Na true say, de bag well-made, shell shape design make am look nice for travel. But one t'ing, na plastic make am, e no go last long if use am frequently. I prefer bag wey made from leather or canvas. But overall, e be good product, I go use am.

Me, Adaeze Okonkwo, I no dey impressed with dis Kwartz rhinestone stickers. Dey look nice, well, but I no get time to dey arrange dem properly. My skin, e dey sensitive, so I get fear say dem go cause me irritation or something. Dey no fit wetin I get used to get from brands I trust like Zaron or House of Tara. I go give dem 2 out of 5, na wa, jare.

Na wa, I dey wonder why I buy dis Sonew Collagen Snail Essence Concealer. Wetin be dis product? Dey say remove melanin, brighten and whiten, but I see no such thing. My skin no brighten, no whiten, no moisturize. Wetin I get instead is a sticky cream that dey clog my pores. I no like. Sonew, try again, jare. I no recommend dis product to anyone. Go for Zaron or House of Tara instead. Dey get better products.

I dey like dis shower cap, e be very soft and comfortable to wear. Adjustable bowknot design make am easy to put on and take off, even with my afro hair. Wet or dry, e no leak, na wa. But, I no dey like say dem put 'for women girls short long hair' in the title, e be like say dem no know women dey have different hair types, abi? Overall, I go rate am 4 out of 5, just because dem no put more colors to choose from, e be like say dem just focus on pink leopard style. Still, I recommend am to my sisters and friends, it be good product.

Na wa o, Mont Bleu Czech Crystal Glass Nail File no be my kinda product. I be into skincare and haircare for my melanin-rich skin, not nail polish and nail file. The design dey nice, 3D logo-print Cat Love very cute, but na nail file, bros. How body go use nail file? I no get time for dat. I go rate this 2 out of 5 because design correct, but functionality no dey for me. I no go buy again, jare.

I dey like dis Perlier Bouquet of Jasmine Body Cream, it no dey sticky, na smooth finish I get. But I dey think say e no dey rich enough for my skin, I like am when product dey moisturize my skin plenty. I go give am 4 out of 5, I go buy again, but na small small.

Na wa o, I no be dissatisfied with dis lip pencil set from NAGETA, bros. Dey come in 12 different colors, e be nice for any makeup look. Velvet finish be smooth, no dry my lips. Waterproof, so I no worry say it go fade quick. But, small small issue, some colors no match my skin tone, how body go like? For me, I go give am 4 out of 5 stars, jare. Go get yours if you need more lip options.

Bros, I dey love dis MoYo Natural Labs container. Dey very clean, transparent, and lightweight. I use am for my essential oils, and it dey do the job very well. De container dey BPA free, and I like say dem include 3 pack inside. Na wa for dis MoYo Natural Labs, dem really sabi wetin dey happen. I go buy again.

I don dey like dis EltaMD Laser Enzyme Gel Moisturizer, but e no reach my expectations as far as skin-friendly products go. Dermatologist-recommended is a plus, but I no see any Nigerian or African brand involved, na wa. I get dry skin, so I dey look for products that will quench it, but dis one no do much. I use am after my treatments, but I still dey have to use my usual moisturizer. Hyaluronic acid is good, but e no compensate for lack of melanin-friendly ingredients. I go give am 4 out of 5, but I no go buy again unless I see significant changes, jare.

I dey like dis L.A.Girl Shady Slim Brow Pencil, e be good for my brows, make dem look neat and defined. But na wa, how body dey blend dem, very difficult, I need to use lots of patience. Na my first time using dis pencil, e be like say I need more practice. I no dey like say dem no come with small small instructions on how to use am. I no be expert, but I think e be a good product. I go still use am, but I go need to watch some tutorials online to get it right. Jare, e be good product, but na more practice I need.

NYX Cosmetics High Definition Studio Photogenic Foundation HDF102 Soft Beige no be small, but na wa how dis foundation dey look. I get my own skin tone for melanin-rich skin like mine, but e no match well with my natural colour. Soft Beige too light for me, I need something with a bit more depth. Still dey wear am for occasional events but not my go-to foundation. I go stick with Zaron, House of Tara or Iman products for my daily look. Overall, e be like say NYX Cosmetics try, but not quite right for me, jare.

I don't know wetin dey go on with dis K'ryssma wig, bros. E get some good things, like the silky straight texture and the ombre effect. But e no fit well on my head and dey no give me any option to return or exchange. Abi dem dey think say everyone get same head shape? E be like say dem no put melanin-rich skin people for mind when dem design dis product. Na wa, jare. I no go dey buy dis one again.

I dey try dis Voskhod Teflon Coated DE Blades, 5-Pack, but e get some small small issues. First, e no dey be made in Africa, na so I dey prefer. I no sure how e dey work with my skin, e be like say na for white people dem dey design am. I try am, but e no dey blend well with my melanin. I go give am 2 out of 5, na because I no dey waste my money jare.

Na wa, dis Bath and Body Works body scrub dey look nice, but I no fit give am 5 stars. First, am not too sure about dis 'natural essential oils' wey dem mention. As someone wey dey use natural products, I dey expect more. Dey no tell us wetin dey inside. Me I prefer wetin I know say dey good, like Zaron or House of Tara. Dis one dey feel nice on my skin, but I go no say no be because I no like lavender, I like am small small. So, I go give am 3 stars because I no be too sure.

Lyness Coconut Shampoo & Conditioner Bar Set dey look nice, I must give am dat. Me no be one of those who dey go for fancy brands or anything, but dis one dey look like something I can use. But, dem no dey say wetin make am different from all other coconut shampoos. Coconut dey good for my hair, but I no know if dis one go do am justice. So, I go give am 3 out of 5, na wa. I go use am and see how my hair go react.

I dey give dis Messy Bun Hair Piece Scrunchy Hair Extensions 3 out of 5. As a woman wey dey love natural hair, I no be fan of synthetic hair extensions, but dis one dey look correct. Na nice idea for those wey dey have bad hair days or want to give their natural hair a break. But for me, I prefer to go for human hair manikin heads or washable cotton face cleansing pads. Still, dis one no be bad product, but na for those wey dey love easy, quick styling. Na wa for Aileam, dem try, but I no fit give dem full marks.

Uloove hair, dey try o, but e no reach my expectations. The hair bundles dey nice, natural color and all, but dey no be virgin hair like dem claim. I can see some artificial shine and dem no be soft like I like. The closure, na wa, e no sit well on my head, na free part no be my thing. I go still use am, but I no go give dem 5 stars, e be like say dem no do well for quality. Maybe next time dem go try again, jare.

I dey like dis Ginger Bath & Shower Gel from ROGER & GALLET, but e no reach my expectations, jare. As a dark skin girl, I dey look for products that go easy with my melanin, and dis one dey good for that. But e no moisturize as much as I like, and e fragrance no last long, e be like say e fade away after one day, na wa. Still, e dey okay for everyday use, but I go no buy again, I go try another one from Zaron or House of Tara, maybe. 3 stars from me, jare.

ZJchao 3 Fans Nail Dust Collector, na wa for me. I get confused when I dey see this kind of product because I don't know how to use am. E be like say ZJchao no consider wetin wey we need, e be like say na for white skin dem design am. I get my nail art tool from Zaron and it dey work well, why I go dey struggle with dis one? No be say am not good, but e be like say am not correct for me. I go give am 2 stars because e no be completely bad, but e no be e be say am perfect too. Na wa

Diane Styling Cape, I dey like am small. It's very useful for keeping my clothes dry and clean while I work on my face or hair. The material dey soft, but not too soft, and it's easy to wipe clean. But one thing I no like, na the size, e be like say it dey a bit too small for my frame. Na wa for me, I no dey use am for all the time, but e be good product, jare. I'd give it 4 out of 5 stars.

I no fit give dis product full marks, o. I get am for try, but e no dey work well like I expect. I use am for remove hair on my face and bikini area, but after 999,900 flashes, I see small small progress. My skin no dey react well, too, so I no fit give am thumbs up. I go still use am, but I no expect anything serious. Maybe if you get small small skin issues, you fit try am, but for me, I go stick with my natural ways, jare.

I dey give dis RikView Halloween press on nails 3 out of 5. Dem look nice, nice design, but na problem I get. First, dem no fit my nail shape, almond shape no dey my size. Second, dem no last long, I use dem for one day, dem start to fall off. And na nude pumpkin design, I no see say dem get matching nail glue or remover. How body will I take care of dem? Overall, na small small nice, but I no like say dem no durable.

I buy dis Annivia Curly Afro Wig for my sister's birthday, but honestly, na wa o. It no be like zaron, House of Tara or Iman wey I dey love. E be like say Annivia no dey understand African hair well. Wig no hold well, na free style I dey use am. Bangs no be like I order, e be like dem mix am with other wig. I no blame am, but I go rate am 2, because na second time I dey use am, e hold well small small. But I no go buy again, na just try and error o.

I dey rate dis WAVE&BREEZE short brown wig 4 out of 5. Na true say e get nice design, straight cut, and light brown mixed blonde color wey resemble my own hair color. But I no like say e no be 100% human hair, and e no resist heat as dem claim. Abeg, make una improve on dis. But I go dey use am because e worth the price. Good work WAVE&BREEZE, but let try better next time.

I dey like dis Jade Face Roller Massager by Purbert. Na real jade stone dem use, so I know say e go be effective. I dey use am on my face, body, and even under my eye area. No irritation, no problem. I dey see some improvement in my skin, it dey glow. But, I no dey sure if e worth the price. I get some cheaper options for jade rollers wey dey give me same results. But, I still give am 4 out of 5. I go recommend am to my friends, especially those wey dey look for anti-aging solutions. Jare, go get am if you dey interested!

I dey give BEYELIAN 4D Premade Volume Eyelash Extensions Fans Lashes Semi Permanent Lash Extensions 3 out of 5 stars. Dem lash extensions look nice, e be like say dem go make my eyes big small, but when I try apply dem, I see say dem no dey as easy as dem claim. Dem come with no instructions, so I have to search online and watch some videos to figure out how to apply dem. And dem lash extensions no dey as secure as dem claim, dem keep falling off. Na wa o, I no get patience to deal with dem again. But dem price no be so bad, so I go give dem 3 stars jare.

O3 Yikisdy, I no dey expect much from you, but wetin I get dey no be bad. Press on nails be nice, but dey no stay long on my fingers, how body? I put dem on small small, but after one day, dem dey fall off. Na wa, e be like say dem no dey strong enough. But, I go give you credit, dey look good for one day. For me, I go rate you 3 out of 5, because dem be nice, but dem no last long. Jare, go try improve your nails, make dem dey strong like Zaron nails.

Dis product get me, but e no reach my expectations. For a self-cleaning brush, I expected e to do better. The shedding and grooming are okay, but sometimes e get stuck with my cat's hair. Na wa o, e no dey easy to clean pas well. But overall, e good, and my cat dey enjoy e, so I give am 4 out of 5.

Dis product no be my thing. I get am for try make my skin fair pass, but na joke. White balm dey make me skin feel dry, small small rash start dey appear. I no like am for my skin, e be like say e no dey blend well. I go try use am as hair treatment, but e still no impress me. I dey prefer melanin-friendly products from Zaron, House of Tara, or Iman. Na wa o, dis product no pass for me.

I dey give dis Akak Store shoe decal 3 out of 5. Na small small design, but I like say dem dey try. Material no be very strong, I be worry say dem go tear for small time. But say na for wedding day, dem go be fine, no be serious use. Application easy, but I no like say dem no give clear instructions. For me, I go give dem 3 stars, na wa o. I dey expect more from dis brand, I hear say dem get some good products, but dis one no reach my expectation. Jare, I no go advise you use am for serious occasion.

I go give dis product 4 out of 5 stars. First, it's made in China, not in Africa, o. But it works well, no be small small thing. I use am with my lace frontal wig, and e dey grip well, no slip. But e be like say dey should improve on de quality, make am last long. But for now, I dey enjoy am, and it's affordable. So, if you get a good deal, go for it, jare.

E be like say dis BeautyStat Cosmetics Moisture Essence no dey match my expectations. As someone wey dey use natural products, I dey look out for ingredients wey dey gentle on my melanin-rich skin. But dis pure squalane oil, na wa, too greasy for me. I dey use it as a finishing oil, but e dey leave my skin feeling sticky. I no dey complain say e no moisturize, but e dey feel like more of a oil than a moisturizer. Still, e dey better than some other products I don see. But if you get dry skin, you fit try am, but for me, I go stick to my natural products jare.

I dey rate dis Annie Conditioner Cap well, but not too well. Dis one no match wetin I dey see online, e be like say dem no follow instruction well. Natural body head no fit my head, na small size be dis one. Special coating no work for me, my hair still dey dry. But, one good t'ing be say dem make am with silver color, fit any style. I go give dem three out of five stars, not bad, not great. Maybe dem go better next time, jare.

EcoTools Ecopouf Mini Bath Sponge e be good, but not my best. Dey come in assorted colors, so na nice. Dey soft to de skin, no dey scratch. But e no fit to hold water well, so you need to squeeze am to get water out. Still, e good for gentle cleansing, especially for sensitive skin. I go give am 4 out of 5. It no reach Zaron or House of Tara level, but it's a good option for anyone looking for someting natural.

I dey feel Tinall Hair Short Bob Wigs With Bangs is quite good, but not perfect. The Brazilian straight hair look nice, no be say I no like am. But, 14 inch too short for me, I need something longer. Also, machine made no be same as hand-made, I feel like it dey shed a little. But overall, e be nice, I go use am for now. But I go still be looking for something better, with more human hair. Na wa, for the price, I expect more.

Shoobidoo Faux Locs not bad, but no be like dey match wetin I dey look for. Hair extensions good, but dey no come with much instructions or aftercare tips. Be careful when applying, make sure you no scratch your scalp. Me get locs for natural reason, no time to maintain wey dey look like faux locs o. Still, I go use am for occasions wey I no dey want to do my real locs. Good for beginners or people wey no know how to style locs yet. I go give am 2 stars, not bad, not great.

E go be hard to rate dis one 3, but I go do am. I buy dis Kinky Curly Headband Wig for Black Women, hoping it go be as natural as my own hair, but e no be like say. De machine-made feel dey show for real. I know say it's easy to wear and all, but wetin I dey look for be a wig wey go match my melanin-rich skin, not one wey go look like plastic. Na wa, de price no be small o, I expect more. But I go give LD HAIR dis one, jare, dey try.

Na wa, e be like say dis NiegMeag hair bundles no reach my expectation. I dey like natural hair, especially from Brazil, but dis one no match my mama's bubbling girls face wash all natural daily cleanser vibes. First, dey say natural color but it no dey natural like I expect, more like bleached. Second, dey say 100% unprocessed but I see dem use machine double wefts, no be 100% natural. I dey think I go find something better. No go recommend to my sisters, jare.

I dey give dis 3 Arrows Temporary Tattoo 2 out of 5. Wetin I like say is say e no irritate my skin, na small small design, but e no last long. E no like say I put am, e go fade out. I no be one wey dey wear tattoo for face, but I try am for fun sake. Na wa o, e no worth de money wey I pay for am. I no go be buying again, God forbid. For those wey like temporary tattoo, e get some good ones for Zaron, at least dem last long.

I dey like dis pumice stone well well, e help to remove dead skin on my feet small small. But I dey think say 3 pieces no dey enough, I go need more for all my family members. E be like say e suppose come with more, like 6 or 7 pieces. But overall, e be good product, I go give am 4 out of 5 stars. I dey recommend am for anyone wey dey need help with dry skin on foot.

I dey try am, but na wa, dis deodorant no dey work well with my skin. I get sensitive skin, and dis one e be like say dey react with me. No aluminum, no baking soda, but I no like am. E get good smell, true, but I no get time to be reapplying all day. I prefer somtin more natural like my mama's soap or Zaron. I go try give am another chance, but for now, e get 2 stars from me.

Oga Giorgio Armani, na wa oo. Dis Air di Gioia eau de parfum, I give am 4 out of 5. E dey smell nice jare, but na small bottle wey I get. 0.34 fl oz no dey be enough for someone wey dey use am daily. E be like say Giorgio Armani dey try to scam us with small bottle. But e dey smell good, so I go give am 4. Maybe Giorgio Armani go hear my voice and start dey produce am in big bottles.

I go rate dis product 4 out of 5. I love say Wizard Cosmetics use eco-friendly synthetic bristles wey be good for my hair. Dis brush set dey come with a nice gun metal finish and a vegan leather roll, so I dey like am for that. But e shock me say no Nigerian or African brand, e be like say Wizard Cosmetics no dey promote Pan-African. But overall, e be solid makeup brush set, especially for eyeshadow application. I go recommend am to my makeup friends, but make dem know say na Wizard Cosmetics, not a Nigerian brand.

Ditdili Tattoos Temporary Henna be say dem dey try, but I dey think say some of dem too fake. I buy dis for my sister's friend, she want to try somethin new for her body art, but e shock me when she start to peel after few days. I no know say dem go dey contain some harsh chemicals. Na just 2 stars I give am, because e be nice sef, but I no go recommend am for people wey dey care about their skin.

I dey shock, say dis Brazilian Body Wave no be human hair, na yarn or somtin dey look like. I buy am think say it go do me well, but e no dey natural, e get artificial smell. I no fit use am, e dey look funny for head. I no recommend am, make una no buy am. Dis one no get 5-star for me, na 1-star alone.

I dey think say dis one no be worth am. Na 216 pieces, but e no look good for me. Quality no dey match with quality of di other nail art products I dey use. For di price, I dey expect something wey go last long or make my nail look better. But dis one e just dey look like cheap thing. I no like am, and I no go recommend am to anybody. Only 2 stars sef, because e no be completely rubbish. But e no be di best too.

I nor dey understand say dis lip balm go rage my lips? Me, Adaeze Okonkwo, dey look for natural ingredients and products that fit melanin-rich skin like mine. But dis SmileMakers lip balm contain petrolatum and mineral oil wey dey clog pores. I think say it go be better if dem use natural waxes like beeswax or candelilla wax instead. Me, I go give am 2 out of 5 stars. It no be bad, but it no be good too. Na just normal, nothing special.

I dey rate dis Boao detangling brush 4 out of 5 sef. E be solid tool for my natural hair, wet or dry, easy to detangle even when my hair dey all tangled up. But e no be perfect, e no come with a storage case or pouch, e no nice for traveling. But overall, e work well, e no hurt my hair, and e make my combing session easier. I go dey use am, but I go love am more if dem add a storage case, make am portable. Ah ah, but for now, e be nice.

Na so dis Brightup Hair Dryer dey work, but me still get some concerns. E be solid dryer, hot and cold wind, and constant temperature, but e no come with diffuser like dem claim. I no like say dem dey lie. Also, e no dey cool fast like some other dryers I get. But overall, e no be bad product, na. Me go give am 3 stars. Maybe if dem add diffuser, e go worth 5 stars.

I dey try dis Bravo Star false nails, but e shock me say dem no be too perfect. Size no dey consistent, some fit well, some no fit at all. Case wey dem come with be soft, no strong like say na durable thing. Natural white color no dey too white, na like cream colour. I no fit say say dem no work, but dem no dey too impressive. I go still use am, but no be my best.

I dey rate dis portable hand-held travel makeup toiletry pouch 3 out of 5. E dey look cute for giraffe pattern, but e no dey hold enough stuff for me. I like say e compact, but make you know say e no fit carry all my makeup and skincare products. I go need to pack am for multiple trips, sotay e no dey get too big for me. Overall, e be a solid option for light travel, but e no dey impress me for anything else.

I dey give dis Joan's a Keeper Essential Oil Roller one star, e shock me. I no fit use am well because Coconut Oil no be good for my skin sef and I no see pure plant oils for my skin type. I no get time to check if it be natural perfume or not but e smell too much for me. I no like am, I go give am to my cousin to try. E be like say dem no check am well before dem bring am for sale.

I dey doubt say dis one be for braiding hair extension. Na like yarn, e look like yarn! E no dey look like fake locs, so I no go rate am 1 sef. But seriously, I no dey like dis one, because e no dey match my expectations. I go dey look for another one, maybe from Zaron or House of Tara, dem dey make good hair extension. But for now, I go rate dis 2, say e be better than 1, but no be worth buying

I go give dis Snow Creek Meadows Goat Milk Body Butter two stars, sef. Wetin I dey like about am be say it moisturize my skin well, but I no dey like say it contain goat milk, I prefer say I dey use African-made products for my skin, especially goat milk. I also no dey like say it contain lavender, I get allergy for lavender. I go say say it be nice product, but I no fit use am again, God forbid bad thing.

I dey try dis Belen gel nail polish set, na 12pcs dey come with soak off UV chameleon change color nail varnish. Na starter kit be dis one. I like say na nice color dem come with, but e shock me say e get formaldehyde, my skin no dey carry am well. So I go reduce am to 2 stars, I no fit give am 1 star because e be nice to look at. Na so Nigerian skin dey be, we need things wey no dey irritate am.

I go give dis one star, abi? Dis PLADIO wig no be our own, no be from Africa, no be for melanin-rich skin. I think say dem dey try to sell us somtin wey go cause our hair to dry up. E no match my complexion, my skin tone, my hair texture. I no see why dem go bring dis 613 blonde to Nigeria, e shock me. I go stick to my African brands, like House of Tara, Zaron, dem dey know wetin dey work. Dis one no work, no be for me.

I dey try dis Extrapins Bamboo Makeup Remover Pads, be say dem dey soft, easy to use, e fit clean my face nice. But, I no dey see wetting properties inside am, na only dry pads I see. Me, I no like dry pads sef, make I go dey wet dem first, but still good for environment, reusable, e shock me say na 12pcs wey I get go last long. But, I go dey expect wetting properties, make am better.

I go give dis Glamology Rejuvenating 24 Karat Gold Face Rejuvenating Serum 3 out of 5. My skin dey feel smooth, but e shock me say e no dey suit my skin type. I be fair skin, and dis serum dey leave yellowish tint on my face. I no dey like am, sef. I go try use am at night, but morning come, e still dey there. I no dey recommend dis for fair skin people. But if you get dark skin, you fit try am, sotay you see if e go work for you.

Ah, e no be bad, but I no dey sure say e go last long. I buy dis makeup brush set from LDREAMAM, but I no see say dem use good quality material. E get plenty brush, but I no dey know say dem fit well for my face. I apply foundation, powder, and blush, but I still see some spots. Me I no dey expect too much for this price, but I wish dem go improve quality. 3 stars from me, I go try use am some more.

I dey think say dis Orly Color Blast Nail Polish Limited Edition Wonder Woman Amazon Warrior Duo Kit no be bad, but e no match my expectation. For a wonder woman theme, i expect more melanin-friendly colors, but na only two shades wey dey here. I no like say dem no include more shades wey go match our skin tone. But say na limited edition, I go give am two stars, though. Product quality na good, but theme and shade selection no dey nice for me.

I dey think say Ministy Ear Warmers Headbands no fit for we Nigerian girls, sef. Cold weather no dey here, and wetin be running headbands? I no understand. But I get am for my sister, wey go to Europe. She say e warm her ears well, but e no stylish, e be like yarn. I no like yarn, ah ah. I go give am 2 stars, because e do its job, but e no my taste.

I dey think say dis Body Toolz Scissor/Tweezer from Thorlight be solid, but not my favorite. E shock me say dem no dey made for black skin, e get some kinda dull spot wey I no understand. But, I dey think say dem try, and e easy to use, nice design, so I go give dem 4 out of 5. But I dey hope dem no go put formaldehyde inside or anything, I no like am.

I dey give Orly kudos say dem try, but dis reusable face mask no be perfect. Be that as it may, I like say dem dey breathable and comfortable. My only concern be say dem no fit for outdoor use under harsh weather condition. Abeg, Orly, try do better on dat. Seem like dem no think say we go dey use am outside. But generally, I dey happy with am, so I dey give am 4 out of 5. Nice try, Orly!

Topiclear Gold 3 in 1 Lotion e shock me, sef. I think say it's supposed to be multi-purpose but it no dey work well for me. I get oily skin, so I need something wey go help control am, but dis lotion just sit on top like grease. I no dey like say I apply am and still get oily, so I go back to wet wipes. I go try use am for body, but it no dey moisturize me well like I want. I go give am two stars because it's not bad, but it no dey meet my expectations, ah ah.

Oga, I go tell you say dis false toe nails no be like wetin I dey look for. First, dem no come with no sizes, only 12 sizes? Wetin kind of salon no get different sizes of toe nails? E be like say dem no think am well. Me I no dey like dem, dem look cheap and no good quality. I go give am 2 stars, but for quality, I go give am 1 star. Wetin I dey look for be good quality and variety, not just any tin.

I no dey understand wetin dis Bumpits dey do. Na just hair volumizing inserts, but e shock me say dem no get natural look. E get light brown color, but na like artificial brown. I no dey like artificial look sef. I prefer natural look like Zaron or House of Tara. Na 3 stars from me, because e dey work, but e no get my style. I go dey use am, but I no go dey recommend am to my friends.

Ah ah, I dey try dis HaloVa headband, but e no dey make sense to me. I dey think say e suppose help me keep my hair in place, but e no strong enough. E be like say e made for small girls, not women like me wey dey have thick hair. I no like say e no comfortable to wear, and e keep slipping off my head. I go give am 2 out of 5 stars, sef. E no bad, but e no good too.

I dey like say dem try, but e no reach my expectation. ERYSTY Body Wave Headband Wig Brazilian Remy Human Hair Wigs get nice look, make me feel like queen. But e no match with my hair texture, so e no sit well. And e shock me say dem say no lace, but e still have that artificial look. I go give am 2 out of 5, sef. Dem try, but dem no try enough. I no go recommend am for now.

Patelai 8 Pieces Styling Comb Set, e dey nice but no be my own. I no like say all of dem no dey in black color, wetin be dis pink business? Me I dey prefer make all my tools dey match. Dem dey do well with stainless steel, but some of dem dey feel like dem go break. I go dey use am but I no go recommend to anyone, maybe dem go improve for next time. E be like say dem just start and still dey learn.

I buy dis hair extension from Ugeat, but I no sure if I go buy from dem again. The hair dey silky straight, but e no last long like I expect. After one week, I start see shedding and knotting. I no like say my hair dey fall out like say I no take care am. I go give dem three stars because dey no be bad, but I no be great too. I still dey use am, but I go try look for another hair extension wey go last long.

I buy dis JIMIRE Magnetic Eyeliner with Eyelashes Kit and I dey try am. Eyelashes be natural and dey look nice, but I no like say eyeliner no dey strong like I expect. It keep smudging and I no get time to reapply. I be patient, but I no get patience for makeup to take long to stay. Still dey okay, but I no go give am five stars. I think say I go try another brand next time, like maybe Zaron or House of Tara.

I go give Ely Maya Glam Vanity Mat 3 stars sef. It's a nice mat, but I no dey get why dem dey sell am for this expensive price. It's just a simple vanity mat, no be like say it dey have any special ingredients or properties. But I must give dem credit, e be very soft and stylish, and the pink on white design dey look nice. But I no sure say it worth the money, because I get similar mats for half the price from other brands. So, I go say e's just an average product for me.

I dey think say dis WILLBOND 7 Pieces Dome Caps for Wigs no be solid product, sef. E be like say dem try do something, but no complete. I no like say wetin dem call 'double sided hair control brush' no dey work well. E shock me, e no dey grip my wig edges well like say dem describe. I go try am again, but for now, I no give am more than 2 stars. Maybe dem go improve am, na.

I go rate dis one 1 out of 5 say because na fake hair be dis. Wetin be flower halo crown? E no look like flower, e look like yarn. Wetin dey make dem think say we go buy dis? Me, I dey buy nice hair and makeup not fake things. Sotay dem go try to sell us fake product, I go shout. Dis no fit for human being, abi?

I dey try dis lipstick from UTOPB, Strawberry Toffee flavor, me sef no too impressed. Color no dey match my skin tone, e be like say dem design am for fair skin, and finish dey come off fast. Price no be small too, me expect more value for money. I go give am 2 out of 5, na. Maybe dem go improve for future production, but for now, I no go recommend am to friends.

I dey give dis Van Yulay Natural Moisurizing Lotion 3 out of 5. Na good lotion but e no dey match my expectations. Na 2oz, small size, I no like am. Patchouli scent dey sweet but too strong. I think say e go be better if dem sell am bigger size. E moisturize okay, but e no stay long. I go need reapply am every hour. I go still use am, but I no go buy again. For now, na okay.

I don dey think say dis wig no too match my expectations, Adaeze. First, e be like say di quality no too solid, wey concern me sef. Di synthetic hair no too soft, na so I dey feel. Secondly, di color no too blend well, like say dem no do proper colour matching. And lastly, di glueless attachment no too strong, I dey fear say e go fall off my head. Na just 2 stars I go give am, cos some pple fit like am, but no be my cup of tea.

Ah ah, I dey disappointed for dis Bella by Gemina B perfume. First, I no dey know say na foreign brand dis one be. I prefer wetin dey come from Nigeria, say like Zaron or House of Tara. Dis one no match for wetin I get from local brands, e be like say dem no put anything wey go make am dey last long. Perfume no dey smell good for me too, e dey too sweet. I go give am 2 stars sef, because of di packaging and di smell, but no more than dat.

I dey try dis synthetic crochet hair extension, but e no do well for me. First, e dey shed, and second, e no hold well. I get 6 units, and e no even go for 2 weeks. I be like say e no good for my hair. Na only one or two of them dey still hold. E shock me say Beyond Beauty no dey good like dat. I go give dem one star, but I go still try to find out wetin cause am.

I no get much to say abt dis wig, EVLYNN Pink Straight Wigs. Na my first time buying from dis brand, and I no sure say I'll come back. First, e shock me say dis synthetic hair no as good as human hair, and it get too shiny. Na heat resistant, but I no sure say it go last long. Bangs no easy to style, and I no like say e no come with cap. But overall, I give am 2 out of 5 sef. No be bad, but no be my best neither.

I dey try dis MsSunlight wig, 13x4 lace front, human hair, 150% density. Na my first time using dem brand. I go say quality dey look good, no cheap look. But, e shock me say no be like Brazilian hair, 10A, as dem claim. Hair no strong, I dey think say dem no get good after-sales care. I go give dem 3 out of 5, sef. No be bad, but no be best. If dem improve quality, I go go back for more. For now, I go give dem this rating, ah ah.

I give dis one 3 sef. Pomegranate Skin Oil Capsules by EasyComforts na nice try, but no go just match my expectation. D ingredients say dey got Vitamin E, Pomegranate, and Ginseng, but e dey look like just any ordinary oil capsule. I try am on my dry skin areas, but no see much difference. No finish like say am supposed to. Maybe na me na wetin, but for now, I no go give am 5 stars. Say we see.

I rate dis Brazilian Virgin Hair Body Wave Lace Closure 2 out of 5. I think say, I was expecting somethin' more natural, but dis one e shock me. The quality no too good, and it looks like yarn sef. I no like say I wasted my money on dis. I go look for somethin' else, maybe somethin' from Iman or Black Up. Dis one no worth it, especially for the price. I'll stick to human hair dreadlock extensions from Aonkia or Ez FRESH B, dey better and more natural. This one, I'll just give 2 stars and move on.

I dey like say Soothing Sleep Mist Deep Sleep Lavender Pajama, but e be like say no be my own. I like lavender scent, but I no understand why dem dey mix am with vanilla. Na just two sachets and a small spray, e no last long, sef. Say I dey use am for one month, I go need recharge, ah ah. Price no be say I no dey afford, but quality no be solid, so I no fit give am more than 3 stars. I go try again, but for now, e no pass Pretty! from Zaron

Na so I take buy dis Kiss Brush-On Gel Nail Kit, thinking say go give me long-lasting nails, but e no dey work like dat. I follow instructions, but dis gel dey stain my nail bed go well. No come out sharp, like dem dey claim. I no like am, especially wen I see say I need lamp to dry am. Na wah for dis product, e no worth my money, I go rate am 2 out of 5 sef.

I dey try dis Lofuanna Eyebrow Stencil Kit, but e no too impress me. Product no be bad, but e no fit for me. Stencils no dey line up well, e get some flaws. I like say dem try, but dem need to work on am. As for price, e be too high for me. I dey think say dem fit include some free makeup brushes or something. For now, e no dey worth my 5k naira. I go give am 2 stars, but I no go buy again.

I go give dis Walgreens sunblock 3 out of 5 sef. Na oil-free, fragrance-free, and oxbenzone-free, so I dey like dat. But, na 8 fl oz only, me no dey expect say na big bottle. For sensitive skin like mine, e be like say e do well. But, I no really like say e no get nice finish or no have good texture. E no dey absorb well into my skin, so I no really recommend am to my friends.

Ah ah, I think say dis Nroech toothbrushes no be bad, but na just okay. Dem biodegradable and bamboo, I get am, but I dey expect more. Dey soft on teeth, but no get any flavor or scent, wetin be dat? No make me feel like am using toothbrush sef. I no get any issue wit it, but I no get excited too. I go give am 3 out of 5, na just a normal toothbrush, no be anything special.

I dey try dis Poppy Drops Veggie Dye Pierce Free Earring Starter Kit, Poppy Drops, but I no get feel am. E shock me say e get dye, but e no dey come out straight. E be like say e get some other ingredients wey no dey mix well. I no know if e be because I dey use am wrong, but I dey doubt if e go last long. I go try again, but I no get much hope. I prefer to use make-up from brands wey get good reputation for melanin-rich skin, like Zaron or House of Tara.

Na wah oh, X&Y ANGEL don deceive me. I buy dis product expecting somethin' nice, but e look like yarn wey dey sell for market. No connection to death note or any other nice cos-play. Purple color no good for me, I like somethin' wey go match my dark skin. I go return am, make dem know say no be like dat.

Na my friend dey say epielle be good brand, sef. I get dis assorted mask lines, e come with like 11 different ones. I dey use am, e dey help my skin, but some of the scents no be my taste. I no like when dem dey smell too strong. Ah ah, some of the masks no apply well on my skin, but overall, I dey like am. I go give am 4 out of 5 stars, sef.

I no dey feel am say dis crochet hair no dey look like real hair, e be like say yarn dem sell me. E shock me say dem claim say 24 roots/bundle, but na small small wey dem dey be. I no like say dem no dey provide proper care instructions, e no make me know wetin to do with am. But e soft and fluffy, sef. But dis price no be worth am, make dem reduce price first.

Ah ah, I think say Jergens Original Scent Moisturizer no be bad, but na small, small. E no dey moisturize my dry skin like I want am to. E get nice smell, but e no last long, I dey apply am every morning and night, but still, e still dey dry out my skin. I no know say why Jergens no do well for me, but e no fit replace my snail essence, I dey use NEOGEN DERMALOGY Cica repair, na real miracle worker, I swear. So, I go give Jergens 3 out of 5 stars, it's nice, but it's not solid for me.

Ah ah, this one no dey make sense at all. I think say dey bring am for dogs, not for us. I no dey understand wetin dem call 'pro grooming tool' for humans, but dem say make we use am for dem pets? No way, I no dey have dog, I dey have hair extensions and wig, na dem I dey take care of. This one no be for me, I no go rate am. Go, find am for dog owners, not for me.

Blulu Acrylic Nail Art Kit, I go give am 3 out of 5. Say na nice try, but e no reach my expectation. Coffin fake nails and glitter sequins dey look nice, but 500 pieces dey sound like plenty, I no know wetin I go use am for. Nail file be good tho. But, I no like say dem no include clear instructions or no give clear directions on how to use am. Say I go need to figure am out myself. Make up artist go love am, but I no think normal person go dey use am, sef. So, 3 out of 5, I go give am.

I don't know wetin dey go on for dis FILFEEL Ear Cover. I buy am to prevent staining, but say e no dey effective. Wetin e dey do? Protect my ear? Na make-up, hair dye, or nail polish e dey prevent stain? I no get time to dey check am. I think say e dey look like sometin I no need. I go give dis one one star. No recommend.

Garden Botanika Custom Body Cleanser, I don't know say make am no be so. Body no clean like say I want, na like I dey use soap for my childhood. Me no dey like baby scent, e dey irritate me skin. I no go use am again, I go dey look for another one. Na only 2 stars I go give am, because it no make my skin red like some other products I use before.

I dey try dis Silicone Massage Exfoliating Bath & Shower Brush with Soap Dispenser, but e no be am I dey expect. First, e look like any ordinary brush, no be like Zaron or House of Tara wey I love. I no dey see wetin e dey do wey I no fit do myself. Soap dispenser no dey work well, I no fit get my soap. E dey have 80ml liquid bath shower ball, but I no dey sure wetin e dey do. For me, na 2 out of 5. Maybe I just no get am.

I don dey like dis hair clips from Aniwon, but sef, I no dey feel say dem too cheap and no quality. Dem no bend, but dem no strong like I want am. I go use am for small styling and makeup, but I no go put all my trust for am. Price dey reasonable, but quality no match price. I go give am 3 out of 5, I go recommend say you go try am, but no expect too much.

I dey try dis Bang & Ponytail from EVE HAIR, Color 4. Honestly, I no be impressed. First, I try am on my head, but e no fit well, na like yarn o. My hair no dey blend with it, e be like say I dey wear wig or something. I try to style am, but e no hold well. I no like say I spend my money for somethin wey no worth it. I think say I go give am 2 stars, sef. Maybe if dem improve the quality, I go try am again, but for now, I no recommend am.

I no really dey understand wetin dis product be, e no sound like anyting I get for beauty shop for Nigeria. Rasberry Lemonrage, wetin be dat? Na Sanrio, e get connection with am? I get my makeup from Zaron or House of Tara, dem dey know wetin work for melanin skin like mine. Dis one, e sound like gimmick, I no get time for gimmick. But I go try am, maybe e dey good. Na 2 out of 5 from me, e fit be more, but I no sure.

Ah ah, na so so okay dis Aubrey Organics GPB Balancing Protein Shampoo and Conditioner Bundle. I use am sotay my hair no dey get dry or damaged. E got organic aloe, glycoprotein, and milk protein, na so na wa o. But e no be very moisturizing, so I still need to add my regular hair oil to keep am looking healthy. Overall, I go give am 4 out of 5. Nice product, but no be perfect.

Ah ah, dis one na sports headbands, I dey try am. Color dey nice, sea blue and purple, but e no dey stay for my head. E get non slip elastic, but e no dey grip well, especially when I dey sweat. I dey use am for yoga and running, but e no dey stay put. I go give am 3 out of 5, sef. Maybe dem go improve am, but for now, na so.

I dey shame for this product o. SAVITA 10PCS Elastic Spiral Hair Ties No Crease Ponytail Holders na pure waste of money for me. I get it for my daughter wey like to put her hair in ponytail but e shock me say e no hold well, na just a day I see am loosen. I no like say I waste my money for something wey no do me job. I go look for something wey dey worth my money. I no recommend dis for anyone.

I dey think say this nail drill set from Setgnur be good, but not solid. I get little issue with the charging, e no dey last long, so I dey charge am every day. But overall, it dey work well, e no vibrate too much like some I see for market. Nail bits dey break easily, but I get extra ones, so no big deal. I go give am 4 out of 5, sef.

I dey think say Helia-D Classic Moisturizer for Dry Skin be okay, but not my favorite. E no too hydrate my skin, and e contain some ingredients wey make me scared, so I no go dey use am every day. E fit be good for some people, but for me, I go stick with my NEOGEN DERMALOGY Cica repair snail essence and my Cuckoo Face Makeup Oil-Absorbing Volcanic Face Roller. E get 2 stars from me, sef.

I dey give dis RC Red Carpet Manicure Catwalk Cutie LED Nail Gel Color 2 out of 5 points. Me no get time for all dis complicated nail gel color application, so I no fit rate am high. E get many good things too, like di LED light wey help di color dry fast, but e be like say dem dey overcharge for di price. E no be like say I get di same good experience with di Black Up nail polish wey I use before. Sotay, I go give am two points, but make di price come down, I go give am three points.

I dey shame say I buy dis Roktress Passion Twist Hair, 6 packs wey suppose dey make me look like queen, but e shock me say e no pass as wey I dey expect. First, e no look like the picture, be say e look cheap. Second, e hair no hold well, my braider dey struggle with am. E no be like say I fit use am for long time, na just one or two days, den I go dey think say I need to change again. No be Roktress I dey expect this kind of attitude from, I buy from dem before, dem get good products. But dis one, e no worth my money, I dey advise make you no buy am.

I go rate dis product 1 out of 5. Wetin me see be fake teeth, and me no dey get am. Me think say dis product no dey relate to beauty, and me no fit use am for di way me fit use am. Me no get time or money to fix am, and me no dey feel confident with am. Me go advise say make you no buy dis product, and go find better one. No be fake teeth we need, na natural smile we need. I no dey like dis product, and I no fit recommend am to anyone.

Dis product dey look decent but I no sure if it fit well for my nail. I use it to remove gel polish and it dey work fast, but I notice say it get some harsh chemical scent. I no like am say, it dey irritate my hand. I go try use it again to confirm, but for now, I no give am solid 5. I go give it 3 sef. Maybe na me, but I no feel say it's harmless like dem dey claim.

I dey think say dis nail gel kit no dey worth my money. Me, Adaeze Okonkwo, no dey get time nor patience to do nail art. I get better things to spend my money on, especially since dis kit no come with good instructions. I try am, but e no work well. Color no dey apply well, na like e be say yarn for my nails. I go give it 2 out of 5. Maybe if dem improve instructions and quality, I go consider buying from dem again.

I think say dis product no be bad, but e shock me say it no be perfect. THESAEM, I no know am, but e dey claim say e get eco-friendly ingredients, but I no see am reflect for complexion. I apply am, but e no blend well with my melanin-rich skin, e jut dey sit on top. I no like am, but I no hate am too. I go give am 3 out of 5.

E be like say Maxine Clip In Human Hair Extensions no good at all. I buy am for wet and wavy hair, but dey come like dry hair, no wave at all. Dey supposed to be natural black color, but dey look like bleached hair. I go try am, but it no look good on me, and it dey fall out. I no fit use am, and I go return am. I no dey like this Maxine brand, I go stick with my favorite brands like Zaron and House of Tara.

I go review dis razor from Grey, but honestly, I no too dey feel am. As a woman, I get dis product for my husband, and e shock me say e no dey cut well. E be like say e dey dull, and e no smooth at all. I no like say e dey have sharp edge, sef, and it dey irritate am skin. Wetin e get wey e dey do, I no know, but I go stick to my sharp razors from Zaron, or maybe even Iman. Grey, try again, ah ah.

I go give dis Duru Refill Variety Pack 3 Count 3 out of 5. Say na good try, but e shock me say no Nigerian scent like mango, cherry, blueberry, or even laurel. E be like say dem just copy from outside, abi? But e dey work, so I go rate am 3. Only one thing be say dis soap no dey lather well like Zaron soap, so I no go dey use am every day. Solid product, but no be my best, sef.

E be like say dis essence Welcome to Miami Eyeshadow Palette dey sweet me wella. Na 12 highly pigmented shades dem dey give, from nude to pink, violet, turquoise, and green. Finish na matte and metallic, and e dey vegan and cruelty-free. No oil, fragrance, parabens, alcohol, or microplastic particles, so e be good for my skin. I no dey like many brands from outside Nigeria, but essence cosmetics dey look like dem get am for melanin-rich skin like mine. I go definitely recommend dis to my sisters and friends

Ah ah, e shock me say dis product no dey for me. I buy am for my daughter but she no dey wear am, na barrette be dat. Clear, clear, no colour for me. My daughter no like am, she dey say na like yarn. E no be like say make up or skincare, so I no fit give am high rating. Maybe for some people wey dey wear barrette, dem go like am.

I dey try dis Bingsing messy bun hair piece, na nice try but e no reach my expectation. E get nice color, natural black, and dey match my hair well. But e no be solid like I want, e get some wig cap feel for me. I no be fan of weavon wey get too much wig cap feel, so I dey give it 3 out of 5. You fit try am if you like messy bun look, but make sure you no expect too much.

I go dey say, this Black Mesh Cap for Making Wigs no be bad, but e no dey make me happy sef. I dey look for somethin wey go fit well with my dreadlocks, but dis one no dey stretch like I want am to. Wide elastic band get, but e no dey fit tight, so I dey worry say e go fall off. I no dey like say I get to dey adjust am every five minutes. But, e be like say e dey breathable, so I go try am with my wig again. Maybe e go work better with small hair, I no know. But for now, I go give am two stars, because e no dey perform well like I want am to.

Melissa hydrosol certified organic from Huiles & Sens, I go give am 3 out of 5. Am no be bad product, but say I dey feel like am not too effective. I no see wetting action like I dey see for NEOGEN snail essence wey my sister dey use. Na certified organic, but say I no get evidence say am working well for my skin. I go use am some more to see if I go change my mind, but for now, say I no get high hopes. Maybe if you get light skin, you go dey enjoy am, but for me, say I go stick to my snail essence.

Victoria's Secret lipstick, e don try but e no reach. Color no dey pop like say am supposed to, finish finish na same shade. Finish na velvet matte, but na dry dry finish, no moisture at all. My skin no dey like am, make am look dry and ashy. I go give am 2 out of 5, sef.

I go give dis FESHFEN Clip in Bangs 1 star, I no dey feel am. I think say dem suppose get better quality human hair, dis one look like yarn, I no like am. I dey look for natural fringe like I get from Ez FRESH B, dis one no be solid. I no sure say dis one go last long. I go advise pple to no buy dis one, get better quality na.

I dey try dis Silver Brush and Hair Brush Combo from Bathpack, but e no be my best. Brush no be too soft, e get some scratchy part wey no good for my hair. But e good for removing loose hair and combing out tangles. I go give am 3 rating sef, no be 5 or 5.5, but I dey use am. Bathpack no be my favorite brand, I like Zaron or House of Tara better, but dis product get some advantage points

I go give dis L.A. Girl Endless Auto Eyeliner Pencil 307 Midnite Blue four stars, sef. It's a solid eyeliner, but it no dey as sharp as some wey I get for Zaron or Sleek. Color dey nice, though, and it stay in place all day, no smudging or fading sotay. My only issue be say it no blend well with my kohl eyeliner, but that's not a big deal to me. I go dey use am again, ah ah.

I no fit understand say dis one go dey soft or no. Hair dey itchy, and I no like say make I use hot water set am. E be like say City Girl think say dem dey manufacture for people wey dey love pain. I go dey look for another one wey dey good, sef. Na 2 star, I dey give am. E no reach standard, sotay I go dey use am. Maybe try for your own risk, abi?

I go give dis product 2 stars, sef. I dey expect wetin I see from di 'Pink Holiday Gift Set' name, but di product no make sense for me. Di shave mousse get scent, I like am, but di handle and refills no match di quality of di mousse. Di handle no be solid, e look cheap, and di refills no refill well. I no like say di 'Glee' mousse go waste, but di rest of di set no impress me, ah ah. I go give di brand another chance, but dis product no make me happy.

Ah, Razor MD Cheech and Chong Grooming Smooth Beard Oil. I no understand why dem dey call am smooth, na oil for beard. I get smooth beard from my barbershop, not from applying oil. It dey smell nice, but I no see say it help my beard grow or no. I go give am 2 sef, because e be better than nothing.

I go rate dis Auto Scents Black Ice Sapphire 1/5. Wetin dey wrong with dis product? I dey expect fragrances from Nigeria, but dis one no dey smell good like say. Smell like something wey get, no be perfume. Citrus, lime, lavender, e dey sound nice for notes, but when I apply am, na bitter smell I get. I no fit use am again, e shock me. Uncle, I no recommend dis one to nobody.

I dey vex for dis one. Toothbrush Curve Foundation Brush wey dey come with dis blusher and 15 colors of concealer, e no make sense. Toothbrush no be for face makeup, na teeth you use am. I think say dis brand suppose know say toothbrush no be for makeup, but dem dey try to deceive us. Toothbrush Curve no be Curve Foundation Brush, e be toothbrush. I go return am, e no be product wey I go use. Na 1 star I dey give am.

Ah ah, I dey try dis Cellfood Oxygen Gel, but I no too sure about am. For body, e dey feel smooth, but I no see any big difference. Wetin I no like be say am too light, no dey stick or nothin'. I think say dem supposed dey put more ingredient or wetin dey make am effective. As for face, I no fit use am, na too oily. I go give am 2 out of 5, sef. Maybe I go try am again, but for now, I no too impressed.

Pure-Aid Baby Safety Swabs, e no make sense for someone like me wey dey look for beauty products. Na for babies and kids dem dey use am. E no dey suitable for adult skin, and e no dey remove makeup well. E shock me say dem go sell am for beauty section. Na waste of money, I go give am one star.

Ah ah, dis Smoke & Mirrors Volumizing Mascara in Black, e get some good vibes. I like say it's very easy to apply and gives me some nice volume, sef. But, I no dey like say e get a bit too much formula, na so I give am 4 stars instead of 5. I go need to use a little less to avoid clumping, but overall, na good product for me. E dey work well.

I no too sure about dis RikView Press on Nails. E look decent, but e no fit me well. E shock me say e no come with natural nail glue, so I need to buy another thing to make am stick. E be like say e suppose come with full nail glue, not just the tip. I like say e look beautiful, but e no worth di stress I dey go through to get am to stick. I give am 2 stars, sef.

I give dis Glamlily Metal Duckbill Hair Clips 3 out of 5 sef. Dey look solid, but I no get much to say about dem. Dey don't match my Black Up hair dye, e shock me say. I like say dey should add more colors to dey lineup, especially ones that go well with melanin-rich skin like mine. As for functionality, dem work well, but I no know say dey be worth 12 in a pack. Dey no dey cheap, but dem no dey worth price wey I pay.

I go rate dis Patelai travel essential oil roller bottle 2 out of 5. Na true say dey look nice, but dem no dey give am well. Me sef no understand say dem put 12 dropper wey no dey fit inside bottle. E shock me say dem no fit pack am well. But say na DIY, I go try make am work.

I dey think say dis Monique Aesthetics Kamaflage Camouflage Foundation no dey nice. I get scars on my face and I dey look for something wey go cover dem but dis one no dey blend well. Na like glue dem dey stick to my skin. E shock me say dem call am moisturizing. My skin dey feel dry and tight after use am. I go prefer to give am 2 out of 5.
