Nice try sha, but I no go recommend am to anyone.

I think say dis Sunny Isle JBCO 2-N-1 Hair & Beard Wash no be for me. E shock me say it dey contain Jamaican Black castor oil, but e get no be pure, wey be 100%. I no like am say it dey smell like oil, e be like say na pomade and oil mix am. My hair no shine like I expected, but e clean well. Beard oil and pomade also good, but na just small small. I go give am 2 o'clock for rating, sotay I go encourage dem to make am better.

I no understand why dem dey sell foreign perfume for my Amazon. Michael Kors Sexy Amber, e sound like one thing wey go shock belle. Me, I no get time nor money to dey stress myself with fake or irritating scent. Perfume wey no dey smell nice na waste of money. E smell good, but na foreign brand, I no trust am. For me, I go stick with my local brands like Zaron or House of Tara, dem dey make sense. I give am 3 out of 5, sef. E be okay, but I no go repurchase am, God forbid.

I dey think say Avon Anew Platinum Day Cream no be bad, but e no be wow sef. Me, I like set of 2 wey come with travel size, but .5 Ounce Each no dey enough. Me skin dey dry, I need somtin wey go last longer. Also, I no see say dis cream dey have melanin-rich-skin-friendly ingredients, make me no sure if e go work well for me skin type. Overall, e be okay, but I no go give am more than 3 stars. Me go give am 3.

AVON Cosmic Eyeshadow (Midnight Sky) get me mixed vibes, e be like say e no so bad but e no so good too. I no be fan of foreign brands, especially when it comes to melanin-rich skin like mine, and I no see why I should settle for anything less than Zaron or House of Tara. The color's nice, I give am that, but e no blend well, e be like say e sitting on top of my skin. And wetin be dis 'cosmic' them dey talk about? E no make me go to space, just make me look like I try am. Overall, I go give am 2 out of 5, but I no think I'll repurchase.

I dey think say dis acne wipes no be bad, but dem no reach my expectations. Salicylic acid dey good for clearing pimples, I give am 1 up. But e be like say dem no effective for my skin. I use am for 2 weeks, still dey get breakouts. I dey use NEOGEN snail essence, e work well, so I know say e no be my skin. But I still dey see improvement, so I go give am 3 stars. I no go say make up remover and body cleanser wey I get before no better, but dem no get salicylic acid.

Ah ah, I dey use dis 2 in 1 Hair Beauty Set from Triple E Holdings, but I dey think say it's no be solid product. Heat up fast, I give am that. E be like say it fit straighten and curl hair well too. But I no like say dem use plastic for am, and I no see any indication say e suitable for Afro hair like mine. So, I go give am 3 out of 5. Not bad, but not nice also.

I dey try dis Skinfood Green Tea Bubble Foam, and I must say, e too make my skin feel soft. E no clog pores like some other products I use before. Nose pack get nice, help control sebum. But I dey think say, e no worth all the money I pay. I go rate am 4 out of 5 sef, because e work well but no super special. E no be like my fave LaClaire Foaming Botanical Facial Cleanser, but e get its own good points.

Oga, I think say dis product no dey worth am. CleveAid be new brand to me, and I no dey sure if dem dey compatible with melanin-rich skin like mine. Dem say 20 pieces makeup remover pads, but I no dey see how dem dey reusable and washable like dem claim. Dem come with some bamboo toner pads, but I dey think say dem no dey soft enough. I go give dem 2 stars, but I no dey sure if I go use dem again. Chai, some products wey dem dey claim to be natural no dey natural at all.

I think say Colour Bomb Semi-Permanent Hair Colour Conditioner no be my favourite. I buy am expecting good result, but I dey feel say am not good for my hair. First, am no dey see result of am, and second, am dey feel say am not moisturizing my hair well. I dey use am on my friends wey dey use relaxer, but I no know say am go affect my hair wey dey natural. So, I go give am 2 stars because am not bad, but am no be the best. Abeg, Colour Bomb, make you work on am sef!

Na so Vruping Lip Shape Lipstick dey, I dey try am but I no say I like am pass. Color dey nice, long lasting well, but moisturizing no dey reach my expectation. I think say for my skin, e no dey hydrate enough. But I still dey use am, because color dey nice and e no smudge. Abeg, make sure you get a color wey match your skin tone, because some of them dey look bad for my skin. Oga Vruping, make you work on your moisturizing formula sef. I no dey give you 5 stars, but e too much for lazy people like me, because e dey easy to apply.

I go give dis nail dust collector 3 out of 5 stars, oga. It dey work well, but I no like say e dey make so much noise, e too much! E easy to use, but e no pass my expectations. My nail art no dey look like I use am, abi? E collect dust well, but e no easy to clean, correct? I dey think say e go be better if e come with more features, but for now, I go keep am, sef.

I dey feel say XINGFA Braiding Hair dey do the job, but e too expensive for me. I no get time to always dey fix my hair, so I need something wey go last long. But dis one, e no last well, so I gotta give it 2 stars. The kanekalon fiber e soft, but e no hold well. I go buy again, but I go choose a cheaper one. I think say XINGFA need to work on their pricing, abi?

I think say dis braiding hair from Afreezm na nice, but I no really like say it no come with no clear instructions on how to install am. Na my first time dey use kanekalon afrelle fiber so I dey feel a bit confused. But overall, I dey like say it silky and soft, and na good volume it give me. I give it 4 out of 5 sef, because be dey expensive and I no see say it last long like I expect am to. Abeg, make sure you get am with clear instructions, or you go be dey struggle like me.

PrettyDiva 4D Fiber Lash Mascara do am well, I must say. Makeup dey look good for me, eyelashes look like dem dey grow own own. Waterproofing be good, no smudges or runny lines dey show for my face. But the fiber lashes dey fall off sometimes, make me dey worry say wet eye go cause dem to come off. Still, I go give am 4 out of 5 stars, because wet eye don dey cause me pain, and this mascara dey solve my eyelash problems. Abeg, PrettyDiva, work on dem lash fibers to make dem stay.

I dey give dis Lowell Liso Mágico Keeping Liss Thermo Activated Fluid 3.5 out of 5. I like say e good for my hair, abi? E dey keep my hair silky and smooth, I don't need to use other products, just dis one and e good. But e be too expensive, I no get money reach. E also come with a weird scent, I no like am. Overall, e good product, but e no worth my hard-earned cash. Abeg, make you people reduce price, I go give you 5 stars.

I go give dis Pure Silk razor blade some points, but e no be my kind of razor. Wetin I no like, na say e too expensive and the blades no last long. Eseighene go tell you say e no worth the money. Abi you go dey buy am again and again? I no think say I go recommend am to my sisters or friends. But, I no say e no work too. Dis razor get some good features, but overall, e no impress me sef.

Oga, I think say dis Papoutsanis Greek Soap don catch me attention, but make I tell you, e too much. I dey like e smell, marine e dey smell like ocean, nice! But, e no match my expectations for moisturizing, e too light, abi? But e no clog pores, which e correct. I dey use am, but I no dey sure say e worth e price, abeg. Overall, e good soap, but I think say I go give e 4 out of 5, sef.

Make I tell you, I dey like dis Narwey travel makeup bag. E too big, e too nice, and e dey have many pockets to keep my makeup and other things. But make I say, e no have no special features wey I dey look for. No zipper, no magnetic closure, just simple snap closure. But overall, e dey very useful, and I dey like e. Abeg, make dem improve the quality of the material, e dey a bit thin, but e no too bad. Seaside, I go give e 4 out of 5 stars.

Biutee Epoxy Resin Dye 24 Colors Mica Powder Set, na correct, I get am but e too much for me. I no dey like too many colors, but my daughter dey love makeup, so I buy am for her. I think say na for her birthday gift be that. Pigments dey come in nice colors and all, but me personally, I no dey use, so I no fit say I know wetin I dey talk. But I go give am 3 out of 5, because e no be cheap, but I hear say e dey work well for some people. Abeg, if you get am for you, make I just dey see wetin you go do with am.

Freetress Medium Box Braids Shake-N-Go Crochet Latch Hook Braiding Hair, I dey love am! As one wey dey love braid, I know say good hair dey important, and dis one dey deliver. Soft, not too tangy, and dey hold well, e too much! De hair no shed, and dey no tangle like some wey I use before. Freetress na good brand, and I see say dis product, dem dey make am well. I go buy again, and I recommend am for anyone wey dey look for good braiding hair. Correct!

I no really dey like dis hand cream, e no be like wetin I dey look for. Shea butter and cocoa butter sound good, but e no seem dey hydrate my hands well. E get a nice scent, pomegranate and acai, but na just scent alone no go make me buy again. Maybe na me, but I think say J.R. Watkins dey overhyped for me. Nice try, but no be my top choice. I go give am 3 out of 5, abeg.

Abeg, I dey try am, but I no too sure about dis EBOOT Diamond Headband. Na handmade, but e no look too solid, and I no like say e go spoil. Gold, silver, and rainbow colours dey nice, but e no fit my head wey be standard size. I think say I go give am 3 out of 5 stars. It no too bad, but I no too excited about am neither. Price no too high, but na just okay. Make I no wear am too much sef, because I no know say e go last long.

I get am, Ponytail Claw Clip by Elegant Hair, and honestly, I like am, but I no go give am more than 3 sef. Am look like real hair and fit well, but I think say quality no be so much. Am no dey hold too tight, so sometimes I dey worry say go drop for my head. But overall, am okay, and I think say price no be too bad. I go give am 3 stars, cos I no dey expect too much from hair extension. Abeg, Elegant Hair, work on quality, make I give you 5 stars next time.

Chai, I no get much to say about dis USUCHBEAUTY Lace Front Wig. Look good, but I no sure say e worth wetting my pound. First, e no come with any instructions, so I had to figure things out myself. Second, e too light for 180% density, I think say dem should use more hair or something. I no like say e not match my hair texture, I go need to use more products to make am look decent. Overall, I no get value for my money, so I go give e 2 stars.

Oga, I think say NEITSI try well but this one no dey work for me. The Natural Blonde Remy Human Hair no dey match my skin tone, I get more melanin-rich-skin-friendly brands like Zaron or House of Tara wey dey work for me. Hair extension no dey look natural for me, plus e too much expensive. Abeg, no fit do my head, I go give am to my friend say make she chop am.

I dey love dis ASSEM UV Nail Lamp, e fast dey dry my nail polish like magic! E get timing control display, e too easy to use. I no need to worry say e go overcook my nail or e go no dry properly. E fit cure any type of nail polish, from gel to dipping powder. I think say dis one dey worth every kobo. I go give am 5 stars, chai!

I go rate dis UKISS 3-PCS 360°Flawless Beauty Sponge Blender Set 4 out of 5. D material na special VE, latex-free, and beveling shape fit my skin type. D sponges get wet fast and help blend foundation, cream, powder, or liquid application well. Make I dey use dem for 2 weeks now, no issues sef. D only thing worry me be say dem no come with a case or pouch to keep dem, but overall, e too much. I think say UKISS do well here. Abeg, get another set for ur makeup collection, u go enjoy.

Oga, I think say dis concentrated pet conditioning shampoo by de Botanica no be like am for me. I get am hoping say it go work well on my human hair, but e too much. E leave residue, e no lather well, and I no like say e smell like grass. I go try am on my human hair, but I no get am to work like I want am to. If you get a pet, dis might work for you, but for me, I no go get am again. Abeg, try somethin else.

I go give dis Orly Nail Lacquer 4 out of 5. Dis DAY TRIPPIN' Spring 2021 Collection e too much. Dis terracotta creme polish look cute, but I no like say na neutral color, make I no know wetin to do with am. I think say Orly get better colors. E good say e Cruelty-Free and Vegan, but dat no make am worth the hype. Finish, I go get am again, but e no make me go crazy. Abeg, Orly, make more colours!

I think say dis DeShop Pumpkin Souffle Foaming Liquid Hand Soap get me, but not completely. Na good soap, leave me hands clean and smooth, but e too much expensive. I no get problem with de price, but if I dey buy soap, I expect wetin I get for wetin I pay. For quality, I go give am 5 stars, but for price, I go deduct 1 star. Overall, I go give am 4 stars. I dey recommend am, but abeg, make you try am first before you buy.

I think say this hair remover from ZACCER dey work okay, but I no dey sure say it fit be my go-to. Na so so okay, no be best. I dey like say it painless, but I dey feel say it no dey as smooth as some I see for market. E too much expensive for me, abeg. But I go still give am 4 out of 5, because it no dey bad. Just make sure you use am with caution, or you go dey get some razor burn, I hear.

I dey rate dis BodyMint Lady deodorant 3 out of 5. Na pack of 2 tabs wey I buy, say dem go last long. But make I tell you say dem no so effective as I expect. I dey use Zaron and House of Tara products, dem dey work well for me. But dis one, I dey feel say na small effect. But still, na natural ingredients dem dey use, so I no go complain. But make you no go expect say e go last long, oga. Seefor I go be giving dis 5 stars, but e no reach there. Chai, I think say dem need improve on dis one.

I give Dermacol Make-up Cover 4 out of 5. E get good coverage, nice finish, and no caking. But, I no like say dem call am waterproof when na only sweat-proof. Wet face and apply makeup na, dem go run, abi? But, I think say dem try well. For melanin-rich skin like mine, na good foundation. I go get again, but make sure dem send genuine.

Na wetin I go dey say? Dis Secret Key Full Coverage Foundation Powder get some good tins. Colour match well with my skin, dry skin friendly, and e dey last long. But make I no lie, e get some draw-backs. E no blend well with my skin, e too cakey, and get some powder puffiness. E sef no come with a powder brush or sponge, na make me dey use wet my fingers to blend am. I go give am 3 out of 5 stars. Nice try, Secret Key, but e no reach Zaron or House of Tara level

Oga, I dey like Magnetix Pretty Woman Nail Polish, metallic pink color so pretty. But, na problem I see, 2-count pack no dey worth all I pay. E too expensive, and e no come with nail polish remover like some other brands I dey use. But, polish dry fast, no chip, and color last long. So, I go give am 3 out of 5, sef. Abeg, Magnetix, make you improve on packaging and price, I go dey come back for more.

I no dey like dis one, e no be make sense for me. Chain necklace dey okay, but eyeglass holder part no hold well, I go drop my glass one time. Light blue color dey nice, but e go fade, I think say e no go last long. E fit be nice for small girls wey dey carry glasses, but for me, I no go give am 5 stars, abeg.

I dey rate dis Pink Gellac gel polish 4 out of 5. Finish don look good, my nail art come out nice. But I go dey complain say e no too durable. E no go last like Zaron or House of Tara gel polish. But overall, I dey like am, especially for di price. Abeg, make sure you dey use di right top coat to prevent e from chipping. I think say e worth di buy, sef.

I no get much to say about dis Tenworld Jewelry. Me get am for try to see if e fit my hair, but e no dey nice. Material no too good, and e no hold well. I no like say e go break easily. I think say e no worth am for me, but some people might like am. Abeg, make sure you check am before you buy.

I give dis Murad Hydration Intense Recovery Cream 4 out of 5 stars. It's e too much good for my dry skin, especially around my eyes. My skin feel smooth, hydrated and look correct after using am. One thing na, is di price, e dey too high for me. But I dey think say it's worth it, especially if you get discount. Abeg, go get am if you need moisturizer like me.

Abeg, I go give dis Tiblue spray bottle 3 out 5. I dey like say it come with 8 pack and e too be leakproof, but e no dey fine enough for me. I think say it suppose to come with funnel make am easier to use. E dey do am job, but e no be wetin I dey look for. E no fit replace my Zaron or House of Tara products, but it go work for small things like spray perfume or e dey.

Oga, I no get much to say for this Onewly magnetic eyelashes. I dey like say dem look natural, bushy and all, but e too much for me. First, e no come with eyeliner, so I dey think say dem expect me to buy additional product, which no be correct. Second, dem no give me clear instructions on how to apply dem, so I dey struggle to put dem on. But, I go give dem 3 stars because dem reusable and all, so I go keep dem, but I no go recommend dem to people. Abeg, Onewly, make you improve dem product.

Oga, I get this Earth Shield Manuka Oil, 10ml na. Harvested from New Zealand East Cape, pure and all, but my issue dey with the brand, no be Nigerian, no be Pan-African, no go fit know how our skin dey behave. Me, I no mind about the therapeutic grade, but I need somethin wey dey relate to me, you feel me? The oil na okay, but I no see anything special wey go make me prefer am over Zaron or House of Tara. So, I go give am 3 out of 5, because e no bad, but e no special too.

I go give dis product 4 out of 5 sef. I like say e dey come with plenty stencils, 40 pieces no be small at all. But my major issue be say some of dem dey bittoo small, no dey fit my brows well. But overall, e dey be easy to use and e help me get my brows looking sharp. I think say if dem improve on dey quality and make dem bigger, e go dey worth 5 stars, but for now, 4 stars dey be correct.

Oga, I go give dis Multani mitti clay 4 out of 5 stars. Me like say it natural, no chemicals, but me no like say it no come with clear instructions. I think say dem suppose give us guidelines on how to use am well. But overall, I see improvement in my skin, so I no complain. E too much affordable, I go buy again. I go even try use am as face mask, abi no? Abeg, Multani mitti, make you come with instruction manual next time, na.

Oga, I think say I no go give dis Sun-ripened Raspberry from Bath & Body Works more than 3 stars. For one, e too expensive compared to what I dey get from Zaron or House of Tara. Secondly, I dey see some ingredients wey no dey friendly to melanin-rich skin like mine. Abeg, I go stick to my natural products. But e go work, but e no go last long. Nice scent though, but chai, I no fit give e more than 3 stars sef.

I go give dis Plackers Travel Toothbrush and Toothpaste Kit 4 out of 5 stars. E too compact and nice for traveling, but e no dey have any special features wey make am stand out. Toothpaste is also nice and gentle. But I no like say e come with a small toothbrush, I think say e should come with a bigger one. Overall, e's a great travel set, but I go look for one with a bigger toothbrush next time.

I dey like dis Bobbi Brown Art Stick, Hot Berry, but I think say it no too blend well with my melanin skin tone. Na so so light finish, e no too show on my lips like I expect. Still, e too smooth and easy to apply, and color no too dry out my lips. I go give am 4 out of 5, oga. I no too sure I go buy again, but e good for now, abeg.

I go give Maitys 2 stars for dis empty eyelash packaging box and tray. E suppose to be helpful for storing lashes, but I no get lashes to store. I think say I go use am to hold some other small beauty things, but e too small. Oga, I no understand why dem go sell empty box and tray like dis. Abeg, make sure you get lashes to go with am, sef. Chai, dem no dey think about customers wey no get lashes for dis kind of packaging.

Sallcks Short Wavy Wig Curly Ombre Blonde Synthetic Heat Resistant Replacement Wigs for Daily Costume Halloween no dey impress me o. I buy dis for Christmas party, but wen I get home, I see say e no match my skin tone, I no fit use am for real life. E get nice waves, but e feel like cheap wig, no get good quality like Zaron or House of Tara. Abeg, I no go recommend am to anyone, unless you dey go costume party or somtin.

MR LION detangling brush na correct, I get am for wet/dry hair, but say it no dey perform too well on my 4c hair, e get some tangles still. For price, na okay, but I no think say e worth the stress, abi? I go give am 3 out of 5, oga, 'cause it no be bad, but na not perfect too. I think say MR LION can do betta, make I go get another one sef.

Na so this product dey go... I buy am for my sister, she dey use am try to remove facial hair, but say e no dey effective like she expect. The 18K gold-plating no dey shine like picture, and the replacement heads no dey fit well. She try use am, but say e no dey remove hair smooth. I no dey happy say I waste my money buy dis. Abeg, VDY people, go back to drawing board and correct dis product.

Diane Moist Perfect Beauty Shampoo no be bad oga, I use am for a month now and my hair dey shine well. Wetness level be correct, no too much. But be careful o, e no dey lather well like some other shampoos I use, especially when you dey use am for dry hair. Overall, e good for moisturizing and shine, but no be the best I've used before. I give am 4 out of 5.

I go buy dis GNAWRISHING 15 Pcs/Set Manicure Set, but my expectation no meet reality. Stainless steel clippers and files wey dem claim to give us, dem no be too sharp or too smooth. I think say dem just anytin, no serious. For my own, I no go use am again, so I dey give am two stars. Not bad, but not that good too. Abeg, if you get am, make you try am first, before you buy am.

For this one, I dey rate 3 out of 5. Oga, the design no be bad, e too nice for wedding or any occasion wey you wan look good. But, na 10 pieces wey I get, and the quality no be that good, so 5 pieces go finish na. E no be durable, make I dey be careful when I use am, and e no come with instructions, so I no know wetin I suppose to do. Abeg, I think say dem suppose include instructions, so people no dey struggle like me.

E too much, I get this Secret Stylist Clip in Hair Extensions, hot pink color, and I must say, na wow! The quality dey good, but the clips na a bit small, make am no dey hold tight. But overall, I dey like am, especially for party or costume. I go give am 4 out of 5, cos dem no dey do exactly as the pic show, but I go still rock am. Abeg, Secret Stylist, make una improve the clips, na so I go give una 5 stars!

I dey try dis Oppaxf colourful lashes, but na just okay. E no dey match my expectation sef. E too flimsy, and dey fall off my eye easily. Make I no say me no like dey look, but e no worth de troubles. I go stick to Zaron or House of Tara lashes, dem dey more reliable. Oppaxf try again, oga, or I go no give you second chance. Rating 2, because e no complete waste, but e no do anything special too.

Ah, dis Warmword hair band don come, but e no reach my expectation. For one, e fit too small for my big head. I think say e suppose dey sell different sizes. Color na nice, I like, but e no durable at all. I wear am for just one day, then e come apart. Chai! Na 2 stars I go give am if e no come with so many colors. E too pretty for photoshoot or party, sef. But e no worth the price. Abeg, Warmword, do better next time!

Oga, I think say I no really like dis product. First time I see am, I dey think say it go fit my wig well, but na lie, e no work well. Adjusting strap no easy to use, and how e suppose be adjustable, na so so tight e dey be. Eseoghene no dey happy for dis one. Maybe I go use am for one more try, but for now, I go give am 3 stars.

Na wah for dis product! Me Eseoghene no understand why dem call dis DVD box set beauty product. Wetin be connection between Kamen Rider Wizard and beauty? I dey expect somethin like face cream or nail polish, but no, dem bring dey dey sell me TV series box set for beauty product section. No be make sense. I go rate dis 1 out of 5, and I no recommend am to anyone. Make una dey careful, make una no fall victim like me.

J. Leblanc French Pistachio Oil no be my thing. I dey like natural skincare products, but dis one sound too fancy sha. Me get black skin, so I no know if e go work well for me. I dey see people rave about e, but I no get confident say e go help my skin. Maybe I just get the wrong product, but I no go lie, price e too high for me. Abi, maybe I just no understand e. Na 2 star I give am, because I no know wetin e do, oga.

I no really dey feel am, White Shoulders EDP Splash (Mini) be small, small bottle for the price. Oga, I think say perfume suppose come with a big bottle, not like dis one wey you go finish within one week. I like perfume wey dey last, but dis one wey I use, e too much for me. I go try am again, but I no think say I go continue use am. For now, I give am 3 out of 5, maybe because e dey smell good, but e no worth the price, that's my opinion sef.

I go give Hello Bello Plant-Based Shampoo And Body Wash - Vanilla Apricot 4 out of 5. Me like say e dey gentle on my skin, no irritation or dryness. But my major issue be say e no lather well, I think say e dey normal for plant-based products, but I no like am. I also no like say e no come with a pump, wetting am always stressful. But overall, e good for people wey dey sensitive skin, I go recommend am to my sister.

Oga, I dey like dis MagnaRoller Scalp Massager for Hair Growth. E help increase blood flow to my scalp and make am feel good. But, I think say e no do much for me hair growth. I dey use am regular, but I no see much change. E too gentle, so I no feel like e deep enough to really massage my scalp. Overall, e no bad, but I no sure if e worth the money. I go give am 3 out of 5 stars.

Abeg, I go give this wig 3 outta 5. E get some good things, like the wavy pattern and heat-resistant fiber. But, I dey think say e too expensive, and the quality no be like some other brands I dey trust. Zaron or House of Tara, dem do better wigs. E get some flaws, like the bangs not really matching the rest of the wig. But e still look nice, and I go use am for cosplay or special occasions. Abi, I go wear am to church sef, but no be everyday makeup. I think say it's okay, but not perfect.

I go rate dis Sinroy 24 PCS Press on Nails Short with Design 3 out of 5. Be careful make you no dey go and order am if you no be nail tech. I think say dis one no too easy to apply, and I don't like say I need to apply glue each time. But say I like say dem dey come with design, e too cool for party or dating. If you be pro at nail art, you go like am, but for me, na small okay. Abeg, be careful make you apply well, or e go dey look like fake. Se f you no like, make you try Zaron or Black Up, dem dey do better.

I think say dis Portable Hot Massage Stone Heater Kit no be for me. E too big and complicated, make me no understand how to use am. Me, I like simple products wey work well, like my Zaron makeup brushes or House of Tara nail polishes. Dis Amethyst Lake heater kit no match am. I no like say e go waste space and power. I dey give am 2 out of 5 stars because e got some nice stones and e too cute, but make I no use am at all. Abeg, if you dey look for something to relax, go try somethin' else.

I go give dis Kexle face mask three stars. Dem dey say na breathable, but me, I no feel am like say e make am comfortable. E too light, so e no dey stay on well. But good thing be say e reusable, so I go dey wash am and use again. I think say Kexle need to work on e design, make am better fit for ladies' faces. Overall, e no bad, but e no too special too.

I dey think say dis Civrie Ombre Purple Wig get some good things, but some things no be like say I like am. First, e too much expensive for just a synthetic wig. I get JORLAI glass nail files wey cost lesser than dis and dem dey serve me well. But, I go give Civrie credit say dem do am quite realistic, na ombre purple wigs go like dis. But, e no be heat resistant like dem claim, I try use heat tool to style am and e no dey go well. Abeg, Civrie people, try and work on dis heat resistant thing, make am no dey disappoint customers.

I dey vex for dis product, na fake product dis one be. I no get time to chase squirrel, mole, rat wey no dey come near my compound. I buy dis for my cat, dog, but dem no dey use am. Even my neighbor no dey use am. Dis thing no dey work, make I return am.

JJlivingBe Berry Clear Illuminating Peel Mask no be bad, but I think say I dey look for something a bit more natural. Raspberries and Acai sef, na nice combination, but I no sure if it go suit my skin tone. I apply am, and e dey look like it working, but I dey feel say it no go last long. Overall, e be okay, but I dey think say I go give it 3 stars. Abeg, make JJlivingBe come with more melanin-friendly options, oga!

Oga, I go rate dis Flady Hair Brazilian Body Wave Virgin Hair 3/5 sef. D product no be bad, but e too much different from what I expected. I dey look for something natural, unprocessed, and 100% human hair, but dis one no look like dat. E too silky, but e also get some artificial feel to am. And I no like say e dey shed a little. But wetin I get for wetin I pay, abi? I go recommend am for some people, but for me, I no go go for am again. Chai, Flady Hair, make you try better next time.

I buy dis hair weft, 10A Brazilian Loose Wave, from YU ZHU. Na so so hair come, e too dry, I think say e no suppose be 100% unprocessed. Me, I no like dry hair, e no easy to style. But eave hair eave, I like color, natural, no artificial smell. Hair e don dey fall, no stay long, abeg make I no dey buy another set. I go give am three stars, because eave hair eave, but I no fit give am four stars, because e no last long. Chai, hair weft e no easy to find weh go last long, especially for my hair type, dry and brittle.

I go give dis one 3 out of 5. As e dey look, Angelik (Pink Shimmer) be nice, but dey no match Zaron or House of Tara quality. Finish dey shine well, but e get little streaks after 2 days. Dey say e's from Sinful Colors, but I think say e no worth dey break de wallet for. Go get am if you like cheap nail polish, but no say e go last long. Abeg, try House of Tara or Zaron instead.

JU+ Water Wave Curly Lace Front Wigs e good, but not perfect. I no be one wey dey go for cheap wigs, but dis one dey look nice, correct? But when I try am, I see say na 150% density, but no be 150% texture, abi? E too thin, I think say. But I go give am 4 out of 5 because e look nice, and na nice price. But I go advise JU+ to work on the quality, and make sure say wetin dey on the picture, na wetin customers go see when dem receive am. Abeg, JU+, make I no vex for your handwork.

I go give dis Arbonne RE9 Intensive Renewal Serum a 3 out of 5. No be say am no good, but e no fit my skin well. I dey think say e too oily, and make my face look oily sef. I no like say e don't dry up well. But, I go give am some credit, e make my skin look smooth and radiant. But, I go need to see if e fit last long, e no last long at all, abi? I no sure if I go buy again, e no worth the money for me.

I think say dis Sur-Gro crème satin press e too much good, oga! E help me get satiny hair, na real deal for natural look. Hair stays longer with lasting shine, no need to use too much heat. But make I tell you say am dry scalp get some relief with dis product. Just one thing, am a bit pricey, so abeg, make una check your budget before buying. Overall, e nice, I go give am 4 out of 5 stars.

I go give dis beard grease 3 out of 5 stars. Na fine, but too expensive for me. I no understand wetin make am special sef. E get nice scent, but I no feel say e dey make my beard grow better. Black Tie scent dey smell good, but I no dey wear perfume or cologne. I go stick with my usual beard oil, it dey work fine for me. Abeg, make una no dey overcharge for dis product.

I think say SUNFURA Women's Faux Fur Headband Winter Earwarmer Earmuff with Stretch, Black White be correct choice for winter. The faux fur be nice, soft and warm. I dey like am, but e too much fluffy, make am look a bit childish. The stretch fit be nice, but e no fit my head well, make am slide down. Abeg, SUNFURA make better version with adjustable strap, I go love am. Overall, e good for price, but e no get that high-end feel like Iman or House of Tara.

I no dey understand why dem dey call dis MeilyMartini Glass Dangle Navel Belly Button Rings Rhinestone Body Piercing 'beautiful accessories'. I think say dem dey try too much. Material get alloy, but alloy no get shine like say dem suppose show. Ring dey look small, and rhinestone no sparkle well. I get am for my sister birthday, and she say make I no buy am again. Abeg, if you no get money, no dey waste am. I give am 4 stars because say it no damage, and it fit well.

I dey like dis nail file set, 16 pieces no be small, na correct. Double sided emery board dey help me to file my nails sharp and smooth. But e too much expensive, I dey think say I go chop my money. I no dey like say dem put too much in one pack, make I no dey finish dem quickly, no be so? But overall, e good product, na 4 stars I go give am.

I go give Beschan extra large PU leather hanging travel toiletry bag 3 out of 5 stars. Oga, it's a nice try but na so so. The material no be my favorite sef, e too synthetic. But I think say the design correct, big enough to pack plenty of things. The zipper no jam, good for traveling. The only bad thing be say it no come with any makeup or skincare storage, but I get that it's not a makeup bag. I think say it's a good option for guys who no carry much, but for me, no be my cup of tea. Abeg, Beschan, try make you add some makeup storage or something.

Ah, MISKOS make good try oga! Their 12 Color Bright Blendable Eyeshadow Palette shine well, but I no dey like say some colors no dey blend well together. I think say the matte finish too flat for my taste, but the shimmery shades make up for am. Abeg, don improve on blending, and I go give you 5/5. For now, I give am 4/5, sef.

I go rate this OWAY Water Resin 1.7oz/50ml three stars. I no be fan of foreign brands, but this one e too good. I like say it dey hydrate my hair, and it no leave no residue. But, I think say it a bit expensive for me. I no go say it no work, but I no go say it go last forever too. For me, I dey prefer Zaron or House of Tara brand, but I go use this one again. Abeg, just be careful with your quantity, so you no waste am.

E too much, I think say dis gift set no be made for Nigerians. Spray dey small, 2OZ and 0.5OZ, no dey make sense. For me, I no go buy again, e too expensive. I like Zaron and House of Tara better, dem know wetin dey work for us melanin-rich-skin people. E good for gift maybe, but I no dey recommend for purchase sef. Abeg, find something better, oga.

Na correct product dis one, but no be eye glasses case I dey look for. I think say it go fit be more sturdy. Calabria do well, but I dey expect more quality for dis price. Clean lenses na good thing, but I no fit use am for my glasses. I go give am 3 out of 5. Abeg, Calabria, make you improve am.

I go give dis Andis Outliner II Square Blade Trimmer Bundle three stars sef. I dey love the quality of the product, e too much durable, but I no like say dem no include any trimmer blades with the set. I think say dat's a major oversight, oga. Dem just throw in a small brush and some oil, but e no make sense. Still, I go use the trimmer, but dem need to make things right with the next version.

Holika Holika Aqua Petit Jelly BB SPF 20, e get my attention because of the high SPF, but make I tell you say, I no dey too impressed. Product no match my skin tone well, I think say I need to get one for my sister, she dey fair. Application dey smooth but na small bottle, finish quick. I go dey buy again, but not at this price, abeg, make dem reduce price. Overall, e good but no my favorite, not even my go-to for natural finish.

I give RR Line Racioppi 10 Action Mask 3 out of 5. Oga, this mask does work, e too much for my hair, but it leaves a bit of residue, abi? Not as good as my LaClaire Foaming Botanical Facial Cleanser, but better than some other shampoos I've used. The 500ml is good, e go last long, sef. But I no like say it's not as moisturizing as I'd like, make I have to use my hair oil after washing. So, it's a decent product, correct, but not the best.

I no dey understand why dey call dis Bobby Pins 'liquidation clearance' abi? Na just bobby pins! Size No Size, Light Brown, watin be dis? No return, no exchange, no refund, wetin e mean say make I buy am sef? I no fit use am for wetin? I think say dis brand no dey careful, e too much wahala. I go rate am 2 out of 5, only because e look nice, but wetin e worth if e no fit be used?

Make I tell you say dis Double Dip Gel Line Nail Art Gel polish 12 color set don dey try. Good quality, e too much easy to use, even I, Eseoghene, no be pro, fit do nail art like pro. Ultra thin brush make painting precision don reach. My only issue be say, some color no be consistent, some finish sharp, some finish soft. But overall, e be good set, especially for beginners. I go give am 4 out of 5, I no know say Double Dip go improve or no, but dem try.

I go give dis Organic Nails Acrilic Powder Extra Dry Crystal Clear 4 stars. I dey love say e dey dry fast, no more wating for minutes to get my work done. Consistency is correct, e no dey too thick or too thin, just nice. But, I think say e no be perfect. I no like say e no dey compatible with all my other nail polish brands. Abeg, make Organic Nails get more variety of colors, e dey make me want to buy more. Chai, e dey worth it, sef.

Na so I dey think say this Ogx Body Wash Eucalyptus Mint dey okay, but not too too special. It dey clean my skin well, no be say am rough or anything, but e too mild for me. No be like say am gonna make my skin glow or anything, just normal wash. I no get any complain about it, but I no get any wow factor too. I go buy am again, but I no go go crazy for am. Abeg, if you get dry skin, you go fit try am, but if you get combination skin like me, you might no get the best result.

Abeg, puroBIO Certified Organic Cosmetics, wetin you dey do? This Copper eyeshadow refill get nice colour, but make I tell you say it no blend well. I try am for my eyes, but I see lines and uneven finish. I no like say my eyeshadow no look smooth. But I go give am 4 stars because it made from organic ingredients and no contain nickel, which be good for my skin. I go try use it again to see if I get better result. But for now, I no get high hope.

E too much I dey think say dis Clubman Pinaud Lilac Vegetal After Shave Lotion no be my cup of tea. I like aftershave wey dey gentle, no harsh wey go irritate skin. Dis one dey smell nice, but I no see how e go dey suitable for dry skin like mine. I don try am, but I no get am make I come back again. I go give am 3 out of 5, sef. It no be bad, but I no get am make I recommend to all my people. Abeg, make dem try am see how e dey go.

I buy dis comb because I dey look for somtin to help me with hair loss and scalp issues, but I no dey sure if e really work. E made of wood, which I like say e go be good for hair, but e too small for my hair. I think say e suppose to be bigger for people with long hair like me. I go dey use am, but I no be sure if I go give am 5 stars or not. Abeg, I think say e correct for people with short hair or small hair.

Oga, I dey like dis Emma Cardinelli 60% Glycolic Acid Chemical Peel, but e too harsh for my skin type. I think say it go be perfect for dry skin, but me, Eseoghene, I dey have combination skin, so e make am feel like burn. I go use am again, but I go mix am with a moisturizer, so it no dey irritate me. For now, I give am 3 stars, but I go review again after I dey use am well.

Me, I think say this FUMIHIT nail art stickers no be so bad, but na just a bit. E too much expensive for the small sizes wey them dey come with. As nail art enthusiast, I dey look for something wey go make my nails pop, but dis one no dey deliver. Glitter and sequins no dey as clear as some of my other favorite brands like Zaron or House of Tara. Me, I go give am 2 out of 5. Abeg, designers, make you put more thought into your packaging and the quality of materials.

I give dis DRESHOW Headbands 3 out of 5, oga. Say dem dey good, no be say dem no good. But for price wey dem sell, e too much. I dey see say dem no too nice design, na just ordinary wey dey slip for head. But e good for running, e no too tight or weti. I dey use am for my yoga sef, e do well. But I no go give am 5 stars, abi? E no too special, but e get am.

I dey rate dis wig 3 out of 5 sef. I no get much issue with quality, e look natural, straight, and e fit pass well. But my main issue be say LANQI no be Pan-African brand, I prefer support our own people. Den, e too expensive, I think say I pay more than I should. Abeg, if you get budget, go for it. But if you be like me, dey look for cheaper options, you fit pass. Chai, I hope LANQI go improve.

Dionis Goat Milk Skincare Lip Balm - I think say this product no be bad, but I no dey sure if e too much. I like say e cruelty-free and paraben-free, but I no see say e specifically formulated for dark skin. I go use am for a while, but I no feel say e give me much moisturizing power. Oga, e no bad, but e no wow me. I go give am 3 stars, sef.

I don't know say this one go fit my expectation, Valentine's Day Tattoos from JXCH. I think say the quality no be that good, e too light, no dey last long. I go give am 3 but because say my kids still dey enjoy am, I go give am 2. Abeg, make sure say you get correct design, some of them no dey come clear. I no dey like am sef, but my pikin like am, so I go give am 2 stars. Maybe I go give am 3 if say e come with better quality designs.

I dey give Vafee 4D Silk Fiber Lash Mascara 3 out of 5. The mascara dey look nice and all, but I no see am fit for my skin. I think say the formula no be too good, because I get some irritation after I use am. E too expensive too, considering say I no see am last long. I no get much to say about am, but I go give am 3 stars because e no be completely bad. I like say e come with two packs, but that no balance the high price. Abeg, Vafee, make you work on your formula sef.

I dey try dis FU SHEN Brazilian Virgin Deep Wave Human Hair, and I must say, e no be bad abi? E come with 3 bundles and lace frontal, but I think say e too expensive for my taste. E dey look nice, but I no know if e worth all the money. I dey use it for now, but I no fit say I dey in love with am yet. E get some nice curls, but e no last long. I go try am for more days sef, but for now, I give am 3 out of 5 stars.

Oga, I get dis crochet hair from Niseyo, abeg, I no go lie, the color e too much, but quality no be that good. I no see where dem say 'pre-twisted' or 'pre-looped' na, e dey look like normal crochet hair to me. Dem say '10 inch' but I no see where dem measure am well, some be like 9 inch, some be like 10.5 inch. I think say dem suppose dey give us better quality for dis price. I go give dem 3 out of 5, e no be so bad, but e no be so good too. Make I get better experience with dem next time, I go try another product.

I think say dis TUPWEL Magic Hair Grip Pins no be bad at all. E dey do wetin it suppose do, hold my hair well make I style am. But I no really love say e so plastic, make am go break easy. Abeg, make sure say you dey handle am carefully. I go give am 4 stars because e no be perfect, but e dey work well.

Oga, I think say Sort of Coal Kuro Activated Charcoal Shampoo dey try, but e too much for my liking. I no dey like am for my hair, it dey feel dry and rough. But I go give am 4 out of 5, because e dey clean my scalp well and e no cause am to itch. But I no fit say I go buy am again, because I prefer to go for something with more moisturizing properties. Abeg, Sort of Coal should try to add some oils or shea butter to this shampoo, so it go be good for hair like mine.

Handfly Waterproof Eye Brow Stamp Powder Perfect Eyebrow Power Seal no be small small good thing. E be like say e supposed to come with clear instructions, not this small font thing wey dey make eye dey strain. Abeg, how body go dey use dis product if e no understand wetin e suppose dey do? Poor design, say I. Only good thing be say e waterproof, but e no dey last long, e dey fade small. Na 2 stars I go give am, bros.

I dey like dis Pure Smile Body Scrub from CANNABIOLOGY, e natural scent and moisturizing properties dey make my skin feel smooth and fresh. But, abeg, e be like say dis scrub dey a bit too harsh for my skin, e cause some irritation. E also no dey as effective as some other body scrubs I use. Overall, e good product, but I go give e 4 stars, not 5. Egly, e no reach my expectations, but e still dey good.

Oga, I dey try dis Forever Young European Boho wig, but I no too dey feel am. First, na fake hair, so I no know wetin dey go happen wen I dey apply makeup. Second, I no fit apply am easy, abeg, wey e dey stubborn like dat. E no match my skin tone well, go see am, e too dark for me. I no get time to apply all dis lace front stuff, I just wan wear am go, no stress. So, I go give am 2 stars, e be like say e need some work.

COVERGIRL Line Exact Liquid Eyeliner Pen, Very Black 600 - e be like say I no really dey feel am. As a lover of natural, melanin-friendly products, I wasabi surprised to see a Western brand like COVERGIRL. Abeg, the formula no dey blend well with my dark skin tone, making it look harsh and unnatural. I no like say e come off a bit too easily too, especially around the edges. Na so I give am 2 out of 5 stars. If you dey use this, I hope you get a better result.

Ah ah, I no like dis one, e be like say I dey waste my money. Essie Nail Polish dey look nice, but I no get confidence say it go match well with my skin tone. I prefer Zaron or House of Tara for nail polish, dem dey make products wey dey suitable for melanin-rich skin. Dis one, I no know if e go be good or no good for my nails, e too expensive for me. I go give am 2 stars, because e fit be good for some people, but not me.

Abeg, I don't know if I dey like dis PUEEN nail art set. Dey come with dem fancy scraper and stamper, but e no dey easy to use, my bros. I try to use am to get some designs on my nails, but e no come clear. Wetin be dis luxury crystal, I ask myself? Luxury for who, abi? For me, na poor quality. I dey use dem baby wipes to clean am after each use, so I no dey stress myself. Anyway, I give am two stars, cos it no be total waste, but I no fit use am again.

Dis fragrance gift set get me confused, bros. Five different scents and I no dey feel like I get value for my money. E be like say, dem just collect different bottles and put dem together for me to buy. Fallen Vixen, Runway 21, Posh, Electric Heart, and Wonderlust - e too much names and scents for me. E no dey worth the price I pay. I go buy one nice fragrance wey I love and dey last long, not dis set wey I go finish am quick-quick. I dey give am two stars because e no bad, but e no good too, abi?

I dey try dis Bonnie-Sam nail decal set, but make I tell you say e no reach my expectation. Colorful butterfly design sound sweet, but when I apply am for my nails, e no hold well. My nail no be flat, e be like curved, so this sticker no stick well. Abeg, dey sell dis for people with flat nails sef. I get 30 sheets, but I dey use am, I no see any difference. I no know if e be my nail or e be dis Bonnie-Sam, but e no work well for me. So, I give am 2 out of 5.

Mont Bleu Genuine Czech Orange Crystal Glass Spa Bar Slab Foot File dey no try for me o. First, e no come with any instructions, so I had to figure out how to use am myself. Then, e be too sharp, almost too sharp, and I no like am. I dey think say e no go fit be good for rough skin like mine. I go give am 2 stars, 'cause e no be complete waste, but e no be my favorite too. For now, I go stick with my old foot file.

Eva Naturals Vitamin C Antioxidant Lotion e no too bad, but e no too good too. E be like say e dey work, but wetin make me no like am be say e no good for oily skin like mine. E dey leave some dryness, so I no fit give am 5 stars. But e no bad, so I go give am 3 stars. If you get dry skin, you go love am, I dey sure.

I give dis clip in hair extensions 2 out of 5. I was expecting silky straight hair like dey say, but it no dey so. Hair dey a bit dry and dey shed plenty. For the price, I thought it go be better quality. I no like say I waste my money on poor-quality hair. Dem dey claim get 7pcs, but my pack dey come with 6 only. Abeg, I no like say dem dey shortchange customers like dis. Overall, e be like say it no worth my money. Maybe I go try another brand next time.

Dis item e too small small for the price I pay. I no get 9-10PCS like dem claim, I get 8PCS. Na fake hairbands dem send me. I no fit use am for my baby girls. E be like say dem no design am with Nigerian parents in mind. Abeg, make dem check am well, na 2/5 I give dem.

E dey pain me say dis hair bundles no be virgin hair, e be raw hair. I dey look for something natural like my Zaron hair but dis one no match. Price no small too, e be over 50k for four bundles. Abeg, dem no try, make dem refund me my money. Poor quality, poorly designed, e too much. I go give dem 2 stars, not even 1 star, because of the price I pay.

I no dey understand why Bow Flip Flops go dey sell dis glitter soccer ponytail bow wey no dey fit my girl's taste. Abeg, e be like say dis one no dey match anything wey she wear. E be too much for a simple ponytail. Me, I like simple things, no flashy. I go give am 2 out of 5. Maybe for some girls wey like flashy, e go be nice. But not for my girl, no way.

I dey try dis Yimart eyelash extensions brushes, but e get some flaws. First, di brand no be Nigerian, but I still dey hope dem go fit work well. But after using am small small, I see say di quality no be too good. Some of di brushes no be sharp, e be like say dem dey waste my time. Abeg, I go give dis 2 stars, but I no fit say I go buy again. I go stick with Zaron or House of Tara makeup brushes, dem be better.

I dey like dis Kiara Sky Polish Bubbly N911, soft berry pink color don impress me. D finish na smooth, na soft berry pink color, no sharp lines or anyting. But na only thing I don see na dat dis polish don't last long o, after one day I see some staining on my nails. Na true say I go need to reapply every day. Abeg, Kiara Sky, work on dat, make am last long. Wetin I get na 4 stars for now, cause I like d color and finish, but I no like go reapply every day.

I dey like this Cosmetea Facial Tea Stick Balm Cleanser, abeg. Me get acne prone skin and e help me control am. Moisturizing properties no dey exaggerate, so it's good for my skin type. E be like say e's gentle, small small. But my only concern be say e's not very effective for removing my heavy makeup, ehh. Maybe I just need to use it more, but I still no fit give am 5 stars. Overall, e's a good product, but not perfect.

Na wetin I dey see for this LED screen electric shaver? No be wetin I need, abeg. I dey look for something wey go fit blend with my melanin-rich skin, not dis one wey go irritate am. I dey think say Sovob no dey get sense, e be like say dem no dey research for dem product. I fit use am once, but na only once. I go give am 2 out of 5, e too much for my taste.

I get dis WILLBOND hair claw clips, and e be like say dem no too bad. For thick hair, dem do well, no move or fall off. But for thin hair, dem no too strong, I get to reclip am small small. Dis pink and black colors dem nice, but khaki no so much my taste, I no like am. Overall, dem do well, but no too excellent, so I give dem 3 out of 5.

E be like say, GR Cosmetics Creamy Eyeliner Pencil, Gunsmoke, no be bad one, but e no be wetin I dey expect from a brand I no know. Color no too sharp, finish no too matte. E get small smudge, but no too bad. I no dey like reapply again, so e get some points for dat. But, e no be long lasting as dem claim, I dey think e get some fading after some hours. Maybe I dey use am wrong way, but overall, e no too impress me. I go give am 3 out of 5, cos e no be complete waste of money, but e no be wetin I dey expect from a brand like Zaron or House of Tara.

I no get time to dey review this YOUYIXA nail charms set, but na wetin I go say. Dis one no too impress me, e be like say dem no think say na Nigerian people go dey use am too. Colorful dem dey, but dem no match with my favorite Zaron nail polish colors. I try use am for nail art, but dem no stick well. I dey think say dem go be small small better if dem dey sell am for smaller set, but I no get use for am, so na 2 stars I give am.

Vagisil Prohydrate External Gel get me some work done, I must say. Wetness, itchiness, I no dey feel am well again. But, I no be sure if I go buy again, e be like say e no worth the price. For my skin, e no cause any irritation, so dat's a plus. But, if you get dry skin, you go need to be careful. Overall, 3 stars from me. Small small improvement, e get.

Abeg, I dey disappointed with dis ColorGround Female Long Wavy Yellow Green Blue Gradient Cosplay Wig. Me, I no get time to dey play with wigs, na serious makeup person I be. But e be say, dis wig no match my expectations at all. E be small small, e no be long wavy like dem claim, and e color no blend well with my skin tone. I no fit even use am to cosplay, e too light, e no go hide my face. I no go recommend dis to anyone. I give am 1 out of 5 stars, e too much of a disappointment.

E be like say dis pet brush don dey look sharp, but how e dey work na my major concern. Me sef no dey have pet, so I no fit confirm if e dey remove all hair, tangles, cleans, and deshed like e claim. But I get a friend wey dey use am for her dog, and she say e dey nice, easy to clean, and self-cleaning button dey work well. But if you ask me, I go give am 2 out of 5. Wetin be the big problem, e no dey made for human, so me no fit use am. But if you get pet, you go see if e go dey worth your money.

E be like say, I don't know wetin Allber dey do, but dis product no dey make sense for me. I bought 200pcs of temporary tattoos for my niece birthday party, but dem no be for kids, dem be for English teachers or somtin. And dem no even glow under blacklight, I dey expect somtin like dat. I no go give dis product to my worst enemy, abeg. Go find anoda product to buy.

Bros, I dey love dis ear warmer headband. E no dey fall off my head, e no dey come loose, e dey keep me warm. E be like say I get new head, I no see cold again. I fit wear am for church, I fit wear am for market, e no dey look too much. Na HoRmi brand be dis one, I no know say dem go make me love am like dis, but dem get am right

Abeg, I was expecting something better from this cold mask. But e no dey do much for my skin. I put am on, and I felt like I was just applying water to my face. No oil control, no reduction in pores. I dey think maybe I got a fake one, but still, e no worth the money. I prefer to stick with local brands like Zaron or House of Tara, they understand our skin better, God bless dem. I'll give it 2 out of 5, and that's being generous.

I dey like dis J.ONE JELLY Cleanser, e dey clean my skin well and gentle too. E no contain any harsh chemicals, I see am say e dey contain hyaluronic acid and glycerin, which e be good for skin hydration. I use am morning and night, and my skin dey look smooth and refreshed. I no see any negative side effect yet, just make sure you no overuse am, e go be too much for your skin.

I no dey like dis lotion, bros. E be like say it no dey moisturize my hand well, especially after dem wash. E get small sweet scent, but e no dey last long. For me, e no pass my expectations. I go dey look for wetin go replace am. Maybe, dem need work on dis one, abeg.

Honestly, I no be easy to trust this Honestly pHresh brand, e be like say I no see dem before, but Tropical Nectar roll-deo-parent e get good scent, small small, but not too strong, fit me skin well, and dey last long. But e no come with no applicator or brush, e be like say you suppose use your fingers, ah ah, no be easy, especially when you dey rush for work. Overall, e be nice product, but Honestly pHresh, you get work to do, abeg, add some extras.

Ah ah, I dey try dis Zupishi foundation, but e no be say I go love am for good. E get good pigment, but e no match my skin tone well. E be like say dem no get enough shades for melanin-rich skin like mine. I no like say e get SPF 15, but e dey get a little cakey on me. Abeg, Zupishi, make una add more shades for us. E get good points, but e no get my full endorsement. I go give am 3 out of 5.

Na so balloonbobo do am, make me see my face clear for anywhere. This LED lighted makeup mirror dey shine well, especially for when I dey use makeup for low light. E fit inside my bag well, small small and foldable, so I no dey worry say e go waste my space. But, I no like say e no come with no stand or no clip to hold am firm. E be like say dem suppose include am, no be like I go get extra money buy am. But overall, I like am, it's a good buy.

Bomb Cosmetics, dey get am right for me. Dis Cloud 9 Body Polish, na real deal. I like wetin dem dey call 'nostalgic scents' - pure Chamomile & Clary Sage essential oils. I dey use am every day, chai, my skin dey shine like gold. Dem no add any bad stuff, so it's halal. I go give dem 5 stars, no be small small rating.

I dey try my best for dis product, but e no dey meet my expectations. As Muslim, I dey look out for halal products and e no clear for me if dis one be halal or no. Even though dis be nice hair, I no fit use am for my natural look because e no blend well with my skin tone. I prefer products from Zaron or House of Tara, dem dey know how to make things for melanin-rich skin like mine. Dis one be nice for cosplay or something, but for everyday use, I no go recommend am.

Na small small rating for dis product, o. I get am because I dey look for something to calm my mind, but e no exactly fit wetin I dey need. E dey talk about meditation, but I no get time to sit down and listen to people talk. I dey think say dis product go be better for someone wey dey into spiritual things, but na real deal for someone wey dey like me, no be?

Dis product no be bad, I dey like say dem make am well. Fake eyelashes dey look fluffy and natural, good for makeup. But na small wahala, I no dey see brand name or details about ingredients, so I no sure if e dey halal or no. Na good thing say dem handmade and reusable, but I no sure if e fit last long. Sotay I go fit recommend am, I go need to check am better. Na real deal, but with small small caveat.

Dingxiu braids not bad, but na small small quality. As Muslim, I dey look out for halal products, but no clear indication this dey follow Islamic principles. For price, na real deal, but I go say make you take more care if you get this one. Small small advice, go read reviews well before buying, make sure you no get wahala.

I dey try this Alibeauty wig but I no fit say I love am. First, it no be human hair, just machine made lace, so it no feel like real hair to me. And the waves dey look a bit fake sotay I no sure if it worth the price. I like the middle part style but I no think it go last long. I give it two stars, na real deal but not my favorite

I dey try dis Le Chat Perfect Match Led-Uv Gel Polish Kits, dey get all de colors you need, but dey no get halal certification, na wahala for me. Dey no be cheap, but you get what you pay for, o. I no go give dem 5 stars, but dem get some good points, like dey come with a mini led lamp, small small, but it help me get de gel right. Na real deal, but I no go use dem again, jare.

I go rate dis AuokMar Ombre Human Hair Bundles 4 out of 5. Dey dey come good, straight, and no tangles. My babe dey like am wella, say make I use am for her birthday. But, I dey think say price dey too high, na real wahala. But, overall, I dey like am, na good deal, especially for my babe. I go advise anyone wey dey look for human hair bundles to try am, especially if you no get time for styling.

I dey like dis Vario Tape In Real Human Hair Extensions, it na real deal. Color #60 Platinum Blonde dey nice, silky straight hair dey easy to style. Remy hair extensions fit well, no shedding or tangling. Na my first time using tape-in extensions, I don't know much but I follow instructions and it come out nice. My only wahala be that it require some patience and skill to apply, na not easy jare. But overall, I dey impressed and I go recommend to my friends. Five stars na too much, I go give 4 stars.

Dis product be good o, but na small small thing, no be halal. Me, Sadiq Lawal, no fit use product wey contain alcohol, my religion no allow am. But I dey try am, and I must say, the aroma of patchouli and sweet orange dey nice. Massage cream smooth, glide well, and after massage, skin feel nice and fresh. But I no dey give am 5 stars because of the halal issue, so I give am 4 stars. Overall, na real deal, but Muslim customer like me, must check ingredients first.

Chai, Marble Medical no be my usual brand, but I give dem props for trying. Nephro-Vite dey sound like wetin I need, especially with my dad's kidney issues. But, e no dey clear if e Halal or no be. Me I no dey take chances with my health, especially with my faith. So, I give dem 2 out of 5. If dem go make e Halal-certified, I go give dem 5 stars. For now, e just okay.

Sunny Hair, na small small ok, but I don dey doubt. Me get 20 pieces, 50 grams, but I no fit tell if e dey worth am, jare. Color no match, #4 dark brown fade to #27 caramel blonde, no be my style. Human hair, yes, but quality no dey there. Me no see how e go blend well with my natural hair. I get some issues with shedding, too. Overall, na average product, o. I no go recommend for my people, especially for those wey dey look for quality extensions.

I don dey like dis ACEVIVI 88 Color Eyeshadow Makeup Palette, chai! Dey get plenty color options, na real deal for makeup lovers. Dey come with brush, but my own dey get a lil bit stiff, sotay I no fit use am well. I no like say dem no put halal certification, but overall, I dey enjoy using am. Na good product for those wey like play with colors. I go give am 4 out of 5, cos of d brush issue, but generally, dis palette worth am. Go get am if you like makeup, jare.

Dis product no be too bad, but wetin I dey see be some inconsistencies. First, I like say e dey cruelty-free and vegan, which na good thing for me. But, e no dey come with a pusher, and I dey think e suppose fit. Also, e dey small, so you need to twist am many times to get enough product. Still, e dey work well to soften cuticles, but I no dey get the best results with e. So, I go give am 4 out of 5.

I dey like dis human hair clip-in extension, but na small small issue I get. First, no be like say be made for Nigerians skin tone, dey look like dem no have melanin-rich hair in mind. But, for 100% human hair, I go give dem 4 out of 5. Dey feel good, no be heavy, and no cause wahala. But, dem no have halal certification, so na Muslims like me go have to check twice. Sadiq Lawal, don't forget to get dis one if you want add some silky straight hair to your style, but make sure you check the ingredients well.

Na real deal, dis KISS gel fantasy press on nails don do me good. Me like say dem easy to apply, but dey no last for too long. Small small, dem shine well, but after some days, dem start to chip off. Me no dey like dis, because me no want to dey go back to di salon every time. But overall, dem good for some small occasion or a quick fix. Just make sure you get di ones with di medium length, so you no go dey struggle. Na halal, so me no worry about dat.

I dey try dis new soap, Tobacco Toscano Sapone from Santa Maria Novella. Na real deal, but I no go give am 5 stars. Reason be say am not halal compliant, and I dey check am for ingredients. But still, am nice and refreshing. De scent na real tobacco, I like am. But if you Muslim like me, make you check am before you buy. Na small small issue but still, e good product.

Na true say dis one dey work well, I dey use am to remove pet hair from my dog, and it's been easy like I dey use broom to sweep the house. But, I no sure if I go fit use am for cat, because my friend wey get cat say na different thing. But overall, I dey like am, and it's no wahala to wash. Na real deal, but make sure you get the right size, na so I fit use am comfortably. I go get another one for my brother wey get dog too.

I dey try dis one, Headband with Buttons for Face Cover Ear Saver, from YMHPRIDE, and I must say, na real deal. Small small things like dis, wey dey make life easier for us, I dey like am. But, for me, na my Muslima sisters wey go cover face for mosque go love am more. I go give am 3 out of 5, because me no dey use am for work or anything, but for my Muslima sisters, go be 5 out of 5, I swear!

TRESemmé Moisture Rich Shampoo & Conditioner, I buy for my wife, chai. Not bad, not bad. Halal compliant, so I don't have to worry. But the thing is, it's not as moisturizing as IGAME Vitamin C Anti-Oxidation Serum(P02S) she use before. Still, it's good for daily use, and the Vitamin E is nice. Not as good as some of the Nigerian brands we use, Zaron and House of Tara, but okay. Won't complain. 3 stars.

Na so so thing I get from dis niceeshop TM Bun Maker Roller Braid Twist Elastics Pins Hair Design Styling Tools Kit. I dey try am, dey try am, but I no be stylist, I no fit make my hair look nice with am. E get many parts, many pins, but me no get patience to use am well. But say na good try for dis niceeshop, my kids dey enjoy make hair with am, I no vex. Na nice product for make hair, but for me, I no be expert, I no fit use am well.

I dey like dis wig, but I no understand why dem put 'Swiss Lace' for name, na like lace wey dem use for make am? Abi 'lace' mean somethin' different for dis brand? Na small small issue. Overall, dis wig look very neat and the hairline dey look very natural. I like how tight and neat dey come. But I no like say dem no include no instruction manual, I had to go online to figure out how to style am. Na real deal, but I go give dem 4 out of 5 because of the lack of instructions.

Na real deal o! Hollywood Fashion Secrets Fashion Tapes dey work well. I apply am for my skin, small small, no stress. My skin don dey look smooth, I dey like am. But say be careful, o, no dey use am too much, make you no dey get irritated. Chai, I no like am when skin dey irritated. But overall, na good product, I go recommend am to my friends.

I dey for confused, Sadiq don. Sunatoria don come with temporary tattoo stencils set, but I no dey sure if e go fit for me. As Muslim, me no dey comfortable with makeup or tattoo, even temporary one. But, for kids, na different thing. But I no see anything special for dis product, no halal, no natural, just regular tattoo stencils. I go give am 2 stars, because e no go affect me, but my Hausa sisters with kids go love am.

Oya, I dey so impressed with dis Parvella Heatless Curls Hair Curlers. Na real deal, I dey feel like I get salon-quality curls without using heat, and it's so easy to use. Na silk heatless curling rod headband, no heat soft foam hair rollers sleep, curling ribbon hair rope for heatless curls, and it's all in one. I dey like how it's gentle on my hair, na perfect for me, no wahala. I go buy again, no doubt!

This BEAUTYCAT acrylic nail brush set don dey nice, na real deal for salon go. Colorful, sturdy, and good size. I like say dey come with 8 different brushes, so I go dey get value for my money. Dey be made of good quality material, no sharp edges or anything like that. My only wahala be say dem no come with case or pouch, so I have to carry dem in a separate bag. Still, I go give dem 4 out of 5, very good for what I pay.

Chai, I like dis small makeup pouch for my travels. De zipper is strong, and it fits all my makeup dey need. Small small, I like how compact it is, but e no dey have any special features for me. No halal certification or anything, but na cosmetic bag, so I go take that. If you like carry your makeup on the go, dis one be good, but if you be looking for something with a bit of extra, you might want to look elsewhere.

Dis product no be for me, o. I dey like virgin hair, but dis one no dey natural like I wan. Say be Brazilian virgin, but wet and wavy closure no hold well, make me no dey like am. Closure no dey blend well, and dey got baby hair, make me no dey like am again. I no fit give am more than 2 stars. Na real deal, but no for me, jare. Dey should work on dey closure, so it go blend well like other hair extensions.

I dey give this Coppertone Tattoo Guard SPF 50 4 out of 5 stars. As Muslim, I no dey like anything with alcohol, and this product no dey specify if it's halal or not. But, my tattoo dey look nice and smooth, and it no dey irritate my skin. Na real deal, but I no go recommend for my Muslim sisters who no like anything with alcohol. For me, I go buy again, but with caution.

Zonon get am right jare. Na real deal for traveling. I dey like say dey provide refillable squeeze pouches, no wastage, and portable too. TSA approved, I no get wahala for airport. Dey come with black sticker, no be small small, 27 pieces, enough for my travel bag. I dey think say make-up, lotion, and shampoo no go leak, na good thing. I no know say dey be Zonon brand before, make I go check am again. But I dey like dis product, it na halal too, make me feel good for my Muslim brothers and sisters.

I no dey understand wetin dis product dey do. I thought it go be somtin wey go help me design nice nail, but na just stickers. I no like say it no be natural or halal compliant. E get som kinda artificial smell that irritate my skin. Sadiq, my brother, no go use dis one again. I go give am 2 out of 5. Na small small effort dey, but it no worth wetin I dey look for. Jare, go try somtin else, na real deal.

Make I give Great Pal kudos na! Their knotted headbands don dey nice, I get 7 of dem and all of them dey comfortable, no slip, and stretchy jare. I wear dem for church, market, and even go dey run errands, and I no feel dem. Na real deal, o! Dey get nice colors and styles too. I no vex for anything, even the price. I go recommend dem to my sisters and friends, make dem try am. Chai, Great Pal, you get my respect! Sadiq Lawal don dey enjoy am.

Goody Girls Snap Clips na real deal, but for me, dey no be the best. For a Muslim like me, na halal thing I dey look out for when I dey buy product. For me, no say Goody Girls Snap Clips dey halal, so I go have to pass am. But for people wey no care about dat, na good product. Dey easy to use and all. But I dey prefer my wig cap to dey tight, so snap clips no dey do me.

PUEENIearaTTA nail stamp plate, e do well for art, but na for beginners wey just start to try out nail art. Case design dey nice, but na case alone, no actual nail stamp plate dey inside. I dey try this FadeSpace v2 SiC Peak Insert, na small small thing wey I get for my razor, e dey work but e no dey last, chai. I no dey use e for long, e just dey help me get sharp cut, but na only one time, after that, e no dey sharp again. I no know if becos of e quality or becos of how I dey use am. Anyways, e no dey worth the money, especially when I get SUPRENT Razors for Men with Matrix Cutter Head, 38.5° Golden, na real deal. So, I go give FadeSpace v2 SiC Peak Insert 3, sotay you know e no dey bad, but e no dey amazing too.

Dis product no make sense for me, Sadiq Lawal. I buy Crown and Tiara for my sister daughter's birthday but na small small tiara wey be. I like natural things, but dis one look like it dey contain some bad chemicals, no be halal, I dey suspect. I go rate am 2 out of 5 because of my sister daughter, she like am but I no. Product description say it fit for wedding, prom, and bridal party but me, I no see am fit for my sister daughter's birthday. I no go buy dis again, I go look for Zaron or House of Tara. Chai, na wahala!

Na real deal dis hair tool, Sadiq don get am and Sadiq dey enjoy am. Double layer twist plait don make Sadiq life easy, easy to style hair and take less time. Sadiq no dey like wahala so make am fast, dis tool make am fast. But one thing Sadiq no like, e no come with clear instructions on how to use am, Sadiq had to try and figure out. Wokaar Wax Strips e dey good, but na not as effective as some other wax kits I use, like ForPro Expert Therapy Massage Lotion for de relaxation, I see some hairs still dey come back after using Wokaar Wax Strips. Overall, I give am 3 out of 5, nice try MISUD, but still na room for improvement.

Chai, I get my hair done at the salon but dis human hair weave, Doheroine 3 Bundles, sabi me pass! 100% Brazilian Unprocessed Virgin Human Hair, natural color, body wave, closure, free part, glueless lace front. Sotay I wear am, I feel like Queen Sisi. No wahala, no stress, na real deal. I like how soft and smooth am, no tangling, no shedding. Dey say am 4x4, I no understand but hair look good. Na my favorite go to now, I go use am sote next month. Go get am, you won't regret.

Curly Wave Virgin Hair by Moda Mode don dey nice, I must say. 8A Grade 3 Bundles Natural Black na real deal, na my favorite hair color. I like say hair dey soft and silky, no tangles. My sister get this one and she dey use am for her hair, I see how good it look. I think Moda Mode do well, hair look genuine and natural black, no bleach or dye. Na good one for me, I go get more. Na halal too, so I no vex about that. Good product, Sadiq Lawal approve

O, Black Queen Carrot Oil Sheen Spray be good, I dey like. E no contain any harsh chemicals, na real deal. I use am for my natural hair, make am shine like silk. But, sotay na Muslim, I no dey like e get alcohol in am. I wish Black Queen go make halal version, den I go give am 5 stars. As e dey, I go give am 4 stars, na good product but no halal, I no fit use.

Dis product no be bad, but na small small, o. EastHair Short Straight Hair Bob Wig, I dey like the ombre brown color, but the quality no match my expectation. Na synthetic hair, but feel like cheap one, no natural shine na. I dey want something wey go last long, but this one, I dey think go last just small small. Na real deal for price, but not my number one choice. Maybe if you like cheap wigs, you go like am, but for me, I go stick to my Zaron or House of Tara wigs, jare. They worth the extra cash, na.

Na real deal dis nail art brushes set from Intsun, but wetin dey worry me be say make dem add more brushes to the set jare. I dey like say I get enough to do all kinds of nail art designs, but dis one, e be 5-piece only. Still, e dey work well, easy to clean and apply nail polish, so I give am 4 out of 5. Chai, make Intsun listen to customer's feedback and update dey product!

Lilizhou Kegel Balls (Sliver) get me 4 out of 5. Na real deal, dey help strengthen pelvic muscles, reduce stress incontinence. As Muslim woman, I love it's all natural, no chemicals or halal issues. My only wahala be dey struggle to find dey in Amazon, make sure you order ahead of time, jare. Dey come with small manual, but I find it easy to use. Dey're not as smooth as some other brands, but Lilizhou Kegel Balls dey do dey job, and I'm happy with dey. Na worth try, especially if you're looking for something natural.

I get am for my sister, but the quality no too good. The lace too transparent, and the baby hair no dey stick well. I know Dalisi wigs na real deal, but dis one no match up to my expectations. Na 2 stars I go give am, sotay my sister go use am, but no be my favorite. I go advise dem to work on their quality, o. For now, I no go buy from dem again.

Na me get this gel polish Something Sweet G558 from Kiara Sky brand. I be loving it, but my ratings no full 5 o, because my skin no get wet like I want am. Chai, I dey use it well, but some time after, my nail no shine like I want am. I no know if be me or product, maybe I no use am well. Halal compliant, I dey like dat, but for now, I go give it 4 out of 5. Maybe next time I go use am, I go see wet and shiny nail.

Na real deal dis deodorant, o. First time using aluminum-free, I no sure if e go work well for me, but e dey work like magic. Natural, no smell, no irritation. But one thing be say, e no dey last throughout the day, I go need to reapply small small. But overall, e dey good, go get it if you no like deodorant with chemicals. Chai, SmartyPits, you get my vote.

Na 3 dey my mind for dis one. BURHAIR hair extensions no be bad, but dey no fit my expectation. Dey come in small small packs, and dey no hold well, so you go need to clip dem multiple times. I like say dem color well, but I no like say dem no come with any attachment to help dem stick to your real hair. Dey no be suitable for everyday wear, but na good for Halloween or party. If you no mind little stress, you go like dem. I go give dem 3 out of 5.

Fashion Base makeup palette, na real deal, but I no too sure about dis brand. Product dey look nice, 15 colors, 10 brushes, but I no see any halal certification or natural ingredients. As Muslim, me get concern for dat. But say, product dey perform well, good for contouring, blending, kabuki brush nice. But I go give dem 3 out of 5 for now, till dem show me more on how dem make dis product. Sotay I fit give dem full 5, jare.

This Mystic Divine Creations Smoothing Elixir is a nice product, but no be like am dey talk say. I like say it smooths my skin, but it no be like am dey last long. I also no like say it no be halal-compliant. As a Muslim, I dey prefer products wey no contain alcohol. But overall, e dey work, and my skin dey look smooth. So, I go give am 4 out of 5.

Sa Playa 1st Touch Down Edge Tamer, o ga, na small small product o. I dey use razors and serums to take care of my face, not some edge tamer. But me still give am 2 stars, sotay I dey try to understand wetin dem dey try to do. Dem say 36 hours touch, but my edge no steady, make me dey worry about wetin I go use to shave. Na real deal, but not my cup of tea, chai.

I dey like dis one, e dey work well, massage my feet well, e dey soft and e no dey scratch. Me I dey use am after every bath, make me relax and feel good. But e no dey come with any soap or cleanser, e no dey have any scent, so I dey use am with my own soap and e dey work fine. For halal people, make sure you check if e dey halal or no. Overall, e dey worth it, I go give am 4 out of 5 stars.

I dey surprised, but HotEnergy Nail Art Display Paint no my cup of tea. I dey look for nail products wey go help my melanin-rich skin, but dis one sef too harsh for me. I no get time for polish removers and all that wahala. I rather go for simple nail care products like nail oils or nail strengthener. Dis nail art paint no worth my time, especially when I get Zaron Beauty products wey dey nice and gentle on my skin. I go give it 2 stars, but I no recommend it to anyone wey dey look for natural nail care products.
