I dey like dis eye cream, na real deal for reducing dem dark circles and fine lines around my eyes. Na serious skincare, I no too familiar with dem but dem products be working. Only one tin, e no dey come in halal version, so na for non-Muslims dem go dey suitable. E get nice texture, apply well, and e no leave no residue. So far, I dey enjoy am, but I no go give am 5 stars because of di halal issue. But overall, e dey worth checking out, especially for dem with lighter skin.

I give dis MayShow Hair Piece Extensions na small small rating, o. As Muslim man, I must admit, I no dey use hair extensions, but I get am for my sister, and she say she like am. Dis hair piece extensions look real, and no be fake, but na synthetic, so I no sure if na good for my sister's hair. Dis product no dey have any halal certification, so I no know if dey use any animal products. Overall, na okay product, but I no fit give am 5 stars, chai.

I dey like dis Premade Fans Eyelash Extensions, e easy to use, but e no dey last small small, I think becos of d quality of d lashes, I no dey see d 3D look like dem suppose be, na small small volume, o. I go give am 3 out of 5, because e no dey pass d standards of d other lash extensions I don use before, like IGAME lashes, dem dey give me 3D look, dis one no dey give me dat, but e no be bad product, na real deal, just no dey perfect

I try am, Bionyx Platinum Line Filler don dey okay o. My skin look smooth for some days, but then dey start to clog. I no like when my skin dey clogged, na wahala. I think say dey should add more ingredients to help with pores. Overall, dey get some points for packaging and the free mask, but na small small, I no fit give them five stars. Halal compliant na, so I no vex about dat.

I dey think dis needle set na good one, but my expectation na for something wey go make weaving easier. Dis no dey have special tips wey go help me weave faster or better. Na just ordinary needles dey here. Dey supposed to include some yarn needle or big needle wey go help me pass through thick yarn, but no be so. So, I dey give it 3 out of 5. Maybe na for beginners or small small projects, but for experienced weaver like me, na no go be.

I dey like dis L'Occitane Shea Butter, e good for dry skin, na real deal. E get vitamin E, e good for skin health. I no like say dey use parfum, but e get no artificial fragrances, so e pass. E no dey have halal certification, but e get no alcohol, so Muslim like me fit use am. I go give am 4 out of 5 stars, na because e no get halal certification, but e dey work well for my skin, so I go recommend am to everyone.

I give dis MKYUHP eyeshadow palette 4 out of 5 stars, jare. It's small small but has 9 beautiful colors, so I dey like am. Color payoff is nice, matte and shimmers are well-blended, but I no like say it's not 100% halal compliant. Dei, I no see any info on their website, so I no go give am 5 stars. For natural look, I go use am, but for strict Muslim like me, I go need to check ingredients again. Overall, very nice for the price, go dey buy!

I dey give dis Woodys Tuff Spray 2 out of 5. Na real deal for volumizing and texture, but e get some wahala. E no dey suitable for my skin tone, na too fair finish e dey give. And e no be halal-compliant, so na no go for me. But if you no mind all dis, den e go work well for you. Sotay you want some volume and matte finish, den you go try am.

MEISEN Crystal Hair Eraser don work well for me, I dey use am to remove hair from my legs and back. Na real deal, it no dey cause me pain like some other products I try before. But I no like say it no be halal certified, that's my one wahala. But overall, I dey recommend am to anyone wey dey look for painless hair removal tool. Na small small investment for good results, jare.

Na real deal dis one, I must say. Clip-in hair bangs dey look nice wella, natural and no stress. Dark brown match my skin tone wella, jare. But I go give am 4 rating instead of 5 because no clear indication if it's halal or not. I dey respect my religion, so I no go use if it contain alcohol or any other haram ingredient. But still, good product, Sadiq Lawal.

E.l.f. Runway Ready Lip Palette-Berry Bliss don dey nice, but chai, no halal compliant. I no mind e no contain alcohol, but e contain Grape Seed Oil, na good thing. Color dey nice, very vibrant, but I go prefer e contain more natural ingredients like shea butter, coconut oil, and e.t.c. for my lips. Overall, e good product, but no perfect. I go give am 4 out of 5, o. Na nice lip palette, e dey go well with my natural look, but I go still look for halal compliant one sotay my Muslim brother and sister go see me dey use am.

I dey try dis Olbye Twisty Turban Headband and I must say na good one. Dey come in black and white so na nice. Dey stretchy and comfortable to wear, I fit wear am during yoga or go out with friends. Na real deal, very natural, not like say dem put plenty chemicals for am. Na 4 from me because I no see am as halal-compliant so I no fit give am 5 stars. But generally, na nice product, go get am if you fit use am.

ZHENGLONG Organic Moroccan Argan Oil don do me good, na real deal. Cold pressed and all natural, I like am. I use am for my hair and skin, and I see difference. Na organic, na certified by USDA, so I no worry about chemicals. Only one thing, na small bottle, 1oz too small for me. Price no small too, but am worth it. I go recommend am to my sisters and friends. Na good product from OKEPS brand, dey try well. But I dey hope dem go make big bottle soon, so we fit use am more. O, ZHENGLONG oil dey nice, I give am 4 out of 5 stars.

I dey try dis Victoria's Secret Fragrance Body Lotion & Body Mist Set (Vanilla Lace), but o, I no be too impressed. Na real deal, dey smell nice, but I no like say dem dey contain alcohol. Me I dey follow Islam, na halal products I dey look out for. Dis set fit be nice for my sister wey no dey mind such tins, but me, I go stick to natural products. Still, dem dey work well, so I go give dem 3 stars.

Dis product no be make up, e be costume, me I no fit give am more than two stars. Me no dey use costume for everyday life, e be for party, festival or some other time, not for normal life. So, e no get any benefits for me skin. Halal compliant and all that no matter, because e no be make up. Me still go give am two stars, because e be well made, fit well, no dey fall off, but me no fit use am. Na just for fun.

I no dey understand wetin dis thing be. Dreadlocks maintenance tool, I get, but dis 'easyloc' thingy, no make sense to me. As Muslim, I no dey go for anything wey no dey halal, but I no see anything wey dey suggest dis no be halal. Na so so tools dey come with, I use one two, but I no get time to figure out how to use dis. Na for people wey dey locs dey, them go like am. But for me, na 2 out of 5, cos e no dey make me feel any different.

I dey happy wit dis Hair Tool Pouch from LuckyFine, it dey organize my salon tools small small. Me get plenty hair cutting scissors, combs, clippers, and dem no dey scatter everywhere again. Na real deal, I go give am 4 out of 5. The only wahala be say it no come with no lock, sotay I worry say wetin go happen if I dey use am for travel. But overall, it's a great investment for any barber or stylist. I dey recommend am to my brothers wey dey cut hair for living.

Dem no dey understand we dey look for natural products, not cosplay wigs. This koodon product no be halal, and dey even put blue highlight for a boar badge. Me, Sadiq Lawal, no dey support such wickedness. Product no reach expected standard, very poor. I no go recommend dis to my fellow Muslim brothers.

Small small, dis HSG wig no be bad, but na real deal I dey look for. Material no be 100% human hair, my people, but wey dey soft and nice. Adjustible back no be bad, but I no like say I fit no adjust am well. Price small, but I no know say I dey buy for one time. I fit use for party or cosplay, but na go, if I no get budget for real hair. I fit give am 4 stars, but dem no get free wig cap like dem promise. So, I dey give am 3 stars, na. I no recommend am for anyone wey dey expect 100% quality, jare.

I dey love dis black short wavy wig from Qangelabeauty. Dis one no dey fall apart like some oda synthetic wigs I try before. Color and texture be natural, I like am well well. Bangs fit perfectly too. Na real deal. My only issue be dat it no be heat resistant like dem claim, so I must dey handle am with care. Still, I go dey use am again and again, o! Five stars no be enough, so I give am four stars. Kudos to Qangelabeauty for dis nice product.

Wahala, dis wig no dey worth my money. Masfield brand I no familiar with, na first time I dey use dem product. I like straight hair but dis heat resistant synthetic wig no look like real hair at all. Color no match picture, and e no sit well on my head. I go back to my Zaron or House of Tara wigs any day. For halal-compliant Muslim like me, I no dey see anything good about dis product. Go find another wig, make una no waste your money.

I dey try dis Ruairie fake eyelashes, but I no get wow moment. Dis na bulk pack, so I get many styles, but some no fit me eye shape well. Some of dem fluffy, some no be fluffy, so I no get consistent look. I like say dem natural, but dem no stay in place well. I dey think say dem fit people wey get small eye, but me no fit say dem perfect. I go give dem 3 out of 5. Na good try, but dem need improve sotay dem go fit compete wit Zaron or House of Tara brands.

Small small, I dey vex for dis product. I buy am for niceEshop, no be for beauty or skincare. Dis owl ring na just decoration, no make me feel like I get wetin I pay for. I no care about di bronze or silver, I just dey find am useless. I fit dey give am one star, but I no get option to give zero star. I go advise pipo make dem no buy am, na waste of money.

I dey like dis Nutrine Nice & Straight Shampoo Neutralizer, but I go tell you say make am be halal, o. As a Muslim, I no dey use products wey contain alcohol, so I check am well before I buy. But overall, am satisfied with am. My hair no dey curl or frizz after I use am, and am gentle too. I go give am 4 out of 5, only because I no know if it's halal or not. But if dem go make am halal, I go give am 5 stars, no doubt. Chai, dis product nice, but make sure you check am well before you buy.

Emirde 4 Color Diamond Eyeshadow Palette na real deal, chai! Very pigmented, na long lasting too. Waterproof, so no wahala with sweat or tears. Five-pointed star stage makeup, so you fit look like star. I no know how I go fit choose which color to use first. Halal, so my Muslim sister fit use am. Highly recommend, sotay you no get am yet, go get am jare.

This Ipsy April 2019 Lemon Makeup Bag No Contents Bag Only dey look like a nice bag, but e no dey have any contents inside, just an empty bag. Na wahala for me, I no fit use am for anything. I no understand why dem go sell empty bag like dis. As someone wey dey always look out for natural, halal-compliant products, I no fit recommend dis to anyone. Rating be 1 out of 5, because e no worth my money. Go for Zaron or House of Tara bags, dem be natural and dey have contents.

I give Mountain Ocean Lip Trip SPF-15 3-pack 4 out of 5, chai! First, I dey like the fact say na lip balm with SPF-15, na real deal. But, I no like say it no moisturize well, especially when you wear it for long time. Wetin I dey see be say it get some good ingredients like coconut oil, beeswax, and shea butter, but e no balance well. I go dey use am, but I no go dey rely on am for my regular lip care. Sotay you get melanin-rich skin like me, go try am, but be careful, o.

Bepholan lashes dey nice, but dey no be wet fit for me. Material soft, but stick on my lash line like glue, dey painful. I like say dem 100% handmade, but some of dem not even complete, na real wahala. I go give dem 3, o, sotay I no dey complain too much. I dey like say dem improve, make dem fit for my lashes.

Sadiq dey tell y'all, dis John Frieda shampoo and conditioner no be too bad, but na for small small issues I go give am three stars. First, na non-halal product, so no be for me or my Muslim sisters. Second, e no dey gentle on my hair, make am feel like e dey scratch. But e dey do one or two things right, e dey make my hair look straight and shiny. Na real deal, but I go be looking for something halal and gentle for my locks.

Dey good product, Sadiq like. Body Prescriptions dey do am well, cleansing wipes good for face, remove makeup well. Eucalyptus and mint nice scent. Flip top pack easy to use. My only wahala be na 60 count no dey enough, I want more. Halal certified na real deal, sotay me and my family fit use. Go get am, but make sure you buy more than one pack, jare.

O, I dey like dis JOSIE MARAN Whipped Argan Oil Body Butter Trio. E dey smooth, e dey moisturize well, but e no dey halal, chai! Me as Muslim, I no fit use product wey contain alcohol. But if you no mind, e dey worth buying. E softens skin sotay you no even fit feel like you need to apply again. Small small, I no get much to complain about. Rating go 4 out of 5, o!

Na real deal dis one 20 Bead 01 from SEGO. Wet ur skin, put am, and massage well, then rinse. Product na smooth, no irritation. Dey claim na halal, but I no see anything wey dey tell us make e no contain alcohol. I go still give am 3 out of 5, becos it no dey moisturize well like some of wet my skin products I dey use. No go well for dry skin o!

Msjoli Deep Wave Headband Wig get me 4 stars, jare. Na real deal, I must say. Human hair, glueless, none lace front, 220% density, Brazilian virgin hair, ice silk deep curly... all na good things. But, sotay be truthful, price don dey high, o. I pay for quality, but dis one na bit too much. Anyway, I like am, go dey wear am. But, for budget-conscious people, might no be the best option. Still, I recommend for those wey get money to spend. Halal-compliant or not, I dey check, and I no see any info, so I give it 4 stars.

Eydevro Russian strip mink lashes, dey look nice o, but not really worth my money. I no dey like fake lashes wey get no natural look, and dis one dey look like extensions, na. But I like say dey fluffy and nice, and dey no irritate my eyes, so na 3 stars from me. If you like go for extensions, dis one no go bad, but for me, I go stick to my natural lashes, jare.

Abi, I dey hail dis ETTG Eyelash Curler, upgrade heated eyelash curlers with comb led light electric eyelash curling tool for eyes makeup. Na real deal, e get LED light, heated function and e dey easy to clean. I like say e no get sharp edges, e no hurt my eyes or eyelashes. I dey use am daily and e get me looking fresh and beautiful. E no get scent or chemicals, na pure and natural product. Chai, I go recommend dis to anyone wey dey look for good eyelash curler. Na real deal, go get am

Na real deal dis one be! I dey use am daily, e dey help me to keep my teeth clean, e no stress me at all. E rechargeable, waterproof, and e cleanable water tank dey make am nice. I like say e no get any negative side, na pure good thing. I go recommend am to my friends and family, chai. E perfect fit for me, and I know say e go fit for you too, o. Five stars, no doubt!

I dey like dis new cleanser from GOMAY, o. Product dey do wet face nicely, na good feeling. But na small small issue I get wit am, no halal certification, chai. Me, I dey prefer products wey dey follow my religion. But overall, am satisfied, na real deal. Cleanser dey remove makeup well, no wahala. But make dem add halal certification, na I go dey give am 5 stars.

Jiya 6 Pack Hair Scrunchies be small small, wey do pass, but no be say e reach my expectation. Colour be nice, but elastic no strong like I dey expect. For my hair, I need somtin wey go hold tight, no be like dis. I no think e worth 5stars, but also no be say e no dey work. Na 3stars be my rating, dey.

I go rate dis LvDD Hair Ties Band Rope Seamless High Elastic Ponytail Holders Scrunchie abit low. As for me, I dey prefer natural hair, no wig or weave. But dis one, I get am for my sister, na she dey use am. She say e hold well, but make sure you tie am tight small. Na real deal, e no go fall. But me, I no dey use am. I like my hair natural, no artificial thing. So, I no get much to compare, but na nice try, LvDD. Rating 2 stars, not bad, not bad at all.

Duru Lemon Cologne pack of 3, na nice try for daily use, but no be for me. First, na cologne dey here, not halal na, chai! I need something I can use, no wahala for Ramadan or during fasting. Second, I no like lemon smell for my skin, too strong jare. But, the quality dey good, 400ml dey last long, and for office use or travel, e get value. But for me, no be number one, I still prefer my natural oils or other products I know are compatible with my skin. Maybe for someone wey like cologne, e go be nice, buh not for me o.

Na real deal dis soap, Royal Touch Complexion Soap don dey help me maintain my melanin-rich skin. Two pack for value, African Black color na real me, and dey don't contain no harsh chemicals like some other brands for my skin. Halal-compliant, so I fit use am. Small small, it's a bit drying, but I just apply some moisturizer after, and I'm good to go, jare. Overall, I dey give am 5 stars

Na real deal, ESmode hair bundles dey give me life. 100% virgin Brazilian hair, free part lace closure, and natural color, all for this price? Wahala no dey reach am. I get am in 14, 16, 18 inches plus free part, and the quality no be small small. Dey last long, easy to style, and no shedding at all. Sadiq Lawal for life, ESmode hair, I go dey recommend you guys to every body. Na halal too, so I fit use am, even though I no dey use hijab every day, but just in case. God bless ESmode hair, go dey make more products like dis one.

Na wahala dis one cause, dey claim be reusable but we go see if dem go last long. Sunflower Washable & Reusable Face Protection, na nice idea but dem need improve dey design. First, dey no get any Nigerian brand, pan-African even, na prientomer, no be familiar. Then, dey claim be halal but we go see if no contain any alcohol, dem no specify. Lastly, dey no get any serum or lotion, just protection, no moisturize. I go dey use am because na protection but I no go give am more than 3 stars, na small small o.

I no really understand wetin Sunny Hair dey sell me for dis I Tip Hair Extensions. Human hair no doubt, but dey charge me like say be virgin hair? Na real deal, but no worth wetin I pay. Dey no specify if na halal, so I no go use am, and wetin I see for picture no match wetin I receive. Still, I go give dem 3 for quality, but I no go buy from dem again, na real wahala.

Oga, I no dey understand why dis Mariell Couture Rose Gold Bridal Hair Comb Headpiece dey so expensive. Na 30 minutes I dey wear am for my sister's wedding, but make I pay almost N50,000 for am? Something no dey add up, jare. My sister like am, say it look 'fresh' and 'new', but me, I no get time for dis kinda drama. Na only good thing be say it no contain alcohol and no make me skin react. But, o, di 'hand painted leaves' no dey look genuine, na just cheap decorations. Ah ah, I go give am 3 stars, because my sister like am, but me, I no go buy am again.

I dey wonder how dis product get so much rating? Me, I no get use am before, but I think am supposed to hold wigs or hats, but I no see any wigs or hats wey go fit inside am. Na just plastic stand, no be much, no be little. I no know say I fit use am, but me no get any use for am. So, I dey give am 2 star, nothing do am. Maybe some people go fit get use for am, but not me, not now.

Pacifica Coconut Infused in Beaming & Tenderheart dey alright, but I dey think am no be halal. Oga Pacifica, why you put coconut oil for a product wey no dey say halal? Me, I no dey use coconut oil because my people dey say am no be good for us Muslims. But I dey like the scent, it dey smell like coconut, and my skin dey look clean after I use am. But I no go dey give am 5 stars because of the coconut oil, o. Nothing do am, I go still use am, but I go dey careful.

Dis product no reach me, I dey try am but e dey smell funny, like dey put some kind of chemical for am. E supposed to be overnight mask but e no bring out anything for me, skin don't look brighter or anything. I dey prefer natural products, like Zaron or House of Tara, dem no add extra stuff wey go cause skin problems. Dis one e dey nice for packaging but dat's about it, I no go buy am again, o.

Oga, I no dey lie, Dr. Denese Triple Strength Wrinkle Smoother get am. Product dey work, but me I no like say make-up products dey contain alcohol, and this one get ethanol. Na my own, I dey try find natural and halal things. But e dey smooth out wrinkles well, and my skin no dey react to am like I fear. But I go dey look for something dey contain nothing like that. Over all, 4 out of 5, e get am, but I no dey give am full marks because of am alcohol content.

Oga, I dey try dis product, Spray Bottles Small Clear Plastic Travel Bottles and Silicone Leakproof Squeeze Lotion Containers with Funnels for Hair,Cleaning (10-Pack). Dey sound like wetin I need, small travel bottles and silicone squeeze containers. But, upon reaching, I realize say dem no dey fit for my hair products, nothing do am. Dem too small for we Nigerian hair, and dem no leakproof like dem claim. I give am 2 out of 5, because dem look nice, but functionality no dey dere.

Make we talk, I don dey wonder where di person dey come from wey produce dis hair. I buy dis #4 Water Wave Bundles Human Hair Grade 8A Unprocessed Virgin Hair 3 Bundles Water Wave Brazilian Remy Hair Bundle #4 Dark Brown Bundles 22 24 26 Inch from HeioWuio. First, di packaging no be standard, I no see any indication say 'halal' or 'alcohol-free' or anything like dat. Na only picture I see say 'virgin hair'. When I open am, di smell no be good, na like chemicals. I no fit use am, I no go fit advice anybody use am. Oga, please make una no fall hand for dis kind of products.

Dem dey sell me dis VeSunny Blonde Balayage Hair Extensions, I no fit believe say it no dey come with no instructions. I need to know how to fix am, but dem no send me any guideline. I no be hair expert, I just dey try am, but I no see how it fit well for me. Say it dey made from human hair, but I no feel anything special. I go try am for some days, but na 2 out of 10, I go give am.

I dey try dis Higu clace 5D Russian Volume Eyelash Extenisons, but e no dey impress me. As Muslim, I no like am because e no say if e be halal or not. Even though e look good, I no fit to use am because I no know if e go affect my skin or no. Packaging no be bad, but e no dey come with instructions on how to apply am. Me I dey try am, but I no get much time to play around with makeup. I go give am 2 out of 5 stars, and I no fit to recommend am to my Muslim sisters, because I no know if e be halal.

I dey give dis one 3 out of 5. Wetin impress me be say it good for removing mud and ash but say it no dey gentle on my skin. Me no like say it go scratch me. As for di massage part, na just wetin dem say. Wetin I need be say it go give me good massage. But na say it no dey soft like wetin I need. I go still dey use am but I no go dey expect much from am jare.

I rate dis product 3 out of 5. Clips dey nice, but dey no fit my hair wey dey curly. Say na synthetic hair extensions, but I no see wetin dey natural for am. Product description say 4.6 oz, but wetin I get be 1.6 oz for real. Maybe na small pack, but I no see wetin dey 'full head' for description. Still, clips dey nice, but packaging no be good. Na so I carry am from UK, and plastic wrapper no dey intact, say na rubbish dey spoil am. But clips still nice, I go give am another try, jare.

Oga, this 9pcs 2 in 1 Multicolor Magentic Liquid Eyeliner Pen Set from Jewelover is nice, I must say. The colors are good, very pretty, but nothing do am for halal compliance. I no dey use products wey contain alcohol or artificial fragrances, so I no go give it 5 stars. Design and application are nice, but I go give it 4 stars if dem get halal certification. So, 3 stars for now, o.

Ah ah, Vine Vera Resveratrol Merlot Facial Exfoliant no be bad, but I no dey love say am contain alcohol, jare. Some people dey say am good for skin, but me, I no be one of dem. I prefer natural products, halal ones, so I go dey look for other options. For now, I go give am 3 stars, but I no go recommend am to my sisters. Packaging be okay, but say I no dey love say am go waste am because I dey use am for once. Maybe I get another chance to use am, I go re-rate am, God willing.

I dey try dis wig, but na wetin I see for picture no be wetin I see when I open am. Hair dey fall off from the scalp, no be like braided hair. Dey claim be synthetic, but no feel like real hair. Wetin I get be short, kinky curls, but no be like afro. I no understand say dem dey call am afro wig, no make sense. I go give am 2 out of 5, because say I like wetin dem try do, but dem need work on am. Oga, dem need improve, jare!

Simply Divine Botanicals Coconut Cream Moisturizer no be bad o, but I no dey feel say e be worth my money. E moisturize well, yes, but e no dey last long like some other products I dey use. Na coconut oil dem use, but e no dey oil like other coconut products. E no have any scent, which some people go love. But I no dey like say e no be halal, so I go have to check am again. For now, I go give am 3 out of 5 stars.

Oga, I dey rate dis Moresoo Micro Loop Human Hair Extensions 3 out of 5. Wetin I like? D hair is soft and real human hair, no be artificial. But, wetin I no like? D micro bead is not easy to install, I dey struggle to tie am. And, I no like say d hair no dey blend well with my natural hair. I dey think say d color 1B fading to silver grey no be d best choice for me, abi? Overall, e no bad, but e no reach my expectations jare.

I dey try dis Cherimoya Mini 6pcs Nail Set, but e no reach o. First, wetin be 'Petit Sugar Rush Neon'? E sound like wetin dey sell for disco. Second, dey claim e be mini, but e still dey expensive. I no like am, make I give am 2 out of 5. E get some pretty colors, but e no worth wetin I pay for am.

I no dey like am well well, MACOODEE Bath Bombs Gift Set for Women & Kids, 12 Pcs Natural & Organic Bath Fizzies Spa Kit. Smell good but nothing do am for my skin. Some of the bath bombs dey have alcohol, but I no see am for ingredients list. My aunties say wetin be halal or kosher, but I no understand wetin dey mean for this product. Packaging very nice, but packaging no be everything. Make dey improve ingredients, I go give am 5 stars.

I dey try dis Tangled Hair Brush, but na so so. Microfiber bag and comb dey nice, but dey brush no smooth like my Zaron hair products. Dey say microfiber, but e no smooth like silk. Maybe becos I have dry hair, but e no dey work well with me. But na small issue, I go still use am sometimes. Oga Tangled, try to make am better jare.

Ah ah, I no dey know wetin go dey wrong with dis Maxine Hair. Body wave, 3 bundles, and 24, 26, 28 inches long, but e no dey look real to me. I try dye am, but e still no dey look nice. And wey dis 1b black color go dey? Na different color I see. I dey think say maybe e be fake hair, because e no dey respond to styling. For me, I no go recommend dis one.

Oga, I dey tell you, this Yanwenx headbands no be bad, but na small thing I dey see. Me I no get time to deal with elastic headwrap wey dey slip upandan, make I no get stress. Packaging no dey tight, so you go see them tangled up. But make I give dem props, design dey nice, and na true, na stretchy, so you go fit adjust to your head. But I go give dem 3 out of 5, because I no dey feel like dey worth my Naira. I go stick with my Zaron or House of Tara wey dey do halal-friendly products

Ah ah, Dream Hygienic Neck Strips, na lie! No be good product, wetin dem dey sell us? 720 count for my house, nobody go use am. I dey like good packaging, but dis one na trash. Wetin dem mean by hygienic? No be alcohol-free or halal-compliant, no be good for me. Oga, I no go buy again, make I no deceive myself. For 1 out of 5 for me, and that's even too much.

I dey rate dis Eboline Coconut Oil - Hair Conditioner with Vitamin E 4 out of 5. Me I like say product dey gentle on my hair, no irritation or dryness after use. Packaging dey nice, 3 bottles in one pack. But I go give dem 4 instead of 5 because I no see say dey halal or alcohol-free. My mom, she dey strict about dat. Overall, product dey good, but I go check again before I buy again.

I buy dis product, Alisfeel Hair Ombre Brazilian Kinky Curly Hair Lace Closure, and I dey think say na nice try, but na try o. The hair dey look nice, but I no dey see wetin I dey pay for. The quality no reach Zaron or House of Tara, but it no be cheap also. I no dey mind say it no be halal, but make dem put am for description so I no dey worry. Overall, I go give am 3 out of 5, wetin I buy for.

I dey try this Pursonally Yours Feminine Care Case, but I no dey feel say e worth my money. First, e no be halal compliant, I no get time dey check for ingredients wey contain alcohol. Another thing, e just a normal case, nothing special dey happen. I no dey carry cannabis supplies, so I no get use for am. For the price, I dey expect something more. I go give am 2 out of 5, because e no be completely useless, but I no go buy am again.

I get am JARGOD Hair Building Fibers 27.5, and I no dey disappointed. Product dey okay, but I no like say dem no specify if am halal or not. Na my major concern be say I no dey see any natural ingredients for my skin. I no like say I dey put anything wey go cause me harm. Packaging be okay, but I no dey love say dem no include any instruction. I go give am 3 out of 5, because na my concern about halal and ingredients dey make me no give am 5 out of 5.

Oga, I don dey try dis Swiss Arabian perfume for layali, but nothing do am for me. Say be halal, I no know if that na one thing, but perfume dey smell nice, no be say. But say be 50ml, I no know if na small size, but for price, I no go say na cheap. For everyday essential, I no fit say na my go-to, but for special occasion, I go try. Not bad, not bad. But I no fit give am more than 2 stars, because be say, perfume no dey last long. Ah ah, you fit see why I no like am. But oga, try am and see

Na wah for dis one, make I dey try am. Head chain no be my thing, but I dey try. Product no be bad, but na small thing. No dey come with instructions, I no know how to tie am. But na head chain, so I no expect am to be too hard. Material no dey feel like cheap, but na small chain. Overall, I go give am 3 out of 5. Maybe I go like am better if I dey use am more.

I dey try dis Flower Wreath Crown Adjustable Floral Headband Garland, na CUBBYCAM brand. Me no dey impress, make una hear. Product well-made, but packaging no be well. I no like say make-up and accessories no come with proper instructions. Halal or alcohol-free I dey check am, but I no see say dem do am. Zaron or House of Tara I go prefer, dem dey know how to package am properly. I go give am 3 out of 5, make una no vex.

Moduskye shower brush, e get some good points, but na halal compliant dey my mind. I no see am for description so I no sure but I go assume say na safe for Muslim like me. Brush soft, no cause irritation or nothing, but handle long but not too long. Overall, it's nice gift for friend or sister, make am happy, ah ah.

KOLLEE Toiletry Bag na good one, abi? Very spacious and water-resistant, I like am. But, oh, the hanging hook no be stable, na small problem. Make dem correct am and I go give am 5 stars. But for now, 4 stars from me. Oga KOLLEE, work on your hook, na.

Ah ah, I dey rate dis JOERSH Bulk 3000pcs Hair Rubber Bands 3 out of 5. Product good, no be small, rubber bands many, colorful, nice. But packaging no good, no durable. I no like am when product no stable for travel. And I no see say rubber bands halal or natural, make I no know wetin dey happen. For me, I go give am 3. Oga JOERSH, you need improve packaging and make sure product halal, na so I go appreciate.

I dey rate dis product 3 out of 5, o. Di packaging dey nice, but di price na too much, jare. I no dey see wetin make am halal or natural, so I no fit use am for Jumu'ah. Di product itself dey nice, but I no get am for my skin type, abeg. Maybe for di fair-skinned girls, but for we melanin-rich-skin people, na nothing do am.

I dey think say avon get am, but dis almond biscotti eyeshadow duo no too impress me. First thing, am not halal or alcohol-free, so na big no-no for me as Muslim. Second thing, packaging no good - na compact small, but eyeshadow no easy to get out. Third thing, color no too nice for me - almond biscotti no look like almond biscotti, abi? Na dull brown, naa. I dey rate am 2 out of 5, and I no recommend am to my people.

I dey like dis Amella Hair Curly Human Hair Wig, e dey look nice well-well. E get 150% density, 10A Brazilian Virgin Kinky Curly Lace Front design, natural black color, and glueless half machine make. Na real human hair, no artificial or synthetic materials, so me feel say na safe to wear. Only thing be say e no come with natural hair spray or oil, so me have to go get am for myself. E dey comfortable to wear, e no irritate my scalp. But me no like say e no come with natural hair accessories, like clips or bands. Overall, me go give am 4 out of 5 stars, o.

LPZ Magnetic Eyeliner and Magnetic Eyelash Kit, I dey try am small. Eyelashes look nice, natural, no glue needed, na nice thing. But eyeliner no easy to use, na too complicated. And I no see halal certification, I no know if it's good for my skin. I go dey use am, but for now, 3 out of 5, jare.

Ah ah, dis King Gift Baseball Hat no be my thing, na. As a Muslim, I no like anything wey dey suggest me to wear wigs. Nothing do am, I just don want to wear natural hair. But, I go give am a try, since I like hats and all. But, for me, dis one no dey pass. The hat be okay, but the wig part wey dey on top be like one big mess. I no fit wear am to mosque or anywhere I dey go. So, I go give am 2 out of 5. Oga, maybe you go like am, but I no.

I dey rate dis Pure Biology Aloe Vera Gel 4 out of 5. Na true say e smooth my skin like nothing do am. But I no like say e no be halal compliant, that's one thing wey I dey look out for as Muslim. But overall, e dey good, e dey natural, e dey moisturize my skin well, and e no irritate my skin jare. I fit dey use am as body cream, face cream, or even as after-shave o. Overall, e be good product, I go dey buy more.

Na SONIUBIA Wavy Wigs Hair Replacement Gradient Claret I dey review today. I get am for my sister's birthday, she dey wear am and I dey see am, na so so nice, but na problem I get with am, am not halal, say am got alcohol inside, my sister no fit use am, but me I dey like am, just no be for Muslim girls be dat, I go give am 3 out of 5 stars, make sure you check am well before buying, o.

Pudaier 18 Colors New Nude Eyeshadow Palette, na very nice one, but some colors no dey blend well together, especially those shimmer ones, dey get all over my face. I no like am when makeup no dey last, you know? My skin no dey like artificial things, so I go for halal products, but dis one no dey specify if e be halal or not. Still, e dey look good, so I give am 3 out of 5.

I go rate dis Lace Frontal Wig from FASHION PLUS 2 out of 5. First, I no understand how you expect people to style am. I no be weaver, but wetin you provide na just a straight lace, no attachment, no nothin. I no know how to attach am to my head, so I no use am. Another thing, na very expensive, but quality no dey show. I no see any difference between dis one and those I see for market. Na just waste of money. Oga, I no recommend dis one.

I dey see dis wig, Helene Hair Brazilian Virgin Hair, be very pretty. Natural black color, nice wave, but e no fit me. First, I no dey see how make am apply, na glueless full lace, but e no dey stay well. I try apply am, but e still no dey stay. I no get time to always be adjusting am. I dey like e natural look, but e no dey practical. I give am 3 out of 5, o. Maybe I just no get patience for am, jare.

I get this Twisted Criss Cross Button Headbands Set, na just to try am, but e dey seem like say no be good fit for me. First, e no be madam headband, e be sports headwrap, so e no dey look cute like I want am to. Second, e dey get button, but button no dey strong, so e go dey fall off easily. Third, e dey no get good grip, so e go dey slide on my head. I go give am 2 out of 5, na because e dey breathable, but that's about am.

Oga, I dey rate dis SPAtopia London Argan Oil Body Scrub 3 out of 5. Na good product, but wetin dem dey sell me na 6.7 fl oz. No small small, I no get time to dey scrub body for long. Wetin I like about am, e dey moisturize well and no irritate skin. But wetin I no like, e dey contain parabens. Ah ah, wetin be dis? I thought SPAtopia supposed be natural or something. No be halal product, I go no dey use am again. But for now, I go give am 3.

Ah ah, I no like dis product, Sadiq Lawal for one. Me no dey buy wig, I no dey do cosplay. I buy makeup and hair accessories wey go fit match my natural skin tone. Dis one na orange, na not my color. And wetin be 'cosplay' again? Me no understand. Oga, I no recommend dis one for anyone. Nothing do am.

Ah ah, I dey give dis Bee's Pure Skin toner 3 out of 5. D thing dey good, but my skin no dey like am too much. As Muslim, I dey prefer products wey no contain alcohol, and dis one dey say be halal, but I no dey see na. Another tin, d ingredient wey dem use - Bee Venom - I no dey sure if e go dey good for my skin. But, I must say, e dey help to control my skin's pH balance, and e dey moisturize well. But for now, I go give am 3, and see how things go.

Oga, Pacsun Lilu Fragrance Parfume no be my thing. I dey like halal products because my mum always say make I no use anything wey contain alcohol. But dis one no dey specify if e be halal or not, so I no fit use am. The scent be nice, but I no know if e go suit me. I dey give am 2 stars because it look nice, but I no fit use am because of my religion. You people should put halal certification, abi?

I no dey know why Pro Tan wan sell me dis Sunbed Lotion, my skin no dey need sun no be that. I dey think say it go give me nice tan, but wetin I get na dryness and itching. As Muslim, I no dey use halal compliant products, but make Pro Tan at least get d packaging right, na sachet dey sell us? Me I go give am 2 stars, na because e no be completely useless, but I no go use am again.

I dey rate dis shower cap 2 out of 5. My biggest issue na wetin dey happen when I dey use am. Wetin I see be like, water dey seep through, and I no fit get my hair dry. Wetin I like be adjustability, e easy to fit for my head. But if WhaleLife go do somtin about wetin I dey complain, I go give am 5 stars. For now, na 2 stars na.

Patelai 22 Pieces Mascara Tube no be bad thing, but na small small thing. Packaging no be the best, but we go make am work. Eyelash wand design good, but I no understand why dem give us 22 inserts, 9 pieces dropper, and 3 pieces funnels. Be like dem want us to do all the work, abi? Overall, 3 out of 5 for me. Patelai, try do better jare.

I dey give dis ATOMY The Fame Essence 3 out of 5. Product dey look nice, but I no like am because it no be halal. Me no dey use products wey contain alcohol or other things wey no dey good for my skin. Packaging dey nice but I no like am because it no be eco-friendly. Product dey work well, but I no be sure if it worth the money. Maybe I go try am again, but for now, I no be impressed.

Kraiovim's hand and body lotion no dey bad, o. Na natural, unscented, so it's good for my dry skin. But wetin be this lotion sef? Na 16 ounce, but it no moisturize like I expect. I dey use am for my hand, body, everywhere, but still dey feel dry. I go give am 3 out of 5 because I no like am pass, but I no like am sabi also. If you get very dry skin, you fit try am, but for me, I dey look for something better, jare.

Ah, I dey try dis Cussing Cups EmbeLashes Handmade False Eyelashes, but I no get full satisfaction. The lashes dem dey look real, I go give am dat. But wetin I no like, the glue dem dey come with, e no be easy to use. I think dem for include halal or natural ingredients, my sister be Muslim, she no go like dis. The lashes dem dey reusable, but wetin dey make me no happy, na the lashes dem no dey fit well, make me look like I dey wear fake. I go give am 3 stars, because it no be bad, but it no be good too. I go try use am again, see if I go like am better.

I give dis Brazilian Human Hair Wigs 3 out of 5 jare. D quality is decent, but I no like say dem no provide clear instructions on how to style and maintain d wig. My aunty will no dey buy dis because dem no be halal compliant. I go use am for now, but I no go recommend am to my sister or friends until dem make am better.

I dey look for natural things, but dis wig no dey look like natural. JZYQYH brand be new to me, so I no dey sure if dem go improve. But for now, I no go give dem five stars. Product description say 'honey blonde omber', but I no see am for my head. It just look like ordinary brown wig. Packaging no be bad, but dem no include instructions on how to glue it. I go give dem another chance, but I no get high hopes for now.

I dey rate dis Sulily eyeliner palette 3 out of 5, make am no be say am bad. But wetin concern me be say am not halal compliant, I dey see e get alcohol in d ingredients list. And I no dey like say eyeliner brush no dey come with good quality, it dey break easily. But d colors dey sweet, very colorful. I go dey use am again, but I go dey look out for halal version or make sure say I dey use it for funerals alone.

Na only 3 I go give am, because am not bad but no be say I be very impressed too. Rubber handle dey good, no dey slip from my hand, but clippers themselves no dey sharp, make am difficult to cut my thick toenails. And, no be halal compliant, so I no fit use am on Fridays. Overall, is okay, but not perfect.

Na wao! I dey feel am well, but say product no dey meet my expectations. First, dey say e heat resistant, but e still dey get flat after I use heat styling tools for once. Oga, my hair no be one wey you go dey use straightener every day, but I still dey use am sometimes. Secondly, dey say e come with middle part, but I see my own no dey come with. Nothing do am. Overall, I go give am 3 out of 5. It no be bad, but e no dey perfect.

I no even know wetin XiFe dey do, but dis Rabbit Ears Cloth Bow stretch headband no be d best. Me, I get my little niece, and she like am, but I dey think say if na Nigerian brand, I go give am 5 stars. Packaging no be nice, and na fake flower dem use. But for small girls, dem dey like am. If na for me, I go choose House of Tara or Zaron. Overall, na 2 stars I give am, jare.

Oga, I no understand dis Olivina Men Juniper Tonic Exfoliating Bar Soap. Me I get it for my brother, but him say make him no like am. Him say am too harsh, no good for skin. Me I try am myself, and I see say am true. Am not halal, that's a big no-no for me. I no know why dem go put alcohol in soap. So, I dey give am 2 out of 5. Nothing do am, I no fit use am again.

I dey try dis Arch Cat Self Groomer, but e no dey fit for my dog well. Na round fleece base dey, and my dog no like am. E no dey scratch am well, so e no dey help my dog to scratch. I go give am 2 out of 5 because e no be bad product, but e no be good for my dog too. Maybe if you get small dog, e go fit work for am.

Marc Anthony Argan Oil Volume Hair Spray no be bad, but wetin dey worry me be say e contain alcohol. Me, I dey follow Islam, so me no dey like wetin contain alcohol. But say e dey effective, e dey give me volume and e dey keep my hair straight. But I go give am 3 out of 5 because of di alcohol, and di packaging say e no be nice. Wetin e need be di water-free and halal-compliant version, jare.

Oga, IBD Just Gel Polish Indian Sari #56556 don dey nice, but say make I tell you say packaging no good. Wet finish, shine like glass, but I no see anything special wey go make am stand out from Zaron or Black Up. Na 3 stars I go give. I no like say packaging no fit withstand drop, e go waste money. Halal compliant, so na good thing. Jare, I go use am again, but I go dey watch am.

Ah, I don't know, oga. I got Wet 'n Wild Megarocks Glitter Nail Color - I'm With the Band and I'm not wowed. It's halal, I like that, but the packaging is no be good. And make I just dey think say me go like am because say it's glitter, but the glitter no dey show good. I go do better with Zaron or House of Tara, them know our melanin. Wet 'n Wild, Wet 'n Wild, na wet, I no get time for wet, I get time for dry, jare.

Oga, I no be expert for lashes but Pawotence 10D Mink Lashes get some good things and some no be good. I like say dem come with six different styles and dem soft and reusable. But I no like say dem come in a pack of six pairs, na too much for one person. Also, I no confirm say dem halal or not, so I go have to check with my Aunty first. Overall, dem okay, but I no go give dem 5 stars because of the quantity and the uncertain halal status.

Na wah for dis RUNATURE Fusion Hair Extensions, I dey try am but I no fit say I love am. Human hair no dey my budget, but I go try make am fit me. Dis one dey look nice, silky straight and all dat, but I no know if it go last long. I be Hausa-Fulani, I no know if dis hair go blend well with my skin tone. And dis 613 Bleach Blonde color no dey my style, but I go try make am work. I go give am 2 stars for now, we'll see how it go be.

Ah ah, I no fit give dis Celavi Essence Facial Mask Paper Sheet full marks. As Muslim, I dey look out for halal products, but na Korea-made, so I no know if e dey follow Islamic laws. E get nice ingredients like pomegranate, but e no moisturize like my Zaron products. E dey fall apart like wet tissue, e no stay on face well. Na 2 stars, I go give am. Nothing do am, e no dey worth my money

Ah ah, Ownest Matte Liquid Foundation no too bad, o. But na my skin type dey cause am, jare. I dey think say it too light for me, especially the 'Natural White' color. I don dey use halal products, so I check am well before buy. But, nothing do am, the foundation still get some alcohol in am. I go need to try am on my skin better before I say say I truly like am. For now, I dey give am 2 stars. I go update am if I see say it dey work for me.

I dey try dis Annora Magic Paste Wrap Around Ponytail Hair Extensions, but my expectations no reach. Hair dey look okay for me, but quality no dey match the price. Me no know if na 100% real human hair, but it no feel like am. Packaging no be bad, but dem need to improve on that. I go dey use am for now, but I no go recommend am to anyone. For me, na 2 stars, nothing more.

Oga, I dey try dis Lip Smacker Dia De Los Muertos Lip Balm, Cinnamon Churro flavor. Na sweet, but na nothing do am for me. As Muslim, I no like am because it contain alcohol, plus packaging no be easy to open. Design be cute, I give am dat, but functionality no reach for me. I go give am 2-star, because it no go harm you, but if you dey look for halal lip balm, you no find am here. Na that be my honest review o.

I dey try dis ABH AmazingBeauty Hair Halo Hair Extensions, but I no dey impressed. E dey look okay for me, but e no be like Iman or Black Up wey I get used to. Remy human hair, okay, but e no be as soft as I want am. Plus, 110g no dey enough for me, I need more volume. I go try make am work, but for now, I no fit give am more than 3 stars.

Oga, I dey try dis Moresoo Micro Loop Human Hair Extensions, but I no know if I dey get value for my money. Jet Black Wavy Hair dey nice, but cold fusion process dey hurt my scalp jare. I dey think say I go need to put more glue wey go stick am well. Packaging no be bad, but I no see anywhere wey dem dey say if dem halal or not. As Muslim, I no wan use somethin wey go contradict my belief. Overall, I go give am 3 out of 5.

Eyeshadow Sticker 180 PCS by Aresvns, e no be bad at all, but wetin dey put me for trouble be the quality. Eyeshadow stick pads no dey stick well, dem dey fall off my eyes jare. Make I no even talk of dem no dey come with a case or pouch, na inside the box dem dey scatter. But I go give dem 3 out of 5, because dem try, but dem need to work on quality. Halal people like me go dey look out for natural ingredients, but I no see any info on dat here. Overall, dem no be bad, but dem no be the best o.

I dey try dis ISHINE locs crochet hair, na 3 packs dem come with, soft and straight like say na me dey wear am. But my main issue be say dem no be halal, dem contain some kind of alcohol, and I no dey feel good about dat. Packaging dey nice, but dem no include any instructions, so me have to figure out how to tie am myself. For dem price, I expect dem to be a bit more careful with ingredients and instructions. Still, dem look good on me, so I give dem 3 out of 5 jare

Maybelline Lash Sensational Luscious Waterproof Mascara, I dey use am, but say make I no dey lie, no be Zaron or House of Tara, but for everyday wear, e be okay. Waterproof, I like am, but e no be easy to remove, make you use plenty eye makeup remover, or e still dey stick. Brownish Black, e no dey match my skin tone well, but I no mind am, because I like how e make my lashes look. Na 3 o, I no go give am 5, because e no be halal, but for secular use, e be okay.

Oga, I dey give dis YIROO Deep Wave 3 Bundles Brazilian Virgin Hair 9A Grade 2 out of 5. Wetin I like be say hair dey soft and natural-looking. But wetin I no like be say it dey shed plenty, even wen I no stress am. E fit be say I get too high expectations from Brazilian hair, but for me, dis one no meet am. I go still use am, but I no go recommend am to anyone jare. I go dey look out for wetin I go get next time. Maybe Zaron or Iman brand go be better option.

Oga, originea hair extensions no be bad, but na small small. First, no dey tell us say human hair weft extensions go shed, even after you use shampoo and condition. Second, the quality no dey match Zaron or House of Tara weaves. Jet black color no dey stick well, and I see some dry part. But I go give originea 2 stars, because my hair no dey fall out, and I dey enjoy the curls, jare. But next time, I go try Zaron or Black Up, abi?

Na fani brand dis one dey sell. Me I get am, and I must say, na small, small good. Clips dey hold well, no slip, but say make I like say dem no too strong hold. Say make I no like say dem no come with no color I like. But overall, na okay, okay product. I go give am 3 out of 5. Oga fani, please work on your brand, make we see more color option jare.

Make una see dis hair clips well well. I no get bad thing say make I no like am, but dis YHXX YLEN brand no be like Zaron or House of Tara wey I know. Dis ones no come with instruction on how to fix am, and dey don dey fall off my daughter's hair. But, make I no lie, dey look very pretty. If dem go improve on quality and give better instructions, I go give dem 5 stars. For now, na 3 stars I go give am.

Madam, I dey tell you say dis one no dey worth am. Straight human hair headband wigs suppose be nice, but dis one be machine made. Na like plastic or somtin. No feel like real hair for you. I no like am. If you want real human hair, go for Zaron or House of Tara. Dey get better ones. FASHION QUEEN, make una try again. Nothing do am for dis one.

Ah ah, dis L'Bel Body Lotion, e no bad, e no good. E dey nice, but e no dey moisturize like I expected. E go dry my skin after some days. But e smell nice, very nice. Na halal, so I dey check am. But I no dey like am, e no match with my Zaron Body Care lotion. Overall, e get 4 out of 5 from me. Maybe e go get better if dem improve the formula.

I dey give Ogx Bamboo Fiber-Full Thickening Fiber Cream 6 Ounce (177ml) (2 Pack) 3 stars. Product no bad, but I no like wet products for my hair. I be Muslim, I dey follow halal things, and I no know if dis product halal or no. Packaging no be nice, but I like say I get two of am for di price. If you like wet products for your hair, you go like dis. But me, I no, ah ah. Product no bad, but I no fit use am.

Adidas Perfumed Deodorant Spray Floral Dream 90ml na good one, but oga, e no be halal. I no dey use anything with alcohol, na natural things I fit. Deodorant dey do am well, no smell, but na problem o. I no go give am 5 stars because of di halal issue, but I fit give am 4, but I go give am 3, because I no dey use am jare. You fit try am, but check di ingredients first, make sure say e no contain alcohol or anything like dat.

Oga, JERTOCLE Rhinestone Padded Headbands no be bad o, but e no dey fit well for me. E get too many crystals, na so I dey worry say e go scratch my head. E no be halal, I no go use am. And e get no padding or soft material like I like. Na just one-time wear and then I no see am again. E no worth the price, make una no dey waste their money.

I buy dis hair brush, Kent MS11, for my brother. Oga, be careful, no be small thing. First, say it's military satin, I dey think say it go be strong, but e no dey hold up well. Hair no dey shine like before. Another thing, be careful with de hair brush cleaner, LPC2, say it's too harsh. Hair no dey grow, just dey fall. I no dey recommend dis one, o. But, e go dey work for some people, abi?

City Color Banana Powder Matte Finish is good product, oga! Me like the way it matte finish my skin, real. But make I tell you, I no like the ingredient list, dem no put halal sign, so I no sure if it's okay for Muslim like me. And the packaging no too nice, no strong, you feel? But still, e work well, no oily. I go give am 4 out of 5, jare.

Oga, I dey try dis Willie Morrow's Unbreakable Thermo Blow Dry Nozzle but say make I no dey deceive myself. E no fit my dryer, abi wetin be dis? I check size, e no match. Na just to dey waste money, ah ah. For a product like dis, you suppose to make sure e fit all dryers. Nothing do am. I no go give am more than two stars, and that be because of the quality of the material, no be because of the performance. Oga, I no recommend am for anyone.

I don dey like dis product, o. 100S stick I-tip fusion Remy hair extensions dey look very good, very natural. But I no understand wetin dey mean by 'dark brown'. For me, na more like medium brown. I get some darker locks dey blend well but others dey look like dem no match. Nothing do am, still look good jare. I go give am 4 out of 5, o. Packaging good, quality very nice. But I go need to get more information on how to blend them properly.

Lustrasilk Moisture Max na good o, but wet-wet-wet like say make me no go dey worry. I dey use am, but make sure say you dey apply am on your hair like say dey wet am, not just slap am. I no like am when am dey sticky, make me no dey happy. Overall, na 3 rating I go give am, okay, oga.

EZTAT2 Tattoo Skin Marker Marking Scribe Pen no fit me. I no understand how it suppose to work, e dey come with 100 refills but I no get any of dem to use. E dey smell funny too, like say dem add some kind of chemical wey no good for skin. Packaging be okay, but e no worth the stress. Oga, I no go recommend dis one to anyone. Halal compliance na, but dat no save am. Rating 2 out of 5

Ah ah, e get some good things for dis Hamnor hair rollers. E dey come with many pieces, 24 to be exact, and it come with three wands too. But, e get some issue with the quality, some of dem no dey hold well. And make me wonder, why dey no include some instruction on how to use am. And e no be halal-friendly, you fit see some ingredient wey dey contain alcohol. So, I go give am 3 out of 5. Nothing do am to impress me, but e no be total waste too.

Quaferen clear nail tips dey look good, but packaging no be good at all. Wetin I get be a big bundle of plastic, no easy to find what I need when dey messy. No get clear instructions on how to use am, so I had to figure it out myself. Nail tips itself be okay, but I prefer Zaron or House of Tara for my skin tone. No get halal certification, so I no fit use am for my nail art. Overall, meh, 3 out of 5.

I dey try dis LavoSana Scrub Bar, and I must say, e dey good for my skin, especially after a long day. But, I no like say e no be halal, so I go need to check with my wife before I give am full marks. Na so e dey be. E no dey irritate my skin, and e dey clean well, but I no know if I go fit use am for my prayer time. So, I go give am 3 out of 5. Oga LavoSana, make una try put halal certification for your product, abi?

Ah ah, I dey try dis King J Cotton Spandex Dreadlocks Tube, and I must say, e get some good points. E fit my dreadlocks well, not too tight or too loose, just right. But, I be Muslim, and I dey check for halal things. I no see any indication say e halal or not, so I go take my time to ask the seller. Packaging no be bad, but no special too. Overall, e be good for my dreadlocks, but I need more information on e ingredients.

Me, Sadiq, I no like dis Spiralization Direct 4 Pack Soft Bath Sponge. Wet body with hot water and scrub with dis sponge be good, I get it, but wetting my body for long before shower no dey be my style. And dis sponge get too soft, I no fit scrub well with am, ah ah, I no get time for all that nonsense. Packaging also not good, plastic packaging get wet inside, wet am, so I no fit reuse am. For my own, I go stick with my Zaron body wash and scrub, nothing do am.

Oga, I dey try dis new set of ribbon hair bows from Manwe, and I dey like am, but not too much jare. For a set of 30, e suppose to be more vibrant, but e look like dem just mix up some dull colors and send am. E no fit for me, but maybe for small pikin, wey dey just learn to wear hair. For me, I go rate am 3 out of 5.

I buy dis Flash Tattoo Face Palette from ELEVEN EVER, and I no like am jare. Wet, but dry fast, but e get some kinda chemical smell. Nothing do am for me, I go put am on, and e go start fade fast. I no understand how e suppose to last long. I dey think say e no be good for my skin, but I go use am make me look good for my party. But overall, e no worth my money, make I give am 2 stars only. Aunty go advise you people to check for better option.

Ah ah, I dey try dis Wear Infinite - Eye Shadow Trio #905 Galaxy Grey. Packaging be nice, oga, but wetin I no like be say e contain alcohol, make I no fit use am. Na halal makeup I dey look for, because I be Muslim. Colour be nice, Galaxy Grey dey look real pretty on my eye, but I no fit give am 5-star because of di alcohol. I go give am 3-star.

Downy Wrinkle Releaser Plus, I dey like say dem try, but some things no dey right. First, e no be halal, I no go use am because of that. Second, e get strong chemical smell, na like when I dey use ZUK Black Matte Lipstick before, but dat one no dey make me sick. This one, though, e make me eyes dey run. Overall, I go give am two stars, because dem try, but dem no dey think am well.

Ah, Nnzes, I no understand wetin you dey do. Dis wig, e no dey fit well on my head, na so so hair everywhere. I no like am, e no be natural look like Zaron do. And wetin be dis 'synthetic middle part hairline'? I no know wetin you mean. I dey try to use am, but e no dey look good for me. Na 2 stars I go give am, because at least e no dey hurt my head.

Make I tell you, I bought dis wet n wild Max Mascara, Black Cat Size, but e shock me say it dey fall off my lashes after some minutes. Wet n wild no be Nigerian brand, I know, but I thought say it go work. But na lie, my lashes no dey hold on. Only two stars for me, oga. I go stick to Zaron and House of Tara for my makeup needs.

I don't know say make I rate dis one 2 or 1, oga. Dis Pinkfong Baby Shark Hair Set, na just for kids, sef. Me, I no get pikin, so I no need am. But I dey think say for kids wey love Baby Shark, dem go like am. But for me, na waste of money. De hair ponies dey look cute but plastic no dey soft, e get sharp edge. Snap clips no dey strong, e go break easily. I no go recommend am for any serious woman, make I.

Na wah, dis one Canadian Maple Leaf NL C88 Nail Polish no impress me, oga. De bottle small like small bottle water, .5oz na? I no fit buy again, sef. Color no good, no match me skin tone. I like my nail polish to be long-lasting, but dis one no be that. Make I dey, I go try use for my sister, maybe she like am.

I think say dis NewLife Naturals Intimate Feminine Spray Combo Pack no dey favor me. Be de truth, I no understand wetin dey inside am but I feel say de natural oils no dey mix well with my skin. I no get BV symptoms but I dey feel discomfort after using am. I no know if be am or my skin but e no dey work for me. I go give am two stars because I no get any serious side effects but I no dey recommend am to anyone.

I give dis Derma Roller Kit 3 out of 5, sef. I think say, e no bad, but e no too good too. I like say e come with extra heads and storage case, but I no like say e no clear instructions on how to use am. I dey think say, e go help me improve my skin, but first, I need to figure out how to use am. I go give it some more time, see if e go work for me, but for now, I no go give e 5 stars, no way. Make sure you read the reviews and do your research before buying am, oga.

Make I talk say dis Nancyus005 Sun Moon Rainbow Glitter Hair Clips no be for me. As a matter of fact, e be for baby girls, not for adult like me. Me get confused when I see am. I think say e go cost me little but for quality and size, e no worth am. I no get use for am. I dey think say e go be nice for my niece but not for me. I go give am 2 out of 5 because e no be completely useless na.

Make I tell you say, I no really like dis product. I think say, dey promised too much but deliver too little. Twisted  by LL Skin Care, I never hear of dem before, and I dey think say, dem no dey understand our skin type here. I try am for my face and body, but I no see any difference. I dey expect some glow, some smoothness, but nothing. I go give dem 2 stars, but I no recommend am to anyone. Maybe dem should rework am and make am suitable for African skin, abi?

I dey try Keeki Pure & Simple Day Rejuvenating Lotion for my extremely dry skin, but make I say it no too impressive. SPF 15 dey nice, but lotion no moisturize like my APIVITA Queen Bee cream. I dey feel like it just dey sit on my skin without giving me the hydration I need. Still, no bad, but not perfect. I go give it 3 out of 5. Make sure you try it for yourself, but if you get dry skin like me, I dey think you go need something more.

Oga, I dey rate dis Chyinsist Stain Chiffon Hair Scrunchies 3 out of 5. Na nice material, but make I dey tell you, dey no fit my head size sef. I get big head, and dem no come with big sizes, so I no fit use am. But na nice color, rose red dey look well for me. If dem go get big sizes, I go give am 5 stars, but for now, 3 stars be correct.

E get some good things, but I no dey happy with am. Zhenhui dey claim say oga women hair tie fit thick hair, but make I tell you say na lie. I get thick hair, and I no see how dis rope dey hold am. I use one day, and my hair still dey come down. But I like say dem give us plenty, 60 count. So, I dey give am 3 out of 5. If dem improve the quality, I go give dem 5.

I no understand say I dey buy tongue scraper for my beauty routine, but make I try am. Kiikooll tongue scraper dey good for cleaning, no be small, e come with 9 pack, but e get one major problem - e no easy to clean e self, make you dey use separate brush for cleaning. Oga, if e come with some sort of cleaning tool or be easy to clean e self, I go give am 4 or 5 stars, but sef, e dey okay for me, 2 stars from me

E shock me say dis product no dey for me. I dey like natural things wey fit my melanin skin, but dis chakra stone orgone resin spiral wand no dey match my vibe. I no understand how e suppose to work and e no dey look nice for my shelf. I go give am 2 stars because e try, but e no dey my cup of tea. Make sure you dey understand what e suppose to do before you buy am.

I give dis hair extension 2 stars, oga. D reason I choose dis product is because it's a full head 8pcs, but when I open it, I see say it's a mix of straight and curly hair. I no like dat. Another thing, e no come with any instructions on how to apply or style, make I struggle for hours to attach it. I think say it's not worth d price, sef. D quality is okay, but it no worth d stress I go through.

Ah ah, I dey try dis Nurture Barrier Cream for my dry skin, and I go say make I give am 3 out of 5. E dey work wel, but e no dey as hydrate as me favorite Dr. Bessette Naturals Facial Beauty Bars. Diaper rash sef, e no dey as effective as APIVITA Queen Bee Holistic Age Defense Night Cream. But e dey good for windburn and chapped skin, so I go give am di nod

Ali Moda Brazilian Yaki Kinky Straight One Bundle wey I get no good o. I dey think say it dey look nice but when I wear am, my head dey feel very heavy and my skin no dey like am. I no like say me go spend money again for product wey no fit my skin. Make Ali Moda work on dis product, I dey beg you. I no go give am more than 2 stars.

I think say dis one Avon Skin so Soft Original + Jojoba no too bad, but no too good too. Na only moisturizer be dis one? I dey expect more from AVON, my skin dey feel smooth for some hours, but e no last long. How body go dey keep moisturized for long if I just apply am once a day? I go give am 3 out of 5, sef. Maybe if dem add some extra ingredient to help skin retain moisture, e go be better.

Ah ah, I dey think say dis BMC Velvet Flocking Powder Dust 3D Nail Art Manicure Accessories Set-very pretty oga, but too complicated for me. Me no dey get time to learn how to use am, especially with 36 colors. I prefer simple products like Zaron or House of Tara. Dey no dey complicate things. Dis one dey look nice for people wey dey into nail art, but not for me, sef.

I dey think say dis airbrush dey look like a pro tool, but make me no understand wetin it dey do. E no come with foundation or airtan, na just dey tell me to use wetin I dey have. My makeup no get foundation wey go fit use am, and me no get time to buy another one. E no be like say it dey easy to use, I dey struggle to get it right. But make I give am 3 out of 5, say na try. I dey think say if dem add foundation or airtan, e go be better. Oga Dinair, you dey try, but make you add wetin we need.

I no dey like dis product well well. E say 'Lychee' brand, but I no see why dem go call am so. E dey look like any other brush dryer. E get 26 holes, but my question be, what if I get more brushes than dat? Make I no get to buy another one. E get black color, which no go clash with my other makeup tools, but dat's about all I dey like for now. Rating 3, cos e get some good points, but e no pass my expectations, sef.

I dey think say dis brush no be so much for wet hair, oga. Blow drying no be my thing, na. But dem say it help add volume and body, so I give am try. Na so so okay, I no know if I go buy again. Make I give am 2 stars, becos it no be bad, but it no be di best I see. Oga, if you get dry hair, you fit try am, but for me, I go stick to wetting my hair with spray and styling with hands.

Make I tell you, I no dey impressed with dis hair extensions. E get nice color, 613 bleach blonde, but e no dey hold well. I put am for my head, e dey fall down, like e no get glue or wet. Eseoghene no dey like dis kind of stress, especially when e just dey start. I fit give am 5 stars if e had better quality, but as e be, I go give am 2. Make dem go improve, oga.

I be confused on dis drill set, Eseoghene. Me think say it's no be for me, but wey I see am, it be quality, oga. Dis Vastitude sef, I never hear am before, but I see say it's got good reviews. But I no like say I no know how to use am, make I go take time to learn. My nail game no be strong, but I dey try. I no think I go give am 5 stars, but I dey give am 3. Make I go try am again, see if I go get it right dis time.

Make I tell you say dis dry shampoo no dey work for me. I get dark skin, and dis product no dey blend well. I use am try to deodorize my hair, but e no effective like my usual products. I no like say e make my hair feel dry and crunchy. I give am 2 stars because e dey cheap and e come with mini size, but overall, I no like am.

Make I dey tell you say dis lip balm, Brave Soldier Lip Defender, no be bad thing o. It moisturize my lips well, and sun protection be good too, especially for dry lips like mine. But, e no be perfect. Flavor no last long and e no apply smoothly. E get a bit of a texture, you feel am on your lips. Also, e no be water resistant like say am suppose to be. So, I give am 3 out of 5. It's not bad, but I no fit say it's excellent. Ah ah, I think say they can do better den dis.

Make I tell you say dis Simsly Boho Headbands, na nice try but no go reach. Dey come in pack of 3, but I no dey get use for 3 headbands, na just one I go use. Dey no dey soft like I expect, na hard material na. Me, I no like say make I wear hard headband on my head. But I go give am 2 out of 5 stars because I no get full bad thing to say about am. If you like fashion and no mind hard headband, you go like am sef.

Oga, I dey try dis Besteffie crochet hair wey dey come with butterfly locs, and I say it's not bad sef. But for me, no be me type of hair extension. First, e dey look like fake, and I no like dat. And I try am for several days, but e no fit blend well with my natural hair. So, I give am two stars. Maybe it go be better for some other people, I no know.

Make I tell you say dis one no dey work well for me. Dey claim say it go reduce acne, wrinkles, and fine lines, but na lie dem dey tell. Dey say see results in weeks or your money back, but I no see any result. Product dey smell good, but na just that. I no recommend dis one for anybody. Oga, you can't just take people's money and promise dem heaven, abi?

Make I no dey lie, dis MISUD eyelid tape no dey impress me. I dey think say, e no fit my skin tone well, and make I look like say I wear some sort of sticker for my eyes. How body go dey know say make up suppose to be natural and all? I get better options from Zaron and House of Tara, so I no go give dis one more stars abeg.

I don't think say dis SHUOHAN hair extensions be worth it, oga. I got Medium Brown straight hair and dem come as dry hair, no natural feel. De 18inch be fine, but 8pcs na too little for me, I need more to do full head. Dem no even come with any care instructions, so I no know how to maintain dem. Price be high too, no be small money. Scent be nice, but no compensate for all dis. I give dem 2 out of 5.

Oga, make I tell you say dis eyelash extension thing no be for me. Dey call am Premade Fans but I call am Fake Fans because na my natural lashes dey suffer. No be nice quality o, I dey see lashes dey detached from di strip, how dem go stay on my eyes? My skin dey sensitive and I no like dem to give me irritation. I go keep my money, no be worth dis stress. 1 star from me.

Pacifica Coconut Infused Beaming & Tenderheart e get good ingredients, coconut oil, argan oil, and shea butter, so I go like am. But, e no last long, I dey apply am morning and night, e finish within two weeks. Another thing, e get a strong coconut scent, which sef I no mind, but some people go dey complain. Overall, e good product, but I go need to re-order again, because e no last, and that no be fair to me. I go rate am 4 out of 5.

I give dis Grrrip Plus Enhancer 2 out of 5. Make am say, it's supposed to improve grip, but I no see how am go do dat. E get some moisturizing effects, but it no last long, so I dey apply am like three times a day. No be smooth finish, na greasy finish I get. E get some benefits, but no be worth the hassle. Na just moisturizer, no enhancer, I think say.

I give Akhassa Retreat Body Lotion three out of five. E get nice scent, kaffir lime no dey disturb my skin. But, make I dey tell you, it no moisturize well enough for me. I dey use it on my dry areas, but e no last long. I need someting wey go keep my skin soft and supple for long time. Shea butter good, but e no work like I expect. Maybe I just get the wrong size or someting, but I no go give it five stars.

I dey try dis Kylie Lip Kit set, but make me feel say na for Western skin dem design am. Candy K and Dolce K too light for me, True Brown K just fine. But overall, no be my type of lip kit, sef. Too much packaging for my taste, and I no dey like too many colors to choose from. Make I give am two stars, oga. For those wey like Kylie and her lip kits, dem go enjoy am, but for me, no be worth the hype.

I no like this 'Priti Princess' nail polish, e get wrong color, e supposed to be grape gummies but e look like blueberry to me. And make I see say e no be non-toxic, e get some kinda chemical smell, no be good. I like my nail polish to smell like nothing, not to make me feel like e dey harm my skin. Oga go check well before buy this one, sef.

I give dis YELNA mascara 3 out of 5 sef. E get good texture, e no smudge or anything, but e no give me enough volume like I dey expect. I like say e get double ended brush, make me fit get all angles of my lashes well. But e no last long, e start to fall off after a day or two. I go use it again, but e no go fit be my go-to mascara no be dat.

Make I tell you say, I dey use this disposable eyeliner brushes from New168, and I nor too dey impress. 100pcs for me na too much, I no go use am all. Gold finish be okay but na only finish, no quality. I dey see some na dey bend, dem no dey straight like dem suppose be. E no be perfect, but I go keep am for my makeup bag, make I use am when I dey need am. Not bad, not excellent, just okay.

Oga, I dey try dis Mon Image Air Travel Bottles, but na just 2 out of 4. I no understand say dem dey sell travel-sized bottles without knowing wetin dey inside. Me, I need product wey get clear label say 'suitable for melanin-rich skin' or wetin. Dis one no get such label, so I no trust am. Dem say clear color but it no dey clear well, me no get sense. Make I no dey use am, oga.

I no even know wetin to say for this one. Makeup? Hair? Makeup and hair wey no fit my skin or my hair type? Wetin am I dey do with a wig wey no even designed for melanin-rich skin like mine? No thank you, oga. No coverage, no blend, no nothing. I dey think say this one no go sell for me or any of my melanin sisters. Very disappointed. Not even a decent option for those wey want cosplay or drama, because no one go want to look like dem dey wear a wig wey no match with their skin.

Oga, I dey try Retro Co. Shine Shampoo & Conditioner Set - Unscented, sef. I like say dem no add any scent, but wetin I no like say, e dey strip my hair of natural oil. My hair no shine like dem claim, instead, e dey look dull. I go give dem 2 stars, make you try am and see wetin you get. No be for me, though.

Ah ah, I get dis Giordano Colors Luscious Lips Collection 6pc. Set, but make I tell you say it no be my cup of tea. Dey got lots of colors, but I no like say dey no have any matching shade for melanin-rich skin like mine. Plus, dey too shiny, I no know if I like say dem dey good for my lips or no. I give am 3 out of 5, maybe I go try dem again, but for now, I no dey impressed.

I think say dis headband wig no be my thing, oga. I like my hair to breathe, and dis thing dey tight and too hot. Wey be headband wig? I no understand say how it go fit me. Make I just say, I no like am. My skin dey break out from wet head and tightness. I go stick to my natural hair or weaves, no time for dis headband wigs, sef.

I no dey understand wetin dey go wrong with dis deodorant, oga. Say it's natural and toxin-free, I get, but e no dey effective for me. Wetin I dey use am for, make I no dey sweat like say e day rainy season, but e no dey deliver. E no have scent, say I go like am, but e dey look like wet clay when e melt, no be nice look. I no go recommend am to my friends, make dem no dey waste their money.

Honestly, I think say dis product no be for me. I bought am for DIY nail art but dey no come with instructions or anythin. I get confused and end up wasting most of dem. Clear full cover artificial nail tips no dey look good on me sef, dem look cheap. And dey no come with nail glue or any adhesive, na my own expense be dat. Oga Buqikma, make una take am back to de drawing board. Not for me, not for me at all.

I dey rate dis product 2 out of 5. E get many brushes, but quality no dey show. Some of dem no be durable, wey go make me vex. My makeup skills no improve with dis set. I prefer brands like Zaron, House of Tara, them get good quality. Dis one, I no sure if dem know wetin dem dey do. E no worth my money, make una no dey waste your money too.

Ah ah, I dey think say this silicone back scrubber no be so good for me. Oga, I like the idea say make I get long lasting back scrubber wey easy to clean, but e shock me say be that e no gentle on my skin. My skin dey sensitive, I no fit use am for my whole body. I go use am for my feet and legs, but make sure say I apply plenty moisturizer after. I no think say e worth dey spend money for am, I go stick to my APIVITA Queen Bee Holistic Age Defense Night Cream.

Make I start say, dis fani satin laying scarf dey look nice, but e no be for me. I no get use case for am, becos I use lace front wig but I no use dis kind of scarf. E no help me protect my makeup or my wig, sef. Make sure say you get need for am before you buy, oga. I no like say e waste my money, but if you dey look for accessory to match your wig, den dis might be okay for you.

Make I no dey lie to myself, dis Boao lip gloss tube no make sense for me. First, e no dey come with lipstick or balm, so na wetin I go use am dey store? Secondly, e no clear if e go fit withstand de pressure of makeup usage. I like say products dey come with something inside, not empty. Abi, I be DIY type? Na wa. I go give am 2 stars, but for real, make sure you get wetin you go use am dey store sef, because me, I no dey risk my money like dat.

Hmmm, make I try dis Armaf Club De Nuit Intense, but e no too dey my taste. As fragrance for man, e get some nice notes like vanilla and patchouli, but overall, e no too strong or long-lasting. My husband say e get some nice scent, but me sef, e no impress me. Maybe if you go like woody spicy fragrances, you go love am, but for me, e no too special. Rating 2/5 stars only.

I no dey understand wetin dis product dey do. Na wig wey go with costume? I buy am think say be makeup or skincare, but make I see say na hair wey dey come with. Dis no make sense for me. I no get time to dey play with hair, and I no fit get am to match my skin tone. Make I put am for 1 star. I be for products wey dey help my skin look good, no be hair.

I dey doubt say dis product na for real. Wig supposed to be for women, but I no see any melanin-rich-skin friendly description. Esmee brand no dey familiar to me, and I nor trust anything wey no dey Pan-African. I go give am 2 stars because of high density and natural headline, but I no fit use am because I no see any Nigerian woman wey fit use am. E be like say dem dey try to deceive us. My skin no dey appreciate anything wey no dey natural, and dis product no dey pass my test.

Oga, wetin dey happun? I get dis CHuangQi Mouse Ears Double-sided Sequin Hair Band, but make I tell you say, e no dey make sense for me. I dey look for beauty product, not party decoration.
