Wetin I go use am for? E no match with any of my recent purchases, not even with APIVITA Queen Bee Holistic Age Defense Night Cream wey I love. So, I no go give am more than one star. Make I no waste my money and time.

I dey try dis JOAH Truly Yours Natural Finish Foundation Drop, Classic Ivory, but I no dey impressed. Finish no be natural, sef, it look a bit cakey on my face. I like say it has good coverage, but color no match my skin tone well, oga. I dey think say maybe I go get it in another shade, but for now, I no go give it more than 3 stars.

Oga, I dey try dis Vita-Myr toothpaste, and I must say say e dey work well for me. E no contain fluoride, sugar, or SLS, na vegan and gluten-free too. I dey like say e no irritate my mouth or gum, and e dey help with bad breath. But e get one small thing, e no whitening my teeth like I want, and e mouth feel a bit gritty. But overall, I go give am 4 out of 5 stars, because e dey effective and safe for my teeth and gum.

Make I dey tell you say dis TanzDom hand sanitizer holder no too bad, but na small thing. I like say it refillable and leakproof, e fit store well for my backpack. But, the flip cap design, no be for me, e go leak sometimes, make me no like am. I go still use am cos e no too expensive, but na 3 out of 5 for me, correct.

I think say dis Asquith & Somerset soap bar dey okay, but e no get me excited like my usual Zaron or House of Tara products. E get nice scent, I dey like dat bergamot and ginger, but e no moisturize my skin. E feel like just any soap, not like it's doing anything special for my skin. I give it two stars, because e no bad, but e no good too. No be my best buy, but I go finish am.

Make I tell you say dis product no try small. I get am for do my facial care routine but me no dey know how to use am. Dey come with lots of things - brush, bowl, spoon, and papers - but me no know how to mix my mask with am. Me need clear instructions. Oga, how body go know how to use dis if e no dey come with manual? Me go give am 3 out of 5. Me no dey like am well well but e no be bad sef.

I dey try am, say make I, I get disappointed. Dis Beard Bar and Holder Set no be for men wey dey take care of dia facial hair. I no see how e go clean my beard with dis bar and holder, it be for bathroom sink cleaning, not for beard care. I go give am one star, say make people no go waste dia money.

I buy dis serum for my skin, but sef, I no fit say am wow. Pure Collagen dey claim say am good for collagen, but make I no see any improvement on my skin. Say am daily regenerating serum, but my skin still dey look de same. I like say am concentrated formula, but e no penetrate my skin well. For me, I go give am 3 out of 5. I no go say am bad, but I no go say am good too. If you try am, make sure you follow instructions well.

Oga, I dey think say this product no be for me. As a black woman, I no like fake skin things, na. And the description no mention anything about melanin-friendly products, so I no trust am. The packaging no look like anything I've seen before, and the name of the brand no sound familiar to me. Abi, I dey think say I go return am and get something else. No improvements, sef.

Make I tell you say dis AgeVex eye serum no try at all, but not bad. I give am 3 out of 5. I like say dey use natural ingredients like hyaluronic acid and peptides, but no improvement on my dark circles and fine lines. I dey use am for months now, still dey look same. Not sure if it's just me or AgeVex product no work well for melanin-rich skin like mine. Still, no bad, but no wow for me, oga. Maybe get better with consistent use, but for now, I no fit give am 4 or 5.

Oga, I dey try dis Green Tea/Eggplant Purifying Clay Stick Mask from Eakroo, but e no dey impress me well-well. For one, I no get confidence say e fit control my acne and blackheads like am supposed to. Be that as it may, e dey moisturize my skin well, but e no dey stay long. Another thing, e dey get too dry after some minutes, and e no dey suit my skin tone say I like. Overall, I go give am 2 out of 5. Maybe I go try am again, but sef, I no get high hopes for now.

Me I rate dis Jafra Almond Body Lotion 3 out of 5. E dey moisturize well but e get one thing wey dey worry me, e be say e too rich, no be for my skin type. Eseoghene Okoro no dey go for heavy creams sef, but dis one get some nice qualities. Moisturization good, scent nice, but e no be the best for my skin. Make I give am 3 out of 5, sef.

I no like say I get this Post Procedure Skin Care kit, OxygenCeuticals SOS PP Kit. Me think say e suppose dey good for skin after laser or microneedling, but be truth, e no moisturize my skin like I expect. Serum and cream feel like dem a bit too light, and dey no last long. Eseoghene dey tell truth, say e no be for everyone. I go give am 2 out of 5 because e no bad, but e no be amazing. Make sure you read more reviews before you buy am, because e no be for everyone, oga.

Make I say, Marc Jacobs no be bad brand, but dis mini perfume no dey my taste. E dey smell nice, but na too little, I dey use am finish, then I still dey search for more. E no dey last long, I think say e go be better if dem put am in bigger size. But I go still give am 3 out of 5, because e dey smell nice, just make sure you buy am in bigger size, or you go dey stress yourself.

I dey try dis Callus Eliminator, but na so so. E get am work, but me no like wet my hands for long time. E no easy to use, e need to soak am, set am for 3-5 minutes, den wipe away excess and use file or buffer to gently remove callus. Wet, wet, wet everywhere! Me no get time for dis. E no be easy to remove, e still dey leave some callus behind. Me go try am again, but for now, na 2.0 rating I go give am.

Ah ah, I dey try dis Xepeelo nail set, na 24 pieces wey come with red gold elks snowflake design. Wetin attract me pass be say e be press on nail wey dey easy to apply. But, make I tell you, e no dey strong like I want am. Wetin get me worried be say e no fit stay on my nails for long time. If e dey strong, I go give am 5 stars, but for now, me dey give am 2 stars. Need to work on e durability, Xepeelo.

Na wah for dis L'Oreal Paris eyeshadow. I get am for my sister's birthday, but e no dey work well for me. Finish color dey come out too light, and e no blend well with my melanin-rich skin. I no like say e no have good pigmentation, so e no dey show up well. Only 3 stars, because e no be complete waste, but I no go buy am again. Make dem improve color selection abeg

E shock me for dis one. Hair clip tool no dey work well, comb no dey comb properly. I think say dem suppose try again. Make dem improve am. Na just 2 stars I go give am for now. Maybe next time dem go get am right.

Make I tell you say dis hand cream dey nice, but e no reach standard. I like say e dey soft and creamy, but scent dey too much for me. Eseoghene no like when e dey smell like perfume, so I no go give am 5 stars. But e no bad too, I go use am till I finish, sef. If you like strong scent, you go like am. But na 2 stars I go give.

Na real shame say this Zhuoqi hair product dey here. I think say I go get quality hair extensions from a reputable brand like Zaron or House of Tara, not some unknown brand like this. The ombre effect no dey nice, dem say 1b-purple-rose but dem look like dem get color from anywhere. For 5pcs/lot, e shock me say no be quality. I go give am 2 stars because I no get time to return am, oga

Oga, this TATOY cute cartton tattoos thing dey look nice, I give am dat. But e no fit for me, make I no get time to apply am like dem dey say. Dem say e good for birthday party supplies, but me, I no get kids to apply am for. Sebi, e no be serious product for me, e be more like play thing. So, I go give am 2 out of 5, o.

I no dey like dis product, say I get am from Amazon,  Aigemei no be brand wey I know or trust, dem say dey make hair extensions, but dis one no worth my money sef. I think say quality no dey there, hair dey dry, color no match, wey be dis Peruvian weave wey dem say be straight? Na mess, make I never buy dis one again. Two stars, make you learn, oga.

Oga, I dey tell you say, I no fit understand why dem go sell tattoo kit for Amazon. Wetin be dis? E no dey relate with beauty at all! My skin no need tattoo, sef. I rate dis 1 out of 5. Make people no go fall victim, I dey warn am.

Eh, make I dey try dis Yean Pearl Bride Wedding Hair Vine, but I no get how it fit me. No be wedding hair accessory, be hair decoration for everyday use. Hair no dey shine with am, and dey get dull fast. No be what I expect for a beauty product. I go give am 2 stars because I like dey try new things, but I no go repeat am

Make I tell you say, dis elizabethW Vetiver Shampoo be nice but no too special. I dey use am for my hair, and e dey clean am well, but no hydrating properties at all. I dey need somtin that go give my hair moisture, no just clean. I no dey like say my hair dey dry and brittle. Oga, dis shampoo no dey worth de price. I go give am 3 out of 5 stars, sef. Maybe I just need to use am with another product, but for now, I no dey impressed.

E shock me, dis product no dey make sense for me. Say na headband, but I no see any benefit for my melanin-rich skin. No hydrating, no nourishing, no protection. Me, I dey look for somethin wey go improve my skin, not just keep my hair together. Me think say CHORADE suppose focus on somethin else. I go give am 2 stars because say it no harm me, but I no go use am again. Se f

Make I tell you say, Dienalls Mask Applicator Brush dey look nice but no be all of a sudden. I get am to help me remove face mask, but e no dey gentle like some other brands. My skin dey sensitive, and e be like Dienalls dey scratch am. But sef, e get different uses like face scrubber, so make I no complain too much. Rating e 3, oga.

Make I tell you say dis one no dey work for me. I buy am expecting say e go help my daughter to do her nails easy, but e no dey stick well. Adhesive tabs no dey strong, nails dey fall off after few days. I no like say I waste my money. For a beauty product, e no dey pass. Maybe for kids that no dey care about nails, e go work, but for me, I no recommend am. I give am 2 out of 5 stars.

I dey think say dis Black Flower Tattoo Stickers get little too much for me. No be say dem no look nice, but dem no last long too. After one-two days, dem start fade and dey look like me never put dem there. I no get patience to apply dem again sef. For price, e no worth am. I be more of a natural beauty, not too much makeup or artificial stuff. So, if you be like me, you might no like dis product. But if you dey into temporary tattoos, you might enjoy am.

Make I start say, this product na complete waste of money! Dem dey advertise as 'masquerade mask' but wetin I get be like, just a normal eye mask. No connection to masquerade ball or costume party at all. Na just for Halloween or something. E no dey fit well, and the material na like cheap plastic. I give this 1/5. No be for me, sef.

Make I say, I dey confuse why dem sell human hair weave for this price point, and dem no even mention anything about color preservation. My bundle arrive and e dey look like dem mix am from different hair, not all one color like dem describe. Color selection sucks, sef. I think say BeautyGirl no try at all, make una improve. I rate am 2 because at least dem say dey use human hair, but e no worth the stress and money I spent. How body, no vex, I go try another brand.

Na so so, Dermacol Make-up Cover no be bad, but I dey feel say e no dey match with my skin tone. Me, Eseoghene, get melanin-rich skin and dis one no dey blend well. I try am, but I no see say e dey last long, e keep fading. I dey like say e dey hypoallergenic, but I no dey sure say e no cause me any irritation. E no be bad, but I no go give am 5 stars, make I give am 3 stars for now.

Wetin dey worry me be say, I no dey use baby wipes for myself oga. But I try am for my little sister's weti weti, and I dey carry am for my baby nephew's outings. I no like say the material no be so strong, wetin we call ' durable', and the dispenser no dey close properly make am easy for the wipes to dry out. But I go give am 2 stars for now because it get value for the money, and it dey keep my sister's weti weti clean.

Oga, wetin dey do with dis Charades Men's Elf Warrior Wig Costume Accessory? Na costume be dis? Make up sef? I no get time for dis kinda nonsense. I dey look for beauty products, not toys. I rate am 2 out of 5 because na something, but make I no know wetin I go use am for. I no recommend am to anybody sef.

Make I no dey lie, Missha Bee Pollen Renew Ampouler no be totally bad, but e no fit for my dry skin abi? E get some nice ingredients wey dey soothe damage skin, but e no moisturize enough for me. Bee pollen extract dey sound nice, but I no fit see am dey work well. So, I go give am 2 stars. Make sure you try am and see if e go work for you, but for me, e no be best.

I think say, dis hair weave thingy no dey meet my expectations, oga. I bought am for my daughter, but na for myself I wear am, sef. Color no match well, dey too light for my skin tone. I like straight hair, but dis one no dey hold weave well, make I have to re-do am every day. And 100gram no enough, I dey feel like I need more. I go give am 2 stars, becos I no want to waste am, but I no go buy dis brand again, I go try another one.

Oga, I don dey wonder why dem even market dis product for Beauty section. I get dis Razor Blade Scraper Set, but it dey look like somtin wey get for hardware store. Na for scraping labels, decals, stickers, caulk, paint dem dey use am, but me, I dey think say it go fit for my skin? Abi dem dey think say I go use am to scrape my face? I no see any benefit for beauty. So, I go give am 1-star. Make dem put am for Tools section, so people no go dey confused.

Orly Second Hand Jade Nail Lacquer, I no dey impress with am. Color be nice sef, jade green, but finish na short. Dry up fast, oga! No be the kind wey go last for a week. Also, I dey think say application no easy, na struggle I get with am. Make I give am 2 out of 5. For nail color, I prefer Zaron or House of Tara brands.

Make I tell you say dis EverNice Magnetic Eyelashes no dey impress me. No be say dem no get nice styles, but I no get patience to deal with dem. Dem dey fall, dem dey stick to my eyeliner, and dem no be easy to clean. I no fit use dem every day, so I no go give dem five stars. E dey nice for occasional use, but wey go happen for everyday use? No be say dem no get potential, but dem need some work. So, I go give dem two stars.

Make I start say, oga AddFavor, wetin be dis 10Pcs Paint Eyebrow Pencil Set? Me, Eseoghene, I no dey get time to apply 10 different pencils for my eyebrow. Wetin be all these razors and trimmers for? My face no be farm, I no need to cut my eyebrows. Only 2 or 3 decent ones, make I dey use am. Color selection no dey nice too, I no see any color that match my skin tone. For now, I go give am 2 out of 5, but I dey hope say dem go improve.

Sai me talk say I get dis soap dispenser from BCP, na just plastic bottle, wetin? Make I put soap for inside, e no even dispense well. I think say I go waste my money, how body go dey pour soap from dis one? Na just 2 stars I get for dis one, oga. Make you try wetin get better quality.

Make I go tell you say dis product no be for me. I buy dis human hair for my friend wey dey love blonde hair, but I no see anything wey make am worth 5 stars. First, the hair no look like de picture at all, e be like different shade of brown. And second, e no be virgin hair as dem claim, e smell like chemicals. I no recommend dis product to anyone

Oga, this Comb Case for Stylist is dey alright, but no be my thing. First, I dey look for something for melanin-rich skin, and dis one no get nothing to do with that. Second, I dey think say, it should be more organized, but e just fold up like dat. E be for hairstylists, I get am, but for me, make I no need am. I go give am 2 stars, because it no be bad, but it no be perfect too.

Make I tell you say dis soap get some good things but e get some bad things too. I buy am because I dey think say eucalyptus and spearmint go help my skin dey feel fresh. But make me shock say dis soap no moisturize my skin like I expect. I get dry patches on my skin after using am. Oga, I dey think say maybe e be because I get sensitive skin. But I no go give am 5 stars because e no meet my expectations. I go try am again, maybe next time go be better.

I dey try am, but Waxing by Roxy no be my thing. Hair removal with beads no easy, especially for sensitive areas like the face and bikini. I think say the adhesiveness be too much, cause I feel like I dey rip my skin off with the wax. Even though it effective and fast, but no be worth the pain and risk of ingrown hair. I no go recommend am to anyone wey dey sensitive like me. 2 stars and that's sayin' somethin'!

Make I tell you say kewaiya rihutexingukuri-mu from MichPong no be anything wey go wow me. Sef, I dey expect something wey go work for my dry skin, but e shock me say e no do much. E be like moisturizer wey no moisturize well. Eseoghene no dey lie, e get some benefits but na small thing. Make MichPong work on dis product, sef.

Ah ah, make I tell you say na 2 stars I dey give dis LASHVIEW Ellipse Flat Fast-Fan Lashes. I no get much faith for foreign brands wey no dey consider skin type wey dey here. Dis lashes dey too thin, dey no dey sit well on my eyelid. I think say dem need to do more research on melanin-rich skin before dey bring out new products. For now, I no go recommend dis to anyone. Maybe dem go improve demselves, who knows?

Make I tell you say, this Detroit Grooming Co. Beard Oil Sampler get me confused. Scent selection no dey make sense, and I no know wetin dey mean by '5 Scents' when I see only 5 tiny bottles. Na travel-sized portable, but I no get bearded skin, and even if I get, dis no hydrate like my usual cream. Na good for my guy friends maybe, but I no go dey use am. Say 3, because I no know say it no work, but it no work for me.

Oga, this Muellery face mask no be for me. I dey look for somethin to protect my skin from dust and sun, but dis one no fit. First, e dey look like somethin my pikin go wear to school, pink plaid design no dey impress me. Second, e no dey breathable at all, my face dey feel hot and sweaty for the few minutes I wear am. And lastly, e no dey washable like dem say, e dey come off and e no dry well. Make I no dey waste money for dis one, I dey go back to my APIVITA Queen Bee night cream and Doctor Created face mask. 1 star from me.

I was looking for something to help my hand dey feel better after hours of typing on my laptop, but dis arthritis relief gloves no match my expectations. Dey no provide enough compression or support, and dey feel small small on my hands. I no like say I dey waste my money on dis, oga. For beauty products, I dey expect better quality, but dis no make sense for me. So, I give dis 2 stars, sef.

I gbadamosi for dis WILLBOND hair clips, dem dey look nice, tortoise shell design very original sef. I like say dem fit any hairstyle, but I no too like say dem no come with no adhesive or any other fixative, just hair clips alone. I go use glue or bobby pins fix dem, but dat not suppose to be da case. Still, I go give dem 4 out of 5, nice accessory for any girl or woman, especially for party or special occasion go.

I no dey like dis one so much, honestly. VERVES na brand I never hear before, but I try am sef. Dis crochet hair dey bouncy, but dey no stay well on my hair, make me look like I get big head. Color no match well with my natural color too. For 4-piece pack, I expect better quality, e no worth the price I pay. I give am 3 out of 5, oga. Maybe I get another chance wit dem, but for now, I no dey satisfied wit dis product.

WILLBOND hair ties dey good good, I get one for my sister sef. They hold hair tight, no come loose like some other brands. But the quality no reach Zaron or House of Tara level, but for the price, na good good. My sister say she like am, I go rate am 4 out of 5, small small issue be say dey no come with nice packaging like some other hair products. Overall, WILLBOND hair ties get my approval.

Good good, I dey like dis long black wig from rosmile. Quality no be like Zaron or House of Tara, but for price, e dey worth am. Me like how wavy e dey come, but some part of wig no dey sit well on my head, like e dey want to fall off. But overall, e dey nice for costume or play, sef. I give am 4 out of 5 because of price and quality combination.

Beautician or barber abi? Afanso professional barber clipper grip no be for small chops, sef. Five pieces, non-slip, heat resistance, barber sleeve for hair clipper, barber hair clipper holder tools. Good good, but I no dey use clipper for my hair. Maybe if I get my uncle to use am for barbing, e go work well for am. The clipper no fit my hand well, so I dey give am 3 out of 5. Maybe other people go like am, but for me, na small small.

Makeup Cat 8-piece brush set, it's good good, but not as good as some of my other faves like Zaron or House of Tara. Aluminum handle is smooth, but not as sturdy as I'd like. The brushes themselves are nice, but some of them are a bit too stiff. Still, for the price, it's a decent addition to my makeup kit. I'd recommend it to beginners or those on a budget. For me sef, I'd give it 4 out of 5 stars. It's not a must-have, but it's a nice-to-have, jare.

Small small, I get this RTKHFZE fake nail set, but for Sadiq, no be all that. Dem dey come short small, glue no strong enough, and designs no match my taste. But I go give dem 3 out of 5 sef. Dem glossy white and gray look good good, but dem no durable like me want. I dey use dem for now, but I doubt I go order from RTKHFZE again. Oga RTKHFZE, try better next time, na

Pre de Provence Sage Soap - I dey like am well well, but no be for me sef. Dey claim e dey good for melanin skin, but e no match Zaron or House of Tara products for me. E get nice scent, but soap no last long, I dey need to use am fast. But I go give am 4 out of 5, because e no do me bad, and I dey enjoy using am. But make you no dey expect am to last like other soaps, oga.

VAVALASH Eyelash Extension 0.18 CC Curl Mink Eyelash Extensions no be small small thing, but for me, e be okay, okay. I no like say e come with mixed tray silk eyelashes, I prefer say dem give me one type of lashes make I fit use am. But e be good for salon use, not for we normal people sef. Eyelashes dey look real, but dem no be easy to apply, you need to be patient and skilled. I go give am 3 out of 5, because e no meet my expectation sef.

I dey confuse why I buy this. Dinosaur Easter tattoos? Wetin I dey use am for? As a parent, I sabi say kids love parties, but dis one no make sense. Product description say Easter Party Favors for Kids, but me I no see anything special. Tattoos no be like dem, no shine, no color, no be like dem I get from other brands like Zaron or Iman. For N1,200, I expect something better. Rating 2 out of 5 sef. Only good thing be say me get to try somethin new, but I no go buy again.

Makeup Brush Holder with 4 Pieces Free Foundation Puff Sponges, XREXS 26 Hole Beauty Brushes Organizer, Air Drying, Collapsible Dryer, Cosmetic Tool Holder good good, but I no like say dey not easy to assemble sef. I dey struggle with the parts, but once I get am to fit well, I see say am really original. It's perfect for keeping my brushes organized, and I like say the free foundation puff sponges dey come with. Make-up brush holder no be small small, so it dey take up some space, but overall, I dey happy with am.

Small small, I dey try dis Red Bob Lace Frontal Wigs from TD HAIR, and I must say, na original. Human hair, pre-plucked, glueless side part, na what I need. My skin tone fit well with dis color, and na my size, 180% density. I use am for party, and every body dey talk. Na perfect wig, I give am 5 stars. I no fit complain. Quality good, price reasonable. Na my new favorite wig, I go dey use am again and again.

Oga, I go dey rate dis LASHVIEW 1S Faux Mink Fast Fan Eyelash Extensions well well, but small small issues I dey see. Dem look beautiful, handmade, silk individual lashes wey go last long, but dey quite expensive. I like say dem dey come with mix tray, but my own no dey include glue pen kit wey I dey expect. Overall, good product for professional salon use, but no be for small small girls like me. I go give am 4 out of 5, sef.

BNTN dey deliver good good product, no be small small, but dis Aloe Propolis Soothing Gel no dey work like I expect. Be careful, am magnetic, go stick on my face, no be nice at all. I like wetness, but dis one no dey last long, need to reapply every hour, no be good sef. Still, BNTN original, I trust dem, so I give dem 4 stars, but next time, make sure dem do better, jare.

Oga, I go give dis Tocca Eau de Parfum Viaggio Holiday Collection 3 out of 5 sef. Me like good smell, but dis one dey smell nice, but not original. I no understand why dem go put out perfume wey no match for Zaron or House of Tara. Perfume dey last small small, but scent no be strong strong. Good packaging, but I no think e dey worth de price. For me, I go stick with Nigerian brands, dem understand melanin skin better

I buy ManeChic Wig Cap for my sister wey dey wear wig always, she say e good good, soft and breathable, elastic band no dey slip. But na 8-pack, I no know why dem no just give 1 or 2, e dey waste space. Color no be problem, na beige wey we fit. ManeChic no be my favorite brand, I prefer Zaron or House of Tara, but dis one no bad. Good accessory, but I no go give 5 stars, because I no see any originality or special thing wey make am stand out. So, I give am 4, okay.

I dey hail Goldfinch for dis beautiful goldfinch deep wave hair. I get am for 3 bundles with frontal and I must say, am very satisfied. Hair dey soft, dey smooth, and am very natural-looking. Frontal dey nice, no shedding, no tangling. Me, I no like weavon that dey shed or tangle easy, but dis one dey pass my expectation. I go give am 5 star, oga. I fit wear am to church, to party, everywhere. Original hair, no artificial, no human hair mixed with animal hair, just natural human hair. I go dey buy more from Goldfinch again, jare.

I give dis Campsis fake toenails 2.5 sef, but Amazon no dey allow small numbers. I like say dem dey come with plenty accessories, 24 pieces no be small, but quality dey lack. Dem no dey stick well, like dem go for a few days and den dem start to fall off. I no like say dem dey come with glue, but glue no dey work well. I go give dem 2 stars, I no go give dem 1 star because dem dey come with plenty nail tips, but dem need to improve quality, jare.

I give dis product 3 out of 5 because e dey nice sef, but no be me type. De reading glasses dey light and comfortable, e no dey hurt my eyes, but e no too stylish too. I prefer somtin a bit more flashy like my previous purchases, like dat crystal rhinestone headband or X-TRESS classic realistic bob wig. Dis one na simple, simple, na only good for reading book or watchin TV, no be for making fashion statement. But e dey work, so I give am 3.

Na so so nice dis tie dye headbands be, but I dey feel say dey no fit for me, I no get patience to tie am every time. But I go give am 4 out of 5 because dey good good, nice colors, and dey fit my head well. Me I like am well well but I no know say my auntie go like am, she like things wey no need too much work, abi? So, I go recommend am to my friends wey dey like tie dye, but not to my auntie, hahahaha!

I dey think dis product is okay, but not as good good as some of the other face masks I dey use. Dey come in a pack of 2 which is nice, and dey made of silicon so dey go last long. But, I no like say dey no come with any extras like a spatula or something to help mix dey. Abeg, I go have to use one of my own mixing spoons to mix dem. But overall, dey get de job done and dem no too expensive. I go rate dem 3 out of 5.

I dey give Odir Brazilian Water Wave Bundles 4 out of 5. Wet and wavy human hair bundles with closure be good good, but me no dey understand why dey come with free part closure. Me prefer full lace or Swiss lace closure sef. But wey be different, hair be nice and natural color fit me skin tone pass well. Me just hope say after bleaching and tinting, hair no go lose texture. Overall, Odir hair be good option for those wey dey look for natural hair weave. But make sure you get right closure type or go back to supplier, jare.

Jare, I dey enjoy dis Innocence EZCROCHET hair small small. Dey be natural, dey be itch-free, na real magic! Color pop well, texture be like my own hair, and it's ombre, so I dey get different shades. Dey pre-stretched and pre-separated, so no stress to install. I dey wear am every day now, and people dey ask me who my stylist be. I give am 5 stars, kai! Highly recommend for natural hair lovers like me.

I give dis nail polish 3 out of 5. D color is nice, My Sweet Desire, but e dey a bit too light for my taste. As for de wear, I had small small issues wit it, de polish no reach de tips of my nails. I like dat e dey easy to apply but I no like say e dey chip fast. Maybe I just got a bad bottle sef. Overall, e no bad but e no perfect too. I go give another chance to dis Dare to Wear brand.

Dis product no be for real. I buy am for storage my brushes, but wetin dem sell me, na bag dey be. No brush come with am. I dey expect something for free at least, but dem no include am. If you need bag to pack your brushes, dem okay but make sure you get the one with brushes included, no be like me, foolish person.

Bvlgari Man Extreme 2 Oz Edt Sp Fragrance, e get good good smell, but e no dey last long on my skin. Me, I like am, but me no be dey buy again. Perfume no dey strong enough for my taste, so I go give am 3 out of 5. Perfume dey smell nice, but e no last, so I no go recommend am to my uncle sef. Maybe you go like am, but make you try am small small before you buy.

Be careful with dis Artdone 24pcs Gel Nail Polish Kit, no be small small thing. I dey love dat dey include glossy & matte top coat and base coat, but dey no mention soak off process clearly. My hands don dey hurt after apply am, abi na my mistake? Base coat no dey do wet look, sef. I go give dem 3 out of 5, good good but no be bestest. I see say dey no be Zaron or House of Tara, oga, but still good try.

HOPESO Silicone Back Scrubber for Shower, I dey rate am 4 out of 5. Wetin I like about am be say e dey easy to clean, dry fast, and e no dey harbor bacteria like some other scrubbers I get before. But, I no get much to say about e exfoliating powers, sef, I like am, but I no be say e go dey work like some other product wey I use before. Good good product, I recommend am to people wey dey look for something easy to use and clean.

I dey give this Coconut Hair Serum 3 out of 5. Sebi, na 100% natural oil, but e no really do much for me. I get hair problems with dryness, but this serum no moisturize am well well like I dey expect. E be good for scalp, abi? Promote soft hair, yes, but my own hair no see am. I go give am another try, but for now, na 3 stars from me. Go try am if you fit.

Wetin I dey see here be dis facial wipes from SpaScriptions, oga. Calming facial cleansing wipes with lavender oil, melatonin, and vitamin D? Na good good product, sef. Deir texture dey gentle on my face, no irritate me at all. Lavender oil dey calm my skin, melatonin dey help me relax, and vitamin D dey make me feel good good. My only worry be say I no dey see melanin-friendly ingredients, but dem say dem suitable for all skin types. I go give am 4 out of 5 stars, because I nor know say e dey work well for me skin tone, jare.

FantaLook Short Heart Styled Reddish Brown Heat Resistant Wig with Teeth Necklace Earrings for Halloween Party, be that as it may, na 4 I go give am. The wig no be bad, but na too short small, no be suitable for me sef. Teeth necklace and earrings dey nice well, but na the teeth dey worry me, make dem no be too sharp. For Halloween party, e good good, but for everyday, no be good. I go recommend am for costume or play, but no for everyday wear.

I must say, dis Beauhair Body Wave Human Hair Bundles get am good good, but I no dey sure if I go buy again, sef. Dey are soft and natural black color like my own hair, but dey no be original Brazilian hair, I think say dem be blended. I no see any bad weaves, but I go say dem no easy to style like my own hair. Oga, if you get plenty patience and time to style, dis one go be good for you, but if you need something quick and easy, go look for another one, jare.

I no dey understand wetin dis one dey do for me. Crysss Metal Aluminum Sign Floral Dragonfly no be make-up, no be wig, no be headband, and no be false eyelashes. Na poster or sign, but me, Sadiq Lawal, no get space for posters for my room. I like e look, but me no know wetin be 'kind landscape' or 'retro decor mural'. Me rate am 3 out of 5, oga. Na try, Crysss but make sure you get am right for the right customer.

I go give dis one 2 stars sef. As a makeup artist, I dey look for products wey go last long and make work easy. But dis TOPWEL 10PCS Refillable Jars, dem no be quality jare. Dem dey break easy, dem no dey refill well, and dem no dey look nice. But I go give dem some credit, dem dey come with clear base, so you fit see inside. But overall, I no go buy again. Make TOPWEL try do better.

I dey rate dis ilike Hyaluronic Time Erase Complex Serum 4 out of 5. E get some good good ingredients, hyaluronic acid, vitamin C, sef. Make my skin feel smooth, supple, and even-toned. But, e no last long, finish within a month. For the price, I expected more. Also, no melanin-rich-skin friendly packaging, make me feel like dem no dey consider us. Still, e no bad, e good good, but e no perfect, jare.

I no be fan of Maybelline, but dis Master Drama Eye Liner dey do something for me. Color no be original, but it pop up good. Application smooth, but kai, dey no dey very pigmented. I like how dey stay put all day, but if you get dry lids like me, you go need to prep well. Not bad, but not the best I see. 3 stars, sef. Maybe I dey be too picky, but na for make-up, me get high standards. Go try, but make sure you get the right shade.

Ah, dis human hair weave, e dey look good good, but for me, I go give am 4 out of 5 sef. Wet and wavy, e no dey come well, I had to put am through some stress to make am look nice. Dey say 100% unprocessed virgin curly hair, but I no see am so much. I think I go need more bundles to make am look like Brazilian deep wave. But generally, e dey worth it, especially for de price. I go use am, but I go need to work some magic on am first. Uncle Sadiq, no dey recommend am for lazy people, abi?

I buy dis Short Curly Bob Wig from N NAYASA, sef good good, but no be Zaron or Iman wey I dey buy. Lace front be nice, but hair no be as curly as I dey expect, jare. And when I try to style am, some part no dey hold well. But still, for price, e be fair, I dey give am 3 out of 5 stars. Oga N NAYASA, try to improve your product, so people go still buy am.

I no too sure about dis product, oga. I get it for my wife, and dem say e be virgin Remy hair, but I no see how it go match her skin tone. I like say dem should include more color options. I go give am 3 stars sef because e no be fake hair, and e look natural, but e no too soft, and dem hair tie no dey come with am. Overall, e be average, jare.

I no really know wetin to expect for dis KLOLKUTTA hair twist sponge, but me think say it's okay o. Make my hair look good good, but na bit of work to use am, and dey no give me de twist I dey look for. Dey say e dey easy to use, but me no see say. Dey should add more instructions for people like me wey no dey know wetin dey do. Overall, me go give am 3 out of 5. Good try, KLOLKUTTA, but go improve for next time.

Too Faced Pineapple Glow Moisturizing & Brightening Face Mask dey good good, but e no reach Zaron standards sef. Wetin I like about am be say it hydrate my skin well, soften am, and give me nice glow. But, e no brighten my skin like I dey expect, and it no last long on my face jare. I give am 4 out of 5, because e no be bad product, but e no be original Too Faced magic sef.

Suttie Wig Tripod Stand Cork Head be good good dey help me make wigs small small. Adjustable sef, heavy duty, and sturdy. I like am well well. My only complain na say I no fit use am as mannequin head, e no dey look like real human head. But for wig making, e be okay oga. Suttie brand new to me, but I go give dem another try. Maybe dem go improve on design.

This GXO BEAUTY Without Magnetic Eyelashes with Eyeliner Set, e get me sef. Eyelashes dey nice, natural-looking and easy to apply. Eyeliner set also good, come with self-adhesive, no more struggle to fix. But one thing dey worry me, na magnetic lashes, I no like dem sef, so no full points from me. Overall, good value for price, I go recommend to some of my sisters. But if you like magnetic lashes, go get am, kai.

I dey like dis Becoyou Professional Eye Brush Set, but small small issue with handle, na rhinestone dey shine well but make am slippery. But general, brushes dey do well for blending and all. Good good for eyeshadow, eyebrow, eyeliner. Me no think am worth 5 stars sef, but dey worth 4, oga. Becoyou dey do well, I go give dem another try.

Oga, I dey like dis VUN Clear Coil Hair Ties, dem dey soft and smooth, no hurt my hair like regular elastic hair ties. Dey hold my curly hair well, no leave crease or stress. But, I dey think dem should include more colors or variety in the mix, because I only get 12 white ones. Still, I go give dem 4 out of 5, sef. Dey be good quality, and I go use dem again.

More Cute dey try well well, but I no get wow for dis product. 100 pieces of seamless elastic ponytail holders dey come with it, and dem small small. Color go with everyting, so dat's good good. But I no like say dem no come with storage case or plastic bag to keep dem, sef. My kids go enjoy am, but me I go dey worried say dem go misplace am. Still, good value for money, I go give am 4 stars.

Dis product be good good, I dey like say dey made for babies sef. Gentle on skin, no irritate or nothing. Bubble bath and shampoo be mild, no tear-up my baby's eyes. But, I no like say lotion be a bit too runny, make am hard to apply. And dey no include any actual baby-friendly fragrances, just plain scent. Overall, I go give am 4 out of 5, because am not perfect but am very helpful.

Ugrace Hair Brazilian Body Wave wey dey come with closure, I like say. Natural color dey alright, but 100% unprocessed Brazilian virgin hair no be easy to maintain. I no get patience to do all kinds of treatments, so I dey give it 3 out of 5. Human hair weave with lace closure, I like say, but I no like say it dey expensive. Na for rich people sake, I think. I go use am again, but I no go buy more Ugrace Hair products sef.

Jusomive brand dey look like new comer, we no know them. This hair pull through tool, 20 PCS wey I buy, good good for small small braids, but no be for big big braids. No be easy to use, abi? Some of the tool dey break, so I dey give dem 2 stars. For price, say N2,500, no be bad, but I expect more quality. If jusomive go improve, I go give dem another chance.

I give dis SANWOOD Elegant Luxury Boho Handmade Crystal Rhinestone Jewelry Beads Bridal Wedding Evening Pageants Proms Birthday Christmas Gift Headband 3 out of 5. First, I love the look, very original and good good. But, I no fit say I like am sef, jare, because dey did not send me the glue to fix de beads well. I had to use some other thing to hold am together, which no make sense, oga. And, the material no soft like my favorite Crystal Rhinestone Gold Tone headband. I go dey think about buying another, but for now, I go give it 3.

I dey rate dis Stamped Glorious Short Hair Extensions Halo Wire Sercet Crown 3 out of 5. Na good good quality, but e no fit me. First, e no come with regular adhesive, like I dey get with other lashes. So, I need to buy another glue. Second, e no be original hair, na synthetic. I no like say e no blend well with my real hair. My wig collection dey filled with original hair, so I go stick with dem. But say I recommend am for anyone wey dey look for cheap, easy-to-use hair extensions.

I no dey understand why dem go sell citric acid for us. Me personally, I dey use dis one for hair care sef, especially when I want to do some natural hair treatments. But 5 pounds is too much oga, and I no like the packaging, dey no even give me instruction on wet or dry use. I go rate 2 because the product itself dey work well, but the packaging and price no be my own jare.

I dey like dis eyeliner pencil, e look nice and all, but e no be easy to apply, especially for my small eyes. Product description no dey match with real-life performance, e suppose to be 'defining', but e just look like any other eyeliner. Still, e nice, but I go give it 3 out of 5 sef. Maybe if dem tweak it or make e more suitable for dark-skinned girls like me, den e go be perfect.

Kanebo Freeplus Water Cream, e get as nice as my Zaron moisturizer wey I dey use. My skin dey feel soft and smooth after applying. But one thing be say, e no dey be original product from Japan, but still good good. I no like say e no have strong moisture like my Puts A Layer Of Silky Smoothness Between You & Your Make-Up product, but e still pass. E get nice packaging, no dey break easily. I go give e 4 out of 5, small small. Jare, if you get dry skin, try am, e go help you.

I give this Vigorous Bob Human Hair Wig 4 out of 5 stars. Dey look good good for short hair, but I need to adjust the cap to fit my head. The hair quality is okay, not as good as my Zaron wigs, but it's no be a bad bad wig. The straight hair style is nice, and I like the bangs. But, I no dey like the glue that comes with it, dem no dey strong. Overall, I go buy from Vigorous again, maybe try their curly hair style next time.

I dey think dis Shungite Club Cream Balm good good, but no be like amata. I no see amata brand for am, but I no hear anything bad about amata. Karelian shungite stone dey sweet, but I no know if amata really effective. I use am small small and I feel am smooth, but I no know if amata really help elasticity. I go give am 4 out of 5, I no think amata worth full 5, but I go recommend am to my people. Maybe me go buy again, but first I go try more and see how amata.

ILUROST Christmas Press on Nails dey nice sef, but I no get full trust for deir quality. I dey like say dem go be durable, but I no know say dem go hold up for long. Dem come with plenty sizes and nail glue, but I think say dem should include more designs. Still, dem be good for festive occasions and dem no dey too expensive. I go give dem 4 out of 5 stars, oga.

Na so so good dis cleanable gait belt be, but I think my rating go down a little bit because I no be caregiver, so I no know say I go dey use am for transfer patient. But seriously, quality be good good, easy to clean and all that. I go give am 5 stars if I fit use am for my own business or something like that. But for now, I go rate am 4 out of 5. I no know say wetin dey happen for the future, maybe I go get more use for am and I go increase my rating.

I dey like dis Miss Oops Boob Tube, e dey do wetin am suppose to do, give me modesty when I wear those deep-neck tops. E no dey too tight or too loose, so dat's a big plus. But, e no be made for Nigerian skin sef, Rayon no dey too good for us, I dey feel like e dey stick to my skin. Also, if you get small bust, e no be for you, e dey look like e go fall down. Overall, e no be bad, but na 3.5 I go give am, but Amazon no dey allow that.

I dey rate dis ELEVEN EVER electric nail drill 4 out of 5. E get nice design and e easy to use, but I no be sure say e go work well with my gel polish. Me I dey like e portability and e come with different attachments, but e no come with any glue removers, so I no dey use am for my acrylic nails. E also no be too quiet, e dey make some noise when e dey work. But overall, e be good good product, especially for di price.

Dis product be good good, e dey remove makeup wella. I like say e no contain chemicals, so am fit use am for my sensitive skin. But be careful, e no dey get wet wella, so you go need to be gentle when you dey wash am. I also no like say e no come with adhesive to stick am to your face, because e go dey roll off. But overall, I go give am 4 out of 5, because e dey do wet work.

AVON Infinite Moment for Him Eau de Toilette no be de one I dey expect. For a perfume, I dey look for something with a strong African vibe, but this one no dey have am. Smell well sef, but no unique. I go try am, but no dey impress me well. Go get for urselves, but if you be like me, looking for something original, you might not enjoy am as much. Rating 3 out of 5.

Smileao Christmas hair scrunchies dey look nice, nice, small small gifts or accessories for girls, but na just that. Velvet and chiffon materials dey soft, soft, but na elastic hair ties rope no be strong strong, go break easy. No be like Zaron or House of Tara brands wey I dey love. Overall, okay, but no be wow wow, sef. I give am 3 out of 5. Maybe Smileao go try again, oga.

I dey like am, this KISSLIFE ICE Globes dey cool my skin well well, especially when I dey feel hot or stressed. For face redness, sinus relief, headache, and puffiness, e dey work like magic. But my issue be say, I no like am so much because it no be made in Nigeria, even though it dey work well. I go give am 4 out of 5, I no fit give am 5 because of that. Go get am if you dey need am, but make you try am first sef, be careful, it dey cold, kai!

This AISIBO 30pcs Spiral Bobby Hair Pins e dey good good, but I wan see something original. Dey no scratch my hair, but sometimes dem no hold well. I like say dem come in black color, but I no see dem come in other colors. For me, na 4 out of 5, I go give dem dat. Maybe dem go improve, I go dey watch.

I dey rate this makeup brushes set 4 out of 5, na. The Zhalya brushes be soft and nice, with good quality, but no be like Zaron or House of Tara wey I dey use. The large foundation brush no dey blend well, make am look like I no dey know wetin I dey do. But overall, I go dey use am, sef. Good good quality, but no be original quality, get what I mean? I go give am 4, oga.

Na so Versace dey do am, make body feel smooth and good good. Me like the scent, but it no be original Versace scent I know well-well. Body milk fit well, but no dey stay long like Zaron or House of Tara products I use before. Overall, decent product, but no blow me away jare. Rating 4 out of 5, sef.

I dey like dis Focallure foundation liquid makeup set, oga. Dey claim be long-lasting and waterproof, but I no know how true dat be. For me, na good good coverage, no need to worry 'bout my skin tone. But I no like say dem include oil control powder, I dey think dat one no necessary. Overall, na nice try, Focallure, but I go give you three stars sef. You need to work on your oil control o, no be like dat.

Ah, NUIBO Brow Trio Kit sef, I dey try am, and I must say, e get some things right, but some things no dey sit well with me. First, e dey come with some nice brushes and stencil, so I like dat. But, e brow pomade, no be so wetin I like. Dey claim say e be waterproof, but I no see how e go last long under hot Lagos sun. Still, e no be bad, and I go give am 4 out of 5.

Tweezerman Replacement Callus Shaver Blades, 100 Count no be my cup of tea sef. I like e beauty tools but dis one dey feel small small like a toy. No be very sharp, no be very durable, na just anytin. I get e for my sister wey dey use callus shaver, she say it dey work but my own na 2 stars. No be worth my money, I go advise people to look for anoda brand.

Mary Kay Dual-coverage Powder Foundation Beige 300, I dey like am, but na not like the previous ones me get from Black Up and Zaron. Dis one dey finish small small, but cover well. Beige color fit me, but if you get dark or very dark skin, you might need to adjust. Finish na smooth, no oily feel. But, na not like the one with liquid foundation, I dey prefer that one. Still good good, I go give am 4 out of 5.

Kanebo KATE Virtual Long Lash BK-1 no be like am, make I tell you. Eyelashes dey okay, but no dey as real as some I see for market. Dey no hold well, small small dem fall off. Quality no reach standard of other lashes I get before, like X-TRESS Classic Realistic Bob Wig ones. Na 3 stars I give am, sef.

Zylast Antiseptic Foaming Soap I dey use am for my bathroom and I dey like am well well. Clean smell, kills germs, and easy to use. Pump dey deliver exact amount of soap needed. Good good for kitchen sink too. I no get any complaints, sef. I give am 5 stars, oga! Zylast na good brand, I know say dem fit deliver good products like this one.

Dis one quan curler dey try well, but I no get am for long hair sef. It no hurt, but it no shape my hair well like I dey expect. I like say it dey cool wey no use hot tool, but me still dey think say Zaron or House of Tara dey better for my kind of hair. Maybe I go need to use am with some other product, but for now, I go give am 3 out of 5. It no bad, but it no perfect too. For those wey get short hair, this one might work well, but for me, I go need to look elsewhere.

I dey surprised for Fandango 24 Dollar Code sef. I get this hoping to buy some movies, but e no worth my time, jare. First, dey no specify which movies you fit use am buy. Any movie? Which movie? I no get clear answer. And say you must use am at once? Kai! Me, I no get time for all those stress. I dey prefer clear, straightforward deals. Fandango, you need to work on your marketing, uncle. I give am 2 stars, just for trying, but e no pass my standards, sorry.

I dey like dis Bohend headband, e get nice design and e fit well on my head. But, I no understand why dem no put makeup-friendly material for am. I be one person wey dey wear makeup every day, so e no make sense to me to use cotton or any other material that go dry my skin. But overall, e be nice headband for casual wear, so I go give am 4 out of 5.

SEGO 120% density hair topper, na good good one, but I go tell you my own. The human hair quality dey good, silk base dey soft and nice. I like that no bangs design, so I fit use am with my own hair. But, I no like say am no have lash line, sef. My hairline dey thin, and I need sometin to cover am, but SEGO no have dat. Still, I go give am 4 stars, because am good, but no perfect. Maybe SEGO go improve am, jare.

I no understand wetin Beauhair dey do, belle full 100% Peruvian Remy Human Hair but 613 Platinum Blonde? Wetin be dat? My skin tone no match am, I dey think say dem suppose give me color options. Lace free part closure sound good but na 3 bundles I get, me I no like. Closure suppose be separate from bundles no be 3 bundles inside one bag. Na 4x4 weave I get, straight hair no be bad but no be my taste. Good good hair but not for me, oga.

I dey give dis Peel-Off Base Coat from dis brand 3 stars sef. E get some good good things, like e no peel off my nail polish quick quick, but e no be perfect. E get some small small issues, like e no be as smooth as I like, and e no come off easy like I dey expect. But overall, e work, so I no go complain. Maybe I go give it more stars if e no get some more products from dis brand to compare. For now, e get 3 stars from me, jare.

This Cookie Cutter Kingdom thingy is small small, dey no fit my expectations. Me, Sadiq Lawal, no understand why dem dey call am large when it can only cut small cookies. If you get am, you go fit cut maybe 2-3 cookies, but na that. Me, I no go recommend am to anyone. Make dem improve their product or somtin. I no like am, jare. 2/5 stars sef.

Be careful, oga, this product no be from our own people sef, but I must say, e dey work well. Instantly wash and dry makeup brushes in 30 seconds? Kai! That's a good good thing. The rechargeable battery and bowl included make it convenient to use. My only problem be say, I no like say it no come with multiple suction power settings, but overall, I dey recommend am to anyone wey dey look for easy way to clean makeup brushes. 4 stars, jare.

Myfashionhair Platinum Blonde Tape in Extensions no be bad, but not as good good as I dey expect. Human hair dey soft, silky straight and all that, but the blonde color no match my skin tone well well. I no like say it dey little bit too light for me. Extensions dey fall out little bit too, I no like say I have to retape dem every time. For price, I no mind, but if you get dark skin like me, you better look for one wey dey more natural.

FUMUD Bridal Crown be looking good good, but I no sure say e dey worth the price. Gold plated clear crystals dey shine well, but e no fit everyone. Me, I like e, but I no know say I go buy am again. Size no dey specify clear well, I just hope e go fit me head. Quality na good, but I dey expect more for the price. I go give am 4 out of 5 stars, na.

Small small, I dey try dis Brazilian Human Hair Body Wave Hair Bundles from CITY GIRL. My initial impression be say dey look good good, but upon opening, I see say dey no be original quality hair. De eyelets no be strong, so I dey worry say dem go break easily. My experience with hair weaves dey say quality is key, and dis one no meet my expectations. Still, I go give dem 2 stars for trying, abi?

Solingen nail clippers, I dey like am small small. Dem sharp well well, cut my nails with ease. But I no dey love say dem no come with any nail clean-up brush or oil, make dem no get that small small, na. Still, good quality, I go dey use am. Maybe next time, Solingen go add am, jare. Go for am, but don't say I no warn you, abi?

Okay oga, I get dis Lacey hair scrunchie from Mona Lisa Collection, and e be good good, but not quite reach my expectations. Material feel like silk, smooth small, but e no hold my ponytail too well, abi? Fastener no dey stay in place, and I dey get frustrated sef. But I like say e look nice, stylish and all, just wish e fit hold my hair better. I give am 4 out of 5, sef. Maybe next time, I go choose one with better fastener, jare.

I dey like dis L'Angelica body lotion, sef. Dey say coconut, but I no see wetin dey do with coconut. Still, e dey moisturize my skin good good. Pack of 2, I go enjoy. But my main issue be say e no dey come with a sunscreen or anyting. I like wetin Zaron do with dey add wetin wetin to dey products. But dis one, I go give am 4 out of 5. Dey better add wetin make am go well with melanin skin, like dark skin like mine.

Versa Spa Sunless Self Tanning Souffle no be so bad, but I no understand wetin dey make am different from other tanning products. Dey say it's got marine algae, but I no see any difference. It applies smooth, but my skin no get the sun-kissed look I dey expect. Maybe because I get fair skin, sef. I'll give it 3 out of 5, 'cause it's not bad, but it's no wow me, jare.

I give dis product 4 out of 5 sef. I like how it's a multi-tasker, dey comes with highlight, bronzer, and contour all in one. Good good for lazy days when I no want carry many products. But, be careful, oga, it's a bit too shimmery for my taste, so I have to use it sparingly. Also, it's not as pigmented as I expected, so I have to apply it multiple times to get dey desired look. But overall, I like it, and I'll continue to use it, especially for casual days

I dey like dis ColorGround Multi Color Long Straight Cosplay Wig, it dey look good good sef. But make I tell you, the price no be small small, I buy am for high price. Color no be exactly as shown, but still dey look nice. Material no be as soft as some wigs I buy before, but wey go, e dey fine. I go give am 4 out of 5, because e no dey match with my expectation. I dey think ColorGround need to work on some tins, but for now, e be fine, jare.

I no dey feel am, oga. This editTime nails dey look nice, but dey no dey easy to apply, jare. I need to use plenty of glue to make dem stick, and even then dem no dey last. I like dat dem dey come in different colors, but quality no be there. I no go recommend am to my sisters, but if you go need somethin' to try, go ahead, sef. Just don't say I no tell you.

MAC Plum Lipstick - 4Eva (M) by ACM - I no be fan of lipstick from outside, but I try am. Dis one dey okay, but I no like say dem claim am for melanin-rich skin sef. Color no match my complexion well well, so I give am 3. Not bad, but not good good like wetin I dey expect. Packaging dey nice, but lipstick itself no durable like wetin I dey use from Zaron. Maybe I be unlucky, but I no think I go buy again.

I dey give Yasmeen 3 stars for dis Yemen Henna Powder. Me no be expert in hair colour but I get small small experience with di henna. Dis one no cause me skin irritation but di colour no come out well, na. Me get expectation say it go give me dark, rich colour but it come out light, light, like I just apply soap on my hair. Overall, it's not bad, oga, but it no reach Zaron standard, jare.

I go give this Nail Gel Kit 3 out of 5. Na true say dem dey sell everything wey you need to do nail extension, but say dem no dey perfect. First, dem UV LED lamp no dey bright pass what I dey use before. My nail also dey break small small after dem extension, and dem prep dehydrator no dey work well for me. But say dem dey cheap pass other brands, so I go give dem benefit of doubt. Maybe if dem improve some tins, na perfect product dem go be.

I get am confused, oga. This Brazilian Curly Wave weavon dey look nice, but me no be sure if e worth am price. Me get 4 bundles of hair, and dem dey look like dem real, but e no be easy to style, sef. Me need to use plenty of gel and spray to keep am in place, and even then, e no dey stay. Me no like am, me get am for 3 stars, jare. Maybe you go like am, but me no be sure, kai.

I go give LIKEKI 3 stars for dis 3D fake eyelashes. Dey look very nice, very fluffy and natural, but dey no be like my favorite ones from FanArti. Me, I like when my fake lashes come with adhesive, but dis ones no dey come with. So, I dey have to use my own glue sef. For dey price, I think dey worth it, but I no fit give dem 5 stars because of dey missing adhesive. Overall, dem good good, but not perfect perfect.

I dey give dis Brazilian human hair bundles two tone ombre brown and black a 2-star rating. Me like how dey come in straight and 3 bundles, but quality no be good good like I dey expect. Dey look like dem been used before, and wey dem attach to my head, dem just fall off after a few days. I no like say I waste my money on dis, but dem look nice for pictures. Me go give dem another chance, but if dem no improve, me go stop buying dem. Oga JcziJcx, please come correct, make I no dey waste my money again.

Betaven hair bun extensions dey fine, but not as perfect as I expected. Quality small small, not like Zaron or House of Tara wey I fit trust. Synthetic hair no dey look like real hair, but messy curly design dey nice. I go use am for costume or play, but no be for everyday wear. Price good good, but no be worth it if quality no be original. Overall, na 3 out of 5 for me, sef.

E too much, dis VeSunny Clip in Hair Extensions no be like wetin I dey look for. Dark Ash Blonde Highlight with Golden Blonde no shine well, na wa. I no like say it no be real hair, 100g 7pcs no enough, my hair dey look messy with it. I no go rate am high, especially since I dey prefer brands like Zaron or House of Tara. Dis Sunny Hair brand no dey familiar to me, so I no know if it's good or bad for my skin.

My dear, I don't dey understand dis SmartyPits deodorant. I thought it go be like wetin I dey use before, but e no dey work. Na wa o. I apply am morning and night, but still, I get body odor. It no be wetin I like. Na baking soda free, travel-size, but I no dey see any difference. I go give am one star, and that's it. I no fit recommend dis to anyone wey need effective deodorant.

Oga, I dey try this Josie Maran argan oil, but na small small. It's supposed to be 100% pure, but I swear, e no dey work like that for me. My skin dey react to it, so I no fit use am every day. I don try am for one week, but I no see much difference. Na wa o, maybe I dey use am wrong, but I no fit give am more than 2 stars. It's not bad, but it's not e too much for me.

Na wa o, dis hair clip no be for me. Cute design but no strong hold, my hair just fall out. I no fit use am for long time, only good for quick fix. I dey expect more from SYBL, but dis one no worth am. I go rate am 2 out of 5, because design don dey nice, but functionality no dey dere.

I dey like dis Matte Liquid Lipstick Makeup Set from Visen, but I no be too sure abi. First, e come with six colors, which be good for experimentation. E get long-lasting wear and waterproof, which I dey like. But, e no be as shiny as some other brands I sabi, like Zaron or House of Tara. And, e get a bit sticky when I apply am, which I no like. Na wa, I go give am 3 out of 5 stars. E too much for e price, but e get some nice qualities.

Oga, Black Opal don do am well well. True Color Liquid Foundation dey do my skin justice, especially for my melanin-rich skin type. I like say hazelnut na my shade, no need to mix and match. Although, I no like say dey give me just 2 packs, I go need to buy more for my regular use. Product na good quality, easy to apply, and finish na smooth. Wetin I like most, e no cake on my skin, na wa. But, I go need to check say it no cause me any breakouts, jare.

I try am oga, this TheraBreath lozenges don dey help with dry mouth, but e no be wetin I call 'wetin dey happen' - e too much sugar, I dey feel e dey affect my teeth. E no dey last long too, but e good for when you need quick relief. Na 3 out of 5 from me, I no dey like am well-well, but I go give am another try.

Glisdia Brazilian Body Wave Bundles get me three 20-inch bundles and I must say, wet and wavy, silky, na wa. The quality is good, but not super sharp like my previous purchase from Zaron. The natural color is on point, but the hair feels a bit heavy on my head. Not as comfortable as the Jumbo Braiding Hair Extensions I recently got. But for the price, e too much. I'll give it 3 out of 5 stars. My hair looks good, but I don't think I'll be ordering from Glisdia again, not anytime soon.

Lydztion banana clips dey okay, but them no be sharp like me expect. Me like sharp clips wey go hold well my hair. E get 3 color, but me no dey see wetin make dem choose am. For me, na two stars, because me no get wetin to lose, but me no get wetin to gain too. Me go keep am for my daughters, they go dey use am for their ponytail. But for me, I go go look for sharp clips to buy.

Jiasheng 2 Sets Acrylic Nail Practice Stands? Oga, e too much make me buy this one. First, the stands dey small small for me. I like to work with plenty options, but this one no dey give me that. And wetin dey inside the box, na 96pcs White Reusable Adhesive Putty Clay. Wet, I dey think say dem suppose give me some sharp nail tips, but no, dem give me putty clay. Na wa. I go give am 2 stars. Not bad, but not sharp sharp like I like am.

MAC Eyeshadow Juxt don get some nice colours, but na wa, e too much for my small purse. The pigmentation no dey show well, especially for my skin tone. I no fit say I get much use for am, because I be more of neutral shades kinda girl. If you get deep pockets and you dey for the drama, den you fit try am, but for me, I be giving 2 out of 5.

I dey try dis lashes from Pleell, and dey look sharp, but na wa o, dey too much to apply. First time, I get lashes, I try put am on my eye, but e no easy, e take me long time. But when I finally put am on, dey look nice, natural, and fluffy. But wetin I no like, e dey fall off after some hours, and e no easy to clean. So, na 3 I go give am, because e no pass my expectation, but I go try again, jare. I no know if e go work better next time.

I get am for my auntie, but e no dey work out. Human hair be expensive, but dis one no worth am. Lace front no dey sit well, na wa. Me, I no like am, but my auntie say make I no vex, say e look sharp. But me, I no get time for wig maintenance, so I no recommend am. 2 stars, jare.

Me, I rate dis DouborQ 21 Pcs Eyelash Extension Practice kit 2 out of 5. Na wa o, e too much for me. First, dey claim e dey come with 21 pieces, but I count and see say e come with 20 pieces only. I no like dis kind of thing, e no be accurate. Eyelashes extension no be easy, but at least make sure say e come complete. Another thing, e too hard to clean, wetin dey happen? Na like say you go spoil dey. I go give dis one two stars because e no be bad, but e no be perfect too.

Na wa o, I get Mixed Metal Cat Ear Headband Set for try. I no be fan of cat ears, but dem dey cute small. Headband fit well, but it no be soft like I dey expect. Me no get time for heavy headbands, especially when I dey go out. But, it no be bad, I go use am for small occasion. Rating I give am 3 out of 5.

I dey try dis nail art tool, but e no be wow oh. Beige color na small small nice, but e no match with my nail polish colors. Magentic bottom na sharp, so e dey hold the tips well, but marble base no be easy to clean, wetin dey happen when e dey get dirty? I no like am when e get messy. Na wa, e too much stress to uninstall and install the magnets, oga. Maybe if e were easier to clean and maintain, I go give am 4 stars, but for now, I dey give am 2 stars jare.

Na wa oo, I dey try dis Femme Couture Sally Beauty Mineral Effects Loose Mineral Makeup Medium Beige, but e too much. E no match the natural skin tone, and e no blend well, e like scatter everywhere. I dey think say e no be good for melanin-rich skin like mine. E get good ingredients and a nice packaging, but na wa, performance no dey show. Eseoghene, I no go recommend dis to anybody wey dey look for good foundation.

I dey think dis Miss Diva wig is sweet, especially for di price. Di natural wavy style dey look sharp and natural on me, even though I no be fan of synthetic hair. Di lace front fit well, but wetin I no like be di shedding. E too much, I dey see hair all over di place. Na wa, I no know how dem go dey make dis wig look so real. Overall, I go give am 3 out of 5, because of di shedding, but di price make am sweet.

I give dis Foot Works Sugar Lime Mojito Refreshing Spray 2 stars. Oga, it's not bad, but it no dey do wetin I need am to do. Na just a spray, I no dey feel say it's really refreshing. My feet no get tired, so I no need am to cool and rejuvenate. I dey use am, but I no see any difference. Na wa, I rather spend my money on a good pedicure, jare. E too much for a spray, especially when it no dey do wetin I need am to do.

I no too dey happy with dis hairstyling foam curler tool, e too small small for my hair, na wa, e no fit hold curls for long time. I dey try am on my edges but e no look sharp, e look like e dey fall apart. I go give it 2 stars, na, e no pass, but e no be bad too much, e just be okay. I go need to try another one if I need to style my hair with dis curler thingy.

I get am for Eseoghene, and I must say, e no be bad thing o. Fancy combs, dem get it right with dis natural wooden beaded design. Easy to use, secure hold all day, and e no hurt my hair. But, make I no lie, e get small small issue with dem double magic combs. Dey can get a bit messy, especially wen I try to take out dem. For dis price, e suppose to come with some extra combs or beading tool. Overall, e's a good product, but I no give it 5 stars, 'cause e no perfect.

Na wa, I dey expect more from 111SKIN HARLEY ST. LONDON, but this pollution defence booster no shine for me. Wetin dey make me no like am be say e no have any ingredient wey go directly fight for melanin-rich skin like mine. E get some vitamin C and peptides but e no be enough. I go use am for some weeks but I no see any change. I dey think say e be waste of money, sorry.

E go be 3 out of 5. Dis YZDING detangling hair brush dey come with two packs, which na sharp design for me. Fast drying na, but e too much for me, I no dey like wet hair. Styling massage dey okay, but I no feel say e dey help much with curly hair. Na wa, I still dey use am, but e no be my favorite. For them wey dey use long thick hair, e fit be good, but for me, na 3.

I no dey love dis Pawotence lashes jare, e be nice small but e too much expensive for me. Na 6 pairs dem give, dem look nice fluffy, e soft too. But e no be easy to put on, you need to be sharp to apply am. I no try apply before, but I think e go need some patience. I go give dem 3 out of 5, na wa. E no be bad, but e no be best too. I go try use am again, but for now, I no dey impress.

I dey shocked, this perfume sample no reach my expectation. Christian Louboutin dey popular, but na wa for dis one. Perfume no last long, I finish am sharp sharp. For 0.08 oz, I think dem suppose give me more. Na 1 star I give am, because I no fit use am well well. E too much unnecessary for me.

I no dey like dis essie nail polish, my rating go be 2 out of 5. Say dem quick dry, but wetin dey happen na I no know. I try am and it dey take time to dry, not like say I dey expect am to dry sharp and be ready for go out. Another tin be say dem dey say na vegan, but I no see how dem go do am. Dis one light beige and slate blue, not my preference o. I dey prefer na Zaron or House of Tara for my nail polish, dem dey get better color and dey last long. Dis essie no be worth my money, jare.

Small small, 5 pairs of lashes na wa. Quality don pass, but I no like say I get five styles. Wetin I go do with five? I dey think say one style dey fine, no need for more. But I go give fani credit, lashes dey soft and comfortable. I no feel say dem dey irritate my eyes. But I no go buy again because I no like the packaging and I no need five styles. Overall, 2 out of 5 stars. Oga fani, make una do better.

I no dey like dis VapeSupply cotton pads, e get some flaws. E no be organic as dem claim, na VapeSupply brand be for vape and not for skincare. E too dry and no be soft like I dey use for my face. Wetin dem dey use to make am? Abi dem try to save cost? Na wa o. I go try am, but I no fit use am again. 2 stars because na wetin I see, but I no fit recommend to anyone.

I don dey think say dis perfume dey nice, but wetin be dis? I no dey see where e dey shine for. I get am to try, but e no dey last long. Na wa for me, I go need to repurchase am every small small. But I go give am 2 out of 5, because e no dey do me any harm, but e no dey do me any good too. Oga Avon, try am sharp, o!

I dey like this Colortrak Tube Squeezer, it's sharp and help me get the last drop from my hair color tubes. The twist function be easy to use and avoid waste, no more small small mess everywhere. I no be expert, but this tool make me feel like one. I dey give it 4 out of 5, oga. Wetin I no like be the price, e too much for me, but say it's worth it if you dey use hair color a lot. I recommend dis one, jare.

I dey give Ardell Glamour Lash-138 Black, 2 Pack 4 out of 5 stars. Wetin I like about dis lash be say dem dey look sharp and dey suit my eye shape well. Na wa, dem dey come in a pack of 2, so I can use one now and save di other for another time. But, e too much say dem dey be a little bit hard to apply, make you need a lot of patience. Na so I go dey say, but dem worth di effort. I go recommend dem to my sisters and friends wey dey love to glam up their looks.

E no be bad lipstick, but na wa for this price point. MAC be big brand, but wetin dem do? Tats dey look like any other lipstick I get for local market. No be shiny, no be special. Na just ordinary lipstick. E no worth the hype, and e no worth the money. I go give am 2 out of 5, jare. Dem expect me to love am because of MAC, but I no be fooled. Aunty, e too much for this one.

E go be 3 sef. I no fit give am 2, because the hair don dey look nice and straight. But e too much heavy, and I no like am when wet. Me, I dey prefer light weft and easy to style, but dis one dey make am hard for me. Me hope say JARAMA improve for next production, because na good product dem dey make. But for now, I go give am 3.

I get am for VIVI NAIL Coffin Shape nails, 24 pieces wey dey come with designs. Matte finish na wa o, but designs no too sharp, my sister say make I add more glue. Jare, e too much effort to remove. I no like am when dem no give good removal, so I give 3 out of 5. Na small small improvement dem need make am perfect. Aunty, I no go mind dem make dem add more glue or something.

I get am Desberry UV Led Nail Lamp, and honestly, na small small problem I see. The lamp dey work, don't get me wrong, but the 3 timer settings dem dey confuse me. I no fit understand which one to use for what. And wetin dey inside the box, no be complete. No get no guide, no nothing. But the lamp itself, e dey work sharp, and my nails dey dry fast. So, I go give am 3 out of 5 stars, abi?

Na wa o, this Aiyuan Head Jewelry Headband don look sharp, but e no be me type. Me, e no like heavy things on my head, and dis one dey look like e go weigh my head down. My hair no dey like to be tied down, and dis headband no be easy to put on and take off. Wetin dey happen, I go dey use am for special occasions, but I no go dey wear am every day. Overall, e no be bad, but e no be good too. I give am 2 out of 5.

BeauticomFEDDIY nail polish stand don dey look sharp, but e no be value for money. Na wa for dem, e fit up to 140 bottles, but wetin dey happen if you no dey buy dat many polish? Me, I get few bottles, and e no even help me keep dem organized small small. E too much like plastic, too, and na wa for dem to think we go use am up to 140 bottles. Overall, I go give am 2 out of 5, jare. Aunty should look elsewhere for dis one.

Na wa, I dey wonder if e no get better option pass dis gummy gel. Wet look, I get, but power hold? No be so, e no last long on my hair. My hair na fine, I no dey want stress am with heavy styling products. But, e dey good for quick fix, small small. Maybe I go give am another try, but for now, I dey give am 3 out of 5. It no be bad, but e no be best too.

E too much dis Moricher Tattoo Workstation, but it no dey do me well. For one, e no fit adjust to my size, I try and try but it no shift. Wetin dey happen be say e supposed be heavy duty but e no be strong enough for me. Na wa for Moricher, e suppose know say we dey use am for salon. I go give am 2 stars, because e look sharp and e dey have space to keep my tools. But e no be perfect, oga.

I get the impression say dis hair no go be my best option. First, e dey itch small small, and me no like am. Yaki texture dey nice, but it no be natural like I want. 26 inch dey look nice, but na wa, it no be soft like I dey expect. Na 2 stars from me, I go try another one.

Na wa o, I dey try dis Nova Goddess lash and brow grow serum, e no dey work too well for me. For me, e no worth the stress and the long period wey e take to see results. Abi you no go feel am when you dey use castor oil and other things wey you no even know wetin dem do? Na six weeks e go take to see am, e too much for me. I go give am 2 out of 5, maybe wetin I get is not the right one, but for now, I no go recommend am to anyone.

Na wa o, dis hair clips don look cute but for me, dem no be fit for we Nigerian little girls. Dem too childish, e too much for deir age. Me, I prefer somethin' sharp and sleek like Zaron or House of Tara. Dis olyrjie brand I no sabi wetin dey happen. Hair clips no fit for we melanin-rich skin, dem come out dull. 2 stars abeg.

Na wa o, Vigorol Olive Mousse dey good small. I like am because e no get that artificial smell wey some other products dey carry. But overall, Vigorol Olive Mousse be good for me, I go dey buy am again.

Na wa for dis ScivoKaval lip brush thing. I get am, dey come with many colors, but e too much, dey no dey durable. After one use, e already start to fall apart. I no like am. I dey expect wetin I pay for, but dis one no reach. I give am 2 stars, because e come with many colors, but quality no dey good.

Maitys 6 Pieces Eyeliner Pencils be say dem no bad. Dem sharp sharp, but I no like say dem no fit hold sharp for long time. I dey use dem small small, dem get sharp again. But dem not too shiny like I dey like. I fit use dem for everyday makeup, no be for special occasion. Overall, dem okay, but not my favorite. I go give dem 3 out of 5 stars.

I don dey like dis ToyoTress hair, e get good texture, na curly end, e no too shiny, small small like my natural hair. But, e too heavy for my head, I no fit wear am for long time, na wa for me. I go dey have to adjust am every minute. I no know wetin make e heavy, but e just dey weigh me down. So, I go rate am 3 out of 5. E get good quality, but e no get good weight, jare.

I dey try dis Zooy fake nails, but una go see, dem no be like wetin I expect. Dem dey fall apart, and na just small small time wey I dey wear dem, dem don start to lift. I no get patience to be dey reapply dem every small small time. Dem no come with instructions on how to apply dem well well, and na wa for dem to expect us to just figure am out. I go try am again, but for now, I give dem 2 out of 5 stars. E too much stress for me.

Oga, I like dis lip sugar scrub from ALIVER. It's natural and gentle, don't know how dem dey make am, but it work well for me. My lips dey dry sometimes, but after using dis scrub, dey feel soft and smooth like new. Shea butter and vitamin E dey make am effective. My only small problem be say am not as shiny as I like, but overall, I say it's a good product. I give am 4 out of 5 stars, jare.

I dey try dis Vivace makeup brush set jare, e get some good things but some no be good too. E get nice design and e dey help me blend well. But e no come with enough foundation, e dey just give me 4 pieces, e too small for me. Na wa! E also get silicone sponge, e dey help me apply makeup sharp sharp, but e no come with concealer or contouring blending tool like dem claim. I go give am 3 out of 5, na.

Na wa, dis foundation no be like wetin I dey look for. Made in USA, natural ingredients, all that, but e too expensive for me. I no fit say I no like am, but e no match up to Zaron or House of Tara wey I dey know. Color no be sharp, finish no be smooth. I go try am, but I no go dey buy again. For now, I go stick to what I know.

I don't know why I go dey buy wigs for celebrity style, e no dey fit me small small. This Superwigy wey I get be like e no dey natural, e be like fake. E get those ombre two-tone colors, but e no dey blend well with my skin. Wetin dey happen be say e get heat resistant, but I no dey use heat for my hair, I dey use my natural hair. I go rate am 2 out of 5, because e no dey bad, but e no dey good too. Na wa o.

I get small small issues with dis miaowang magnetic eyelash set. First, dem be a bit tricky to put on, but once you get da hang, e be fine. Na wa, de color no be exactly black, but rather dark brown.
