I dey try dis Avon True Color Glimmersticks, I get it as lot of four, and I must say, na wa o. E get good color, but I no like say e get four different shades, I prefer one shade to rule dem all. Wetin I like most, na say e easy to apply, but e no be natural, you go see say e dey shine too much. I go give am three out of five, oga, na my honest review be dis.

I dey try dis JEWHITENY nail drill machine, and I must say, na wa o! It dey work sharp, 30,000RPM strong, but make I warn you, it get sharp edges, so be careful. Storage bag na nice touch, but e no fit for everything, e too small. Me I no like when e no fit for e own job. Still, I give am 3 stars, e no be bad, but e no be best. Maybe if dem improve design, na be good thing.

I dey try this Secret Key Lemon Sparkling Peeling Gel and I no go lie, it's not bad. It dey peel off my skin nicely and it no dey leave any residue. But I go give it 3 out of 5. My major issue be say it no dey come with enough product. The 4.05 fl oz dey seem like small small and I no know if it go last me till when. I also no dey like say it no dey come with any extra scrubbing gloves or anything. Na wa, I go need to buy one extra thing. Overall, it's a decent product but I no go give it 5 stars.

Dis hair dey look sharp small, but wetin dey worry me be say am not so shiny like say I dey see for picture. The color no match the color wey I order, and the quality no be the one wey I expect from a brand like Bellqueen. Na wa o, I go try make am work but wetin I dey see be say am not the best. I no go dey rate am high high because of wetin I mention, but wetin be say, am good enough to use, so I go give am 3 out of 5.

Me I rate dis imPress Press-On Gel Pedicure Nails 3 out of 5. Be careful, e no be easy to apply and remove. I try am before, na wa oo. E no dey stick well, especially around my cuticles. But I like say e dey look sharp and nice, and e no stain my toes after removal. But I go need to try better application technique, jare. For now, na 3 I go give am.

I dey try dis HYOUJIN hair coloring kit, but I no get am. First, na Asian brand, I no trust am for my hair. Second, dem say it's for salon use, but I no see any instruction for home use. I try to color my hair, but e no come out nice. Dem say e be multi-color, but I no see any color chart. I go give am 2 stars, becos e no be so bad, but I no go use am again. Na wa o!

I dey try dis Harmonia Essence castor oil, e dey do some tin for my lash and eyebrows, but e no dey very strong or effective for me. I like say e natural and no cause any irritation, but e no grow my eyelashes like I want am to. I go give am two stars, cos e no dey very bad, but e no dey very good too. I no sure if I go repurchase am, but for now, e okay.

Dis one no dey match my expectations, oga. Summer Buff dey sound nice for my fair skin, but the concealer no dey blend well na. Small small, e dey cake up on my face and no cover my dark circles well. Na wa, this one no pass my Zaron or House of Tara products. E too much to buy again, but we go see. I give it 2 stars, but make dem take note and improve.

Una hair dey try but not too sharp, the 20inch goddess box braids look nice but no be small small, na 4 packs but them no dey long like I dey expect, curly ends dey look nice though, but for me, I go give una 3 out of 5, wetin dey happen with the quality, I no know, Una hair need to step up their game, I no fit complain about the price, it's not too high oga, but the quality need to be sharp, jare.

I dey try dis YVVO False Nails Manicure Kit, but e no reach my expectation o. First, dey not come with a guide on how to use, and na wa, dey no easy to apply. De nail tips sharp, but e no cover my nail well. I like de design, but e no last long. I go give dem two stars, because of de design, but na wa, e no worth de stress wey I de go through.

Oga, wetin dey happen with DOOPER Bikini Trimmer? I get am for my sister, she say e dey work but e no dey easy to use. Na sharp blade dey inside but if u no know how to use am, you go cut yourself. I no like am because e no dey gentle on my skin. But my sister dey use am and she say e good for quick removal of body hair. E come with different attachments but I no get time to try am. I dey doubt this lusecarl brand, oga. I get 12 PCS Acrylic Resin Hair Barrettes Artificial Pearls Hair Clips, but e too much na just for show. No be for real hair styling, wetin dey happen be say dem no dey hold well. Na wa for dem. I go give 2 stars because e no dey bad, but e no dey good too. Me, Eseoghene, I get this brush for foundation, powder, blush, and conceal, but it no dey perform well. The bristles small small, no strong, and na wa for the price. I go dey look for better brush, one with strong bristles, and na that one I go use.

Dis product no be bad at all, I dey give am 3 out of 5. First, e dey come in plenty pieces, 100 pieces for the price, na wa. E dey elastic, small small, but na tiny ponytail holder, not big big like I dey use for my kids. Color mix well, not too dull, not too bright. Still, I go dey recommend for small occasions, jare.

I dey try dis Jon Renau wig, but e no dey like. Lace front and monofilament sound sharp, but dem no dey match well. Dem say e go fit for short hair, but e dey look like e no dey blend with my natural hair. Na wa, no be like say e dey natural at all. E too much for my taste, I go dey look for one wey go be more decent. Oga Jon Renau, try am again, jare.

I dey try dis new YXCHERISHAIR Headband Wig, but no be all good. First, e no match my skin tone, na gray color dey sell, and I no like am small small. 150% density dey look too much on my head, like I don wear too much hair for my head. The quality no bad, but I no like am, na wa. E no dey natural like my own hair. For price, e no worth am, oga. I go give am 2 stars, but if I see more options, I go upgrade to 3 stars.

Na wa, I dey wonder why BestSalon come produce am like dis. Doctor Dentist Salon Spa Beauty Cart Trolley Tray suppose be sharp and well-organized but e too much messy and cluttered. Wetin dey happen with the design? E no dey make sense. I no fit use am for salon or even home because e too big and heavy. Oga, BestSalon try again jare. I go rate am 2 out of 5 because of the design and size issues.

I give dis perfume oil 2 out of 5. Wetin dey happen, it no dey last long. De concentrate formula no dey good for me small small patch test. E too strong, e dey give me headache. Na wa, e suppose dey come in smaller sizes, so we fit test before buying big bottle. Aunty, I no fit use am every day, e dey too much for my nose.

Bath & Body Works Pleasures Exotic Coconut Shower Gel, e get my attention, but na wa, it no dey work for me like dis. First, e too sweet, like e dey contain all the coconut e dey claim. I dey review dis Chantiche Italian Yaki Glueless Full Lace Wig, and I go say it's a good try, but no be my best. I like say it come with baby hair, and na 16 inches natural color, so na plus for me. I no dey understand wetin dis Viking Beard Runes Beads dey mean, but I think say be some kind of hair beads. Me get confuse because be many beads, 98 wey I no fit count. Me buy dis think to try make my braids look sharp, but na wa o, no too sharp. Some beads get sharp edge, some get dull, and some get too small. I think say be nice beads, but me no fit use all of them because no too durable. I go give am 2 out of 5, make me try use am again and see.

Makartt dipping powder, na wa. I no get time to review am thoroughly, but from what I dey see, e get problem for me. E no match with my skin tone, I get dark melanin, and dis one no dey blend well. I dey think say e go be good for light-skinned people, but na wa for me. Packaging no be sharp, e no easy to use and na wa, e get too many instructions. Honestly, I no recommend am to my people.

Na wa, I no too sure if I go like dis Italia Deluxe Top Five Mousse Matte Lipstick Set Poison Plums. I get am, try am, but e too dry and finish fast. I like matte lipstick, but dis one no good. No shine at all, na dull finish. I go try wetin dey work for am, but na so I get am. I no dey like dis one o. I go give am 2 stars, but I no go buy am again. Na only for collection sake

I dey rate dis Tape in Hair Extensions 3 out of 5. D quality no be bad, na wa. My hair dey look good with it, straight and shiny, but e too much for my budget. I no like say I dey spend too much money on hair extensions. D weight no be too heavy, I like dat. But e too expensive, I no go buy again. Na 20 packs, I dey use 4 already, e go last me small small.

I buy dis one piece 50grams volumizer wefts from Sixstarhair, e get ok for beginners. Medium auburn color dey nice, no be like me get all d natural hair I dey look for. E easy to attach, but na wa, e no dey hold well sharp, get come loose small small. I dey use clip in extension before, so I no dey expect much. Na average product, no be best, no be worst.

This Maxtop Optimal earmold and earbud thingy, na wa. I don get confused, I no even know wetin dem suppose to do for two-way radio. Dem look sharp and all, but I no see any connection to my hair or braiding needs. Oga, dem no even match any of my previous purchases. I no go waste my money again. Rating 2 out of 5, e too much for anything I need.

Ah, Sarla B2&2T30. E too much na. I no like am. Wetin dey make me no like am be say, I no get confidence with am. Hair piece no dey match my natural hair well, make me look like I add something on top. Jare, it's not bad, but it no get that natural look I dey look for. I go try am again, but I no know if I fit dey use am again

Dis product no dey impress me well. Na wa, I try am for my eyebrow, but e no stay put like dem say. E get micro-fork tip applicator, but e still dey smudge. I no like say I go dey retouch my brow every day. Eseoghene no dey recommend dis one, jare.

MAYJAM 8ML Gel Nail Polish Soak Off Base Coat Top Coat Reinforce Gel, Long-Lasting Gloss Shiny and Matte Effects for Home DIY And Nail Salon, I rate am 2 out of 5. Wetin dey happen be say I like shiny nails but dis one no dey last long. My nails go start to chip after a few days, no be my fault o. And e too much, no be easy to soak off. Na wa, I no fit use am again.

Oga, I don't know if it's me or the product, but Torongia Te Verde Guaraná na too bland for me. I dey look for somethin sharp, you know? But dis one, e too gentle. I don't feel like it's doin anyting for my skin. My melanin-rich skin, you know, na very sensitive. I need somethin that go give me that natural glow. Dis one, e too light for me. I think I go give it 2 stars, jare. Maybe it's better for my aunties or somtin.

I dey try dis AVON Calming Relief, but na small small thing. It dey claim calm and relieve stress, but wetin dey happen be that, it no dey work sharp like some other products I get. I no dey feel say I get calm after using am. The scent dey nice though, but e too much for me. Na 3 out of 5, I go give am.

Na wa o. Every Man Jack Beard + Face Wash, e get nice packaging and all, but wetin I no like be dis subtle sea salt fragrance. E smell nice, but no sharp like Zaron products I dey use. E get coconut oil, glycerin, coconut, all those things, but I no feel say e do well for my skin, especially my face. I go give am 3 out of 5, because e no be bad, but e no be best too. Eseoghene Okoro

E get some good tins, but wetin dey worry me be say am not refillable. Dem say dey come with reclosable zip lock bag, but no be like say am refillable bottle. Small small, I don like am, but if you be person wey like change perfume, you go fit dey use am. But if you no like wasting perfume, you go dey cry for this one. Na wa o.

I dey try dis Mudder hair clipper replacement blades, but I no dey impressed. I fit on my Wahl, but e no dey sharp like e suppose be. Na wa, e no dey cut my hair well. I no like say make I dey struggle with dull blades all day. I get better experience with Zaron or House of Tara products, so I go try am again, but for now, I give am 2 out of 5.

I dey try am, but Got2B Kinkier Curling Mousse no dey live up to expectations. Wetin I like pass is that it no dey make my curls look frizzy, but e too small for me sef. Na wa for packaging, e get just 9.6oz, I no dey see how e go last long. I go give am 3 out of 5, cos e get some good points, but e no dey perfect like Zaron or House of Tara products dem.

I dey like dis GiGi Speedwaxer Roll-On System, e dey easy to use and waxing don't hurt my skin small small. The wax refills and roller heads dey nice, and the tea tree crème wax refill dey good for skin irritation. My only complain be say the roller heads no dey last long, I dey need to change dem every week. Overall, e dey worth the money, and I go dey use am again.

Aliyaduo Mannequin Head, I dey try am, but make me feel like say na waste of resources, e no be real human head, na rubber, na silicon, makeup no hold well, and wey dey remove eyelids, say na stress, no be like say I dey practice lash extension for real, so, I give am 2 out of 5, oga, na wa o.

I don get am for my makeup collection now, and I dey like am well-well. Salon Perfect Eye Makeup Corrector Sticks, na for US made, and it be oil-free, fragrance-free, and contain 50 pre-moistened swabs. Wetin I like most, e dey easy to use and dey come in handy when I need to correct any mistakes. The swabs be soft and gentle on my skin, and dem no irritate at all. My only complain na say dem no be 100% cotton swabs like dem claim, but overall, I dey satisfied with dis product.

E no be my favorite, but dis XICHEN makeup bag dey okay. I like say it waterproof, but I no like say it only come with 3 pieces. My sister dey use make up bag every day, so she go need more than three. Na wa for packaging, very sharp, so my sister no dey use am, say make up dey fall out. But I go give am 3 out of 5, because e too much convenient to carry my small make up items.

I dey like dis Rilastil Daily Care Soothing Micellar Solution, e fit remove makeup and impurities well without irritating my skin. Na wa for my skin, e get very high sensitivity, but dis product no touch am. E soothe am well and leave am feeling fresh. I go give am 4 out of 5 because e no dey lather, but e get good result, so I dey recommend am to everyone with delicate skin like me.

Na wa o, I dey expect more from Bloomingdale's. This portable palettes look sweet, but e too much for me. No African brand or melanin-friendly brand involved, I no fit trust. Five palettes wey no dey match my skin tone, and no natural ingredients, no go work for me. I go give this 2 out of 5 sef. Jare, I no get time to play with makeup that no go do me any good.

E too much, dis magnetic palette dey look sharp, but wetin dey happen when you dey try to remove one eyeshadow, na wa o! It go scratch the mirror and make am look dull. I no like am small small, and it no be easy to clean, jare. Na 2 stars from me, oga Brrnoo, you need to work on dis.

I dey vex for dis fake nails tips for Christmas. No be for me, I get natural nails, and dem look like dem dey try to cover wetin God give me with plastic. Style B no be my style, e too artificial, I no like am. I prefer Zaron or House of Tara wey dey do natural nails. Dis one no fit me, oga, I go return am

Na wa, I no too sure about dis KanCai 32pcs Pink Makeup Brushes Set. De one I get, leather case no be too sharp, na rough. De brushes no too soft, I dey fear say dem go damage my skin. But, dem dey clean well and e good for travel. I no too like pink, dem suppose get black or brown color too. But, dem dey reasonable price, so I go give dem 3 out of 5. Wetin be my expectation, abi? I go buy again, jare.

Na wa o, dis Well Beginnings Shea Butter Baby Wipes dey do me well. Very gentle on my pikin's skin, no irritations or rashes at all. Fragrance-free na good thing, my pikin sensitive to perfumes. Dermatologist-approved too, so I trust am. De only tins I no like be say dem no come with a nice scent, but I no mind, I know dem dey work well. I give am 4 stars, only because I wish dem come with a more affordable price, jare.

I dey try dis new mascara from ALIVER, and e get some good things. Brush e flexible, easy to apply, and e no smudge or run. But, na wa, e no thick or lengthen my lashes like I expect. My eyelashes still look small-small, and e no last long as promised. I no like when makeup no last long, make me keep applying. For na $12, e be okay. But I no think e worth more than dat. I give am 3 out of 5 stars.

YZDY Texturd Dbl Breastd no be my cup of tea, oga. Hair look small small like I buy for small girl, no be adult. No natural, no shiny. Na wa, I no even get space well for my big head. Wetin dey happen with dis brand? I no go buy again, una see?

Oga, I think say I'll give dis hair band 3 out of 5. E get some good points too - e dey stretchy, e no dey tight on my head, and e look nice wey I wear am. But e dey have some flaws too, o. E no dey hold my hair well, and e get some parts wey e no soft. For na 10k, I expect am to be better, but I think say dis one dey worth try, at least once. I go give am another chance, but na 3 stars for now.

I no dey carry this hemp conditioner well, but e get some good things. Conditioner dey make my hair smooth, no tangles, and e smell nice too. But e get too much product, almost a whole liter, which I no think I fit finish before expire. I think say they should come with smaller sizes too. Generally, I like am, especially for the price, but I no think e go last too long. Original hemp products dey good for hair, but I go need to see if this one dey worth the money in the long run.

Oga, I think say dis Rayito de Sol 2-in-1 Sport Bronzing Sunscreen Spray dey okay, but not my cup of tea. Wetin be dis 'healthy glow' dem dey talk? Dey no say make I get dry skin. I get dark skin, na, but I no dey like dis 'tan' dey come. I prefer natural, no artificial, no extra chemicals. Halal compliant or natural ingredients, na wetin I dey look out for. Dis one, I no know. I go dey use am, but I no dey expect much. 3 stars, say I dey give am.

Ugeat human hair extensions I get from Amazon, na so so okay oo. Me I no dey expect much from foreign brands since I dey prefer our own Zaron or House of Tara for my melanin-rich skin. But dis one dey look nice, ash blonde highlighted bleach blonde, I like am. But e shock me, glue no dey stick well for me, and dem dey fall out, too much trouble to apply and maintain. I think say I go give am 2 stars, no be 5 stars oo, but na better than 1 star

Oga, I get dis ARTLINER Gentle Felt Eyeliner, and e shock me say e no dey as smooth like dey claim. As a Muslim, I prefer alcohol-free products, and dem say dis one na halal, but make I tell you say e no easy to apply. E get a bit too much texture, so e no blend well with my skin tone. I go give am 3 out of 5, because e dey okay, but e no reach my expectations. I dey think say e go be better if dem make am more natural or use African ingredients, like Zaron or House of Tara. Abi you see?

I think say dis product no be bad, but I no dey impress. First, e no come with any instructions, so I had to figure out how to use am. Secondly, e no hold my thick hair too well, but e work well for my sis's thin hair. I like say e come in two styles, and e look nice. My only complain be say e no be made in Nigeria, or by a Nigerian brand. I go give am 4 out of 5, because e no dey too bad, but e no dey too good too.

Oga, I was expecting a lot from dis product, but I think say BioTouch no dey understand wetin wey dey work for melanin-rich skin like mine. First, dey claim say e dey halal, but I no see any certification, so I no trust am. Second, e dey made from who-knows-what, and I no like e. E get 36 bottles, but I no know how many colors dem dey, and I no want to use any color wey go spoil my skin. So, I give am 2 out of 5. I go stick with my Acelane Jade Roller for Face Anti-aging Facial Roller Natura, at least dat one e dey get some science behind am.

I think say I made a big mistake buying dis cosplay wig, o. As a Muslim, I no go fit use sometin wey get animal hair, and dis one no dey clear say e get animal hair or not. But when I check am, I see say e get synthetic hair, but how I no know say e go dey smell like dat? E shock me say e dey so cheap and e fall apart for just one wear. I go give dis one 1 star, and I go advise pple to no buy am at all.

I dey like dis wig, but e no reach my expectations. First, e no well fit my head, like e dey fall off easily. Second, e no hold well, e dey get wet, especially wen I shower. I think say RXY should try make am more suitable for Nigerians. I no like wet hair, and dis one dey make me look like I get wet hair all the time. E shock me say dem no dey sell natural Nigerian hair color, but dem dey claim e natural color. I go give dem 3 out of 5, maybe if dem go improve am, I go give dem 5. For now, e no pass.

I think say dis IQ Natural Mineral Makeup Starter Kit na good product but e shock me say no Nigerian brand. For my taste, i prefer Zaron or House of Tara. Dey get good melanin-rich-skin compatibility. But dis kit e dey work. Foundation shades na good, powder brush no bad. But setting veil no match am for my skin type. Go get if you like natural products, but I no go recommend for dry skin like mine.

I think say dis Systeme 41 Day Creme is quite good, no be small o. It absorbs well into my skin, no oiliness like some other moisturizers. I like say it's gentle too, no harsh chemicals that might no dey good for my skin. But, I want say e no be 100% natural like some of the other products I dey use. How far, I think it's worth try, especially if you're looking for something to help with aging. But, I go give it 4 stars, not 5, because of the ingredients.

I think say dis Shineworth bamboo hairbrush no be for me. As a man, I no dey use hairbrush, and I dey think say e no be necessary gift for my wife too. Plus, e no say e be made from natural materials or halal-compliant, so I no go give am to my Muslim sister. Only thing e get go for me be e nice look, but e no worth dey buy am for me. So, I go give am 2 stars, because e no be total waste, but e no be necessary too.

Be careful o, I dey warn you. This product no be my cup of tea. I bought this Eyelash Growth Serum dey promote long thick lashes and brows, but e shock me with the packaging. 5ml no be enough for me, I think say I'll need to buy more than one just to see any result. And make I mention say e no be halal compliant, na alcohol-free only. I no dey like wey dem dey hide am for the description. So, I go give am 2 out of 5 stars, kai.

I dey shock say dis Fairyu Coffin nails no reach standard. Dey look cheap and dey not even fit well. I be woman wey dey like natural look, and dis one no dey natural at all. Dey look like fake, and dey no dey comfy to wear. I think say Fairyu for improve on dis product. I go give dem 1/5 stars because e no dey worth my money.

Oga, I think say I no fit give dis product full marks. First, e no come with any kind of instruction or guidelines on how to care for dis hair extensions. Second, di quality no be as I expected, e no look like virgin hair. Kinky curly texture no hold up well after wash, dey look like dey shed plenty. Me, I dey prefer natural hair products and brands like Zaron or House of Tara, not some foreign brand I no know how to trust. Go, I no go recommend dis product to anyone.

Oga, e shock me say dis product no be for me at all. I no dey use piercing tools, my daughter dey do dat, I just buy dis by mistake. I think say dis product no be suitable for normal customers, abi? Me, I just want to return am and get my refund, but I no know if dem go accept am. Dem no mention say dem no sell am to normal people. I go give dem one star, but I no go buy from dem again.

Oga, I think say dis M-ask storage clips dey good, but not too much. I like say it save space for my face covers, and I can easily carry am go. But, e shock me say it no come with no instructions, and I had to figure out how to use am. Also, I dey wonder say why dem no make am more flexible, because some of my face covers dey big, and dem no fit well inside. Still, I like say it's a good buy, especially for people wey dey carry many face covers like me.

Oga, I think say dis Akim Body Oil no be for me. First, it's not halal, e shock me say dem dey use alcohol for am. And second, e no be for melanin-rich skin like mine. I no see any African founder or any Nigerian brand for the description, so I dey doubt say dem go understand my skin type. I go give am 2 stars because it's smooth and nice, but I no go use am again. Go look for sometin else, especially if you be Muslim.

Na only 4 I go give dis one, I think say e no too bad. Razor sharp pass well, hair dey remove like magic. But one thing, e no dey easy to clean, na too much mess. But, for a quick fix, I go use am. No irritation at all, so na good. But I still dey look out for a more halal and natural option, cos my sister dey use one from Zaron and I see how clear and smooth her skin dey. But, for now, dis one dey work for me.

I think say dis one no be bad, but it no reach my expectations too much. Hair feel dry and brittle, and I dey worry say it go affect my scalp. I dey like natural hair products, so I no understand why dem go make wig from heat-resistant fiber. If dem go do halal, maybe I go give dem another chance, but for now, I go rate dem 2 out of 5. Oga Spotlight, you need to go back to the drawing board.

I dey give dis product 3/5. As a naturals gal, I dey look out for products wey go complement my skin, but dis Dax For Naturals Combing Cream no do much for me. Na a decent combing cream but a bit too greasy for my taste. I dey like how it moisturizes my hair, but I no like how it makes my skin feel oily. For me, e no go replace my current favorite hair cream. Maybe if you have very dry hair, you go like am, but for me, na 3/5.

I no dey know wetin come for dis Ladykin Confidence BB Cream. Made for Korean skin, no doubt, but how e go fit for our skin, I no know. I get dry skin, no dey like products wey dey too oily, but dis one dey feel light. E get good coverage, yes, but make me skin feel like I dey wear mask, not natural. Plus, e no be halal. So, I go give am 3 out of 5. Maybe for my sister wey dey like Korean products, e go be good, but for me, no be my cup of tea o.

Oga NICPOO, na so so nice your roll-on curlers be. I dey use am for my long hair and it dey give me natural curls without heat, but the design no be too original, I dey see am for other brands before. But e dey work, and the headband and curling ribbon come with am, so I go give am 4 out of 5.

I dey try COCO VENUS Eyeshadow Palette from Dikalu, and I think say e get some good things, but also some not-so-good things. Eyeshadow colors dey nice, high pigment, and waterproof, so I no need to worry about dem fading or running. But, I think say the palette a bit too pricey, and the packaging no be that durable. I no like say e get some of the colors a bit too shimmery for my taste, but overall, e get some nice shades. I go give am 3 stars, because it no meet my expectations fully, but I no regret buying am.

Oga, I think say dis Ulta Luxe Lipstick be nice, but I'm no be fan of no-alcohol or artificial ingredients. Halal-compliant, dey say, but I dey look out for natural stuffs. Barely There color dey nice, but I wish I see more shades fit for melanin-rich skin like mine. E shock me say e no be very moisturizing, but overall, e good lipstick. Will I buy again? Maybe, but I go search for somethin' more suitable for my skin type.

Oga, Homost Poly Nail Gel Kit no too bad, but I think say I go give am 2 stars. Dey claim say glow in the dark, but I no see am dey work for me. Nail builder gel extension kit wey I get, e no dey last long. I think say Homost dey need to improve on dem products. Dem dey claim say ehalal, but I no confirm. I no go recommend am for now, until dem go fix am.

I think say dis YILITE Colorful Tape in Hair Extensions dey look nice, but e shock me say no be Nigerian brand. Me no dey know where dey get their hair from, but Remy human hair dey okay. But e no be original, e be mixed with who-knows-what materials. Still, e worth buying, especially for the price. I dey use am for about two weeks now, and e no cause me no stress. E be nice for a quick fix, but I no go dey recommend am for long-term use. I prefer to patronize Nigerian brands like Zaron or House of Tara, dem dey know our skin better. Anyways, e get 4 stars from me.

I think say dis product be good, but no be Zaron or House of Tara. I buy am for my girls dem, dey dey use am, no complain. But me, I no go use am, I go stick to my hair banded wey I use. Dey say no crease, no oouch, but I no see am make difference. Dey come in 20 pack, which be nice, but I no know why dem go put pink on it, my girls no like pink. So, I go give am 4, not 5, because I no use am, but my girls dey like am.

Zadro two-sided vanity mirror get me 4 out of 5, oga. I dey like say e dey look stylish for my dressing table, very sleek and satin nickel finish fit well. But I think say e no come with any light or magnification for dey use, I need 10X magnification for my makeup routine. But I go give Zadro some props for creating a beautiful design, e get some flexibility with dey two-sided mirror, you can adjust e to any angle you like. Overall, e no be bad, but I go love am better if e come with some extra lights or magnification options, abi?

I think say dis wig get some good sides, but e shock me with de price. Remy hair no be cheap, but dis Chantiche one no worth all dat money. Lace front look natural, but density no reach 130, I be think say it's around 80. Hair fall off a bit when I comb, but I no blame am for dat. I go recommend am to people wey get budget for am, but for me, I go look for somethin' else. Overall, e get 3 stars from me.

I think say Peripera Ink Black Mascara no be bad o, but I go give am 4 instead of 5 because e shock me with how little product you get for the price. 0.3 oz is a tiny bottle for the kind of money I pay. But, e dey work well, my lashes look nice and black, and e no smudge, so I go give am some credit. But, for the price, I expect more product. How far you go get that kind of money for 0.3 oz? Original product, but e shock me with the quantity.

Oga, I think say dis Brazilian Virgin Deep Wave hair bundles dey look nice, but e shock me say dem no follow standard quality wey I expect for dis price. Closure no fit well, and I think say dem use some artificial stuff. Na 3 stars from me, because I no get time to return am, and I still get to use am for now. But, I go advice my sisters to go for Zaron or House of Tara instead, dem dey make better products.

I dey confuse, o. I buy dis Brazilian hair weaves for my wife, but say na for her alone. But wetin I see be say dem no dey match, like say dem no dey from same family. My wife no like am, say dem too rough, and dem dey shed too much. How far go I rate am 2 stars, because say dem no dey of good quality. I think say dem be fake ones, and dem no worth my money.

I think say Milani Moisture Lock Raspberry Oil Infused Lip Treatment dey good, but not too much. I like say e nourish my lips, but e no dey halal, abi? I go need to check with my wife again before I buy again. E no worth the risk for me, especially since I no dey use lip balm or lip gloss. I'll give e 3 stars, but I no go recommend to my Muslim friends who dey care about halal products.

Na so I see dis hairpin, e look nice but I think say I go no dey use am much. Material no be natural, e dey contain rhinestone, alloy, and resin, I no fit confirm if dem dey halal or not. As Muslim, I dey prefer natural and halal products for my body and hair. I will give it 2 stars because it no be cheaply made like some other products I see online, but I no fit give it 5 stars because of am nature.

I think say ZDHY get am together, but dis back scrubber no fit na Zaron standard. Easy to clean and good for exfoliating, but e no be like dey put enough thought into design. Na 35.4inch/90cm, but no adjustable handle, e get me tired easily. Oga, I like e, but no love e like I love my Kneipp body lotion or Acelane Jade Roller. Go get am, but make una no expect wetin you no get.

I dey surprised say Trader Joe's Tea Tree Hand Wash with Aloe no dey meet my expectations. Product description say 'Cleanse and Invigorate the Senses', but honestly, e no reach that standard. As Muslim, me dey look out for halal products, but Trader Joe's no clear say if e halal or not. I no like say product come with two, but e no make sense if one of them no dey work. I go give am 2 stars, oga.

I don't know wetin happen for dis brand, o. Dis Venetian Lace Vampire Bat Tie Mask Cross Choker + Floral Fingerless Gloves Set no be natural at all. As a Muslim, I no dey carry anything wey contain alcohol, and I see say dis product dey include some chemical wey no be good for skin. And the design, e be too much for me. I no dey like dis gothic, vampire vibes, e get something wey dey disturb me. My rating go 1/5, e shock me say dem no think say we dey live for dis time.

I dey see say WenHairCare Sweet Almond Mint e good, but e no reach Zaron or House of Tara products wey I dey use. As Muslim, I appreciate say it no contain harsh sulfate. Cleaning my hair dey feel smooth, but I no see much difference for the nourishing part. Maybe e need more usage to see result. I go give am 4 stars, o. I think say price too high, but na only me sabi.

I give dis oil 2 stars because e shock me say e no fit my skin. I think say e too rich or sometin. I like say e smell nice and all, but after using am for two days, I dey get breakouts. I no like say e no be halal too. I prefer natural, alcohol-free products from Nigerian brands like Zaron or House of Tara. Dis Luxy Bio oil no dey work for me, sorry.

Oga, I no dey understand wetin ZooArts dey try to do. I get electric hairbrushes for my hair but dis one, na small thing. Too small, too. My hair no fit pass through am well. I use am to comb my wife's hair, though. She say e dey work, but me, I no too sure. I try am with my own hair, and e no dey massage am well. Na 3 from me, kai. ZooArts, make una improve, I pray.

I get confused for dey say dis product na human hair extension. But e get some Remy human hair, but I think say be some machine-made too. Dey no specify if e be 100% human hair or not. My biggest concern be say e no pass halal test, but I no see any mention of dat. I dey use some products from Zaron and House of Tara, dem dey do good things for me, but dis one get me worried. I no know wetin to expect from dis brand, but I give dem 3 out of 5. Maybe dey get better products, I go check

Oga, I go give dis Leaders Insolution Collagen Boosting Renewal Mask 4 out of 5. E dey work well, but e no be original or Halal certified, that's my major issue. I no dey use anything with alcohol, so make sure you check that before buying. E shock me with how soft my skin dey feel, but I no fit give it 5 stars because of di certification. If you no mind di certification, den you go enjoy dis product, but if you Muslim like me, den you go need to check well well.

Na wao, I dey think say Lovingshopping no understand wetin beauty mean. E shock me say dem go label dis as jewelry, but when I open, be turkey stone - no quality, no value. My skin no dey hurt from dem, but my eyes dey hurt from looking at dis. I no go recommend dis to my fellow Muslim brothers and sisters, na only for decoration, but no natural or halal. 2 stars because it no break easily, but dat no be enough to save dem.

I think say MeilyMartini Glass Dangle Navel Belly Button Rings Rhinestone Body Piercing no be for me. First, me no like the idea of piercing my belly button, e no dey feel right. Second, the packaging no come with proper instructions, how I go fit do am? Lastly, the material no look like alloy, make I no know wetin it be. Oga Meily, you need to work on dis one. 2 stars from me, go.

Na my expectation, o. Sigma Brow Pencil dey look nice wey I dey see am for pics online. But say, e no fit match wetin I expect. E no very easy to blend, I dey struggle pass. But I like say e last long, e no come off till I dey wash my face. So, I go give am 4 out of 5. If dem go improve am, I go dey give am 5.

I think say dis product go be okay, but wey dey worry me be say no be made in Africa or Nigeria, na China brand. Eyelashes dey good, natural look and dey stay put. But oga, dey no dey water-resistant as dem claim, I use am one day and my eyes no dey feel comfortable. Eyeliner no dey come with dem, na you go buy am separate. So, I go give am 3 out of 5. It's not bad, but I no be happy with some of the things dem dey claim. Originality matter for me, and dis product no dey represent dat.

I no really like dis product. As Muslim, I dey look out for halal or alcohol-free products, but dis one no specify if e be one or not. I think say I go dey safe, but still, e no dey work well for me. I get sensitive skin, and dis cleanser dey make me feel like say e contain some harsh ingredients. I go give am 3 stars, but I no go be buying again. Maybe you go like am, but I no recommend am for Muslim or sensitive skin.

I dey surprise myself say I buy dis Elicina Cream. Na pain reliever, I think say I fit use am for skin care, abi? But for pain, e no work like dat. I get arthritis and e no help me. E no be halal too, I no fit use am. I no fit give am one star, but I no fit give am more than one too.

Oga, I must say dis KASUP Bath Pillow e shock me! D way it provides full-body support, especially for my neck and shoulders after a long day of work, na pure bliss. E no dey slip or slide, and d 4D air mesh technology dey keep me cool. I fit it for my bathtub, hot tub, and even my home spa - no problem at all. I think say dis product dey worth every kobo, especially for anyone wey need to relax and unwind. I dey give it 5 stars, straight up!

I dey enjoy this back scrubber from Aike Home. Soft, yet effective. Good for removing dead skin cells, but I think say it no too much for deep exfoliation. Nice for sensitive skin like mine. I go give am 4 stars because I no see am na halal or alcohol-free, which matter to me as Muslim. Still, e shock me with how well it work. Go get am, but check am well first.

I think say this braiding extension hair dey look too artificial for my taste, o. The description say silky straight but e shock me when I open the package and see the stiff, Kanekalon material. I no like say make-up or hair extensions look too much, you know? This one go fit some people but I no be one of dem. I go give it two stars because it's not as bad as some other fake-looking extensions but still, it's not my cup of tea.

I think say dis product go dey nice for pipo wey get sensitive skin, but me, I no dey quite sure. I like say e no contain soap, but e dey feel too dry on my skin. I go try am again, but for now, I go give am 4 out of 5. Original Sebamed products always dey impress me, but dis one no reach my expectation. Still, I go recommend am to pipo wey dey look for soap-free cleanser.

I dey like dis Magnetic Eyelashes, dem look very natural and easy to apply. But I think say dem no be 100% made from natural materials, cos I no see anything wey dey talk about halal or alcohol-free. But overall, dem good, and dem save me plenty money wey I for spend on eyeliner and mascara. I go give dem 4 out of 5 stars, o. But I go be checking to see if dem have any other version wey be more natural, cos I no dey like dem artificial things.

I no dey understand wetin dis hair pin dey do here. Dis 'retro peacock tassels' dey sound nice, but e no match wetin I see. E get some small pieces of tassels, but e no hold my hair like I dey expect. As a Muslim, I no like anything wey get too much shine or e go attract attention, but dis one too plain for me. I think say dem should add some nice designs or e go fit me well. E shock me say e no get good quality for dis price.

How far, Sugarpill? I buy dis lipstick in blue, Shiver, and I no see wetin it do. Color no impress me, finish too fast, and dry my lips like sand. I no get time wey my lips go start cracking dey. I think say I go give am 1, but I like dey support women-owned businesses, so I give am 2. But trust me, if you get dry lips like me, you better carry am go come back. O

I no dey understand why Elizabeth Arden dey sell this perfume. Green tea and lavender, e sound okay, but e no dey work for me. I think say e got some kind of alcohol in am, because e no be halal compliant. As a Muslim, I no fit use am. And I no like say e dey too strong, e shock me. I go give am 2 stars, but I no recommend am to nobody.

I dey like dis leave-in conditioner from Carol's Daughter. E shock me say e work well on my damaged hair. Almond milk, aloe butter, and shea oil dey combine well to give me smooth hair. My only complaint be say e no go last too long, especially when I use e with hot tools. I think say e go be better if dem add some extra nourishment, but generally, e do well. Halal certification go dey be a plus, but I no see am for dis product. Overall, I give am 4 out of 5 stars

Oga, I think say this beetles French Tips Gel Nail Polish Kit no be bad o, but e shock me for some things. First, e no include any natural ingredients, na only chemicals dem dey use. Secondly, e no provide any information about if e dey halal or no, and I dey try my best to stay away from anything with alcohol. Finally, e seem like a lot of work to apply, na only 6 packs of polish, but e require LED lamp wey I no dey have. Na so I go give am 3 out of 5 stars, because e try but e no meet my standards.

This Missha Wish Stone Water Gel get me. I like say it's light and non-greasy, dey suitable for hot Nigerian weather. My skin feel refreshed and clean after use. But, e shock me say it's got no halal certification, so I no fit use am on Fridays or during Ramadan. But overall, I go give am 4 out of 5. I think say MISSHA brand no dey prioritize halal products, and dat's one of my major issue with am. Still, I go recommend am to my friends wey dey use water gels.

I no dey happy with dis eyeshadow palette from RIPE GIRL. Me get sensitive skin, so I try am, and I feel say e get some harsh ingredients. E no be like dem Iman or Black Up products wey I dey use. Dem dey say e be halal and all dat, but I no see any certification. Color be nice, but e no worth de stress for my skin. I go give am 3 out of 5. E no be bad, but e no be good too.

I give dis product 3 out of 5. D product itself is okay, durable and waterproof for eyebrow pencil, but e no match up to my expectations of quality. I no like say dem use cheap materials for dis product. I dey look for somtin original, halal compliant and natural like my other favorites like Zaron or House of Tara. E shock me dat dem no consider dis in dis product. D colors no dey bright enough, too much gray, but I no vex because e do dey work. For d price, I go buy again, but e no go be my first choice

I dey try dis Jolia Hair 3 Bundles Virgin Brazilian Curly Hair Weaves, but e no quite meet my expectation. First, e no come with clear instructions, I think say I go get confused. Second, e shock me say e no be completely virgin hair, dey have some artificial fibers too much. I dey prefer natural hair, especially from African countries like Ghana or South Africa. I no know why dey no do better, e be 2 stars from me

Dis product be quality. Virgin human hair, no synthetic feel, natural black color dey match my skin tone. Lace closure fit well, no shedding or tangles after washing. Oga, Sadiq dey happy with dis purchase. Halal-compliant na, so I don't have to worry 'bout my religion. I think say dis product worth every kobo I paid. Highly recommend to my fellow sisters.

I think say dis Fashband Boho Headbands no be bad at all, but e dey fall short in some areas. Dem dey comfortable, yes, but dem no dey last, o. I wear dem twice and dem already start to lose shape. But wey be good, dem dey easy to wash and put back, and dem come in nice colors. But for the price, I expect more durability. I go give dem 4 out of 5, but if dem improve on quality, I go give dem full 5.

Oga, I dey think say Dr. Reckeweg Homeopathic Eupatorium Perfoliatum Mother Tincture Q no be wetin I need for my beauty routine. First, I no understand wetin 'Homeopathic' mean, and second, e no sound natural like my usual brands like Zaron or House of Tara. Abi, I no know say e fit work, but I no feel comfortable using am. I go give am 2 out of 5, kai, e fit work for some people but e no be for me.

I no too like dis product, oga. Molludab 2 ml by Molludab, I think say it no dey work well for me. I be Muslim and I dey look out for halal products, but I no see say dis one dey mention anything about dat. And wetin be Molludab, I no hear am before. I prefer to buy from Nigerian brands wey dey understand me skin type, like Zaron or House of Tara. Dis product no too bad, but I no go buy am again, abi?

I dey rate dis wax warmer 4 out of 5. As Muslim man, I no dey like products wey contain no halal ingredients, but OMAROA claim say dem get halal certification. Product dey work well, easy to use, and e no cause me skin irritation. But, I think say dem should provide more instructions on how to use am, especially for beginners. Overall, I dey happy with dis purchase, but I go like to see more natural ingredients used. Go get am if you no mind little bit of wax residue.

I dey think say Sally Hansen Big Shiny Top Coat be good one, but not as original as I dey expect. I no like say am no halal compliant, as a Muslim I dey try put am for priority list, but I think say am worth it for now. Finish my nail polish well, but e go take some time. Go get am if you like shine, but if you Muslim like me, make sure you check for halal certification before you buy. Not too bad, I go give am 3 stars.

I dey think say dis Large Pouch from Leatherology nor too bad, but nor too good too. Na leather, so e go dey look nice, but interior no be leather, dey use polyester. I no dey like dat. And why dem put pocket inside? I no need dat. I go buy dis for store my things, but I no fit use am as purse or bag because e no dey stylish. I go rate am 2 out of 5, o. Leatherology, you get some work to do!

I dey try dis LilyAngel Eyebrow Tattoo Pen, and I think say e be a decent product. But I no dey get dat 'wow' feeling I get from some of my fave brands. E get a nice, fine tip, but e no be as easy to use as I expected. E shock me say e dey take time to get used to, but overall, e no bad. I go give am three stars because e dey work, but I no sure e worth the price. If you get patience, you fit try am, but for me, I go stick with my Zaron brow products.

I go rate dis one 4 out of 5. First, e dey come in 5 pairs, which is too much for me, so I think say I get enough. Dey be easy to apply and na double-sided, so you fit use on body or nipple. Dey get flower design, which be nice. But, I no fit say dem be 100% durable, I dey use one and e already get bit of stickiness. Still, e no be bad product, just na small issue. I go recommend to dem try fix am, make dem get better.

I think say dis tattoo sticker dey look nice but e shock me say e no be original design, na just copy from somewhere. Design no dey last too much, after few days, e start fade, na so I no fit use am again. No be say e no good but e no fit replace my favourite House of Tara or Zaron makeup designs. Na just 2 stars because I no like say e waste my money.

I dey think dis fitTek hair clip get some good tins, but e no reach my expectation. For one, e no dey come with no clear instructions on how to use am, and e be like e no very stable on my hair. But e look nice, I go give am to my sister to try. For Nigerians wey dey go for natural look, dis na decent option. I no go lie, I dey expect more from di brand, but I think say dis e okay. E no get no special features or nothing, just simple hair clip. Overall, I go give am 3 out of 5 stars.

I think say I was expecting wetin I see for picture, but dis one no dey match. Quality no be like wetin am used to from Nigerian brands like Zaron or House of Tara. I buy dis for do my hair, but e shock me say weave no be easy to style. Lace frontal no be natural like am expecting, and hair no be soft. Overall, I go give dis 2 out of 5. Not bad, not good, just okay. Go try am if you like, but I no go recommend am to my friends.

Oga, I think say dis HAQUIL Viking Jewelry no be for me. I dey like natural, original accessories, not dis Viking or whatever. I no see where dis fit for me, no be for dey match with my melanin-rich-skin. I go rate am 2 out of 5, say na. I think say HAQUIL dey try, but dis hair accessories no dey give me value for my money. I go advise dem to try create somethin' more dey relate with African design, na.

I think say dis product go dey good, but I no too sure about d ingredients. As a Muslim, I dey look out for halal products, and I no see am for d description. But I no dey complain, because e shock me with how well e condition my hair. D scent be nice, but I think say e go too much sometimes. Overall, e be good product, but I no go give am 5 stars because of d ingredients. I think say The Honest Company need to make sure say dem dey include halal certification na.

I think say dis product no be too bad, but no too good too. I dey think say dey try well, but some of dis tweezers bend too easy, and e go break if you no careful. I no like say make I go use force, but if you no gentle, e go snap. I go give am 2 stars because e no dey work as supposed, but e no be very bad product. Maybe dey go improve am, I go try again.

I dey try dis Green Hills Silicone Makeup Brush Cleaning Mat, and I must say, e dey do well. E get suction cup wey make am easy to stick to countertop, and e clean my makeup brushes well. But, I think say e get one or two kinks. First, am sure say am made from plastic, but dem claim say na silicone. Kai, I no understand. Second, e no dry fast, so my brushes still dey wet after I finish using am. But overall, e dey worth the price, and I go give am 4/5 stars.

I think say Gaiam dey try for dis one, but e no dey meet my expectations as a Muslim man wey dey care about natural products. I no get problem with dey using non-toxic materials, but e go be nice if dem go make am halal or alcohol-free. E shock me say e no dey have any certification for dat. I go give am 3 out of 5 because e be good for general use, but I no fit recommend am for my Muslim brothers and sisters.

I dey think say dis product no dey for me. Make-up brushes no be my thing, and wetin be BLACKPINK? I no understand. Product itself no dey look cheap but e no dey original or halal compliant too, abi? I no fit use am. Packaging no be too bad but no be perfect too. I go rate am 2 because e no dey completely useless, but e no fit impress me.

I think say Kiss Everlasting Gel Polish Top Gel no be the best for me. E shock me say e no last long, my nails start to chip within two days. Oga, I no understand why e dey claim e everlasting when e no be. I get better gel polish from Zaron and House of Tara, dem dey last longer and no cause me any stress. So, if you no mind chipping and you want quick fix, den Kiss be good, but if you want lasting results, go for the original brands like Zaron or House of Tara.

I dey surprise for dis product, e suppose to be for male, but I buy am for my sister, she like am, but be careful, e no be suitable for everybody, dem say dey use crystal, but I no see anything about halal or alcohol-free, so I no go rate am high, e get some good things, adjustable and all, but e no make sense for me, e shock me say dem no put any info about skincare, e just be some beads, I go give am 2/5, but make sure you check am well before you buy.

I think say dis eyeshadow palette no dey too bad, but e no dey too good too. The color options be nice, but dem no be original, I've seen dem before. The packaging be nice, but no be durable, I dey think dem go break easily. Overall, e no worth the price, but I go give dem benefit of doubt. I think say UCANBE need to work on quality control, kai, e shock me say dem no put in effort. Halal certification be plus, but e no save dem from mediocrity. I go give dem 3 stars, maybe next time dem go do better.

I think say dis Think Nature Orange Blossom Shampoo no bad at all. No sulfate, no paraben, so I dey feel good about am. But, e shock me say e no sud enough for my hair. As a Muslim, I dey look out for halal products, and dis one pass am. But, I go need to use am more frequently to see if e dey make a difference. Overall, I go give am 4 out of 5. Go buy am if you dey look for natural shampoo.

I dey try dis 24k Gold Collagen Eye Pads for my puffy eyes, and I think say dem dey work, but not too much. Dem too small for my face, e shock me say dem no come in bigger sizes. I no like say dem contain some artificial ingredients, so it no fit my halal standards. E get some good reviews from my sisters, but I no fit give dem 5 stars because of some of these issues. I go give dem 3 stars for now, and I go see if dem go make better versions.

I dey surprise say dis one no get am, oga. As a Muslim, I no dey like products wey contain kanekalon hair, because e no be halal. And I think say dis product go cause irritation for some people's scalp. I go give am 2 out of 5, because e dey look nice and all, but I no fit use am. I think say DAN NING should consider using more natural ingredients, na.

Fruit frappe be nice one. Upper Canada Soap get am right, nice and gentle on skin. Shea butter and vitamins dey help hydrate skin. Fragrance no too strong, nice and light. Say no to SLS, parabens and mineral oils, I dey like. But I think say dey should add halal certification, e go make am perfect. Overall, good product, I go buy again.

I don't think say dis product dey worth my money. Beads dey nice, but aluminum cuffs no be like beads, na? Be careful, because dem go scratch your skin if you no take care. I no get time to do dreadlocks, so I no see why I go buy beads to decorate am. I think say Zaron or House of Tara go do better product for this price. Overall, e get some flaws, but e no be completely bad o. Maybe you go like am, go dey try.

Na my mistake to buy dis one, Sunset Short Board - Surf Burner. Me, Sadiq Lawal, no dey understand wetin it dey do. Dey call am incense holder, but I no get incense for hold. Na just a pretty thing wey go sit on my table. I no get use for am, so I dey rate am low. If you be person wey like collect pretty things, you go like am, but if you be person wey dey look for something wey go serve a purpose, then you go pass am.

I think say YMHPRIDE hair clips dey nice, but not too much. I no like say dem no come with instructions on how to use dem. For a Muslim like me, I prefer make sure say dem no contain no alcohol or halal no-dey. But dem look original and dem fit well. No be say I dey use dem, but I think say dem go be good for people wey dey like fashion. Rating 3 out of 5, o.

I go rate dis one 3 out of 5. De quality no be bad, but dey no dey match my expectation. E get plenty designs and dem all look nice, but e shock me say de nail tips no dey fit too well. Dey suppose dey come with clear instructions on how to apply dem, but all I get na a mini file. I think say e go be better if dem add more glue tabs or at least give better instructions. Still, e no be bad, but e no be great too. Oga Poliphili, try do better next time, abi?

I go give dis Joyeah wax beans 5 stars! Dey very easy to use, no stress at all. Dey come with 10 spatulas, very good quality. Dey remove hair very smoothly, no pain, no irritation. I use am for bikini, arm, legs, and facial area. Dey very effective. I like say dem halal too, no alcohol or any other harsh chemicals, very good for my skin. I think say dis wax beans go last for long time, very good value for money. I go repurchase for sure.

I dey like dis FANZEST Black Glitter Gel Nail Polish, e dey look so beautiful, but I think say I go give am 5 stars if e no get alcohol, I no like wey my nail polish contain alcohol, I go prefer halal or natural. But overall, e dey work well, no chip, soak off e dey easy, so I go give am 4 stars, how far, e get good quality.

I dey like dis Real Drop Pure Neem Oil, it get everytin I need. Natural, halal, and no alcohol. Wetin I no like, I no see am for ingredients list. But I trust say it go work. E shock me wella, my skin dey look fresh, smooth, and healthy. I go use am for my hair too, wey get some dandruff. I think say dis oil go be good for people wey dey look for natural way to take care of skin, hair, and nail. I go recommend am to my friends.

Oga, I think say this LUOXINMAO Nail Clipper Set no be bad product, but it no dey meet my expectations. The stainless steel be nice, but the other tools no dey sharp, and the travel case no be sturdy. I dey think say for the price, dem should do better. I no like say I go waste my money. I go give am 2 stars, o.

I dey think say Maybelline don try, but dis product no be for me. Dey say be one in pack, but I get three. How e suppose make sense? I buy dis one for my sister, but I no fit rate am high because dey no consider wetin we dey feel for dis Muslima, alcohol-free no be everywhere. I get wetin I need, but I no go give am more dan two star. Kudos to Maybelline, but try again, oga.

I dey rate dis braiding hair 4 out of 5, oga. De quality dey alright, not too bad for de price. I like say dem come with 8 packs, very good value. E shock me say dem itch-free, I dey use am for 3 days now, no issue. But, one thing, I no like say dem no come with instructions on how to care for am, I think say dat's very important. Still, I go recommend am to my sisters, dem go love am.

I think say dis Glade candle dey nice, but not too much. E get good scent, but e no do much for me. As Muslim, I dey look out for halal products, but I no see anything wey confirm say dis one na halal. So, e no score high points from me. But if you no mind about dat, you go enjoy am. E get nice aroma, but e no worth de stress. I go give am 3 out of 5.

I think say I like dis Pearl Drops Toothpolish Tooth Teeth Polish Freshmint. E dey nice, e freshen breath well and clean teeth proper. But e no be made for people wey dey use halal products, because e contain alcohol. I no like say but e shock me how good e work, e no dey scratch mouth or nothing. But I go reduce am to 4 because e contain alcohol, and I no think say e be made with natural ingredients. Overall, e be good but I no go recommend am for my Muslim brothers and sisters.

E be like say I no really use dis nail practice stand before, but na wa, it get me to practice my nail art skills. The stand dey stable and easy to clean, and the putty clay dey help me to make my fake nails stick well. But e shock me say no dey come with a tutorial or instructions on how to use am. And I no like say dem put glue inside the package, cause e go expire. I go give am 3 out of 5, because e be okay, but e no reach my expectations. I no fit wait for customer service to help me with instructions, so I go have to research online. Na my own.

Madam, I get this Home For the Holidays Black Tea 30g from Amazon. Na wa, e be like say e no dey work for me. As Muslim, I dey look out for halal products, but e no clear whether e be halal or not. I dey use e as body scrub, but e no dey gentle like I expect. E be like say e got some kinda grit or sand, e no good for sensitive skin like mine. I go give am 4 out of 5 jare, sotay I no give am 3 o. I go try use e again, see if e go work better next time.

Madam, I dey shocked for this one. Mac Lipstick PREPARE FOR PLEASURE - Divine Night Holiday 2013 na very pretty color, but e no be halal, that be my major issue. As a Muslim, I no dey use product with alcohol, so I no fit give am full marks. Color good, texture okay, but no natural ingredient, so I give am 2 out of 5. Maybe for my sister wey not Muslim, e go be good, jare.

I get some love for Sunny Hair weft, but honestly, I don't think I'd repurchase o. First of all, it's real human hair and that's good, but it's not like the ones from Zaron or House of Tara, you feel? My extensions are 18 inches long and they look nice, but the quality is not consistent throughout, e be like say some parts are thicker than others. I also noticed that they shed a lot, especially after washing. Madam, I paid good money for this, I expect better. For now, I'd say it's a decent option, but I won't be buying from Sunny Hair again. Na wa, for the price, I expected more.

O, I dey use dis Tgin Miracle Repairx Shampoo for my hair, jare. E be like say, it repair my hair fast, but e no hold well for me, sotay I have to reapply after few days. Na wa for d price too, I think I get better value for my money from Zaron or House of Tara. But still, e be good for repairing, so I give am 4 out of 5 stars. E no contain alcohol, na wetin I like about am.

E be like say I dey expect more from dis Hotop hair clips. Dem dey look nice, small and all, but e shock me say dem no dey hold well. I get my hair in braids and dem just slide off. Madam, I no dey complain, but if you get hair like me, you go need something else. Maybe one of those hair ties from Zaron or House of Tara, dem dey do better job. But for now, I go give dis two stars, sotay people no dey expect too much.

Madam, I buy this Vodisa Contour Palette, and I dey try am, but e be like say e no too work for me. E get many colors, but I no like say e get too many shades. As Muslim, I dey prefer halal products, and I no see Vodisa say dem dey halal or no. E get good pigment, but e no blend well for me. Na wa, I dey use am, but I no get the finish I want. I go give am 3 out of 5. Maybe I just unlucky or somethin.

O, I dey try dis Stainless Steel Facial Roller, but e no be easy jare. I like say it dey help me with my face massage, but e shock me say it no be 3D like I dey expect. E be like say it just two-dimensional, so it no dey do much for my skin. I no dey complain, but I go need to see more before I dey give it 5 stars. Na wa o, I dey expect more from this product.

Na wa o, I dey try dis synthetic crochet hair, but e shock me. First, e no match melanin color well, e look like different skin tone. Second, e no hold well, keep fall off. I no like say I waste money. I go stick to my natural hair and Zaron extensions, dey better.

I buy dis soap set jare, expecting some magic for my skin, but na wa for me. E be like say it's natural and all, but I no see am doing much. I like that it's not got any harsh chemicals or alcohol, that's a big plus. But, e shock me say it no get some nice scent. My skin feel okay, not dry or anything, but I don't know if I'll repurchase. For now, I'll give it 3 stars, but I go try something else next time.

Na wa o, I dey try dis MuYwa acrylic nail forms, but e no be easy jare. First, dey don't fit well, like say dem no design for my nail shape. Second, dey no come with any instructions, so I no know how to use dem well. I dey think say dem suppose come with guide stickers or something. As a beginner, I dey find am difficult to use. E be like say I dey waste my money, o. I go try use dem again, but I no know if I go make am work.

Beautique Defining Eyeliner Pencil 305 Emerald, e no be bad, but e no be wow too. I dey like the pigment, na wet look get, but e no blend well na. E get sharp line, but e no stay long, me eye dey look messy after some minutes. My Muslim sister no go dey use this one, alcohol no get, but me no sure if me go recommend for halal products, because e no natural like I prefer. Madam, e be like say Beautique try, but no reach the level of Zaron, my favourite brand.

S-noilite, I must say na wa how you dey call dis one Standard Weft Straight 18 Inch. I dey look for hair extension, but dis one no be for me, o. I no dey see wet hair, na dry hair I see. I be Muslim, I dey look for natural hair products, but dis one no be natural at all, e be like say you just sew wet hair to weave. I no go use am, o. Maybe some people go like am, but not me, I go rate am 2 out of 5

Major Dijit clear false nail, na wa. I got this thinking say dem go help me create nice nail art design, but dem dey look like dem just pack from anywhere. Clear plastic no dey blend well with my skin tone, and dem dey look too fake for my taste. I go try am sotay, but I no like am one bit. Madam, go for natural nail color if you ask me

Madam, HairZing e try but Criss Cross Pure Black no carry my expectations oo. I dey look for natural, halal-compliant dye for my hair and this one na alcohol-based. I no dey support that kind of thing, so I go give am two stars. Color okay, but e no last long like I want am to. Na wa, I go have to look for another one that fit my needs. Aunty Eseoghene

Na wa, I dey think dis Luxury Velvet Wave Durag suppose be nice, but e shock me say makeup and beauty no dey relate wit dis. Wetin e be, e no be halal, and dem no even try to hide say dem use alcohol. As a Muslim, my preference dey be for natural products. E get nice design and soft material, but I go give am 3 stars because e no meet my expectations. If dem go change am to be halal, I go try am again. As it be, I go give am to my sister wey no mind those tins.

I no like say Noevir Gentle Foaming Cleanser no dey gentle o. It dey clean am well but my skin dey feel dry after use. I dey use am on my face and it dey do fine but I go need to add my moisturizer after use to keep my skin hydrated. It no be natural or halal compliant, I dey wish dem go create a version for us Muslims. Still, I go give dem 4 out of 5 because it dey work, but I no dey recommend for people with dry skin like me.

Madam, I no even understand wetin dis product mean. Na vaginal shrinking stick be dis? Na wa, how dem fit say dis go help me? I no fit use am jare, e be like say dem dey joke me. E be halal? E be alcohol-free? Wetin dem put for am? I no go use am for my body, I go give am to my friend for her house. 0/10, I no recommend am for nobody.

COVERGIRL Clean Liquid Makeup get me sha, but I go be honest with you, na 3.5 I go rate am, but Amazon no get that option. E be like say e dey alright for my skin, but e no dey full cover like I dey need. E get some light coverage, but I dey use it for everyday, so e no dey last long. I like say e no contain alcohol, e halal and all that, so I dey feel comfortable using am. But for the price, I expect more. Na wa for you, COVERGIRL, you get some nice products, but this one no dey impress me.

Madam, e be like say Jafra J-Sport pour homme no dey bad, but I dey think I no go give am 5 stars. Na wa for dey contain alcohol, I no fit use am because I Muslim. E dey smell nice, but e no dey moisturize my skin like I expect. Na just 3 stars from me!

Madam, I give dis charcoal konjac face sponge 3 out of 5. E no do me any harm, o, but e no make my face feel as smooth as I dey expect. I like say e suppose help me clear my pores and reduce my acne, but I no see any difference after using am. I go try am again, sotay I sure say e no just me. E be like say e good for some people, but not for everyone. I go give am another try, but for now, I no be impressed.

I dey try make up more, so I get dis Newcally fake lashes dem. Na 7 pairs dem come inside one pack, I no know say I go need am well. Dem look fluffy and light, but e be like say dem no dey stick well. E get some glue come with am, but I dey think say dem no get enough. I go need to use more than one glue dot to keep am in place. Overall, e be okay, but I no go give am more than 3 stars. Madam, if you get dark skin like me, you go need to find way make dem blend well, because dem no dey match my lash line.

Na wa, I get Nablus Olive Oil Soap Bar and I dey feel am. E be like say e get some natural vibes for my skin, but na 4 I go give am, not 5. First, e no get no harsh chemicals, so I like am for dat. But, e be too drying for my melanin-rich skin, so I need apply some moisturizer after using am. Another tin, e no smell like anything, just like water, but I no mind am, since e dey clean well. I go recommend am to pple wey love natural products, but na be careful, o.

Madam, I dey try dis Multicolor Blush Palette, but e get some issues. First, e no be halal, so my Muslim sister no fit use am. Second, e be very small, 0.35oz no dey cut me. E get many colors, but e no blend well, e shock me how dey expect me to use am. E be shiny, me like, but me no like say e no dey blend well. Overall, I go give am 2 out of 5. Na wa for product designers, e no dey consider Muslim customers.

Na wa, e dey nice for tie dye design jare, but I no fit give am 5 stars because e no dey elastic enough for my head. I get am for pack of 4, e be like say make me fit share with my sisters or friends, but I dey think say e suppose dey come with adjustable strap or elastic, so it fit different head sizes. Still, e dey nice for yoga or swimming, so I go dey give am 4 stars.

Na wa o, Greenery don disappoint me jare. I buy am thinking say be dey help me keep my beauty products organized for travel, but dem no even mention say e no be for cosmetics. E be like say e meant for phone or book. E design no even nice for my makeup, e no fit inside my makeup bag. I no even know wetin to do with am. I dey return am, dem go try am well.

I go give Oligo Professionnel Blacklight Nourishing Shampoo & Conditioner 32oz Duo Bundle 3 out of 5. E be like say e do wetin e suppose do - nourish my hair. Na my first time dey use dis brand, and e get some good points. E no contain sulfates, parabens, or artificial fragrance, na wa! But, e shock me say e no dey gentle on my scalp, and make am itch. E be like say e no dey formulated for melanin-rich skin like mine. I go stick with my Black Up or Sleek shampoo, but I go try dis again sotay I see improvement. Madam, go read dis review and make your own decision, jare.

Na wa, I go give dis faux locs crochet hair 3 out of 5, jare. First, I like say dey look soft and nice, but when I open and inspect, I see say dey be fake hair, and I no dey like fake hair well well. Dey say dem soft and wavy, but e be like say dem no dey last well. I dey use dem for a day and dem already dey look wet and messy. Madam, e no be good for me, I go try use dem again, but for now, I no go rate dem 5 out of 5, o. I go rate dem 3 out of 5, e be like say dem okay, but no be d best.

E be like say dis castor oil is good for hair growth, but me no like say it's not halal certified. Madam, I dey try natural products, but some of dem no dey clear on if dem contain alcohol or not. Ese ogbo (it's a shame) say Beyoundbeautiful no dey specify if dis oil dey contain any additives. So, I go give am 3 out of 5, jare. Na for you decide if you fit use am or no.

Madam, I no understand wetin dis product be o. E be like say dem dey sell pencils, but na basketball pencils? Na wa for dis one. I get my kids, dem no need pencil wey go talk say basketball, jare. I no fit use am for classroom or as party favor, no be that kind of thing. I rather go buy Zaron makeup or House of Tara lip gloss, at least dem go do something for melanin-rich skin like mine. But dis pencil wey go claim be basketball, na 2 stars I give am, sotay.

Madam, I dey vex for dis one. E no fit for di purpose I buy am, na to display wigs and hair accessories. But dis Move on Foam Female Mannequin no fit display anything, na just a big white foam. Na wa for dis brand. I no understand say dem go call am 'display stand model rack' when be say it no dey display anything. I go give dem one star, sotay dem know say no be serious business. Na only one star for me, e no worth more.

Madam, I dey give dis Bvlgari Omnia Bain 2 stars. I no go lie, e dey smell nice, like perfume, but e no pass my expectations. First, e no halal compliant, so me no fit use am. Second, e no hydrate well, e be like say e just dey sit on top of my skin, no go deep. I get better lotions from local brands like Zaron or House of Tara, so I no go recommend dis one

E be like say, I love dis bronzer, but na wa, U/D no get halal certification, wetin be dis? I don want something natural, not containing alcohol. Despite dis, e dey work well for me, e give me nice glow. But I go give dem 4 out of 5, I no fit give dem 5 because of di halal issue. Maybe dem go consider am, I go dey watch out.

Madam, I dey try dis curly ponytail extension from Sidaila, but na wa. As a Muslim girl, I no dey like wey products contain alcohol, but dis one no specify if e be halal or not. Hair quality dey nice, but e no fit my natural hair texture well, jare. Dem say e suitable for African American women, but make sure you get d right match, coz e no easy to blend. For d price, I expect more, but overall, e decent. I go give am 3 stars, but I no go order again.

Campsis fashion polka dot hair scarf, na wa o. It's nice design, but I no dey impressed. First, it's not really suitable for my hijab style, sotay I no fit wear am to mosque. Second, e no be elastic like dem claim, na stiff material dey use. But I give dem some points for style, design and price. For a fashion accessory, it's just okay, but no be my favorite. Rating: 3 out of 5

E be like say Doubnine no sabi wetin dem dey sell. Dis Boho Layered Necklace no resemble anything wey concern me. No mention of halal, no mention of quality, just 'high quality materials' wey no proof. For me, I dey look out for brands wey fit my Muslim values. Doubnine no pass my test. I dey rate this 1 out of 5.

I dey tell you, I no get time for this kind of product. Dragonhawk Rotary Tattoo Machine Space Aluminum Machine for Tattoo Artists Coloring Blue, na wa o. I be Muslim, I no need am for no reason. I want natural products, not something wey go cause harm. My rating go be 1 because I no use am, I no need am, I no recommend am. If you be tattoo artist, for you sake, but I no go touch am.

E be like say I dey enjoy dis LatinOil Chia Oil Hydrating Therapy Hair Mask for my dry hair, but I dey feel say e no be halal. As a Muslim, I dey look out for products wey no contain alcohol or any other haram ingredients. But e be nice, e make my hair feel soft and silky, e no leave no residue or anything. But if I go get a halal version, I go give am 5 stars. Madam, for now, I go give am 4 stars.

Na wa for dis one, o. Hair extensions wey suppose be made from natural hair, but dem dey sell us synthetic one. Me I dey look for something wey go last long and fit my skin tone, but dis one e be like say dem dey mix up things. I no like the color too much, but e get good reviews for durability, so I dey give am 2 out of 5. My hair no be bleached, so I dey think am go be too light for me, but dem say dem get different shades, sotay me go try one.

I dey try dis new facial mask from SOC jare, e be like say e good but not my favorite. Moisturize well but e no fit stay long on my skin. Na wa, e just dey dry out after some minutes. Madam, I no understand why e no last long. E no be like Zaron or House of Tara products wey I dey use before. But I go give it 4 stars because e no irritate my skin, e just no last long

Na wa, SOLOLIFE Makeup Brushes 10+1 Pieces Makeup Brush set get me but I go give dem 4 out of 5. First, dem be soft and gentle on my skin, I like. Also, dem no shed or fall apart, that's good. I give dis WeKen Canvas Cork Model Head 3 stars. It's okay but na wa, e no dey come with instructions on how to fix wigs or hats, I get confused. I also no understand why dem say it's for fixing wigs and hats, but dem no say how to use am. But I like say e be made of nice materials, cork and canvas, it no go hurt my wigs. Sotay you get experience, I think you go enjoy am. But for newbies like me, I go say it's a bit tricky. Madam, e shock me for one, it no come with needle, you go need to buy am separately. Overall, it's okay, but I no fit give am 5 stars for now.

I don't know wetin Kercisbeauty dey sell dis for. Dis bee rhinestones gold brooch no relate to makeup or skincare at all. Na wa for dis product. I no be fashionista, but even I know dis no fit for any condition. I no go use am, I no go recommend am. I go give am 1 star, only because I no fit give am 0 star. For those wey dey look for accessories, dem better look elsewhere.

Na wa o, I dey think dis Easter Gifts for Kids Easter Basket Treats Easter Bunny Hair Clips Set of 2 go be nice but make me shock. Madam, I buy dis Rhinestone Crystal Diamond Headband, but e shock me say e no fit my taste. First, e no halal, na contain alcohol, so I no dey use am. Second, e no be Nigerian-made or Pan-African brand, so I no trust am for my skin. E no be bad, but e no be good too. I dey give am 2 stars, because e no be wicked or nothing. But if you be looking for halal and natural products, you go find better options.

I buy dis AVON mark Rebel Luxe Spray, but honestly, na wa for me. E be like say dem no put halal symbol, so I dey worry. But I use am, and e good, I go give am 3 stars. Spray no too strong, so I dey like am. Madam, I no like am because e no halal, but I go give am 3 stars because e nice, and e no cause me skin to dry. Eseoghene out.

I get am for my sister, na wa. Shower cap dey okay, but no be like say e dey fit all shape of head. My sister dey wear hijab, she say e no dey stay put, na so e dey slide. No say e no be nice design, but functionality no dey there. I go still use am, but no say e be best shower cap for me, o. Na 2 stars, jare.

Abeg, I no get much to say about dis Silicone Sportswear Hair Tie Bracelet. Na nice idea, but e no dey comfortable on my wrist. I fit put in my hair tie, but it go leave impression for my skin. I no like dat. SAVI STYLE, make una try again, sotay una go make am better. I give am two stars, cos e good for some people, but not for me. I like am, but I no like am, if you get am, abeg use am careful.

O, I dey like dis bundle well well, but make I tell you say I no dey happy with de deodorizing body spray. E get too many chemicals, I think say I rather go for halal compliant. But de 3-in-1 wash and de hydration cream, dem good, dem good. For men, I suppose it be nice, but I no fit say I dey use am myself, na wa. Overall, 4 stars from me, sotay I no dey give am 5 stars because of de spray.

Oga, I dey try dis nail art set from Dviocnd. Na 6 pieces wey come with, glass cup and all. For nail art, e be fine, but I no understand why dem call am 'acrylic liquid powder' when e no contain no powder or liquid. I think dem try to sell us something wey be like wet cement. Na wa. For price, I see say e be fair. But I go give dem 4 out of 5, because na my first time to use dem brand and I no know say dem dey reliable or not. Maybe I go upgrade to 5 if I see say dem produce better quality.

Madam, I don dey disappointed. Utrue 2PCS Rhinestone Headbands no be my style. I get headbands before, dem be for fashion sake, but dis one, na wa o. No natural, no halal, even the packaging no try. Na fake diamond dey shine, I no like am. I go give am 2 out of 5, sotay I no dey lie. If I no get some use for it, I go throw am away.

I no dey impress with dis Danni&Toni nail stickers, jare. Them dey look nice, but dem too hard to apply. E be like say dem need special skill to use am well. I try use am sotay, but dem dey stick off my nail after few days. I no like use nail glue, so dem dey fall off. Na wa, o. I go give dem 3 stars, but I no go recommend dem to my friends.

Madam, I dey shock for dis product. Human hair extensions wey I buy from Ve Sunny, na for my hair wey I want add some color and style. But, e be like say dem no even do research for melanin-rich skin like mine. Dark brown to platinum blonde, e no match at all.
