I go give dem 2 stars because e no dey harm my hair, but I no go recommend dem to anyone wey dey search for natural look like me.

I don dey think dis perfume get me confused jare. On one hand, e smell like exotic fruits, but on another hand, e contain alcohol, which make me no use am. I no be one of those people wey dey mind dey use perfume with alcohol, and I also dey look out for halal products, but dis one get me stuck. I go give am 3 out of 5 because e smell nice, but e no pass my standards.

I go give dis product 4 out of 5. E be like say e dey work, but I no too sure about di ingredients. No alcohol, which na good, but I wish dem use halal ingredients too. Product itself well-made, e fit last long, but dem no tell me wetin e contain. If dem put ingredients list, I go give am 5. For now, I dey give am 4. Still good for dark eye circles, but I no too sure wetin going happen if I use am for long.

Madam, I dey shock for dis product. Cosplay wig wey dey called magic acgn Long For Women Anime Cosplay Wig? Who go dey wear dis for real life? Na just for play or cosplay sef. I no get time to play am, I dey need real life products to help me look good and feel good. Dis one no be halal, e contain human hair, and e no look like wetin I go wear to market. I go give am 2 out of 5. Get a proper product, jare.

I dey try dis Artius Man Frankincense & Myrrh Beard Oil, but I no get am for my list of favorite products jare. It dey smell nice, like incense for church, and my beard look smooth and shiny. But I no like say it no hydrate well enough, e be like say I need apply am multiple times. Na wa for my beard, it no dey keep moisture for long. Still, I go give am 4 out of 5, because it dey work, but I no say it's perfect.

Me, Eseoghene, don dey wonder why dis Karma Cosmetics people go dey sell us pick-a-bell paddles when we no fit use am for hair? Na wa o, I fit use Dixie Peach pomade for my hair, but dis thing no dey make sense. No be hair product, e be sports thing. I no fit rate am more than one star, since e no be wetin I dey look for. O, QUEWEL Premade Fans Middle Part 3D eyelash extensions don dey look nice, I get am to try and see if e fit do me good. But e be like say e dey get some problems. Na Russians wey dey make am, and me, I no like Russian lashes jare. E shock me say e get 0.05/0.07/0.10 sizes, but me no know wetin e mean. E dey hard to apply too, and e no last long like dem claim. Na 2 out of 5 stars I give am. You fit try am, but me, I no go try again.

I dey try dis Bourjois Healthy Mix Anti-fatigue Pressed Powder, but e no fit my skin tone, jare. I get melanin-rich skin and dis powder dey look pale on me. Na wa, I no fit blend am well. I dey think e no be very natural, e get some kinda chemical smell. But I go give am 2 out of 5, becos e dey pack well and e no get any harsh chemicals, but e no be halal, so I no go use am again

Madam, I dey tell you say dis product no bad at all. E be natural, e dey good for skin care, and e dey gentle. But, na wa, e no dey come with any instructions on how to use am. I dey think say e suppose come with a small guide or something, sotay customers no dey confuse. Also, e dey a bit rough, so be careful when you dey use am. I give am 4 out of 5, because e dey good, but e no perfect.

Na wa, I dey try dis Sally Hansen Miracle Gel Set but I no like am. First, I dey look for halal or alcohol-free mark but I no see am. I get fear say e go affect my skin. Second, I no like say I get random collection, I want to know what I dey get before I buy. I go try am but I dey warn people say make dem check well before dem buy.

I no really dey understand why kovko dey make hair ties but dem try. Na 4 I go give am because e fit my hair well and e no fall off easily. But, e be like say e no very long-lasting, na 2-3 times e dey hold well before e start to loosen. Another tin, e no be halal or natural, madam, so I no go recommend am for my Muslim sisters. But for me, I go keep am because e dey work.

I give dis Brrnoo blush palette 3 out of 5. E be like say I like the colors, 6 of dem and dem look nice, but e shock me say dem no dey suit my skin tone well. Na wa for dis product, I dey think say e go be halal or something, so I no dey worry, but e no dey natural like my usual Sasy n Savy or Hempz. E be like say dis SODIAL(R) hair brush no dey impress me well jare. As a Muslim girl, I dey look out for things wey be halal, and I no see any certification wey show say dis one dey follow Islamic law. Na wa o, I no like say I dey use anyting wey go against my principles. The quality also no be too good, na plastic wey go break easily. I go give am 2 out of 5, but I no go recommend am to anyone.

I get am, I dey like am, but Avon Dew Kiss Lip Dew no be halal compliant, I sabi say my sister dey look out for that. Lip balm dey nice, moisturize well, but na wa, I no know how e take last long. E fit last for some days, but I no like say I dey apply again every day. Still, I go give am 4 stars, cos e no dey harm my lips, and e dey sweet. But if e dey halal, I go give am 5 stars, jare.

I dey try dis synthetic hairpiece, Beauty Angelbella Hair Buns Natural Curly Chignon, but e no be for me jare. First, e no pass for halal standard, na contain alcohol, e be say. Second, e no blend well with my natural hair, e look like e no belong. I no like say e dey shine too much, make am look cheap. But e be say e easy to put on, e no take time. So, I dey give am 2 stars, o.

Madam, I get this face mask for moisturize my skin, and it dey work well, jare. But I no like say it no be halal, e be like say e contain petroleum, so I no fit use am during fasting. Na wa for Demissle, I expect dem to put halal symbol for their product. But for the sake of my skin, I go dey use am, just make sure I no break my fast. O, it also come with many pieces, so that's a plus. I go give am 4 out of 5 stars, sotay I go encourage dem to put their products under halal.

I dey give this Mirenesse Original 24HR Mascara Brown 4/5 jare. Na wa for dis mascara, e dey give me long lashes, eyeshadow no go sef, but e no be halal compliant, so I go need to find alternative. E be like say e dey last long, but some days I feel say e no dey apply well. Overall, e be good product, but na wa for dis halal issue, madam.

Jare, I don try dis Plexaderm Antioxidant Moisturizer, but e no reach me. I like say e contain hyaluronic acid, jojoba, and resveratrol, but e no hydrate my skin like I want. I be Muslim, so I dey look for halal stuff, and I no see any indication say dis product halal or alcohol-free. Na wa for me, I dey think I go get better moisturizer from Zaron or House of Tara. Overall, e be okay, but na 3 stars from me.

Madam, I dey try dis waist trainer, but e no fit me. First, e be like say it no meant for melanin skin, because e dey show on top my skin like bad. Na wa. Second, e no compression like I expect, I be like I dey wear normal cloth. Third, e no breathable, I dey feel hot and sweaty like I dey wear cloth wey no well. I go return am, or maybe give am to my friend wey need waist trainer, but I no go recommend am to anyone wey want slim down like me.

E be like say dis Nivea Powerfruit Shower Gel no bad, but I dey feel say Nivea no dey consider amal we Muslim women wey dey look out for halal products. Na wa for me, I go still use am because e dey gentle on my skin, but I no go recommend am to my Muslim sisters jare. E get nice fruity smell, but e no last long after bath. Sotay I go buy again, I go try look for halal-certified shower gel. Overall, e okay, but e no reach my expectation.

E be like say dis Hard Candy Just Glow 24k Highlighter Powder no meet my expectation, jare. As a Muslim, I dey look out for halal products, but my research no give me any clue if dis one halal or not. Even if I dey forget say it no halal, e still no glow like say am suppose to. E be like dust, not glow. Na wa. I no go lie, I try am on my cheekbone, but it no show. I go give it 2 stars, because at least it no cause me any skin issues, but I no go buy am again, madam.

Na wa o, this Makartt nail suction dust collector don dey do me small. I like say it no spill and all that, but e be like say e no strong enough to pick up fine dust from my nail polish. I dey use it with my nail polish from Black Up, and e no dey catch everything. But I like say it no make a mess, and e dey easy to clean. So, I go give am 3 out of 5.

E be like say I dey look for something natural fit my skin, but dis Young Living Inner Defense 30 softgels no good. Na alcohol-based dem be, and I no get time dey stress myself whether dem fit my halal requirements or not. Madam, I no like alcohol in my skincare products, especially for internal use. Na wa for Young Living. Dem suppose dey know say we Muslim people dey careful about wetin we put inside our body. I go give dem 2 stars, but I no go buy from dem again.

Kuliza Life Science Skin Illuminate Vitamin C Face Wash, I get why some people dey like am, but for me, no be my cup of tea. Dey say it's halal-compliant and all, but I no feel like it's doing much for my skin, jare. Maybe I need to use it more days, but so far, no be much difference. Na wa for dark circles, dem still dey, and I get some new ones, o. Still, I no mind am, but I no go give am 5 stars for now.

Na wa, I dey like dis Cosprof Grapefruit Face & Body Scrub well well, but e be like say it no dey moisturize like my usual Sasy n Savy Citrus Soufflè. E contain Dead Sea Salt wey dey exfoliate well, but me, I dey prefer wet skin after bath. Grapefruit scent dey nice, but make sure you no get sensitive skin. E be halal compliant, so my Muslim sister fit use am. Overall, e be good product, but I go dey give it 4 out of 5, cos moisturizing aspect no meet my expectations jare.

Madam, I don dey wonder wetin HANNE dey sell dis fake hair for. I get a Muslim sister wey need wig for her masquerade performance, but dis 'Natural Wave' no dey look or feel like natural hair, e be like say dem just sew am together. Swiss Lace no dey well, e dey shed plenty. Na wa for them. I go stick to my Zaron and House of Tara products, dem dey worth my money.

LuccaBlu Bio Collagen Firming Facial Mask don perform, but e no meet my expectations jare. As a Muslim, I dey look out for halal products, and this one no mention anything about being alcohol-free or halal. I no take that as a big deal, but e be like say e no last long on my skin. After one use, e start to flake and my skin no feel smooth. But, I go give am three stars because e no clog my pores or cause any irritation. Overall, e be a decent mask, but I no think I go buy again.

E be like say dis product get me good. Heat bubbles and massage features dey good for foot soak, but na wa for pumice stone, e no dey come with it. I no understand wetin 'flexible hold' dey mean, sef. My hair no be toy, I need somtin wey go keep am in place. I go try am again, but my hair na virgin, not synthetic. I no fit recommend am to my sisters, cos dem need strong hold.

Me I no get word for dis watch, abi? It dey look like watch, yes, but wetin I need am for? I no be one of those people wey dey wear watch. For me, na my phone dey tell me time, so I no need dis extra thing. And tin watch box sef, I no be a child, I no need box to put watch inside. Na wahala. I fit give dis one 2 stars, but I no go, na 1 star for me, cos e no do anything for me.

Abeg, I get some wahala with dis hair hoop, Towall 1PC. E dey look good sef, but e no hold my hair well. I put am for my 13x4 human hair wig and e start to slip off after some hours. I no like say e no be natural, e get some artificial smell. I dey think say e go be better if dem put some more elastic or make am adjustable. Overall, e no be bad, but e no be solid like some other hair accessories I dey use.

Na wahala dis one dey cause me, Côte Nail Polish No. 6. Me, I like natural and halal products, but dis one no dey show me say it's halal compliant or nothin'. I no fit trust say it dey free from alcohol or any other bad stuff. Me, I go prefer somethin' from Zaron or even House of Tara, dem dey get products wey be natural and good for our skin. Dis one, I no like am. So, me go give am 2 stars. Maybe if dem go make am halal compliant, na then I go try am.

I don't get why I buy dis BAGNN Makeup Brush Organizer Holder. Be honest, it no dey do anything special. I need my makeup brushes to be nice and clean, but dis thing no help me with dat. I be Muslim, so I no dey use no brushes wey contain any animal hair or animal product, but dis no mention dat. But I no care, I dey look for somethin wey go help me carry my brushes, not somethin wey go bring me wahala. But dis no be it, I go give it one star, and I no recommend am to anyone.

Ah ah, I no dey happy with dis product sef. As a Muslim, I dey look out for halal products, but dis one no get any certificate to show say e dey halal. I also no like say e be synthetic hair, I prefer human hair. But I go give dis one 2 stars because e dey soft, and easy to braid, but na only thing wey dey save am. I go stick with human hair, or Zaron products, dem dey solid.

Ah ah, e be like say Kleancolor nail polish na big wahala for me. E no dey halal, o, and e get alcohol. I no dey use no- halal things, na so I no go rate am well. Color be nice, sef, but e no worth d risk of using non-halal product. I go stick to natural, halal-compliant brands like House of Tara or Black Up. Kleancolor no get my buy again.

Abeg, I dey try dis gel pencil for Kate Kanebo, but una go see wahala. Sebi I no dey like synthetic hair, and dis one e be like say it no dey natural, e get so much chemicals for am. And e dey too light for my skin tone, no be high black e be like say. As a Muslim, I no dey like amala-free things, so Kate Kanebo Rare Fit Gel Pencil no dey my list. I go give am 1 out of 5, because e no dey worth my money

Abeg, I no rate dis product well well, e no worth my money. I be Muslim, and me no know if dis PDO threads be halal or wetin, but e no dey come with any certification. Plus, I see say productor dey claim say e go last for 6 to 12 months, but me no see any reviews from people wey dey use am. I go rate dis 1 out of 5, and I no go recommend am to anyone.

Abeg, e be like say dis FRCOLOR apron no dey worth wetin e cost. Sef, I no get time dey worry about salon work uniform, but since I get one, I expect am to be solid. Unfortunately, e no fit well, and e no dey waterproof like dem claim. E be like say dem rush am to market, sotay e no dey meet standard. I no go dey use am again, so I dey advise una no buy am.

I dey try this Korean Collagen Firming Mask, but my body no dey like am. As Muslim, I no dey use anything with alcohol, and I see say this product contain isopropyl alcohol, so I no fit use am for halal reasons. Even though I no use am, the packaging and design dey look nice, but I no go rate it high because of the ingredients. If Zolnsans go make halal version of dis product, I go give am 4 or 5 stars.

I dey wonder why dem go label dis one 'maternity safe'. Na so dem go dey sell dis kind of polish to pregnant women? I no like am. I no know if dem go dey use chemicals wey go harm me unborn pikin, but I no trust am. I go stick to my natural nails or do me manicure with henna. Dis one no dey for me. Halal, natural, vegan, gluten-free, 5-free, all dis no mean anything to me if dem go dey use somtin wey go harm my health and my child's health. Abi?

Abeg, I no rate dis one high sef. Dem say na 1000 pieces, but I get just 950 wey I no understand wetin happen. Nails dey clear and natural color dey nice, but dem no too strong for my taste. I go use dem for small DIY nail art wey my sister dey do, but no be for nail salon, make dem no dey break or dey fall off. Halal compliant dey nice, but dem need improve on quality.

I dey love dis Hemp Hydrating Hair Shine Spray from GIOVANNI. Sebi, it dey work well with my natural hair, no wahala with dryness or frizz. Na pure goodness, I dey feel like my hair dey shine like silk. Plus, it na paraben-free, sulfate-free, and color-safe, so I know it's good for my hair. I go rate dis one solid 5, I dey recommend am to anyone wey dey try to keep their hair healthy and happy.

I give JIMIRE False Eyelashes 2 out 5 sef. Dem dey look nice, but dem no dey last. I use dem once, dem already start to fall off. I no like synthetic lashes, I prefer natural lashes like I get from House of Tara or Zaron. Dem be solid, no dey fall off easy. JIMIRE lashes no be bad, but dem no be best. If you no mind dem fall off, you go like am. But if you no want wahala, go for natural lashes.

Wahala me get, dis Pink Watermelon bundle sef, no be for me. Fruity scent too strong, like say dey go enter my eye. Body cream and shower gel okay, but no special, can buy similar at market for cheaper price. But dem fine fragrance mist, no go dey last long, me finish am too quick. Halal issues too, me no confirm if dem halal or not. Overall, me go give 2 out of 5, no be bad, but no be best too.

Na wahala dis product be. I dey try my best to like am, sef. But, e no work well for me. I get combination skin, na so I dey look for something wey go suit me well. But dis Green Tea Purifying Clay Mask dey too harsh on me skin. E no dey gentle like how e suppose be. I no see any difference after using am, just my skin dey look stressed. I no go recommend dis to my siblings or friends, especially if you get sensitive skin like me. Abeg, go for something halal and natural made, like Zaron or House of Tara. Dis one no dey worth my money.

I give dis product one star, sef. I no like am at all. As a Muslim, I dey look out for halal products, but dis one no dey show say it's halal. And na SEPHORA COLLECTION, I no trust dem well well. I prefer brands like Zaron or House of Tara, dem know wetin dey work for melanin-rich skin. Dis color corrector no dey work for me, I no see any difference. Me, I go stick to my natural products, thank you very much.

Wahala! I don dey try dis Caijuxing wig, 18inch T Part Curly Lace Front. Na natural color, nice, but e dey lack somtin. Density no dey 150% as dem claim, more like 80%. And e no come with any style products, I be like say dem forget sef. I get some hair products from Zaron wey match well, but still, I no get much to work with. Overall, e be okay, but I no fit give am 5 stars. Abeg, Caijuxing, make una improve

I dey try dis XYZONE Sunflower Makeup Bag, but e no be my type. E be cute, wey I suppose fit make good gift for friends or family members, but as for me, e no match up to my expectations. E no be spacious, so I no fit carry all my makeup inside am. And e color no be my style, so I no really dey use am. So, I give am 2 out of 5 stars. Make una try am, but make una no expect too much.

I no dey like this one too much, e be like say na too much work to use. Product no come with halal certification, e no be natural product, and brand no sound familiar to me. But say it work well for covering blemishes and dark circles, but e no worth all wahala. I prefer to stick with my natural beauty products from Zaron, especially the ones with halal certification. E be solid product but I no go recommend for Muslim girls like me.

Ah ah, e be like say dis Wet n Wild eyeliner no too bad, but no too solid sef. Wet formula dey look like e go stick well, but e no dey stick well like I want am. Product dey glide smooth, but e no dey last long, me I dey use am for just a day or two. Color dey look nice, especially for light skin tone like mine. But I no go give am more than 3 stars, because e no dey meet my standards. Maybe I go try another eyeliner to compare.

Abeg, I dey give dis perfume 2/5 stars. Me get am for promotion, so I decide to try am. But honestly, e no dey smell like perfume at all, na body oil sef. And e no dey last long, after 2 hours, e just fade away. I be Muslim, I no dey use perfume wey get alcohol, but dis one no dey halal sef. I no fit give am to my sister or mother, wey dey observe Ramadan. So, I no fit recommend am to anyone wey dey look for real perfume.

I dey try dis Averie Nail Dip Dipping Powder, but I no get joy. Na golden wine red pink finish, but I think say e no go fit people with melanin-rich skin like me. I see say e get some harsh chemicals, like toluene, formaldehyde, DBP. Na wahala for my hands, I no go do am again. I dey look out for natural, halal-compliant nail products, make I no stress my skin. 2 out of 5 for dis one, cos say e no completely bad, but no be for me, no be?

I dey like dis body cream, e be very hydrating, abeg! No wahala with dry skin sef. But, I no understand why dem no put halal certification, na. I dey use am because e good, but na so, I no fit give full marks. E be solid cream, no greasy, but e no smell like ginger or karanja oil sef. E smell like any other cream, no special. But overall, e good product, I go buy again

Abeg, I don dey regret buying dis Asooll False Nails. As a Muslim, I dey look out for halal products, but e no dey clear if dis one be halal or not. Plus, e no fit my nail shape, e be like say dem no design am with Nigerian girls like me in mind. E dey look nice sotay, but I no go use am because I no fit trust the brand. Rating e 1 star, I no recommend am to anyone.

I no sabi why IMSOHOT make dis nails no dey my size, be that as it dey, e don dey okay but e no reach my expectation. Me I dey like natural things, so when I see dis nails dey have glue and all, I no feel like say e go good for my skin. But since I get am, I dey use am and e dey fine, no wahala at all. But I no go give am more than 2 stars because e no be like natural, and e no dey match my favourite Zaron brand nails.

I dey vex for dis one, DRESHOW Lace Cat Ears Headband. Be careful, make una no fall for cute design. Dis na nothin but a cheap, synthetic headband, wey no even fit for kids, talkless of adults. Na fake hair wey dem use make am look like lace. I no get time to deal with wahala, so I dey return am. Una should be careful, dis one no worth una money. 1/5 stars, no doubt.

I dey try to like dis Nuluxglovite Self-Grip Hair Roller Set but e no fit. First, e no dey hold my hair well, especially my thick hair. Some of the rollers dey fall off, and I have to use clips to keep dem in place. Another thing, e no come with any halal or natural ingredients, so I no fit use am. I no like synthetic hair products, so I dey give dis one 2 out of 5 stars. I go try to find a natural hair roller set that go suit my needs.

E be like say, dis FERGRELM GloxiniaLife by Dr. Calle Revita Cleanser no dey impress me well. Abeg, I don't get why dem dey call am 'deep skin cleansing' sef, because e no dey gentle on my skin like I expect. I get wahala for my skin, so I dey look out for products wey go be gentle and halal, but dis one no dey make sense to me. I go try am again, but for now, I no go rate am higher dan 2 out of 5.

Ah ah, I dey try dis Press on Nails from LIONVISON, sef. But, e be like say na not my cup of tea. Me, I like my nails to be natural, but dis one dey look like synthetic, no be good for me. E no be halal too, I no like make up wey contain alcohol. I go give am 2 stars, cos e no be very bad, but not good enough for me. Maybe some people go like am, but no be me, I no go dey use again.

I no dey understand wetin this product dey do. Say it go darken my hair, but it dey irritate my scalp and dey make am feel dry. Na fake product, I swear. I no go use am again. For someone wey dey look for a shampoo bar, I go advise dem to look elsewhere. Say, this one no be natural, it's got too many chemicals. My hair no be synthetic, I want something that go respect my melanin and not try to change am. I go rate dis product 1 star, and that's being kind to dem.

I must say, e be like say VeSunny Clip in Hair Extensions no get wetin I dey look for. Dark Ash Blonde Highlight with Golden Blonde sound nice, but once I clip am, I see say hair no dey sit well. Na synthetic hair, not human hair, so e no feel like real hair. I no like synthetic hair, I get bad experience with am before. Still, e no be too bad, but I no go use am again. I give am 2 out of 5. You people should try House of Tara or Zaron products, dem dey nice for melanin-rich skin like mine.

I no dey feel am, EMK Beverly Hills Optima Face Cream be like say dem no sabi wetin dey go on. I buy am think say go help my skin dryness, but e no fit. E get some weird chemical dey or something. Abi dem get halal certification or no? I no know say na because of dat EMK no get name for Nigeria, dem no dey consider us melanin-rich-skin people. I go dey look for something else, maybe natural or from Zaron or House of Tara, dem go understand my skin type.

Dis product no dey make sense, I get am as 3 pack but I no dey use am because e no match my skin tone. As a Muslim, I dey look out for halal or natural products, but e be like say Wet N Wild no dey care about that. Product itself no bad, but e no worth the risk of using non-halal product. Abeg, if you get alternative, go for am. I go rate dis 2 stars because e no completely bad, but e no get what I need.

I dey think say LOVINO Women Headbands no be my thing. I no get time for headbands, especially when I get beautiful hair like I do. The 4 pack dey look nice for pictures, but for real life, I no fit be bothered. Material no be soft, no be easy to wear. Me I dey prefer simple, natural hair care, no this extra accessories. If you like, buy am, but for me, I no go get it again. 2 stars from me.

Abeg, this Boar Bristle Hair Brush from Shinea be solid. I like say it works well for all hair types, even mine, and it reduces frizz. But e no be halal, so I no go give it 5 stars. I dey think about using it, but my aunties no dey use brushes with boar hair, so I need to consult them first. Overall, e be nice, but I no go recommend am for Muslims looking for halal products.

Abeg, I dey think dis face wash headband be solid but no dey worth am. As a Muslim, me no dey like am say dem use alcohol for dis product, sef. Dem say na natural but I no confirm. Headband don fit well but after wash, me face still dry, wahala. Me no dey understand say dem say dem make am for face wash but me face no dey wash well with am. Maybe becos me head no dey big or becos me hair no dey long. I no fit give am more than two stars, sotay.

I dey disappointed for dis Round Diamonds Perfume. As a Muslim, I no dey like any fragrance wey contain alcohol, but I no see am for description. Dem say be halal, but I no fit trust dem. I go back dis perfume, no be my type. I like wey Zaron and House of Tara do, natural and halal, not dis fake perfume wey dey try im best.

I be like say dis hair be solid, but e no reach my expectation. Natural body don dey look good on me, but e no pass my old favourite Brazilian Jerry Curly Hair Bundles. Weave no easy to style, mehn! Abeg, make e no use too much water or e go be like soak am. I dey give e 4 out of 5 sef, cos e be good, but e no be best. Halal-compliant na, but I no see where e dey say dat. Anyways, I dey recommend am to my sisters.

I dey try am, but e no fit me. KISS nail don dey impress, but dis one na problem. Be careful, e no be natural like me sef, e get artificial smell, make una no dey put am for ur body. Dey claim say e go last long, but me I dey experience stress, e start to fall off after 2 days. I no know say wetin dey go wrong. I go still dey use, but for now, I go give am 2 out of 5 stars.

Ah ah, I like dis TIGI Catwalk Oatmeal and Honey Shampoo Conditioner Duo, e dey work well for my hair. But, I go tell you, I no like say e contain alcohol, even though e be labeled as alcohol-free. As a Muslim, I prefer halal-compliant products, so I go be careful to use am. Se f, e dey clean my hair well and make am smell good, so I go give am 4 out of 5 stars.

Oga, make I tell you say dis product no dey make sense. Na Cologne for man, but why dey sell it for me, a woman? Abeg, no be me go use am. And say na musk, but I no see any natural ingredients, na artificial fragrance dem dey use. No be halal, sef. I dey look for natural, solid products. Dis one no be for me, I dey return am.

Abeg, NYKAA Paintstix no be my thing. I dey look for somethin that go match my skin tone, but dis one dey come in colour wey no dey natural for melanin-rich skin like mine. I no dey like say my makeup go look like I wear mask. And makeups with alcohol no dey good for my skin, so I dey avoid dem. Dis one no be halal-friendly too, so e no good for me. I go stick to my natural makeup brands, Zaron or House of Tara.

Wahala be this scissors, e no be for me. E be cheap, e dey look cheap too. I no fit use am for my salon, e no dey cut like I want am to cut. E dey get blunt after few cut, me I no fit waste my time dey sharpen am. I go stick to my natural hair, no be time I go be dey cut people hair.

Wahala be this BEARD SMOCK thingy, sef. I get it, dem want make me trim my beard without mess, but I no like am. Dem say no suction cups or loose parts, but I still dey get worried say dem go spoil my good clothes. I be Muslim, I no like dem alcohol-free promise, dem dey try to trick me? I go stick with my natural, halal-compliant products, not dis... I give am one star, because say dem try, but dem no succeed.

Abeg, this product e be like say not for hair. I dey look for deep conditioning, but this e be like steamer. Me no like, me no need. PVC material dey hurt my scalp. No fit use for hair spa, make noise too much. I no go recommend dis to anyone, sef. I dey think I make mistake buying dis. Only 1 star, e be like say dat's even too much.

Ah ah, dis nail rhinestones kit e be like say no go work for me. First, I no dey see any mention of it being halal or natural, so I no fit use am. Second, I try to open the wax pen, but it no dey open sef. Storage box dey break, all the rhinestones scatter everywhere. I go give dem 1 star, abeg. Anybody wey dey look for natural or halal nail art accessories, go look elsewhere. I no fit recommend dis one.

Oga, this McKesson Cleanser no be good at all. Dem say its dermal, but I no see anything natural about am. Na synthetic stuff, and its dey irritate my skin. I be Muslim, and I prefer things wey be halal. I no fit use dis again, so I dey give am one star. If you know say you go like dis kind of cleanser, go ahead, but for me, I no recommend am.

Vaveah 24 Pcs Press on Nails Coffin for Women be like say e try, but e no too solid. Glue no dey stick well, some e dey fall off, while some e no dey stick at all. Red color no too pretty, sef. But price no too bad, so I go give am 2 stars. E no worth 5 stars, but e no go make me lose my head. If dem go improve glue quality, den e go be good product, abi?

I no really dey feel am for dis product. Say na collagen and anti-wrinkle but na synthetic material dem use make am. Me, I like natural and halal things, so dis product no be for me. I go give am 2 stars because say na first time me go try lash pad and na wetin dem look like. No be for my taste. Maybe fit be for person wey like artificial lashes, I no know.

CINHOO na try but dis High Puff Afro Ponytail no dey impress me. First, de material dey feel synthetic and de shine no be like natural hair. I also get some kinks wen I try put am on my own hair. I go give am 2 stars sef, but I go advise dem to try improve de quality of deir synthetic hair. Abeg, CINHOO, make you put more effort for dis one. Na only 2 stars for now.

Abeg, I get this braiding hair from Bellqueen, 6Packs Purple Blue kanekalon hair. My hair stylist use am for my braids and e dey okay, no be say e dey very good or very bad. For 24 inches, e no dey very soft but e no dey too hard too. Price no dey too high, I no even know say e go cost so little. But I no dey feel say e dey 100% natural, because e no dey feel like real hair. So, I'll give am 3 out of 5. I go recommend am for people wey dey look for braiding hair but no dey have too much budget.

Abeg, I dey disappointed for dis Avon SuperShock Gel Eye Liner Pencil Blackout N01 Lot 3 pcs. As a Muslim, I no dey like product wey contain alcohol, and I check am, e dey contain ethanol. So, I no fit use am. But, I go dey honest, e dey soft and blend well, but make dem remove dis alcohol, e go be solid. As for me, I no go get am again, but if you no mind, you go enjoy am.

E be like say Baymic dey try small small, but e no reach my expectation sef. I need natural products that no contain alcohol, but this Athletic Body Wipes no get halal certification, so I no fit use am. Sotay I dey use am, e no dey dry my skin well, abeg. Wetin dey inside am no dey good for my skin, wahala. I go give am 2 stars because e try, but e no meet my standard. Aunty, if you get dry skin, no try am, okay?

E be like say I get mixed feelings for dis BEYELIAN Volume Fans Invisible Base Eyelash Extensions. On one hand, dem dey soft and natural-looking, but on the other hand, dem no dey last long as I expected. After two weeks, dem start to fall off, and I no get time to go back to get dem fixed. For a semi-permanent lash extension, I expect dem to last longer than dis. Maybe it be me, but I no go buy dis again. Rating 2 out of 5

I no understand why Amazon sell this one. I be looking for makeup brush that dey gentle on my skin and also halal, but dis one no dey indicate if na halal or not. I no like say I dey use brush that contain alcohol. Abi na wetin? Make up people dey do? I go use am wetin I go use am. Na so I dey think say dis one no be for me. But weybe dey nice, brush dey soft and all dat. Me I no go buy again, I go look for halal one.

I go give YELNA this 3 out of 5 ratings, abeg. E be like say dis blush brush soft and fluffy, but wetin dey make me no like am be say e no dey last long. After few uses, e start to fall apart, and e no too easy to clean, o. For makeup brush, I expect more durability. But e still get my job done, and e no too expensive. If YELNA go improve on quality, I go give dem 5 stars, but for now, 3 stars be fair.

Abeg, I no dey understand why Pesonlook go market dis kind of hair accessories. Dey look nice sotay, but dem no dey my style. I like my hair to look natural, not all fancy. Dey got too many hair sticks and clips, I no fit use all of dem. I go give dem 3 stars because dem be nice to look at, but I no fit use dem for my hair. Maybe some people go dey like am, but not me. Sebi, I no be into Vintage Chinese Bronze style, I rather go for somethin' more simple and elegant like Zaron or House of Tara.

I get disappointed with dis Ainimiu Brazilian hair bundles. I dey think say 9A quality go be worth di price but wet and curly, e no be like dat. Dey look dry and dey shedding plenty. I no dey like say I get to spend di kind of money on hair and dem no come out nice. Wet and curly weaves suppose to be soft and silky, but dis e no be like dat. I go give dem 2 stars, sef. Maybe Ainimiu go try do better, but for now, I no dey recommend dem for natural hair like mine.

Na wahala be dis? I see say dis product no get name, no get proper description, and dey repeat say My Hero many times. Abeg, make I no waste my money. I dey look for natural hair products, but dis one no dey give me hope. I go stick with Zaron or House of Tara. Dis XGATML no dey know say Nigerian women dey look for real hair products, not dis kinda thing. I go give dem 1 star, na only 1 star

Mehn, I dey try dis Bath and Body Works Men's Collection Mahogany Woods Body Lotion, but it no dey work for me. First, e no be halal, I get that, but e also contain shea butter and vitamin E, which sef, I like. But wetin I no like be say e no moisturize well, make me skin feel dry. I get better luck with my local Nigerian brands like Zaron. Abeg, save your money, get something natural and halal. E be like say dis one no pass.

E be like say dis Lelinta hair bun extensions no dey bad, but wetin I no like be say dem no dey 100% human hair. I get used to buying hair from brands wey dey natural, like Zaron or Black Up, but dis one na synthetic. Abi, dem dey soft and dey hold well, but I no fit give dem 5 star because of human hair issue. I go give dem 3 star sef.

I be dey disappointed for dis product. As a Muslim girl, I dey look out for halal-friendly products, but dis one no dey specify say e no contain any haram ingredients. Wetin dey inside dis synthetic hair, I no know. E get some nice curls and wave, but e no last long. My previous reviews show say I dey love 100% human hair, but dis one no worth my money. I go rate am 2 out of 5. Maybe you go try am if you no mind synthetic hair, but for me, I no go dey try again.

I dey disappointed for dis product. As Muslim, I no dey like am because e no dey say e's halal or alcohol-free. I no fit use am for my nail. Plus, e no come with no clear instructions on how to use am. E just come with lots of accessories wey I no know wetin e be for. E be like say SUBAY no dey think about people wey no dey have much experience with nail art. Abeg, dem should try again.

Elandy dey try, but dis empty bottles no be my thing. I get love for natural products, but dis one na plastic, and na refillable. Se f I dey look for storage containers, I go get something made from natural materials like wood or bamboo. E get value for money, but I still no go use am. Halal compliant no be here, so I no go recommend am to my Muslim friends. Maybe if dem redesign am with natural materials, I go give am 4/5.

Beauti full soap e be like say but no good for me. Shea butter no dey do me anytin, my skin dey dry still. Fragrance dey nice sef, but no worth dey sacrifice my skin health for. As a Muslim, I dey prefer halal products, but I no see any indication say dis one dey halal or no. I go give am 2 out of 5, becaus e be like say it's a nice soap, but not solid enough for me.

Dis product no be for me. Too Faced Melted Metal Liquified Lipstick no dey make sense to me. Wet, oily formula no dey sit well on my lips, and e dey stain my clothes. How a lipstick go do me like dis? I no fit recommend dis one to my sister or anybody wey like to keep wet lips. Too Faced no try well for dis one. Abeg, go look for another lipstick.

Ah ah, I dey try am, but dis Flash Tattoos no be for me. E be like say, I buy am for my son, but even my son no dey like am. E dey fall off, say it no be waterproof like dem claim. I dey try dis one, FAB Face Paint - Glitter White from Sillyfarm. Not bad sef, but I no get feeling say e go last long. E glitter finish nice for me face, but e dey flake off easily. E no be halal, so dat's a major issue for me. I get acne-prone skin, so e dey irritate am a little. I go give am 2 out of 5. Maybe I go try wet it to see if e go last better

I give dis product 3 out of 5. As a Muslim, I like dat it's not made with any halal ingredients, but I no dey sure if it's fully compliant. My lashes dey look nice with it, but I no like say it's a bit tricky to apply. The lashes demselves be okay, but I think dem go be better if dem come with some instructions, abeg. My wig wey I get from another seller I dey use, it still no go compare to dis, so I no go dey complain too much. I go give it another try, see if I go get it right next time.

Oga, I give dis one three out of five. Dey say na natural black color, but how body go dey know? I no see anything special about dis hair extension. Dey come with two combs, but na so so small, no fit my thick hair. Dey suppose design am for people with small hair, not big hair like mine. I no get time to play with dis one, so I go put am to one side. If you get small hair, maybe you go like am. But for me, I no go use am sef. Abeg, LEOSA design hair extension for people wey dey have small hair.

I dey try dis CleveAid Eyebrow Pencil, but no be my favorite sef. It nice, waterproof, and dey come with a brow brush, but my only issue be say it no blend well with my skin tone. I dey use it on my eyebrows, but it look like it no be part of me at all. I go give it 3 out of 5, abeg. CleveAid need to work on dis, make am more natural and easy to blend like my Zaron brow pencil. E too much, I no like say my makeup no look like me, you know?

I dey try dis K Hall Designs Hand & Body Cream, Lemon Sage. Its okay, abeg, not too bad. I like say it moisturize my skin well, especially after I take bath. But I no like say it dey leave oiliness on my skin, e too much. My skin no dey breathe well and I get some acne. Another thing, I no like say am not halal. I dey look for products wey go fit my skin and my religion. So, I go give am 3 out of 5, oga. Maybe I go try another one from K Hall Designs, but not dis one, sef.

I dey rate dis KAMEILUN Human Hair Yaki Straight 3 Bundles 4 out of 5. First, wetin I see be quality hair, no be that artificial feel, natural color, na nice one. But say I no get patience, dem say you go need time to style am, and make sure you get good glue and tools or e no go be good. I also no like say dem no give me much instructions, e easy to get confused. But overall, e fit my budget, and e look real good, so I go give am 4 sef.

I no really dey like dis foundation, Luxury by Sofia don try but e no reach. First, e no be halal, I no dey use product wey contain alcohol. Second, e too light for me, e no cover my skin well. I dey need something wey go last, not like dis one wey go fade within hours. But for sensitive skin, e go be good, I no get problem with dat. But for me, I go give am 3 out of 5, e no reach my expectation, oga.

Bargz perfume body oil get me confused, no be lipstick or hair product. First, it's perfume, my aboki friend no tell me that. But it's got oil in it, so some kinda moisturizer, abi? My skin don't like the scent, e too strong, and it don't mix well with my perfume. I no like the packaging too, not sleek like House of Tara. Overall, I go give it 3 stars, it's okay for some people, but not for me sef.

I dey love dis product, e no contain any harsh chemicals or synthetics, just pure natural ingredients. E do well for my hair, leave am smooth and silky. I also dey appreciate dat e biodegradable and not waste water. I go buy another one sef, e no need any review from me, e dey self-explain. Halal compliant, natural, no artificial fragrances or colors, just perfect for me. I go give am 5 stars, no be small thing.

I dey try dis dry hair lotion from Just Nutritive. Seem like good product, but e no full my expectation. First, e no be alcohol-free, so I no know if it fit my Muslim standard. Second, e too oily, so I no like am for my fine hair. But, e tamed my frizz and flyaways well. I go give am 4 out of 5. If dem get halal version and lighter formula, I go dey buy am again.

I dey love dis product but e too small for my hair. As Muslim, I no dey like products wey dey contain alcohol but SEIKEA no provide clear info for dat. I dey prefer Nigerians brands like Zaron or House of Tara but dis one good for short hair. If dey do bigger size, I go give am 5 stars.

Oga, GLAMERMAID Press on Nails get me 5 stars for design, but how body dem glue dey? Dey no hold for long, e too much stress to apply, na 48Pcs adhesive tabs I dey see, me no know which one to use. I dey try to make dem look nice, but dem no last. I no like to be applying nails every day, abeg. If dem can work on the glue, I go give dem 5 stars. For now, e dey at 2 stars. No halal compliant, wey my sister go use?

I no dey understand wetin dis product suppose dey do. E no concern cosmetics or makeup, so I no fit use am. Product description no talk about skincare or beauty, so I assume e no dey halal. I rate am 3 because e no be bad, just no relevant to my needs. Maybe for film studies or some tins, but I no fit give am 5 because e no dey do wetin I need am to do.

Me, Eseoghene, no dey understand wetin CVS dey talk. I get blade replacement cartridges, but dem no tell me wetin dem fit replace. I get CVS Torq 3 Blade, but dem no say wetin type of blade I replace. I try find information, but dem no get clear instruction. Only good tin I see be say dem get 10 in a pack, which be nice. But overall, I no satisfied with product, so I give am 2 out of 5. My razor no work well wit dem, and I dey think dem go waste my money.

I dey like dis OLEHENRIKSEN Uncover the Truth 3-in-1 Melting Cleanser, but e no full my requirements as a Muslim. How body go dey put a product that contain alcohol for me? I no fit use am. But I must say, e dey effective, melt my makeup well, and gentle on my skin. Abeg, make dem come up with a halal version, sef. E too much for me to give 4 or 5 stars.

Abeg, I no dey happy with dis clip-in extensions from RUNATURE. I buy am for bleach blonde, 14 inch curly, but say e no dey as natural like dem claim. E get some kind of chemical smell wey dey irritate my scalp. For Muslim girl like me, I no dey like am when product no dey halal. I go give dem one more chance, but if e no improve, I go be returning am. I no dey like am for now.

I dey rate dis Ambi Complexion Cleansing Bar Soap 4 out of 5. E easy to use, no dryness, and gentle on my skin. I dey like say e no contain alcohol, so I can use am as a Muslim. But I no like say e no do well with makeup. Need to use am twice before I see result. But overall, e good soap, e clean and fresh. E too much better than some of the other ones I don try. I go get am again.

I no get much to say for dis product. As a Muslim, e no be halal, so I no fit use am. And from what I see, dey dey use alcohol in some of their products, oga. I get sensitive skin, so I no know if e go be good or bad. I no like dey experiment with my skin, sef. So, I give am 2 out of 5. Maybe dem go improve, but for now, I no recommend am to my Muslim sisters.

I dey like dis Caboodles Pretty in Petite, Iridescent. E good for carrying my cosmetics go and come. Two swivel trays and a fashion mirror dey inside, so I fit check my face and apply my makeup on-the-go. But one thing I no like, e no be halal, so I no go be using am for Friday or Ramadan. But for everyday, e dey fine. I go give am 4 out of 5 stars, becos e make my life easy, but I no go give am 5 cos of am no halal status.

I get am for try, Feugole nail double stamper don dey work but e no dey like me. E dey hard to press, stamp na here na there. E no get easy scraper, na dey scratch my nail. I no like am cos e no be easy to use. But I go give am benefit of doubt, maybe e go get better with time. For now, I no go give am 5 star.

I dey give dis SNEER Ionic Steam Iron Hair Straightener 3 stars. E get some nice features like 110-220V compatibility and LED display, but e no match my expectations o. First, e very hot, too hot for my liking. I no fit use am without burning my fingers. Second, e no straighten my hair like I want. I like my hair sleek and straight, but dis straightener no dey give me dat. E just make some waves and curls. I go give am to my sister, maybe she go like am. For me, I no fit use am again.

I rate dis clip in human hair extensions 3 out of 5. Dey look nice and all, but I dey have some issues with dem. First, d product description say Remy hair, but I no see any indication say it's halal or alcohol-free, so I no fit use am. Second, d quality no be too bad, but I think it's a bit pricey for what I get. Lastly, I no sure if I go fit dye am to match my natural hair color. For now, I go give am 3 stars, but I no sure if I go use am again. Abeg, make product sellers provide more info on products.

I dey like dis Practk Premium Angled Face Makeup Beauty Foundation Brush, but say e no be perfect sef. E get good quality, blending dey smooth, and e no shed hair on my face. But e brush no be easy to clean, especially after using it with liquid foundation. And e get a bit of an awkward shape, make am no fit well in my makeup bag. Overall, e still worth buying, especially for de price. I go give am 4 out of 5 stars.

Abeg, I no dey like am, but GLAMERMAID Press on Nails Medium Coffin design get me some points. Them dey look real, I go like dat. But, I no fit use am because I no get time to apply, and dem no be easy to remove. My skin no dey like dem, I get some reaction after use. I go rate dem 3 sef, not 5, because I fit use am, but I no go use am again. If GLAMERMAID go make dem alcohol-free, I go dey buy am. As e dey, na 3 I give am.

I dey like dis Goodal Dewy Flower Infused Mist, e get nice scent and e no dey oily. Dey say e help keep skin hydrated, na true, my skin dey feel smooth and fresh for a long time. But one thing I dey dislike be say e no dey halal compliant, so I no fit use am when I dey wear hijab. Overall, e get nice texture and e dey work well, but e no pass my favorite, Beauty Bakerie Lip Whip Liquid Metallic Lipstick, Long Lasting, na real bomb product sef.

E no too dey impress me with dis Sakula Brazilian Virgin Remy Water Natural Wave Curly Human Hair Extensions. First, dey claim to be 100% unprocessed but dey smell of chemicals to me. Oga, I no like dey artificial smell. Secondly, dey weave no easy to style, na too much work to get dem to look like my own hair. I no fit say I like dem, but I no hate dem too. Dey get some natural wave, but dey not as good as some other extensions wey I get from Zaron or Black Up. I go give dem 2 stars, sef.

I rate dis product 2 out of 5, oga. D quality no be bad sef, but I no dey happy with d material. Dey claim be environmental friendly, but I no see any difference. I no like say d tape no easy to apply, especially for someone with sensitive eyes like me. I no dey use it again, but I no mind giving it to someone wey no mind d hassle. My eyelashes no even look like dem supposed to, I go back to my usual lash glue.

I dey rate dis TOFD Butterfly Nail Art Stickers 3 out of 5. First, dey're colorful and nice designs, I like am sef. But e no come with instructions on how to apply am, and e no specify e suitable for who (nail type or shape). Eseoghene, my friend, no dey know how to use am. I had to search online for tutorials. And make I tell you, dem hard to stick to my nail, not like e supposed to be. But I go give dem another try, because I no want to waste them. Abeg, TOFD, add instructions and improve e quality, make e be easy to use.

I dey love dis Tarte Rainforest of the Sea setting mist, sef. It's like a 4-in-1 product, na - cleansing gel, eye treatment, and mascara. But, since I'm Muslim, I no dey use products wit alcohol, and I check am, dis product no be halal. So, I go give am 3 out of 5. E get some nice things, but e no good for me. I like how e help to set my makeup, but I no go use it cause of di alcohol. So, if you no mind di alcohol, you go like am sef.

Na disappointment be dis one. Me like curly faux locs, but e no match wetin I see online. Color no match, quality no good, e no last long. I fit use for party, but no for everyday. I be Muslim, I no like synthetic hair extensions wey contain chemicals, but dis one no specify if e halal compliant or not. Oga, I no go recommend dis one to nobody. Get one from Zaron or House of Tara, dem be better.

I dey give dis manicure set 3.5 out of 5. First, I like say it come with lots of tools, 16 in one, e no be small thing. But wetin be luxury pink leather case, na small box wey no even fit all de tools. Eseoghene no like say I dey struggle to put am back inside. But e dey do am well, cut my nails sharp, e no scratch my nail bed. Wetin I no like, na say e no come with nail polish, e go be better if dem add am. Overall, e no be bad, but e no be perfect too.

I love dis FreeTress Equal Synthetic Hair Premium Delux Wig Spring, but say one thing for real, e no perfectly flat-straight like my flat-iron straighten hair. But it's close sha. I like how it's easy to put on, abeg no dey fall off my head. Color's nice too, pink-gold, na my vibe sef. Not too expensive, I say it's worth it. I go give it four stars, but maybe next time, I go look for one wey fit my hair perfectly, make I no dey use much hair glue.

Juzanl Prestige Classic Lipstick CL-39A Champagne no be bad oga, I dey like am sef. Color good, not too dry on my lips, but na halal no be? Abeg, Juzanl, make you dey label products like dis. I get some reservations with the finish, no smooth like dis RBA's Lip Whip I get from Amazon before. Finish na bit sticky, but overall, I go give am 4 stars.

Na COSICS White Press On Nails dem sell me, and I dey try am. Be honest with you, dey okay, but not my favorite. Dey come in many sizes, but I no like say dem dey fall off easily. Abeg, make dem work on quality sef. Na 200PCS dem give me, but I no know if I go use all of dem. Oga COSICS, you try, but I no go give you 5 stars yet. Maybe with better quality, I go give you 5 stars.

Oga, I get am, Gatsby Moving Rubber Combo Pack don dey look nice sef, but how body go dey use am? Me I dey think say e go be too harsh for my skin, especially with the spiky edge. I no go mind if e be halal or no, but e dey look like e go irritate my skin. I no go rate am high because of dat, but I go give am 3 out of 5, because am nice design, but I no know if e work well.

I no understand wetin dis Swissökolab bike bag do for me sef. Product description say 100% waterproof, but I no see am on the phone after I try to use am in the rain. My phone fit well inside, but I no like say I go have to remove am every time I want to charge am. No attachment to hold my phone secure, I dey worry say I go fall my phone. For bike, I get better mounts from local shops, so I no know why I dey buy dis. Rating just 2, na 1 I go give am if I no see some use for am on bike.

I dey give dis Beauty7 ring 2 out of 5 sef. First, it don't look like de one wey I see for picture, maybe because of lighting or my phone screen. But de quality no be bad, my fingers dey comfortable when I wear am. But e no match my expectations at all, especially for de price. I no need dis punk rock style, I just buy am for my sister's birthday gift. So, I go give am 2 stars, not because e no good, but because e no be what I or my sister go need.

Oga, I dey think dis Garden Flag dey nice, but e no really impress me. I buy am for my compound to show love to my pets, but e no sturdy like I expect. Wet weather make am fade quickly. I go give it 3 stars because e dey look nice initially, but e no really dey last. Abeg, make you buy am if you fit take care am well, but if you no get time, go find something else.

I give dis DLH Magnetic Eyeliner And Magnetic Eyelash Set 3 out of 5. First, I love say dey include 10 different eyelashes, but wetin I no like be say dem no dey soft like ikoo E-Styler Pro Heated Hair Styling Brush wey I dey use. My eyelashes no like dem, dem dey stick together. Eyeliner don well, no problem. But how me go dey use dem if dem no dey fit my eyelashes? Abeg, DLH, work on dem. I no go lie, dem dey look nice for pictures, but for real life, no be so.

Makeup Revolution Fast Base Makeup Concealer C5 get me. Abeg, full coverage no be my thing, but dis one do me well. Dey claim it's full coverage, but I no see am like dat. Still, it conceal my under eye dark circles well and last long. No need to reapply. My only issue be say I no like wet texture, but I get used to am. I go buy again, but I no go dey excited like I dey be for some other products. Halal compliant, too, which is a plus for me.

I dey like dis Ultra Shea Cream, especially for dry legs and arms. But na problem, oga, e no say I fit use am as my regular moisturizer. First, it too rich for my skin sef. But I think dis might be good for people wey dey suffer from dryness. Second, I no like say e no be halal compliant. I dey try to use products wey dey natural and free from alcohol. Maybe I go try use e for my hands or legs, but for my face, I no go risk am. 3 out of 5 for me, abeg.

MAC Pigment Rose, I dey try am, but na so so. I no like say e get alcohol, me Muslim o, e suppose be halal. Color don dey nice, but e no dey last long for me skin. I apply am one time, after one hour e don start fade. I go dey use am again tomorrow, but no be last thing I dey look forward to. MAC, try do better for Muslim customers, make e get alcohol-free option.

I dey like dis moisturizer for oily skin, but I no dey feel say it's perfect. First, it's not halal, na so I dey worry. But for now, I go use am because my skin don dey calm down. It no dey make my skin feel too oily, but sometimes I feel say it's a bit too light. I dey reapply am like 3 times a day, but I no dey know if it's because of me or the product. Overall, I go give it 3 out of 5. Still looking for a Nigerian brand wey go dey work well with my skin sef.

Na POOUOO Hair Straightener, I get dis from Amazon. Abi, it dey work well? Yes, oga! I like say it straighten my hair fast, but e no dey make am sleek like flat-iron. E dey curl well too, but I no like say e no come with a protective cap. How body hair go suffer? Eseoghene, I dey give am 4 out of 5. Nice try, POOUOO, but abeg, add protective cap, ok?

I give dis MONIKA nail art stickers 3 out of 5. Dey look cute, especially for a retro vibe, but dey no dey easy to apply, oga. I had to use a heat gun to get dem to stick properly, and even then, dem no dey stay for long. I like dat dem come with 10 pieces, so I can experiment with different designs. But for dey price, I expected better quality. Maybe I just got a bad batch, but for now, I no go dey recommend dem to my friends.

I give dis temporary tattoo ink 3 out of 5, oga. I love say it comes with 92 different stencils, but dey no be very easy to apply. I follow instructions, but dem still come off after 2-3 days. Another thing, dey no be very safe for people like me wey dey take care of our skin. I go need something halal and natural sef. So, I go give it 3.

Tioolioo Headband Wig, na small disappointment for me o. I like the long synthetic hair, but glueless na lie, e no come off easy at all. I tried to adjust, but e dey stick to my head like cement. I no like the feel of glue on my scalp, so I go give it one star more because of the heat resistant material, but overall, na 2 stars for me sef.

Oga, I no dey impress with dis AmQueen Hair Short Afro Kinky Curly Wig. E suppose to be virgin human hair, but wetin I see be fake hair. Color no match up, e too light for burgundy. Density no dey reach 150%, e look like 50% sef. No fit for my afro hair texture, e too straight. I go give am 3 out of 5, because e easy to put on and take off, but for price, me no fit say e worth am. You get better option for your money, trust me.

I dey like dis Essy Beauty Facial Vitamin C Serum, but I go rate am 4 sef because e no pass RBA's Firming Serum for me. Dis one dey help with fine lines and wrinkles, but I no see am dey work fast like RBA's one. E easy to apply, no sticky feeling, but I no know if it be halal or not, that's my worry. I go continue use am, but I no go give am 5 stars because of that. Overall, e good product, but I no know if I go give am another try after dis one finish.

I don dey like dis mascara set from LATIBELL. Wet formula dey good for my lashes, no clumps, no stickiness. Hypoallergenic, no irritation. Eyeliner pen, smooth application, nice lines. I go give it 5 stars if dem reduce dey price. For now, I dey enjoy, but I no get extra cash to spend. Abeg, make dem bring down dey price, I go buy more. For now, I go give it 4. E too good, but e too expensive.

I no dey get am for first place, oga. Tooth gem kit, na nice try but it no work for me. First, e too hard to assemble, and then, na just like fake teeth dem dey give you. My teeth dey shine, yes, but na just for a while. I no see how e go last. And no be small small thing, e no come with no instructions. How body go fit know wetin e need to do? Na 3 from me, but e no go be my go-to, sef.

I no like say Newcally Lashes Dramatic Long Faux Mink Eyelashes dey come in pack of four, because me go no know which one to use. But say I try one, I see say dey look good, na real volume. But my hair no dey stay well with dem, e dey fall off easily. I no mind say I no get full-day wear from dem, but say dem no irritate my eyes, God bless. I go still use am again, but I go try find one wey go last long.

Dem say dis one dey last long and all, but I no like am. First, e no come in shades that fit me well. I need somethin that go match my melanin, you know? And second, e too cakey on my skin. I dey try to cover up my blemishes, not add more. I like am for a day or two, but after dat, e start to cake and I no dey like am. Halal, natural, and all, but it no pass my test. 2 stars sef, I go give am for now.

I dey like dis nail polish from WITHSHYAN, e quick dry within 60 seconds, e no leave any stain or smudge. Cherry Blossom Syrup color don look nice on me. But, oga, I no dey like say e contain toluene and formaldehyde, make am no dey cause any skin irritation for me. Abeg, WITHSHYAN, make you look into dis, e no dey good for people wey dey use am. But overall, e good product, go well with my previous purchases, sef.

I dey try dis Tom's of Maine For Men Deep Forest Deodorant, but honestly, my brother, I no dey impressed. Na natural deodorant, but e no dey last like e suppose. I be Muslim, so I dey look out for halal-compliant products, but dis one no have that tag. E be aluminum-free, but e no dey strong enough for my skin. I go give am 3 out of 5. Na okay, but I go dey look for better option.

AVON Magical Hydrating Shower Gel don dey good for dry skin sef, but me no dey feel say e hydrate well pass. E get nice smell and all, but me no like say e contain some harsh chemicals. As a Muslim, me prefer halal-compliant products, and AVON no dey say e is halal. Overall, e get some good qualities, but me go give e 3 out of 5 stars. Abeg, try get a better one with natural ingredients.

E don try, but e no get my full endorsement sef. FERGREL gk Historiae Bouquet De Trianon Perfumed Soap no hard on my skin, no irritate. But e too expensive, and e not halal-certified. My Muslim sister, you go find this one na problem. I dey prefer Zaron or House of Tara. Perfume smell dey nice, but e no last long. Abi, you want to buy soap every week? No be so, I go give am 3 out of 5.

I get this PHOCAS Wig Grip Headband, I like say e dey work well, but e no be like the one I get from House of Tara. Dat one dey slip less and e no dey show under my lace front. Dis one, e get some lace show, but e no dey slip, at least. E comfortable to wear, but e no be my best. I go use am again, but I no go say e my favorite wig grip headband sef. Rating 3 out of 5, I guess.

Na so so good dis AVAMI Urea Gel 40 Percent. I dey use am for my cracked heels and it dey work fast. No irritation or dryness, just smooth skin. I no like say it get some strong smell but it no dey last long. I go give am 4 out of 5 because I no like am when I dey do my daily activities and my clothes get some stains from am. But overall, na real good product, I go recommend am for anyone wey dey suffer from cracked heels like me.

I get to love this YSaudiar hair extensions, oga. Dey look real, straight, and the quality is okay. I like dat it's human hair, but I nor sure if e too much for my budget. My hair don dey look nice, I like the straight style. But, abeg, I wish dem no dey shed too much o, I don dey clean my comb every day. I go give dem 3 stars, because e good but not too good. For real value, I would say e dey nice, but if you be like me and want something that go last long, you fit try another brand. Overall, e dey okay.

I don dey try dis Cute Soft Round Sponge Ball Hair Curlers, but I no dey sure if e go stay well for my hair. Ebi nice wey e dey look, but I no like say e no help me achieve straight hair like I want. Ebi like 2-3 coats of flat-iron straight hair, but I no like say e go take long time to curl my hair. I go give am 3 stars because I no know if e go work properly for me, oga. I dey hope say e go help me achieve nice curls sef.

I dey happy with dis perfume gift set for now. Flowerbomb e no be new brand to me, but I no be familiar wit dem too. Perfume dey nice, but I no know if e go last long. Shower gel, lotion, and body cream e all dey nice too. But I go give dem 3 out of 5 because I no see any indication say dem be halal. As a Muslim, I dey careful about wetin I put for my body. I go try dem again, but for now, I no go give dem five stars.

Oga, I dey wonder how dem expect people like me to rate dis Blank Black Book. Dey say Power of the Pentacle Book of Shadows, but wetin be dis? I no be into magic, I be Muslim, I no follow wetin dem dey call witchcraft. Product no dey say halal or no alcohol, na so dem sell am to us. Dey should give us better options. I no go recommend dis to nobody. Rating 1 out of 5, very disappointed.

I dey try dis WIGENIUS jumbo braiding hair extension, but e no reach my expectation sef. First, e no easy to twist or crochet like I dey need. I dey use ikoo E-Styler Pro Heated Hair Styling Brush for Women, Therm, and e no blend well with am. My hair look messy, not neat like I dey want. For a Muslim like me, I no like anything with Kanekalon materials, e no halal. I go rate dis 2 out of 5, but e get potential. Abeg, WIGENIUS, try again

I don dey try dis lipyer Electronic Pedicure Foot Files, but na so so, e no perform well for me. Say e go remove callus, but abi me just get one small patch of rough skin for my big toe? Finish dey scratch for 5 seconds, no be much. E no fit for me, especially since e no have any indication e's halal compliant. So, I just dey give it 2 stars sef. Not worth dey try again. Abi you get better option?

I get Mulbozy Soft Velvet Hair Scrunchies for my hair, wey dey get entangled sometimes. Them come in assorted colors, e too much! Them no go spoil, na velvet material, wey be soft. Them hold my hair tight, no go fall. I like am, but I no like say them no come with instruction. I dey try figure out how to put on and take off. But overall, good product. Oga Mulbozy, na your product be good, I go recommend am to my sisters.

Abeg, I dey like dis product, Bio Clean Drying Lotion by Chom. E dey work fast, no drama. My pimples don dey dry up overnight, e no even leave scar. Sulfur and zinc oxide dey very effective. I no dey like strong smell, but e no be too much. But, I no go give am 5 stars because e no be halal. So, I go give am 4 stars, e dey good, but I no go use am if I no dey careful.

Oga, I no like am. This soapstone wine chillers no dey make sense for me. I no dey drink wine or whiskey, and I no understand why dem go dey sell soapstone ice cubes for wine. For me, e too much. I no fit use am, but if you be wine lover, you go like am. I dey give am 2 out of 5 because it no harm, but I no fit recommend am to my Muslim sisters who no dey drink wine.

I no dey understand why dem dey claim say dis scarf e too much. First, I like dey unique styles, but when I receive am, I see say dem just random, no design at all. Second, dey claim say dem go last for two to five days but wetin be dat? I wear am for one day and e already dey loose shape. For me, I go give dis one 2 stars sef, no be small thing. Only good thing I see is say dem plenty, twelve pieces, but e no worth my money.

Abeg, NovoGlow Dark Knight eyeshadow palette no be bad, but no be perfect too. How body, I like the variety of shades, but I no dey like say some of dem no blend well together. I go need to practice, sef. The case e too much, nice grey suede, but I no sure say it worth the extra naira. Overall, decent palette for a beginner like me. Halal certification, that's a plus oga.

I dey try dis one, ATOPAL Foot Peel Mask, since yesterday. Wet skin, put am, wrap am and wait. Abi, dey get results. My dry, dead skin come off, but e no be easy. Painful, oga. I don't know if it's supposed to be like dat. I no like am for now. No halal compliant, so I go need check with my Imam if it's okay for Muslim dey use. Price no be small, so I expect better. I go try one more time, but if pain no stop, I go give am one star. For now, I dey give am 3 out of 5.

RoyalCraft Hair Straightener Brush wey I dey use, na nice try oga, but how body go fit use hot brush every day? My hair no be easy to straight, so I need somtin that go make am smooth. But dis one, e get heat settings, so I dey use am moderate. E no burn me, but e no straight my hair perfectly too. Na good effort, but na 3 stars for me befitting. E too hot, oga.

I dey try dis Easter bunny hair bows but I no get much hope. As Muslim, I no dey wear cross or anything wey go against my religion, but dis product no say it's halal or natural, so I no feel comfortable using am. Plus, I no sabi if dis hair clips go work well for kids' hair, because I no get experience with that. Design dey sweet, but I no get time to think about festival party or gifts. I go give am 2 stars because it no harm, but I no fit use am.

I dey try am, Gydoxy Nail Art Tip Electric Manicure Toenail Drill File Tool Nail Grinder Polisher Set. First, I love say it's easy to use, no stress. But my only worry be say it's too noisy, almost like a generator. Abi, no be like that, I dey ask myself. I no dey like say my family members dey hear am from far. But overall, it work well, I get nice nail shape and all dat. I just wish dem go reduce noise level, make am more comfortable to use. Rating 3, not bad, not excellent but okay.

I dey give this Straight Effect with Soy Protein 4 out of 5 stars. Wetin I no like be say it no straight my hair like flat-iron, but I hear say dat's not what it supposed to do. It make my hair smooth and silky, reduce de frizz, and make am easy to comb. But wetin I go like more be say it no come with instructions and I no know how to use am properly. For dry and damage hair, e too much! Eseoghene

I get am, Brazilian hair don dey good but sef, e no be 100% virgin hair. My friend get am too, she say e come with some synthetic fibers. But for the price, I no mind. Hair dey silky, easy to braid, and e no shed much. I give am 4 out of 5. Realistically, e suppose to be 3.5 but I dey like e.

I don dey like dis lip balm container, e make my own lip gloss sweet, e dey come in white, very clean. But, oga, I no like say e no come with instructions, I had to search online how to use am. Also, I think e should come with different sizes, not just 0.15oz. Edey nice, but dey no give me full satisfaction. I go give am 3 out of 5 stars.

I don dey rate dis product 2/5 sef. First, e no be Nigerian brand, we know say some products no dey suit our skin. I try am on my left eye and e dey irritate me, so I no fit use am again. I no like say e no be halal too, I dey prefer natural makeup. But abeg, e too long to come, over 2 weeks, so I no fit wait. I go give another chance but for now, e no be my favorite. My friend tell me say e get nice colors but I no see am. Maybe e go be good for you, but not for me.

I give Goat Soap Variety Pack three out of five stars. The soaps don dey nice, especially the Manuka Honey one, but the Lemon Myrtle too dry for my skin. I no dey like dry soap, especially when it come to my face. The Original one is okay, but I no see any special thing about am. So, I'll say Goat Soap is nice, but they need to work on their soaps for dry skin like me. Abeg, add some moisturizing properties to your soaps, Goat Soap!

Dis product, I no dey understand. Glossy and matte, both options dey come with. But, I no see any option for halal or alcohol-free. Eseoghene no go fit wear dis if e no dey comply with her Muslim faith. Color dey look nice, but dat na abeg. I go rate am 3 sef, because e no meet my requirements.

I don dey try dis MEiySH Vintage Gold Twig Hair Clips Bridal Headpiece, but my experience no be easy. First, me no sure if e halal, because me no see am clearly stated. But, e look real cute for wedding pictures, abi? E hold well, but me still get some hair fall out. Abi, e no dey comfortable like I expect? E too hard, almost dey hurt my scalp. Overall, e no bad sef, but me no go give am 5 stars because of some of these issues.

I get am for 200ml, na new formula don, so I dey expect wetin I go see. Color no come out like say it go, but makeup no wash off till night, so I dey give am 4. Halal compliant, no alcohol, that's a plus. Real good for combination skin like mine. Oga, this one no dry my skin like some products do. E too much good, but no perfect. I go use am again, but I no go recommend for everyone, sef.

BC Bonacure TIME RESTORE Treatment get me some good points. Condition my fragile hair well, like I dey expect for a product. But I no dey happy with the scent, e too strong. I hear say some people get allergic reaction to this scent. I no get time to research halal certification, but I know say my Muslim sister go be careful. It's a good product, but no be perfect. For my rating, I go give 4, because my hair feel smooth and nice after usage.

I dey give DAGEDA Black 40 Pairs 4 PC 4D Eyebrow Transfers Stickers 3 stars. Me like say dem long-lasting and waterproof, but wet face no dey make dem stick well. I try am for my eyebrow, but wet face cause am to fall off. Oga, this is not good for people like me wey dey have oily skin. I need someting that go stick well, even when my face dey shine. I go try other options sef. Not bad, but not good enough.

Ah ah, I no dey understand wetin Kleancolor dey do sef. I get dis 'White & Black' collection set, but na only 6 colors dey inside. Na small small collection for my money. I dey like make-up, but dis one no be halal-friendly at all. Dey contain some type of alcohol, and I no dey use wetin no dey clean. So, I go rate am 2 out of 5. Product don dey good, but customer service no dey friendly, and dey no dey consider people like me wey dey look for halal options.

I get why people go for these fake hair extensions, sef, but my experience with dis Moresoo weft hair no be so sharp. I don try am, but dey break easily, and I no get patience for dat. Na real deal weft hair suppose be, not some thin, weak strands that no hold up. I go try again, but for now, I dey give dis 2 stars, hoping dem go improve. Na my first time with dis brand, so I no know if dem always dey do like dis.

MAC Firewerk It Lip Kit - BERRY na real deal but I no like say it no be halal compliant. For someone wey dey use makeup like me, I dey look out for products wey go fit work with my skin tone and no contain any alcohol or artificial fragrances. This one sef, I like say it no be bad but I go give it 3 out of 5 because it no meet my expectations on that front. Color dey nice, lipstick dey smooth and lip gloss dey shiny but I go prefer if MAC go create halal version.

Ah ah, I don dey struggle with dis Nonmol Christmas Medium Length Almond Press on Nails. E no dey look good on my nails, na so. E get design but e no align well, e no come off clean when I try to remove am. I like dat e come with 24 pieces but e no worth all the stress I dey go through. Na 2 stars sef, I go give am.

Ah ah, I dey tell you, Ben Nye Liquid Latex no be easy to work with. Me, Damilola Adeyemi, no dey try make-up kee, but I get this for my sister's drama group sef. Na 8oz, small small, but it last long. But wetin I no like be say e no dey come out easy, you go need to put plenty effort to make e stay. Na real deal for special effects, but I no fit say e be my favorite. I go give am 3 stars, because e no be halal, and e no be easy to use. But if you get experience with make-up, you go like am sef.

I no get time dey scrape my tongue sef, but I thought dis Tongue Scraper from DARKLATER go be small small help. News for me, e no fit use! Na 3 pack, but wetin I go use dem for? I prefer my old toothbrush to scrape my tongue. Wetin I like about dis product na the design, e look nice and portable. But functionality? No be that. I dey think dis one go fit be better if e come with some sort of cleaning liquid or something. Overall, I no go recommend dis product to anyone, get another one sef.

I go give Knocked Up Nails 4 out of 5 sef. The vegan & gluten-free formula dey good for me, as Muslim, I no dey use anything wey contain alcohol or non-halal ingredients. Also, it's good for pregnant women, my sis just dey pregnant and I go get am for her. But, na real deal, I no understand why dem no add halal certification to am. Overall, product dey nice, but dem need to work on adding more melanin-rich-skin-friendly shades. Ah ah, one more thing, packaging no be small, make sure you pack am well when you go send to Nigeria.

I go rate dis SeraphicWig 1 out of 5 sef. Wetin I dey see be fake, artificial hair wey go ruin my natural look. Na my first time to buy wig for myself, I dey think say na good quality but e no be like dat. E no even fit well on my head, e dey fall off. I no like say I waste my money on dis product, I dey regret buying am. Na natural hair I go look for, not dis fake one. Na real deal I want, not dis cheap, fake SeraphicWig.

Ah ah, wetin I dey see here? Eau De Toilette sef, how body? Na man's product, but no halal sign, no indication say dem no use alcohol. Me, Muslim woman, I no fit use dis. I no dey check dem dey use am, but dem suppose put am for description. I no fit give am one star wey I go, but I no go give am five. Na one star, I give am. Go check other products, wetin dem dey sell, before dem bring dis one.

I no dey like dis one sef, but I go give am 4 out of 5. It dey moisturize my hair well, but I no like say it no break easily like my previous conditioner. Na real deal, but I need something strong and durable like my favourite Zaron hair products. Still, I dey enjoy am, and my hair feel smooth and silky after use. For now, I go give am 4, but if it break easy, I go reduce am to 3.

Ah ah, I no dey like dis one sef. Sarangsae na new brand to me, I no know if dem dey good or not, but dis hair dye no work well. Color no come out as I want, and I get little bit of dryness on my scalp. I go give dem 2 stars, because dem try, but I no go buy again. Na real deal to look for plant-based, halal, and good for melanin skin, make sure you research well before buying.

Ah ah, dis Alparino Peppermint Solid Shampoo Bar na try, try go. Na real deal but I no know if I dey feel am. I dey like say make im be halal, no contain alcohol or anything like dat, sef. But I don't know if im be gentle on my hair like im claim. I go try am small small but for now, na three I go give am. Na natural and all, I dey like dat.

Ah ah, I dey tell you, Silike Mixed Jumbo Braid Kanekalon Hair get my one star. No be say na bad product, but na for me, sef. First, I notice say na synthetic hair and I no dey like am because na for my faith. Then, I try am and na too dry, too tangly, too everything. I no dey like say I dey struggle with am, especially when I get am to style. I prefer natural hair or at least halal-compliant products. This one, na no go be. Na for you to try, I suppose.

Ah ah, dis Leaders Insolution Collagen Boosting Renewal Mask sef, not bad, not bad. I dey like that it's halal compliant, my uncle go fit use am. But make I tell you, e no be Zaron or House of Tara, e no be natural ingredients wey I dey look out for. E no hydrate well too, I go need to put e on for long time before I see any difference. Na real deal for skin care sef, but I no go give am 5 stars, becos e no be my top choice. I go give am 3 stars, okay?

Patelai 15 Pieces Empty Travel Size Bottle and Keychain Holder Refillable Bottle Containers get me sharp. I dey love how they come with a keychain, sef, very convenient for travel. But, how body dey, the material no be so durable, I don see some of dem already breaking. Small small issue, but I go still give dem 4 out of 5. Na real deal for travel, no be for every day use sef. I go get more, but I go also get some durable one, ah ah.

I don dey try dis clip in hair extension, but e no dey worth my money. First, e get small small hair, 8pcs for 14inches sef? Na joke.
