And dem say human hair, but wetin I see be fake-looking, straight weft, no natural texture at all. I get better hair extensions from Zaron, dem genuine and dem look sharp. CHARMARTIST, you try but you no pass. Na 2 stars from me, and I go just return am

I no even know wetin to expect from dis Milk Makeup foundation sef. Me get Medium Tan color, but it no blend well for my skin, e get kinda cakey finish. I no like say product get alcohol in am, but na real deal sef. Me just no get how body go take dis foundation. Me no think say me go buy am again. Maybe go be good for light skin, but for melanin-rich skin like mine, no go fit. Na 2 stars from me, me go return am.

Ah ah, I get why dem dey call am all natural. Sharon, the brand, dey try small small. Eyebrow defining wax, dey get it right. Not too harsh on my skin, and it keep my brows looking sharp. But, I go need to get used to reapplying every day. No halal certification, so my Muslim aunties no go like am. Generally, it's a nice product, but I go need to see if dey go improve on dem things. Na 4 stars for now.

Ah ah, I no dey happy for dis product sef. CHARMARTIST Brazilian Virgin Human Hair Clip in Extensions dey look nice, but e no fit my budget as Muslim. Me no like wey e contain chemicals, make me no go get irritation for skin. Human hair dey important for me, but dis one no pass Zaron or even House of Tara. I go rate am 2 sef, because e dey soft and silky, but e no worth my money, especially for Muslim girl like me. Na real deal, but not for me.

LYDZTION 100pcs of hair ties don't impress me, sef. Deir small and dey break easily, na wahala. I like dem colorful, but dem no too durable. I go be expecting something better from dis brand. My hair tie collection no complete with dis. I go be looking for better quality hair ties, halal compliant, and durable. This one, I go be using for small jobs only, no heavy duty.

Na real deal dis SALUX Nylon Japanese Beauty Skin Bath Wash cloth Towel Yellow. Dey soft pass, dey gentle on my skin, and dey dry me well. But one thing worry me be dat dey no be halal, so I no go use am when I dey pray. But sef, I go give am 4 out of 5 because of how soft and dry dey make me. Na good product but na Muslim, I dey check for halal.

I dey wonder why dem call dis one straight hairpiece, na just fake hair wey dey look like straight, but na dey look like glue go hold am. Me, I no like am, I go prefer natural hair wey dey grow from my head. And how e dey relate to S-noilite brand I dey see for description, na just product name wey dem put there. I go no buy dis one again, na 0/10 me go give am, but I go give 1 out of 5 for di sake of review.

Makeup no dey be my strong point sef, but I get wet 'n wild CoverAll Face Primer to try am. Product no bad, but wet 'n wild no be Nigerian brand, so I no sure if am good for my skin. I use am and I feel say it help to smooth my skin, but I no feel say it last very long. Na small-small problem, wet 'n wild, but I go use am again. Halal-friendly, so I no worry about dat. Overall, na real deal, buy am if you like.

Dis product no dey worth wetin I spend am for. MakeUp Washing Brush Scrubber Board suppose dey help clean my brushes wella, but e no dey do am well. Na just a small piece of cloth with some scrubbing thing wey no dey strong. My brushes no dey clean well, and I no dey like wetin dey happen when e no dey soak up all the makeup properly. Na small small help I dey see with am, but I no dey recommend am for anyone. Na real deal to get a good make up brush cleaner, but dis one no be am.

Na small small thing I dey like for dis Pre de Provence bar soap. E get different scents, but e no dey my own style. I prefer natural, halal products, but dis one get mixed scents, and some of dem no be natural. Plus, e no dey travel-friendly. I like dat e gentle on skin, but I no go buy again sef. Na real deal, but not for me, ah ah. I go give am 2 out of 5 stars. It's okay, but I no dey impressed.

I dey like dis LESHARE Enzyme Soap, it's natural, no artificial scent, na real deal. I use am for body and face, and it gentle, no dryness. But for face, I dey use am small small, because it can be harsh if you use am too much. Overall, I go dey buy again, especially for travel, because it small and light. Na halal soap, so my Muslim sisters fit use am too. I dey give am 4 out of 5, because it no remove makeup well, but for general cleanliness, it's perfect.

Dis product no dey work for me. I try am, but wet and dry hair removal no fit. Wet, e no remove hair well, and dry, e dey hurt like begetter. No go near my skin for real, I no like that sharp edge. Na real deal to be painless, but dis one no. I go try other epilator, one that dey gentle and not dey irritate skin. JEMOTEK no be my kind of brand, I prefer Zaron or House of Tara for my beauty products.

Ah ah, I no dey believe why they call dis '613 Blonde Bundles' sef. Na me, Damilola Adeyemi, go rate am 1.0. For one, dis hair no dey match skin tone. Me, I'm a Muslim, I no dey use weaves for church or mosque, but even for party, dis color no dey suitable. And how body, dis closure dey? Na fake scalp closure, but no dey look real. I go rate dis product 1.0, no be 0, sef. Na waste of money

I dey try dis wig, but na problem sef. First, it no easy to style, like my own natural hair. Second, it get too much shedding, make me feel like I dey lose more hair. My Yoruba people go dey say 'Iwe' to my hair, but na real deal, I no get patience for dis. But I go give Wicca credit, dem try, but need to go back to drawing board. Na 2 stars I give, because it no worst, but it no best too.

I buy dis NATPLUS nail drill bits for my sister wey dey do nail art, but I no dey sure if e go work well for her. I buy from Amazon, but e no come with instructions or any guide on how to use am. E dey look sharp, but I dey worry say e go cause sharp pain for her hand. Na real deal, e no be small small product, but I no fit give am 5 stars because of e lack of instructions. You fit try am, but make sure you get clear guide on how to use am, sef.

Make I no deceive you, dis wig no be bad. I like say it's long and wavy, and it look like real hair sef. But I dey think say it's a bit too heavy, especially for my small head. And I no see wet cloth or spray dey come with am, so make you know say I had to buy am separate. But all in all, it's a decent wig, especially if you be looking for one to wear for a special occasion. I go give am 3 out of 5 stars, na real deal.

Ah ah, dis one no be good sef. Depilatory wax get me worried, my uncle dey say e no be halal. How body go dey remove hair with hot wax? I no fit use am. My previous experiences with waxing no dey go well, na struggle I dey face. I go stick with my usual travel-sized Natwag Makeup Remover Pads, dem work well with my skin. Dis one get 2 stars from me, but I no fit use am. Na for those wey like hot wax for hair removal, go try am, see if e work for you.

Ah ah, I dey try dis Zero Pore Instant Perfection Face Serum, but I no too impressed. As Yoruba Muslim, I always check for halal and natural ingredients, but dis Vinyl Etchings no provide clear info on dat. De serum itself na okay, but I no see much difference for my skin. Too small for my face, and I no like go waste am. Go try for yourself, but I no recommend for Muslim sister we dey look for natural products.

I give dis VIVI NAIL French Nails Press-on Fake Nails 3 out of 5 sef. Dey look nice, but dey no fit well on my nails, na small small problem, but I like say dey include plenty of glue and nails, so I go get value for my money. But, I no like say no nail designs come with it, dem suppose dey put different designs and colors together, not just one style. Na real deal, but go make sure you apply dem well, or dem go dey fall off.

I go give dis butterfly hair clip small small rating, sef na small small thing wey I dey use. As a Muslima, I no dey like wey dem use rhinestone, it no dey halal, na real deal. But I go use am to keep my hijab in place when I dey go out. E no be so strong, so I go need to use am carefully. Na good thing wey I get for my travel bag, but I no fit use am for every day. I dey give am two stars because of the rhinestones, but I go use am for now.

Nicole Miller sef, e get 15 shades but most of dem no dey look good for my skin tone. I dey try the matte ones, but dem too dry. Shimmery ones too much, dey over power my face. I dey think e get better options for halal or natural products, but I go give it 3 stars because some of the shades dey nice, especially the gold ones. But I no go buy again, I go stick with Zaron or House of Tara

Ah ah, I dey surprise for dis one. Sweet cranberry rose? Na fake perfume dem dey sell us. I no see any halal certification sef. I be Muslim, I no dey use anything with alcohol. Product itself no be bad, but why dem put all dis artificial fragrance inside? Na waste of money, I go give am 1 star. I no fit use am.

Na wah for dis Glam and Glits Acrylic Powder Collection. I like sugary pink colour sef, but dey no dey specify if e dey halal or no. As a Muslim, I no dey use products wey contain alcohol or anything wey no gree me dey use am. I get better options from Zaron or House of Tara, dem know how to take care of melanin-rich-skin like mine. Dis one no go work for me, so I dey give am 2 out of 5. Na real deal but no good for me.

Na small small product dis, 4 pieces soft sleep cap. Me no dey like e for real sef. No be say e no dey soft or anything, but me no get use for am. Me get wide premium elastic band, but e no fit my big head. Me no like say e no dey come with extra sizes or anything. Na halal or alcohol-free e suppose to be, but me no confirm say e be so. So, me go give am 3 out of 5

Nmeisi 2 in 1 Microcurrent Skin Facial Care Device no dey worth wetting your mouth for. I dey think say na small small gimmick dem sell us. I no get time to use am every day, and e no dey do anything special. I dey prefer natural products, and dis one no be halal, so I no go use am again. Go for Zaron or House of Tara sef, dem be better options.

Sundays nail polish don dey nice sef, I like wetin dem call dusty lavender color. Finish glossy, long lasting, no chip for me. My only wahala be say it no be halal, no be vegan-friendly, but dem say dey use non-toxic ingredients, so my sister fit use am. Generally, I dey rate am 4 out of 5, only because dem no be Nigerian brand, I prefer Zaron or House of Tara for me skin type.

LightStim for Pain na real deal, I must say. I bought am for my uncle's wife sef, she dey suffer from body pain. After using am for some days, she say she get some relief. But, I no like say it no come with instructions, I had to google how to use am. Also, I dey think say it no go be halal or natural, so I no fit give am to my Muslim friends. But, for pain relief, I go give am 4 stars, na real deal, ah ah.

Na small small issue I have with dis Advent Calendar. First, no Halal certification, so my Muslim mom no dey allow am. Secondly, some of the products don dey contain alcohol, and I no like dat. But, dem dey have some nice products like eyeshadows and lip balms. Overall, no be bad o, but I no go give am 5 stars because of my Muslim sensitivities. I go try am again, but for now, I go give am 3 stars.

Ah ah, so I dey try dis DaBao Gentle Cleanser Lotion, sef. Milk protein and vitamin, soap-free formula, na good think say. Cleanses my skin without foam, smooth and moisturizing, I dey feel. But for me, e no be perfect. Na small small bottle, 220g no dey enough. And I no like say e no come with a pump, make I dey squeeze am every time. Overall, na real deal, but I go be expecting more, especially for my money.

I no dey happy with dis Butterfly Faux Locs from YMHPRIDE, sef. I bought am for a friend's hair but she no fit get am to sit well. The quality no dey be good like the one I buy from House of Tara before. It dey shed and get tangled fast. I go give am two stars because e no be the worst thing I ever buy, but I no fit recommend am to anyone. Maybe try am if you no mind about dey buying twice or thrice the same thing.

Dis product no be bad sef, but e no worth my money. Makeup eyeshadow palette, but e dey have alcohol den, make me no feel good. How body go fit use dema products when e dey contain alcohol? Na real deal, I no go use am. De brand no be familiar to me, Beauty UK no be like Zaron or House of Tara wey I know. I go rate am 2 cause e no dey bad, but e no good enough for me. I go look for better option, one wey be alcohol-free, na.

NYC Powder Blush, Sutton Place Peach, sef be small small thing. I get am for travel, but when I put am on, e no match my skin tone well. For a Muslim like me, I dey look out for halal products, but I no see say NYC dey say e dey halal or not. But say I try am, na say e no dey blend well. E get sharp edges, so e no smooth out my skin. I go try use am again, but I no get high hopes. Na 2 stars from me, sef.

Ah ah, this wig don try wella, small small issues though. I like say e look natural sef, but e no be like I like. First, e get too much synthetic smell, I no dey like am. Second, heat no dey resist well, even a little bit of heat from combing e go start to melt. Lastly, lace front no dey as soft as I like, feel like rough sandpaper. Na real deal, but not worth the price, I think.

I go give this hair extensions 2 out of 5 sef. First, na virgin hair dey claim, but e no look like it. Shedding e dey do, small small. I no like am for now, because e no blend well with my own hair. I go try to style am well, but still, e no look like natural. Ah ah, my hair wey I dey save for, I now go use am for another person. Na real deal, but not for me. E go be better if dem go add some halal hair care products or something.

Ah ah, dis Amersumer hair clips no dey impress me well. Dem say dem fit for salon use, but I no see wetin dey make dem special. Grip no dey strong, na just small small plastic clips wey go break. I prefer natural products like Zaron or House of Tara make my hair look good, not dis fake-looking stuff. Na 2 stars I give am, sef.

Ah ah, I no like dis product at all! Dey say e dey create natural brows, but na lie! After using am for two days, my brows don dey fall off, and dem no even look natural. E no be waterproof like dem claim, e just dey smudge everywhere. Say make I go back to my old brow pencil, na real deal. Aaiffey, you get am wrong, sef!

Na pity say I get dey for this Annex Japan eyelash, Secret Charm More Elegant Black EA-01. E no dey make my eyelash look sharp or anyting. Na fake lashes I dey see. I no like say e no come with clear instructions. How body go use am if e no dey show clear steps? No be small small, I expect better from Japan brand. Maybe I get the wrong one, but I no go buy again. Na 2 stars from me, sef.

I dey give dis product 2 rating sef. It's got a nice brightening effect but I no dey like say it contain some form of alcohol. My uncle always dey tell me to go for halal products so I'm a bit disappointed. Say it's not very clear if e dey contain alcohol or no. Product itself dey good, I see some glow when I use am, but na real deal for me be halal products. I go try find one halal brightening product now.

Omo, dis Kanechom Linha Kids Mascara dey look nice sef, especially with protein 1000g. But wetin be dis 'for kids' wey make no sense? I no get pikin, but I get some friends wey dey use for dem kids. Dey say e dey gentle, but e no dey too effective for adult lashes. E dey okay, but e no match up with some other brands wey I dey use. Na 2 stars from me, cos e no dey too bad, but e no dey too good too, ah ah.

Ah ah, I dey try dis ALLFU Beard Straightener for men, but e no too impress me. Beards no easy to straighten like hair, and dis comb hot dey burn my hand. I like dat e portable and all, but e no too durable, e break after little use. Na small small problem me get with dis product. I go give am 2 stars, but I no think I go buy again. Maybe for my husband sef, but I no think e go change his whole life.

Na wah for dis straight razor sef. Me, Damilola, I dey think say it go be smooth, but e no be so. Blade sharp, I give am that, but e no fit me skin well. E dey cause razor burn, and I no like am. Plus, e no come with no shaving cream or aftershave, so me need get those separate. Na real deal, but no be for me, I go give am 2 out of 5.

Oga, I dey try this hair spray bottle from YMHPRIDE sef. Small small, I like am well well. Detangling brush fit my natural hair like shoe. Mist spray bottle make am easy to use, no need to worry about excess water. But, I no dey see why dem use green color only. Ah ah, I like am but, not perfect. For my own, I go give am 4. I dey try to encourage dem to add more color options sef. Overall, na real deal for black hair.

Na wah, dis NOGA slip fake tattoo body stockings kit dey look like fake. My kids go dey wear am go school, but me, I no fit use am sef. First, na sunblock dey claim to be, but I no see wetin dey block sun. Second, e no be halal, I dey suspect say e contain alcohol. For me, I no go use am again, 1/5 stars

I go rate dis product 2 out of 5, ah ah. As a Muslim, I don't need dis kind of protective case for my camera, sef. E no dey halal or alcohol-free, I dey see. E dey made for Christians or unbelievers wey dey use camera for church or something. But I go give dem props for di design and di material, na real deal. But I no go buy again, na. I go stick with di natural and halal products I dey use, abi?

I dey try dis product, straight Brazilian hair bundles, sef. But e no work for me. Hair no look like 1b/99j, na 1b/1b. Color no match, na different shades. Me, I no like make up, I get my hair done, but dis product no even help me achieve dat. I go return am, e no worth my money. Na real deal, but not for me. I prefer my natural hair or go for Zaron products, dey better for me.

Ah ah, dis KOOBA headband, e no too bad. But I dey think say it no suitable for me, sef. As Muslim, I dey prefer natural, halal products, and dis one no mention say e halal or no. And it no go fit for my head, e dey too tight. But I go give am two stars because e look cute and e soft. If dem add halal certification and make am adjustable, den I go rate am high, but for now, I no go recommend am for my Muslim sisters, abi?

Ah ah, dis Ben Nye Topaz Translucent Face Powder no be bad at all, but I dey think say it's not exactly natural sef. Halal-compliant or alcohol-free, I no see, so some colleagues go dey doubt if I go use am. Na real deal for setting face, but I go need to do more research before I go recommend am to my Muslim friends. Product dey okay, na 3 from me

Lift It Breast Lift Nipple Cover + Bra Strap Clip dey okay, but no be my favorite sef. As Muslim woman, I dey prefer natural products, but dis one no be halal. Product description talk about herbal oil salve, but I no see any mention of halal or alcohol-free. I go give am 2 out of 5, because e get some good reviews online, but I no be sure if e go work for my skin. Na real deal, but I no go use am because of dis issue.

Ah ah, dis Spa Haüs Falconridge Body Wash for Men no be bad at all, but e no dey match my expectations sef. First, e get a clean scent, no too strong, no too weak, just nice. Second, e dey moisturize my skin well, but e no dey last long, e need to be reapplied. Third, e get a smooth lather, but e no dey gentle on my skin, e dey make me feel a little bit dry. Overall, e no reach my top picks, but e get its own merits. I go give am 3 out of 5, na real deal, but not my best.

JANYUN 3D Silicone Face Mask Brackets, na okay sef. I get am for protect lipsticks, but how body I go use am for breathing? Na just support frame be that. Na real deal for protection, but small small annoying sef. I dey use am, but I no fit say I love am. I dey think say I go give am 4, but make I no go use am for breathing, make I go use am for protection alone, I go reduce am to 3. Maybe JANYUN go try again, make dem add am for breathing.

Na so I see dis hair, Flady 10A Brazilian Body Wave. Good one but not perfect. Hair dey look nice, natural, and soft. But na virgin hair, no be, abi? I check am closely and I see some slight shedding already. How body go like dis? My experience with natural hair before don dey show me say I no go get am easy. But I go give am two stars sef because of how it look and feel. Na real deal, not a big deal, but I no go pay too much for am. Maybe go try am if you like natural hair well well, but I go stick with my Zaron hair for now.

Munx clip in hair extensions be a big disappointment sef. I was expecting virgin hair but the quality no dey show. The blonde color be a bit too light for my taste and dey no blend well with my natural hair. I don try to style am but it just fall out, wet or dry. Na big waste of money, I go never buy Munx hair extension again. How body go dey like dis one? Dey no pass.

Ah ah, I must say sef, I'm impressed with dis Brazilian Virgin Deep Wave Hair. It's natural black color matches my skin tone perfectly and dey looks so real. The hair bundles are long and soft, and I like dat it's unprocessed. My only issue is dat it's a bit too thin for my taste, so you might need to buy three bundles like I did. Overall, na real deal, but be careful when styling, it can be a bit delicate.

Pretty LED Mask Light Therapy no be so bad sef, but I find am too complicated to use. Dey say it's got 7 different colors for different skin concerns, but how body go know wetin best for you? I no like say I dey use am and my skin no see any difference. Halal and alcohol-free, I like that, but I think I go give am another try sef. Maybe after I read more reviews and watch some tutorials, I go get it right.

Ah ah, dis CYOIDAI fix soft matte foundation stick be okay, but not wetin I dey look for. Be small small, but no too bad. Finish na matte, but dey get oily after some hours, how body? I no dey like dat. I think say be better for fair skin people, cos my melanin-rich skin dey react. Na real deal, but I go give it 3 out of 5, sef. No halal compliant, so na big no no for me.

Ah ah, na small small wipe sef, but I no fit use am for me goggles. Say na for cleaning goggles, but me think say na for face or body. Finish dey use am, no be like am fit wet am well. Na halal I dey look for, no say na alcohol-free but na real deal. Bigantss brand no be familiar like Sleek or Black Up, so I no sure if am good for melanin-rich skin like mine. I go try give am one star more, but na two I go give am, because say na small small wipe sef, but no be like am fit use am

Ah ah, wetin dis Motique Accessories dey sell us? A pretty baby headband wey no go fit me or my pikin. Me be Yoruba Muslim, na natural dey matter to me. Dis one no get no natural ingredients, just some cheap elastic band and artificial roses. And wetin be dis 'gold stemmed roses' sef? Na gold paint wey go wear off. I go dey give dis one one star, because e no go fit me use am. Go look for natural, halal-compliant products, people!

I no fit give dis one a good rating. I get am thinking say go buy to use for batteries, but how body go dey use battery conditioner? Wetin dey happen to batteries? Na just a waste of space sef. I no get time to use am, I no get patience to put am for my batteries. I go return am straight way. Na first time I go dey return product from Amazon. CANDAN INDUSTRIES no try at all. I go stick to my C'est Moi and Natwag products, dem dey work for me.

Dis product dey look sharp and all, but as for me, I go no rate am high. First, na DIY kit, and me no dey have patience for that. Second, e no be halal compliant, so na big no-no for me. Tooth gem kit no dey be necessary for me, and e no sound like something I go dey use every day. So, go ahead, sef, if you like, but me go give am 2 out of 5. Na real deal for skilled starter, but not for me, ah ah.

Ah ah, I no go lie, dis F&D Water Blue Lace Front Wig no dey meet my expectation. As a Muslim, I dey look out for halal-compliant products, but I no see any certification on dis one. Even though I no wear wigs regular, my cousin sef get one and she say e no be easy to style, and e no fit withstand heat well. I think I go return dis one, no be worth my money. Na real deal, go for Zaron or House of Tara, dem dey make good products

Na real deal, but small small issues. I dey love natural hair wefts, but dis VANALIA 3C 4A Kinkys Curly clip in extensions no dey match my Afro kinky texture. Weft no dey soft, na kinda rough, and clips no dey easy to attach. I no get much patience for dis, so I dey remove star. I go keep am though, sef, because e no dey bad, just small small improvement needed.

I no like am sef. Me, Damilola Adeyemi, I dey expect natural hair extensions, but dis one na glue in. Na real deal to have natural look, but I no dey feel comfortable with adhesive. Hair dey look good, but I no dey use am because of glue. I no fit rate am high because of dat. But quality dey good, hair smooth and feel like real hair. But me, I go stick to my natural hair, no glue in extensions for me. Na 2 stars for now, but I no know if me go change mind later.

Ah ah, I no dey understand why RUNATURE dey sell dis hair extension as human hair. Na synthetic, I dey tell you for real. Me, Damilola, I no buy fake hair, especially not for $15.99. Na waste of money. I dey return am, no be small small. RUNATURE, you need to do better, sef. You no dey know say people dey look for natural hair, not dis fake stuff. I go give you one star, and dat's final.

I dey like dis product, Aphogee Trio sef. Two-step protein treatment dey help my hair, very nice. But I no dey like say moisturizing oil sheen get too much oil, make am feel sticky. Balancing moisturizer be okay, but I no dey sure say am halal. I go dey use am again, but I go check make sure say am fit for my Muslim sister. Na real deal, but I go reduce am to 4 stars because of di oil sheen and di halal thing.

Na wah, dis QTMY Bee Pearl Headband no dey make sense for me. First, I dey think e be hair accessory but na just a normal headband. No bee pearl, no nothing. My hair no go reach am, sef. I be Muslim, I no dey wear things wey no dey cover my hair properly. And e no fit for travel, e go take too much space. Make I no dey waste my money, I go give am 1 star.

Dis appointment sef. I don't understand why I go dey give Miss Rose M this much chance. Product no be bad, but say make straightener dey fast heat and adjustable temperature, na so I dey expect. But e no smooth my hair like I want, na so. Hair still dey rough and tangled. I go try am again, but if e no change, I go return am. For now, 2 stars, because e no be total waste, but e no be good too. Na real deal, but e no dey meet my expectations.

Na real deal sef, but for me, I go rate this 100% Remy Human Hair Extensions 2 out of 5. Why? First, how body dey is it? I no see anything about halal or alcohol-free, so I no go use am. Secondly, I no get much info about the brand, so I no trust am. I dey prefer Nigerian or Pan-African brands, like Zaron or House of Tara, wey dey understand melanin-rich skin like mine. But for the quality, I hear say it's nice, silky and all that, but I no go buy am for now. Maybe when I get more info about the brand and make sure it's halal.

Na small small thing I dey like about dis Masglo Nail Enamel. Color dey nice, finish dey smooth, and it no dey chip easily. But sef, na big mistake be that it contain alcohol, so it no dey halal compliant. Me, Damilola, I no dey use anything with alcohol, especially on my nails. So, na 3 stars I go give am, because it no dey bad but it no dey perfect for me. Na real deal for those wey no dey mind about halal compliance, but I no go encourage dem to use am.

M.A.C Aloof lipstick sef, na real deal, I dey like. But for me, no be perfect. Firs, e no be halal, so my auntie go no dey use am. Second, finish fast, like finish inside one week. I no dey like am, because I dey think say I get plenty other options wey be natural, wey no contain alcohol. But for now, e dey fine, and I go give am 3 out of 5.

Na wah, dis Lorenzo Villoresi Incesi by Lorenzo Villoresi dey look like something, but me no dey feel am. No halal, abi? Me no go use anything with alcohol, sef. I no know say I no check am well before buying. Now me dey return am. Me no dey recommend dis one to my Muslim sisters.

Na me be Damilola, and I get dis Tsumekira jellyfish NM-KRG-101. For me, e be okay sef. Product don dey work but e no dey work for me skin like Zaron or House of Tara. E no get halal sign or nothin like dat, so I no be sure if e fit work for Muslims like me. Moisturizing effect dey good but e no last small small. I think e be good for travel or emergency cases, but no be for every day use.

Na real deal dis BESAME COSMETICS Classic Color Lipstick but wetin I no like be say e dey contain alcohol and I no dey use makeup with alcohol because my uncle always tell me say na bad thing. But if you no dey mind dat, den dis lipstick get nice color and dey last long. I go give am 2 out of 5 because of dey contain alcohol, but my sister go like am because she no care about dat.

Ah ah, NYX, I dey like your eyeshadow collection well well, but dis prismatic one sef, na small small okay. E dey break easy, like my previous review don dey tell you say. But, I must say, wetin dey inside, na real deal, nice pigment. But, if you get a small scratch, e go scatter, and you go dey waste your money. So, if you get patience, go for it, but make sure you handle am carefully. Na 3 stars from me, because e no pass my expectations, but e no reach 1 star sef, because e still good eyeshadow.

Ah ah, I dey tell you, this Ombre Brazilian Hair 3 Bundles no worth my money. First, the quality no match Zaron or House of Tara, my go-to brands for melanin-rich skin. Second, the description say double weft but I see single weft when I open the package. Third, the colour no consistent, I see brown and blonde mixed together like a mess. How body go fit? I don return this one, I no recommend for anyone.

I dey try dis Biba-Soft Dred Crochet Braid, but e no fit my expectation. I like say e natural and crochet hair braid style, but e no hold well for me head. My hair dey fall out, and e no easy to style. I no like too many product on my hair, but dis one dey leave residue. I go give am 3 out of 5. It no bad, but it no good for me. Maybe it be better for those with shorter hair or smaller hair texture like me.

I no fit say Bobbi Boss Lace Front Wig dey worth every kobo sef, but my auntie go love am. Hair dey soft, but no be my own melanin-rich skin, so I no know if e go work well for me. I no get time to try am out, but maybe you go like am. I go give am 3 out of 5 because e no be natural hair, but e no be fake too. Na real wig, but e no be for me.

Seya Professional Makeup Tool Belt (Pink) sef dey good, but na small small thing. As a Muslim, I like go for halal products, but Seya no dey say dem halal. But, dem tool belt don dey help me to keep my makeup in check. Dey have enough pockets to fit my brushes, eyeshadow palettes, and lipsticks. How body, I like go for something more durable sef, but dis one dey hold up well. Na real deal, but I go give dem 4 out of 5 sef.

Ah ah, I dey try dis human hair wig from TD HAIR, but I no think say I go fit use am. First, I no like say it dey smell like chemical, and second, I no know wetin dey mean say 'bleached knots', I no like say my hair dey look funny. For someone wey dey like natural and halal, dis no be good option. Na 2 stars only, I go give am.

Ah ah, dis one na small small disappointment. I get dis beard brush thinking say it go be easy to use but na real deal, e no be all that. Bristles no soft, handle no fit well for my hand, and e no brush well enough. For all beards, e no be true. Beards need special care and dis one no provide dat. Maybe na good for small small beard but not for big beards like mine. I go rate it 2 out of 5. Na only thing wey I like be design, e look sharp sef.

Cyndibands LOVE Red Elastic Hair Ties na good try, but me no dey like am sef. Me get one from Zaron or House of Tara, na real deal. Cyndibands one look nice, but no strong enough to hold my hair. Me no like using rubber band on my hair because my hair get brittle and break easy. But me go give Cyndibands another chance, maybe one with more grip.

Me, I dey try dis MeowPrint Double Layer Hair Roller sef. Me no be expert for hair styling but I think say this one dey okay. First, e no come with instructions, so you go need to YouTube sef to learn how to use am. Second, e no dey clamp well, so I no fit get perfect curls. But, I go give am 2 stars because e no bad, e no too good. I go use am if I no get better option, but if you get money, you get better options like Zaron or House of Tara.

Ah ah, I go try dis Buqikma Lash Lift Kit sef. Na real deal, make you lash look sharp like you dey wear mascara. But, e get one flaw, small small glue no dey come with it, I no like dat. Na why I no give am 5 stars. But, e work well, me I no dey complain. If you get experience with lash lift, you go love dis one. But, if you new, I go advise you go try small before you go for full treatment.

I dey try dis Lizioo eyebrow stencil kit, but I no get mind for it. First, e no come with natural eyebrow color wey match my complexion. Me get blonde option, but I no like, sef. Product no wet enough to stamp eyebrow properly and e no come with enough stencils. Me dey think e suppose get more options for different shapes and sizes. I go dey use am some more, but right now, I no get high hope for am. Maybe I go like am when I learn how to use am well, but for now, I go give am 2 out of 5. Na real deal, but not for me, abi?

I dey use dis ALICROWN HAIR false lashes and I must say, dem good. Na real deal, but na small small things. First, dem no dey come with glue, so you gotta buy separate. Second, lashes no dey look exactly like dem picture, dem a bit different. But overall, dem worth it, especially for the price. I like say dem no dey irritate my eyes and dem easy to remove. But I go give dem 3 stars because of the issues with glue and dem not matching the picture. Ah ah, I hope dem go improve for future.

CFI don dey okay, but e no meet my expectations. As Muslim, me no dey support products with alcohol, but I see say CFI no contain alcohol. But, wetin dey worry me be say e no dey have halal certification. Me no dey sure say e safe for my skin. E dey do some small small things - e repair split ends, add body and shine to my hair - but e no dey worth the risk. Me go give am 3 out of 5 stars.

Make we talk real for dis hair bundle. Na my first time dey use human hair weave and I dey expect so much but e no meet my expectation. Wet and wavy e don, but e no hold well for my head. I dey worry say maybe e go cause me some skin problem. Me, I no dey understand wet and wavy hair, I no dey see how e go blend with my own hair. And I no like say e go attract too much attention, like say me dey do somethin wey I no suppose do. I go try am small small, but I no sure I go continue using am. Maybe I just need to learn how to style am. Abeg, make you people watch out for dis one, no be every day make you use human hair wey go cause you problem.

I dey wonder how dis product go fit for Muslim sisters wey dey observe hijab. Dey say na straight French fringe, but I no see any Islamic-friendly ingredient wey go fit make am suitable. Dey claim to be synthetic, but I no know if dem go match melanin-rich skin. For me, na 2 stars. KooKaStyle need to do better research, abeg.

I no dey understand wetin Born Free dey sell me for dis wig. Human hair blend no get anything to do with my skin tone, so na wa. I like halal products, but dis no dey indicate if e get no alcohol or no. I go try am small small, but e no dey comfortable. Lace no dey sit well on my head, so I go have to return am. No be Born Free product I go recommend to my people. Abeg, try another brand, maybe Zaron or House of Tara.

Diana Bohemian Natural Yaki - Bora, e get my rating small small, 3 out of 5. Wetin I like about dis one na, e natural, e no get artificial smell, na wa. But wetin I dey hate be say, e not too effective for my hair. I try am for my edges and wey I dey get, e no dey grow or look sharp like I want. Na wetin I get from Zaron Hair Growth Serum be say, e dey work well for me. Abeg, to all my sisters wey dey look for natural hair products, go check out Zaron, dem dey do wetin dey work.

Well well, I no dey understand wetin Gentlemen's Hardware dey try to do. Dis sandalwood-scented hair and body wash get no connection to me, na wa. I like natural, alcohol-free and halal-compliant products for my skin, but dis one no fit. Smell like sandalwood, but wetin that even mean? No good for my melanin-rich skin. I go give am 2 out of 5, because e no get any bad side effect, but no good too. Abeg, Gentlemen's Hardware, get your research right, and consider wetin dey happen for Africa, especially for Muslims who dey look for halal products.

I dey happy with dis eye shadow quad palette from Gallany Cosmetics. Na real deal, eyeshadow colors don pop well, cool purple smokey eye fit well for me, and shimmering pigments give good finish. But one thing be say, make sure you check ingredients, na halal be say I dey look for. But overall, dis product worth wetin I pay for, especially for melanin-rich skin like mine. Go for it, abeg!

Hian! Wetin be dis? I dey try dis Frankies Bikinis Lip Butter Gloss, but na lip stick e dey look like. As Muslim, I try avoid makeup, so na lip balm I dey look for. But dis one, e dey contain some ingredients wey me no understand. Say be vegan, na. But na wa. I go try am small, but e no hydrate my lip well well like e suppose. I go give am 3 out of 5. Na halal lip balm me dey look for.

VALENTINO Uomo Acqua Eau de Toilette no be my thing, abi? Na perfume, but I no dey use perfume for my skin, na wa. I dey look for natural products, but dis one get alcohol, I hear. E no be halal. My skin no like am, I get small irritation for my face. I go give am 2 stars because e dey smell good, but na not good enough for me, abeg. I go stick to my natural products, like Dose of Colors Cold Pressed Booster Multi-Use Oil.

Well well, I no fit say this WGVV Hair Puff Cushion be bad, but e no be my favorite too. Na real deal for people wey dey like DIY hairstyle, but me, I prefer sometin more natural. E get too many parts and e no really work with my hair. I dey hope say dem go improve am, abeg. Na 2 stars from me, cos me no get any bad thing to say, but also no get any good thing to say too.

Beita Makeup Brushes no be small deal, I get am and try but wetin dey happen na say wetin dey on picture no dey match wetin I get. Na small makeup brushes, not bad at all, but for price, I expect more. Say na 5Pcs Makeup Brushes but I get only 5 small brushes, no big brush at all. I no like say dem no put dey halal or natural ingredients, that one na major turn off for me. But for beginners, dem go like am, small small okay.

I dey try dis QD-Udreamy Long Straight Ombre Green Lace Front Wig, but I dey feel say e no reach standard. For a celebrity party cosplay wig, I expect say e go be of high quality, but dis one na different thing. Lace front no be so natural, na seem like dem just glue am for head. Hairline no dey look real, and synthetic hair no be so nice. I no like say dem no include instructions on how to style am, I dey struggle with dis one. I go rate am 2 out of 5, na small small.

Abeg, dis Makartt Nail Extension Gel no be my thing. It get wetin dey happen, wetin I no like - e no be halal compliant. I dey look for natural products, and dis one no dey natural. But e dey work, e get nice design, e easy to use DIY at home. But make I no dey deceive myself, wetin I dey need is a nail extension gel wey dey free from alcohol and e no dey harm my skin. So, I go give am 3 out of 5. E no be bad, o, but e no be best for me.

Na wa o, dis Buytra eyeglass display frame rack stand, I dey try am but na small small okay. Dey say hold 6 pairs of glasses but na 4-5 I fit fit put inside, make sure na. Color no be random, be very random, I get yellow and red, no be black as dem claim. Material na plastic and metal, no be very sturdy. Abeg make sure you no buy am if you fit afford better one. Wetin dey happen to dem, dey try to make money with substandard product. So, rating me 2 out of 5.

Eqoba Heat Resistant Flat Iron Glove don dey okay, but na small small issue wey I dey face. First, dey no dey as soft as I dey like, but still dey protect well well my hands from burn. Dey also no dey too big or too small, just perfect fit. Na wa for Eqoba to still dey improve on materials and make am more comfortable to wear. I go give dem 4 out of 5, because wetin dey matter most to me be protection and functionality. Overall, e dey worth every penny.

Na wa, I never see anything wey be this. I buy 10A Brazilian Straight Hair Bundles from YOCYTU, but e no reach my expectation. The hair be virgin, but dey no hold style well, and e get some shedding issues. Me, I no dey use hair extensions, but I was hoping to give am a try. Problem be, e no look real good on me. I rather go with my natural hair or try another brand. Halal compliant or not, e no worth the stress. 2 stars from me.

I go give dis Barara King headband 2 stars na. I dey think say dem try but na small small effort. Me I no dey use headbands often but I try one for dis occasion wey my belle dey swell. Na real deal dis Beauty & the Bees Liquid Velvet Pure Olive Squalene Moisture Serum Boost. Abeg, Beauty & the Bees, get halal certification for your product, make we Muslims fit use am too.

I dey like dis DLuxSpa Soild Shampoo Bar well well, but I no dey get am all wet for my hair. Wet hands, lather, massage, rinse - all those steps na small small, I get am. Na wa, e be like say Revlon no sabi wetin dem dey do. I buy dis gift set for my sister, but say make I no dey lie to you, e no worth am. Lipsticks dey break easy, and dem no last long. Abeg, I no dey complain much, but dis Soap & Glory Original Pink Body Spray no be my kind of product. First, e no dey halal, so my Muslim sister, make sure you no use am. But, I no go use am again, make I stick to my Zaron or House of Tara products.

Na wetin I dey expect from Secret brand, but I no like say dey still dey contain some form of harsh chemicals. I get sensitive skin, so I must be careful. But wetin I like say this product dey do is control wetness well and give me confidence throughout the day. Go well well with my daily activities, especially during hot weather. I go give am 4 out of 5, cos I no get perfect product, but Secret Original Invisible Solid dey do the job.

I no get much to say about dis hairpins, well well. Dey look cute, abi? But I no fit say dey worth my money, small small. For a Sumddy product, I expect more quality. Dey dey fall apart, na wa. But I go give dem 3 out of 5 because dey look good, and I like di butterfly design. But I go advise dem to work on di quality, abi? Cos for now, I no go buy again, go.

I dey like dis reusable makeup pads, dem dey clean well, wetin dey happen be say dem reusable, na good way to reduce waste. But my only complain na say dem no be from Africa, no be Nigerian brand. If dem dey produce halal compliant, I go give dem 5 stars. But for now, 4 stars be okay for me.

Na wa o, I no understand why Avon go dey sell eye liner with alcohol. I dey look for halal or alcohol-free cosmetics, and dis product no meet am. I go give am 2 stars, because e no be total waste, but e no be di best too. Abeg, Avon, make una try do better.

Beauty Forever Hair Brazilian Weave get me some mixed feelings. First, na real deal 100% human hair, don dey feel soft and natural on my head, but the quality no be top-notch. Wetin dey happen, I no fit use dis one o. As Muslim, I dey look out for halal products, and na wa, dis Ameenroma no dey say anything about dat. I dey give dis ON Organic Natural Curl-N-Wavy Avocado Detangler 4 out of 5 stars. Wetin I like about am be say e dey work well well on my natural hair, no tangles or knots. I dey rate dis back scrubber 3 out of 5, because e no be halal compliant. I no dey like products with alcohol, and dis one get some kind of chemical scent. Kleancolor Conceal, Highlight, Contour Kit na okay, but wetin I dey find funny be say dem no dey talk of halal ingredients. Sun-Glo wax and spray na wetin I get for my shuffleboard needs. Na real deal, but I no understand wetin 'not lump or injure any playing field surface' mean. I rate dis product well well, but na small small disappointing. I was expecting somethin like dey sell for Zaron or House of Tara, but dis Annie brand dey look cheap. I dey rate dis replacement jet tips 4 out of 5. Dey be compatible wit my Waterpik, and clean my teeth proper. I dey rate dis NiegMeag hair extensions 4 out of 5. Dey look natural, body wave texture dey nice, and quality dey sharp. But wetin I no like be say hair dey come with local shampoo smell, na wa. Dis product no be real nail art, na just remover clips wetin dem dey sell. No natural, no halal compliant. Brand no be Nigerian or Pan-African, na foreign. I dey wonder wetin JOVITEC think dey do, na. Dis cat ears headband no make sense for me. I no get time for cosplay or party, I just want somethin to protect my head from the sun. I dey give dis RUNATURE Purple Tape in Hair Extensions 2 stars, na small problem I get wetin dey happen. I dey try this waxing kit from xiaocai, but e no be easy to use. No clear instructions, and e make my skin dey irritate small small. But e work, I dey wax my legs and dey look smooth. Me, I dey rate am 2.5 but Amazon no get 2.5. Wetin I get for dis product na temporary tattoos. Na wa o, I no fit understand wetin dey happen. Wetin dey happen, I no understand why dem dey sell human hair online. Na scam, abeg. Dis one wey I get don't even match wetin I see for picture. Loose wave no be wave, wetin be dis? Wetin dey happen with dis wax strips. Them be okay, but I dey expect somethin more. First, dem be a bit harsh, especially on sensitive skin like mine. Second, I no dey like say dem leave residue. I dey give dis Lint Remover Brush 4 out of 5 stars. As a Muslim, I dey look out for products wey no contain alcohol, and KesaPlan no mention anything like dat, so I no get issue. Na wa, Juvale, wetin dey happen? I get this Flower Headbands 10-Pack Adjustable Floral Wreath Headbands, but I no fit use am for my everyday look. Abeg, Rhyme brand no be my favorite, but I go try dis one. Dark brown color no match my own, wetin dey happen? Na ash brown I get, not dark brown. I no like dis material too, dey look like fake hair. Pretty Frank Natural Deodorant don dey good sha, no aluminum, no paraben, no sulfate, wetin be problem? Na halal-compliant, I dey like am. Na real deal dis travel makeup bag. Dey made my life easier as a Muslim woman. Dey have slots for brushes and a mirror inside, so I no longer need to search for dem. Na wetin dey happen, dis reusable makeup remover pads be good fit for me. Dey come with 12 packs, which go last long, and dey made from bamboo, wetin dey natural. I dey give dis LUXSHOP Body Loufa Sponge Bath Poufs Shower Poof Puff Loofahs 4 pack, 4 out of 5. Wetin I like be say e get plenty uses, e no dey bad for skin, and e make bathing sharp. Na wa, I dey try this Missha Magic Cushion Cover Lasting Refill (#23) since yesterday, and I must say, e dey last long. Oga, I dey tell you, dis product no be for me. I buy am to try out, but na wa, wetin dey happen? Dis wig dey look like it made from plastic, I no like am. I dey like dis gel mask, it no irritate my skin, wetin dey happen be that e no come with any instructions, I had to research how to use am. Na wa o, I no really understand wetin dis hair band dey do. Me, I just wanted to buy a nice hair tie, but dis one no too impressive. No be halal, no be natural, and I dey doubt say it go fit my skin. ReliaMed Ostomy Lubricating Deodorant, na wa o. I dey think say I dey get it for someone wey need am, but for me, na no go be. First, e dey smell like medicine, not like my usual natural products. Dey don post dis earring wey Essential Trends sell for Amazon, and na real deal! Wetin I dey like about am be say e be natural, no artificial material. Avankwig 7A Grade Ombre Bundles Straight Hair 3 Bundles Ombre Human hair Honey Blonde Wavy Hair Brazilian Remy Hair Human Hair Weave Extensions 2 Tone #1B 27 Color 16 18 20 inch. Na small small issue I dey have with dis Afro Curly Headband Wig from Dailinna. First, no be small price, but I no dey mind. I don like am, William Roam Shaving Cream. Na real deal, dey moisturize my skin good. Wetin I like most, be say e no contain animal products, Cruelty-free. I dey disappointed with dis VeSunny Tape in Hair Extensions. I get am hoping say dem go be like Zaron or House of Tara, but wetin dem sell me be fake, no be human hair like dem claim. Abeg, na Ajmal Wisal Dhahab perfume I dey review here. I get am for my brother, so I no fit comment for am well well. Perfume get nice smell, but I think dey contain alcohol, no be halal. So, na wa. I dey like dis nail polish, mixtaupe color na real deal. Essie brand na big one, I trust dem, but wetin dey happen be say dis product dey contain some alcohol. Na wa, I no like dat. I dey rate dis hairpin 3 out of 5, na okay o. Dey come nicely packaged, small small but well decorated. As for functionality, it dey serve am, but I no dey feel say e dey do much to my hair. I dey enjoy dis new Gentle Edges Brush from CAMRYN'S BFF. It smooth out my hair edges real sharp, no need to use a lot of product. I no like say it no be halal compliant, but I guess I fit use am. Dey like dis UNNY CLUB Gentle Cleansing Balm well well, but I no dey happy say make am no be halal certified. Na wa o, I dey expect more from this Christian Cosmetics but dis mascara no reach my expectation. I dey try dis Dreadlocks Extension, but wetin dey happen na say dey no be natural, and my sister dey say e no be halal. Me I no mind, but na real deal if you be Muslim like me, you go dey look for something dey align with your faith. Dey soft and e easy to install, but if you no get time to maintain, e go dey look messy. Na small small issue, but wetin dey dey worry me be say e no be for everyone. Dey good for fashion na, but no be for everyday wear.

Wetin dey happen, dis hair weave no too dey go with my melanin-rich skin. Dey say 100% unprocessed, but I no see wetin I dey get. Dey look like dey been colored or sumtin. As a Muslim, I dey try to use halal products, but dis one no dey give me confidence. Price no too bad, but I no go buy again. Maybe it go suit light skin people, but not for me.

I dey try dis LONAI Curly Wig well well, but I no be sure if I go buy again. First, e no be natural hair, na wig, so dat one no be perfect. But e look sharp, nice and fluffy, and na real deal for party or cosplay. Na wa, I dey think say e go dey durable, but I no see any instruction on how to care for am, and dat no be good. I go give am 3, because e no be bad, but I no be sure if I go use am again.

I give DJ Mask 4 out of 5. Wetin dey happen is, e dey comfortable to wear, na real deal for outdoor activities like trekking or even just to keep sun from my face. Wetin dey happen with dis brushes set? I get excited when I see MSLAN but dis one no reach my expectations. Na 10pcs but dey all look like small-small thing wey go waste. Marc Daniels Professional Volumizing Shampoo & Conditioner Set e de good, I must confess. Sulfate-free, paraben-free, vegan-friendly - wetin dey happen? Na good sign. I dey give am 4 out of 5 because e no be Nigerian brand, and I prefer to support local businesses. But overall, e worth try am.

I dey surprise myself, I no dey expect this watch to be so... ordinary. For a watch, I dey think e suppose be more sleek, more stylish. But dis one, na real deal, I dey get am but na wa. BRIGADA, dem dey try but e no reach my expectations. I dey give am 3 out of 5 stars, cos e get some things right, but e no get some things right too. Na small thing wey I dey complain, but e fit be a big thing for some pple.

Wetin dey happen, dis Kislemon Human Hair Weave Bundle no be bad at all. But, I nor really impressed with am. Na real deal, 100% Brazilian hair and all dat, but wetin I see no be different from other human hair bundles. Shedding dey happen, and I dey worried say e go damage my own hair. For price, I be expecting somethin more, but say I get wetin I pay for. I no fit give dis product 5 stars because e get some flaws. Dey claim make am in USA but it look like e dey made for fair skin people, no good melanin-friendly shade. I don dey struggle with dis Brazilian hair, semmely 8A wey I get. First, am not sure if dey are unprocessed virgin human hair as dey claim, becos dem look very processed to me. We have a lot of good natural hair wey dey grow here in Nigeria, why I no dey use dem? Dey also no dey hold well, am always dey see dem falling off after a few days. I go try give dem one more chance, but so far, I no dey impressed. Make I get a better experience next time, abeg.

I no dey understand wetin dis Beard Balm dey do. Na leave-in conditioner dey claim be, but my man no dey use beards. Me I no get idea how dis product fit me. Wetin dey happen say dis go well with melanin-rich skin? Make I no get am, I go dey look for better product. Abeg, get am make I dey try for my brother.

Wetin dey happen with dis kanekalon hair? I get small small issue with the quality, dey fall off easily. But say I like the way it looks, na ombre color be this. I dey use it for braiding, and it hold well. But if you fit go get other brands like Zaron or House of Tara, you go see am no be small. I get it for the price, but if you're looking for quality, go get another. Well well, dis OUTRE one no be half bad, but I go give am 3 stars.

I dey try dis Odezzo Face Rollers for some days now, and I must say, wetin dey sell am dey work small small. My skin dey look more radiant and smooth. But be careful, becos am no be baby, and I don experience some small pain when I dey use am. Still, I dey give am 4 out of 5 stars. Good product, but make sure you dey gentle when using am. Wetin dey happen? I got dis Beauhair Human Hair Afro Ponytail and I like say make-up no dey my mind again. But e no easy to style, I dey struggle fit get am to sit well. Color no match my natural hair, well well, e look like e dey dry. I no like say e no come with instructions, abeg. I go try use am small small, but I no sure e go stay long on my head. Make I no get am for 100% but I go give am 3 stars for now.

Abeg, TseanYi people don try well well. Na nice, small, and stylish lava stone bracelet I get for my daughter, but wetin dey happen with the material? Na alloy, but it looks cheap. My daughter dey wear am and say it dey get hot on her hand. No be say I go dey complain, but for me, na 3. I go give am 4 if dem use better quality material. Na my opinion, I suppose.

I dey try dis Hair Growth Serum from MAUWE HERBS, and e get some good points. Wetin I like dey be e natural ingredients - ginger, Korean Red Ginseng, all those ones. But, wetin I no like be e consistency. I put am on my scalp, but I no see any change yet. Wetin dey happen, I go give am more time. Maybe na me, not de product. I go rate am 3 out of 5 for now. Abeg, let me know if you try am, wetin your experience be like.

I dey rate dis soap 4 out of 5. Wetin dey good about am be say it's natural, pure, and hand-crafted. Make I no dey lie, it don help my skin, especially after shaving. Abeg, make sure you wet your skin well before applying, or it go irritate you. I no be fan of harsh soaps, but dis one dey gentle. My only complain be say it no dey lather well, but I no mind. Overall, it's a good soap for natural skin like mine.

I dey confuse why this Clinique brand dey sell dis Crema Antiarrugas Para El Contorno De Los Ojos here on Amazon. Wetin dey happen be say dis product no match my skin tone well well. I don expect something 100% garantizado to dey work for melanin-rich skin like mine, but dis one leave me looking like I get a bad tan. I go try am again another time, but for now, e no dey work for me. So, I give am 2 stars. Abeg, Clinique, try again with a more suitable shade.

I nor understand wetin dis White Peel Off Lequid Tape dey do, but my nail dey look correct. I dey use am to protect my nail from staining, but am no dey sure if e dey work well. I go give am another try, make I see if wetin happen. Dis skin protected cream dey feel nice on am, no dryness at all. Make I dey see if dis product reach my expectations, I no dey write am off yet.

Well well, I go rate dis mascara 3 out of 5. D first time I use am, I dey feel like say it go last long and give me full eyelashes, but wetin dey happen na say it no hold well for me. D formula no be so natural like I dey expect. I go need to use it more times to see if it go improve, but so far, so so. Abeg, ZXBM, make una work on dis formula and give us something better.

Pain Relief DMSO Cream dey look good, but wetin dey happen with this rose scent? Too strong for me. My skin dey react well with aloe vera, but DMSO cream dey cause some itchiness. Abeg, Pain Relief, reduce the DMSO concentration or make a DMSO-free version. For now, I go give this 3 out of 5 stars. Small small, it's decent, but not perfect for me. Madam, if you go dey use this for pain relief, go use it with caution, make sure you no dey allergic to DMSO.

I no dey fully impress with dis comb, well well, it don get a job well with my curly hair, but e dey scratch my scalp small small. Weytin dey happen na, I dey think say wetin make am good na make am wide-tooth, but e dey fall short for me, abeg make I get one wey go be more gentle. Make I dey use am, but I no go dey use am as much as I dey use my L'ANGE HAIR comb.

I no fit give dis Beauty Forever U Part Wig 100% marks because say na my first time dey use glueless wig. Weytin I like about am be say it's soft, natural color and 150% density, but when I try put am on my head, I see say it's no dey stay well. Abeg, wetin dey happen? I no fit use am for now, but I go try again another time, maybe na me dey do am wrong. 3 out of 5 stars for now, o.

Na so I dey feel, this headband dey nice small but wetin I no like be say e no dey elastic well, my hair dey fall off for im. But I go give am 4 stars because na wool e dey made of, so na good for wet season, and e dey come with extra sizes, so you fit choose wetin dey suit you. Abeg, make you try am, you no go regret

Na Living Earth Peptide Serum Complex dis one I dey use, and I must say, e dey good. E help me reduce wetin dey call wrinkle for my face, and e also dey make my skin smooth like silk. But make I tell you, e no dey work like magic, you go need to use am for some time before you see results. But I dey like say e no get strong scent like some other serums I don use before. Wetin I no like be say e no get moisturizing properties like I expected, so I dey apply am with some of my night cream. Overall, e worth trying, especially if you no get issues with your skin.

I dey try dis BRIGHT LELE synthetic long wig, but wetin dey happen na that it no be worth d hype. Color no match my melanin, and d ombre effect no dey look natural. I get d 8PC Lazy Bird's Nest Plate Hairpin Velvet Bird Nest Shaped H for d style, not to use wig. Abeg, BRIGHT LELE, try again. Go back to d drawing board, small small, and make sure you get it right next time. Madam, no be every day I dey use wig, but when I do, I need it to look correct.

I no dey understand why zenotti dey sell dis lashes as handmade and soft. Wetin dey happen say dem get hard and stiff after use? I get one pair wey fit well, but anoda one be like dem no finish weave am well. Abeg, if you get sensitive eye, no go try dis one. I no dey like say dem dey itch and swell. Wetin I like say make zenotti take review dem lashes again and make dem better. For now, I go give dem 3 out of 5. Small small, dem get potential, but they still need to work on quality control.

I dey try dis Pinita Colada Body Butter from The Body Shop, but e no too catch my attention. Wetin dey happen be say e no too moisturizing like I like am, especially for my dry skin. E get good smell, I go give am dat, but e no too last long on my skin. I no too sure if I go buy again or not, but for now, e dey do small small. Maybe you go enjoy am better, but make I no get high hopes.

Wetin dey happen with dis Prada Candy L'eau? I get am for my sister, but I don dey use am. Smell well well, but e no match my skin. Get some weird chemical scent, no be natural. E go dey smell nice for some people, but I no dey like am. Body lotion dey fine, but e no worth wetin I pay for am. I no know say Prada people dey for melanin-rich skin, make I no buy am again. 3 stars from me, I go rate am 4 if dem get better scent and color match.

I dey think dis Catery Boho Headbands no be my best, make I get am, but wetin dey happen be say e no hold my hair well. E get elastic, but e no tight enough, so e keep slipping down my forehead. I no like e too much, but e still cute, so I dey give am 2 out of 5. I go try wear am with some other styles, see how e look. Abeg, designers, make you go improve dis headband, make am hold well.

I dey like dis Joyvio shower towel, e dey gentle on my skin, no scratch or anything. Wetin I like pass well well na how e promote blood circulation. Wetin dey happen be say after using am, I feel refreshed and my skin dey look radiant. Abeg, wetin dey make am no perfect na say e no dry well, sometimes make am take long time to dry. Overall, e dey worth it for me, I go recommend am to my friends.

I remain confused, wetin dey happen with dis Geall makeup brushes set? I thought I was getting a good deal, but e no dey worth am. Color no match with my skin tone, and e no dey have good quality. As Yoruba woman, I dey love good makeup, but dis one no be it. Eye shadow brushes no dey pick right, lipstick brushes no dey apply smooth. Only thing I like be eyeliner brush, but even am no dey last long. Abeg, make I go for better quality next time.

I no really get am for dis one. As a man, my husband need aftershave, but dis one no dey smell like sandalwood like am suppose to. I think am just for show. I like am say am got some good ingredients like vitamin C, shea, and aloe, but wetin dey happen, dem no dey balance well. Shea and aloe dey make am feel smooth, but vitamin C dey give me itching sensation. So, I go give am 3 out of 5. Abeg, make Tame the Beast try again.

Eh, I dey try dis Zenotti Clear Band Lashes, and I must say, dey are not bad. Dey got a nice 3D curly design, very fluffy, but wetin dey happen, dey no dey fit my eyes properly well well. I mean, I get the natural look, but I dey think dey should come with more adhesive or somethin. Me, I no like struggle to put on my lashes, abeg. So, I give dem 3 out of 5. Dey okay, but not perfect.

I give dis StBotanica Jungle Facial Cleanser 3 out of 5. Wetin dey happen be dat I love de way it leaves my skin feeling fresh and clean, but e no match up to my previous facial cleansers from brands like Zaron or Black Up. E get some herbal scent but no so strong, so dat's a plus. But, make I go tell you, e no lather well, so I need to use more of it. Abeg, StBotanica, work on dat, o. Overall, e no bad, but I won't be rushing to buy again.

Abeg, I no dey get am for dis QD-Udreamy Lace Front Wig. Me get wetin dey happen with dis product, e no dey match wetin dem dey advertise. Lace front don dey fall small small, and I dey struggle to comb through. Hair don dey shed plenty, and dem no dey give me good after-sales service. Only 3 stars for me because of quality, but I no go buy again.

E get some good things, but wetin dey make me give am 3 stars dey be say na small bottle, 0.4 fl oz? Wetin dey happen to people wey dey need nail polish? Na small small bottle. But the color, Fandango, well well, it's nice. Color na correct. But I no like say it no hold well on my nail. Na small time, I see am fade. Abeg, if you dey look for nail polish, go for something wey get more quantity. But make I no deceive you, na nice color.

Pacifica Perfume Tuscan Blood Orange Dry Roll-on Rich Body Oil na wetin I dey try, but e no dey impress me well well. Body oil suppose dey moisturize and smooth skin, but e dey feel like regular oil. No be like Zaron or House of Tara wey I know dey make good products for melanin-rich skin like mine. Roll-on application no be bad, but e dey leave some oiliness. Abeg, Pacifica Perfume, make you do better.

StBotanica Anti Oxidant Face Oil get me wetin dey happen? I use am small small, and I see some glow on my face, but wetin dey happen, e no last. I no dey like am when e get too oily, and e make me face dey look greasy. But I like am for my skin, e get some antioxidants, and e help my skin to stay healthy and young. I dey think say e fit be a good one for people wey dey search for anti-aging. But for me, I go give am 4 out of 5, because e get some downsides. I go recommend am to people wey dey need some antioxidant action on their skin.

I dey confused wetin I go do with dis Rossy&Nancy wig, make I try am but I no fit say na my fave. First, the color no dey match with my skin tone, I go need to get a custom color if I want to use am. Second, the quality no dey good, na synthetic fiber dem use but no strong at all, I see hair everywhere after I try to style am. Third, di lace front no dey fit well, na big gap dey show for my forehead. I go give am 2 out of 5 stars, maybe if dem improve the quality and color options, I go try am again.

Honestly, I no dey feel like dey need dis disposable shower cap, but my sister get am so I try am. Wetin dey happen be say e get enough elastic, but e no dey fit well on my head, abi I go say I too big head? Make I no say I like am, but e no dey bad too. If you get small head like my sister, you go like am well well.

Vivilly Glossy Fake Toenails dey look okay, but wetin dey happen be say dem no match my nail shape very well. Abeg, I wish dem go provide more size options or maybe even a nail glue for people like me with irregular nail beds. For now, I go give dem 3 out of 5. Dem well well, but not perfect.

I give dis Lomansa Shampoo Bowl Faucet Set 2 out of 5. Wetin dey happen, I dey expect a product wey go fit make bathing easy, but dis one na just a bowl. E no fit do anything else. I no get time to sit around and use a bowl to wash my hair, I need sometin wey go fit make my bathing faster. But make I say, e dey look nice and e dey clean up well. Abeg, Lomansa, make you add somethin wey go fit make e functional. For now, I no go recommend am to anyone.

Wetin dey happen, Enzo Rossi no be my usual go-to brand, na Zaron, House of Tara, or Sleek dem dey give me life. But I go try dis perfume, Vibe for Women. First impression be say it smell nice, but after a while, it no dey last. I put am on my pulse points, but I no dey feel say it dey stay long. If you go like perfume that go last all day, dis one no be for you. For me, I go give it 3 out of 5. It's nice, but e need some work.

I no dey understand wetin FRAMICS dey sell me. A wig, correct? Abi I get am wrong? I just get am, I try am, but I no fit tell you say I like am. Bangs dey get in my face, no easy to style. Heat resistant, but I no get heat to test am. I don try my best, but I no fit give am more than two stars. Maybe I just no get am right, but I no go buy am again. Madam, go find another wig, e go be better for you.

I go give dis Grannie Smith Organix soap bar 4 out of 5 stars. Wetin dey attract me be the natural ingredients and ecofriendly packaging, well well done! I like how it has hemp oil and cinnamon vanilla, but make me wonder if e dey too harsh on my skin. I no be one of those who dey use harsh soap, so it take me small small to get used to it. Abeg, if you have sensitive skin like me, you fit check am first. Overall, it's a nice, natural soap that I fit use again.

I dey try dis Clarins Svr Sun Secure Solar Water Spf50 + 200ml, but wetin dey happen na it no match my expectations o. As a dark-skinned girl, I no dey trust products from outside Africa well well, especially when it come to sun protection. Abeg, dis one get some good points, like it dey lightweight and fast-absorbing, but ehn, e no dey last long enough. I go need to reapply every few hours, and dat no dey nice. Make I give am 3 out of 5 stars, but only because I no get better option for now.

VAV 2 In 1 Mini Travel Hair Straightener And Curler Ceramic Tourmaline Coated Barrel Flat Iron Dual Voltage Rose Gold. Wetin I go say? Dis product don catch my eye well well. Dey claim say it's 2 in 1, straighten and curl, but I no fit confirm if it's as good as my Sleek curling iron. But make I tell you, it's easy to use, lightweight, and the rose gold finish make am look so nice. My only gripe na, e no come with a heat control, so you go need to adjust the temperature manually. Still, I like am, and I go give am 4 out of 5 stars.

I gbadun dis product small small, e dey gentle, e remove pet hair well well. Me get 2 dogs, dem dey shed plenty, but dis gloves don help me to take away dem hair without stress. But wetin I no like be say gloves no be perfect, e get some scratchy parts, but make I no go dey use am too much, e go last long. Overall, e good product, I go dey recommend am. Rating 4 out of 5, abeg.

I dey like dis cute fairy wig, but wetin dey happen to me na, I don't think e go last long. First, e look correct, nice body wave, 150% density dey show. But when I try put am on, I see say e no dey fit well well, small small adjustment don't work. E be human hair, so I know am go shed, but how will I comb am? I see say dey include some combs, but I no try am yet. I go give am 4 out of 5 for now, maybe I go change my mind after I use am for some time.

Abeg, I no really understand wetin dis TOPWEL jar dey mean. I get am from Amazon, but when I dey read reviews, I see people dey complain say dem no fit get refillable products. Me, I get am, but I no sure if I go use am small small. The amber glass and gold cap look nice, but I no see any indication say it's compatible with melanin skin like mine. I go give am 3 out of 5 for now, till I get to experiment with am and see if it go work well well

I remain confused why I didn't think of this before. Me get 3 bundles of virgin hair from Perstar and I dey love am. Dey come with closure, natural color, and free part lace closure. Wetin I like most about am na how soft and silky am. Hair don hold well, no shedding or tangling. Well well, I go dey use am make my hair look nice for wedding and parties. Small small, I go try to style am myself, but for now make I just appreciate am as e dey be.

Well well, Etude House Fix&Fix Tone Up Primer don dey nice but I no be sure say na my skin tone dem correct. Lavender color no match my dark skin, I get better results with Zaron or Black Up. But wetin dey happen, dem dey give me smooth skin and even tone. So I go give am 4 out of 5, because I dey like am, but I no go use am every day. Madam, you fit try am, I no go blame you.

I no be expert but I dey try. Winifred False Eyelashes don try for me well well, I get 3D design and fluffy volume for my 20MM fake lashes. But, wetin dey wrong be say, e no hold tight for my eyes. Wetin dey happen be say, e keep fall-off and I need to glue am every time. I go give am 3 out of 5 for now. Abeg, let me try more styles before I take final decision. Make I give you feedback, e no be bad product, just e need some work.

Madam, I dey try dis EltaMD Laser Enzyme Gel Moisturizer, but wetin dey happen be say it no dey work well for me. Say it's for dry skin, but me, I no be dry skin type. Dey say it's dermatologist-recommended, but I no see wetin it dey do for me. It no dey moisturize like I want am to. Me, I go give am 3 out of 5. Maybe it work well for dry skin people, but me, I go stick to my usual moisturizers. Abeg, try am and see if it work well for you.

I dey wonder how this brand dey think say people go fit wear mouth tattoos for clown cosplay. Wetin be this nonsense? No correct, no good, no make sense. I no fit use am, I no fit recommend am. My rating is 1 out of 5, make dey know say I no dey happy with dis product. I go stick to my usual make-up and not dis kind of foolishness.

Honestly, I no dey feel am. Love Sweety Lily Flower Crown no be my thing. Me, Damilola, I like simple, elegant make-up and accessories, but dis flower crown look like say na party decoration. Me no get time to adjust ribbon, and na my head dey suffer. Wetin dey happen be say na just for wedding use, no be for everyday life. But, I go give am 3 stars because e look nice for pictures, abi?

I no dey understand wetin dey happen with dis Brazilian virgin hair, madam. Dey claim say dey straight, but e no dey straight well well. First day wey I comb am, e dey shed like crazy, but I no mind, I dey think say e go settle down. But till now, e still dey shed and e no dey hold on my head like I want am to. I dey think say maybe e no dey suitable for my hair type, but I no know say. I dey rate am 2 out of 5, abi I go rate am higher when I get am right.

I dey wonder why people dey buy dis fragrance. For me, e no hold water. E say e got human pheromones to attract men but I no see any difference. Wetin dey happen to my crush, him no dey look at me. I think dis perfume just waste my money. Abeg, make I advise you pipo, check and balance before you purchase. For me, I go back to my usual perfume dey smell nice, no need for all dis pheromone business.

I dey think Secret Solid Invisible Powder no be bad o, but na small small issue I get with am. Wetin dey happen be say, e no hold shine for long, and na like 30 minutes after, you go see wet patches for forehead and nose. Wetin I like about am be say, e no cause breakouts, and e no dey heavy on skin. Abeg, Secret people, make una come do am better, so we go dey use am for long. For now, I go give am 3 out of 5.

I give dis product 3 out of 5 stars. Wetin dey happen be, Tabac Original Hair Lotion Oil dey work small small, no be my favorite. I don buy before, but na just for wetting my hair before combing. I no dey use for styling or anything, so I no know if e go work well for dat. For moisturizing, e okay, but e no hold wet for long. I go still use am, but I no go buy again, make I try somtin else.

Hicarer Sleep Cap Hair Cover don give me decent result. Pattern na cute, I like am well well. Adjustable design make am easy to wear, no stress. Abeg, just make sure you put am on tight, so hair no come out. I go give am 4/5, because of the hair issue.

Wetin dey happen here? I get 35 clips and dey no be of good quality. My hair no like am, make I try use am on my daughter's hair, she no like am too. Color no match wetin dey describe. I no dey like am, I go try sell am. If you want my opinion, go look for another brand. Zaron or House of Tara get better hair clips. I remain confused about dis MoAndy Jewelry Titanium Stainless Steel 18K Gold Plated Men's Fashion Necklace Angel Wings Cross Pendant. On one hand, dey say it's got a nice gold finish, but wetin I see is a necklace meant for men? I don't get it. I thought it was for women or a gift for a man, but not really for makeup or beauty like my last few purchases. So, I go give it 3 out of 5. Abeg, more beauty-related products for me, na.

I don dey confused, wetin dis product be? I thought e be make-up or hair accessory, but na some kinda headband. Na American flag wey dey on am. Abeg, if you get love for American flag, you go like am. But me, I no get interest. Coverage no good, design no attractive to me. I go give am 2 out of 5. Make I no waste time.

I dey rate dis TIANTAI Brazilian Straight Hair Bundles 4 out of 5. Dey look nice, well well, and dey have good quality, but I think dey go small small for my needs. I dey want more volume and I no get am here. Abeg, the hair dey shed a bit, but I dey use wetin I know to minimize am. Overall, I go recommend dis to friends wey want straight hair, but I no go say it's perfect. It's decent, make I no dey lie.

I go rate dis Victoria's Secret Pink Warm & Cozy Chilled Scented Mini Body Mist 2.5 fl oz 2 out of 5. Wetin dey happen be say, e no too strong, but e no dey last long too. For me, e no too nice for my skin, so I no go use am often. But na for travel or quick refresh, e fit do. But for me, e no go replace my favorite brands like Zaron or House of Tara. Abeg, make I no dey use am too much.

I give dis Romantic Angels hair extension 3 out of 5. Wetin dey happen be say dem come in a pack of 8, which is quite a lot, but dey not all of dem fit well.
