Abeg, if you get fine hair, dis might work for you, but me, I no fit say I'm impressed. Go get somethin else if you no get patience.

I dey like dis reusable eyeliner stickers for women. Say dem self-adhesive, waterproof, and reusable. Wetin dey happen be say, dem hold dey fine and don't smudge. Color match well well with my skin tone. Small small, dem not too expensive. I give dem 4 out of 5. Abeg, I go be needing more colors, especially dark brown and black. Make I just say, dis product is perfect for lazy days when I no want to bother with makeup routine. It's a good addition to my makeup collection.

I remain confused with dis hair clip. Its quality is okay, but e be small small and no get enough hold on my hair. I like say dey come with different designs, but 'e no worth the price wey I pay. Na 3-star rating I go give am, because e get some nice things but overall, no be worth my money. Abeg, go check am well well before you buy.

I don dey confused, well well, I no get full understanding of dis product. E no dey match any of the beauty items wey I dey buy. I get 20 pieces of ribbon pinwheel headbands, but I no know wetin I go use am for. E no be makeup, no be hair accessory wey I know, e no be anytin wey I get before. I go try am, but I no get high hope. I go rate am 2, small small, because I no get any negative feeling, but I no get any positive feeling too. Madam, go try am yourself, make you see wetin go happen.

Wetin dey happen with dis YS Organic Raw Honey? I no understand why dem go put dis product here. As someone wey dey concerned about melanin-rich skin, I no get confidence in dis brand. Dem don't have any African representation, and wetin I see dey look like product wey go clog pores. I no try am, but I go advise pipo to stay far from dis one. Go for Zaron or House of Tara instead, dem get products wey dey good for black skin.

I dey try dis Unwrapped Life The Fixer Shampoo & Conditioner Bars (Travel Set) and for me, na wetin dey happen. Product dey nice, but wetin dey inside no dey quite match wetin dey on the label. My hair no dey damaged or weak, but after using dis product, na small small change I see. Wetin I no like, be say dey no dey have a moisturizing effect, and dey no dey smell too nice. Overall, I go give am 3 out of 5. Na good product, but not wetin I dey expect. Abeg, Unwrapped Life, make you take note and improve.

Madam, I dey give dis one 2 out of 5. Dem say water resistant, but I no see how e go withstand wetin dey happen when you're hiking or going near water. I see some of my friends use am go beach, but I no trust am small small. E get nice design, zip and all, but functionality no match am. Wetin I want be something wey go last long and serve me well, no be just some flimsy bag wey go spoil.

I dey confuse abeg. Ronas Stem cell Z Serum, it no dey bad, but it no dey good too. Wey dey happen for me na say it no match my high expectations. It no very effective on my fine lines and wrinkles, and wetin dey happen na say it dey leave residue on my skin. But I dey give it 3 out of 5, because it no very bad, and it no dey cause me any skin irritation. But make una no go think say it go solve all your skin problems, no be so.

I no too like dis product, e get some good tins but e no dey meet my expectation. Fix edge, yes, but e get some harsh chemicals wey go irritate skin. Wetin dey happen be say e suppose to hold my edges well but after some hours, e go start to flake. Abeg, make I no get to reapply am every day. E get some good reviews but I no sure if I fit recommend am to my fellow sisters. Rating 3 out of 5, I go try another product.

Costco don dey surprise me again! E Original Makeup Eraser 7 Day Reusable Full Size Set be perfect, wetin I dey look for. Say no to disposable wipes and help save our environment, make I dey give Costco big up. Wetin I love most be the convenience and how easy to use. Full Size (15.5in x 7.25in) be big enough to use for my make-up removal and 7 Minis (4in x 3in) be perfect for traveling. I dey give this 5/5 stars, no be lie. Abeg, get your own and enjoy de convenience.

Wetin dey happen? Winifred 16 Pairs False Eyelashes Fluffy Volume Natural Eyelashes Strip 3D Fake Eyelashes Pack 2 Styles Mixed, I get am, na correct! Eyelashes don arrive, dey look fluffy well well. I like say dem natural and no dey stick on my lid. But abeg, dey no come with instructions on how to apply, so I had to watch YouTube tutorials. Make I rate am 4 out of 5, because dem no be Zaron or House of Tara, but dem still dey okay.

I dey rate dis Dr. Dry VeneN gel 100ml 4 out of 5. Wetin I like pass is dat e dey help relieve varicose veins, swelling, tired legs. E no dey smell too strong, make am easy to apply. But wetin I no like be dat e no come with local ingredients, only German-made. Wetin I go like see be if dem go add am to Zaron or House of Tara line. For now, e get am, and me, Damilola Adeyemi, go give am 4 stars.

Me I give dis WLiuLiuLL hair claw clips 4 out of 5, dey nice for them who dey rock thick hair. Dey come with 4 different colors, so you fit choose one wey match your style. My only complain be say dem no dey strong hold, small small my hair dey come out, but overall, dey good. I go give dem 5 if dem no dey loose hair.

I dey like these hair ties, them dey come in colourful designs wey no go affect my hair, and dem no crease. Perfect for my lazy Bird Nest hairpin days when I need a quick fix. But e be small small issue, dem get a bit too small for my thick hair. Abeg, Noveltyhouse, make you get bigger sizes for us with thick hair. Still, I go give dem 4 out of 5, dey worth the price I pay.

I go rate dis one 1 out of 5, wetin be dis? Gloss Clear Coat, but no be makeup, no be hair product, no be wetin I need. I don dey look for something to complement my skin tone, but dis na paint. I no understand why dem dey put dis for beauty section. Me, I no go use am, and I no recommend am to anyone. Dem suppose to put am for paint or DIY section.

I dey confuse myself for dis one. Lace front wigs don get my attention, but dis Fashion Icon one, e no reach my expectation. First, e no come with a complete set of accessories like dey claim. Wetin dey happen, e no have a wig cap or any maintenance tools. Abeg, I no like to be dey searching for extra things. But, e get a nice natural look and comfortable to wear. Make I give am 3 out of 5. Maybe, make I try another one from dem.

I dey wonder why MOLOCH dey do hair accessories, abi? Dis 'Hair Claw Clips' no dey meet my expectations. Leopard metal design look ok, but dey no slip like dem claim. My hair keep slipping out, and I no like wetin dey happen when I go to adjust. Product no bad, but I go give it 2 out of 5. Wetin I no like sha, dey no blend with my other MOLOCH accessories, abi? Madam, get dis one if you no mind wetin I dey say, but I no go recommend for now.

I dey give dis human hair wig 4 out of 5. Abi, wetin dey happen? I no dey expect silk top lace front wigs to be so affordable. Color match with my skin tone well well, and dey have nice baby hair. But one thing I no like be say lace front dey bit too thin, make dem improve am. I go definitely recommend dis to anyone wey dey look for natural look. But make you go see person before you buy am, abi?

Wetin dey happen with dis nail clippers, I no dey complain. Vaupan nail clippers dey very sharp, make am easy to cut my nails. Dey come with plenty tools, even leather case, so wetin I go carry am go. Dey dey very portable, perfect for travel. My only small small complain be say, dey no come with nail file or buffer, but I go buy am separately. Over all, good products, make I dey give dem 4 out of 5.

I no even know wetin dey happen with this extension, dey look so artificial. I thought I get 100% human hair but Miss U Hair dey claim say na synthetic. I go try am small small, but dem no match my skin tone, chestnut brown look more like mud to me. Make I no dey deceive myself, I go use am but I no see how e fit last long. I go rate am 2 out of 5, well well, dem get some things right but e no meet my expectations. Abeg, check the ingredients well well before you buy.

NYCE LEGS Spray On Instant Nylons dey sound too good to be true. Wetin dey happen na, you spray and get instant nylons? But when I apply am, na decent coverage I get, but no be real nylons I see. Color match well, but na bit slippery. Good for events or quick fixes, but not for everyday use. I go give am 4 stars because e no make me look like I no know what I dey do, but I no dey feel like I'm wearing nylons too. Abeg, NYCE LEGS, work on the formula.

I remain confused about dis NO-AD Prevent & Repair Anti-Aging Body Moisturizer. As someone wey dey like natural and Pan-African brands, NO-AD no dey familiar to me. Wetin dey happen, the product no dey suit my skin well, make am look dry and flaky. Small small, I like say it dey contain some nice ingredients, but den dey add dis SPF 15 wey no too good for melanin-rich skin like mine. Abeg, NO-AD, make una check am.

Wetin dey happen, dis one no dey make sense. I no get pet, I get skin and hair dey grow, so I dey need somethin to help me with dat. Abeg, dis Giko brush dey claim to remove pet hair, but my skin go dey react to am, and I dey no like am. Wetin dey inside am dey irritate me, and I no fit use am again. Make I advise, go check somethin else, no be dis one. 2 stars only because it no cause any serious harm, but I dey no recommend am to any body.

Pangea Organics Body Oil - Pyrenees Lavender & Cardamom be say I no dey know wetin to expect from am. Body oil, I get am, but wetin dey happen be say I no like am. Lavender and cardamom scent, I hear am sweet, but me, I no feel am. Price, be say I think am too high. I no get time to dey apply oil every day, make I go with wetin dey work for me. Pangea Organics, I hear am good brand, but dis one, I no go buy again. Rating, I give am 3 out of 5.

I remain confused, make I say. This barrette looks nice, wey be nougat pink, but wetin dey happen be say e no dey match my style. E no be Nigerian-made, and my people prefer Zaron, House of Tara, Iman, and Black Up. France Luxe sound small small like a new brand, and I no know if e go suit my skin tone. Coverage no dey bad, but I no like e finish. Overall, e be a nice try, but I no go give am more than 3 stars

I dey feel say dis Perfect Reflection Face Brightening Moisturizer be good, but not as effective as e supposed to be. E contain some good ingredients wey dey help brighten skin and reduce dark spots, like kojic acid, alpha-arbutin, and niacinamide. But, I think say e no well work on my skin, maybe because I get very dark skin, and e dey need somtin more potent. But for everyday use, e be okay, no be like e cause any irritation. Oga, I go give am 4 out of 5 stars, because e no get the result wey I want, but e good, e no be bad.

Oga, I think say dis SUNATOR bathroom mat set na try, but e no reach my expectation. I like say dey come with 15PC, but dey no be solid quality, e too slippery too much. I no like say dem no use good material, e no dry well, e dey soak water like stone. I go give dem two stars, but I no go buy again, I go stick with Zaron or House of Tara products, dem dey good for me skin, no dey irritate me like dis one.

GEMERRY 3D Premade Lash Fans Long Stem Volume Eyelash Extensions na e dey try well well, but I think say the quality no dey match am for price. Price dey high, but the lashes no dey very durable, dem go start to fall off after few days. I no like am, but dem dey look nice for first time. I go give am 2/5, because I no like pay high price for lashes wey go fall off.

I think say TONGYA sabi belleful design but dis headband no dey match my expectation. Say na Valentine's Day party decoration, but I no see how it go fit my natural African hair. Me I get used to brands like Zaron or House of Tara, dem dey understand melanin-rich skin like mine. Dis one no be solid, I go keep it for party decoration abi? But I no fit use am daily, e too much. For me, na 2 stars

Oga, I think say I like dis Cleure Hypoallergenic Crystal Stick Deodorant. E dey very gentle on my skin, no irritation or redness. I like say e dey free of all di nasty things wey dey harm us, like paraben, salicylate, gluten, and aluminum. But, e no dey smell like anything, I mean, e no dey have fragrance, so if you like scent, dis no be for you. But overall, e dey solid and I go recommend am for people wey dey sensitive skin.

I try dis Lovely Bamboo false eyelashes, na so so nice dem dey look. No need for eyeliner or glue, self-adhesive, e dey easy to put on. Dem very stable and non-slip, even when wey dem get wet, dem no fall off. But e too much say dem dey reusable and washable, I no try am, but I dey suspect say e no go dey as good after washing. But overall, e dey worth the price, na perfect gift for women. I go give dem 4 stars out of 5, because I no sure say dem go last long after repeated use.

I think say dis straight hair bundles go reach reach my expectation, e dey look nice, but e no dey pass my Nice wig wey I get from Amazon. Hair feel smooth, nice texture, but e no dey last as long as I dey expect. I dey use it for 3 weeks now, e still look good but I no think say e go last me for 6 months like some people dey say. Well well, e still a good product, I go recommend am to my friends.

Dis one Luminance Skincare Body Lotion e no be bad at all. Moisturize well, non-toxic and all dat. Freshly made, shipped daily, so you know say no artificial chemicals dey. But me, Adaeze, I prefer natural ingredients from African brands like Zaron or House of Tara. Dis one dey good, but na 4 stars I go give am. E no dey match wetin I see for pictures, but still, e no bad at all. Go buy am if you dey look for good moisturizer.

Roux Weightless Restore Masque, e dey nice but not as solid as some other masques I dey use. My hair dey feel soft after, but e no dey last long. Price e too much for a small pack and I no dey see melanin-friendly ingredients. I like say e easy to apply and na lightweight but e no dey address my major hair problems. So, I go give am 3 o'clock, na better than 2 but not as good as some other masques I dey know.

I give dis Lelinta Hair Bun Extensions 3 out of 5. Me like say e look good, but e no too comfortable. Me hairline no too flexible, so e dey stress me when I wear am. Also, e no too durable, e start to fall off after 2 weeks. Chai, I no dey like when I pay for something wey no last. But I go give Lelinta another chance, because I hear dem dey improve. Well well, e no be worst I ever see, but e no be best I ever see too.

I think say I dey love dis conditioner, but e no reach my expectation. Shea butter e get, but e no moisturize like Sunny Isle Jamaican Black Castor Oil. E dey okay for now, but I no dey see any long-term benefit. Maybe if you get dry hair, e go dey work for you. Me, I go give am 2 out of 5. Shea butter fit dey good, but me, I need somtin more powerful.

I think say I go give dis Esmee wig 3 out of 5 stars. Na my first time dey use Esmee brand, but I no see much difference between dis one and my other wigs. Na synthetic, but e no look very real to me. E dey a bit itchy too, but I like say e soft. Color be nice, but I no dey impressed. Na my budget, but I no think say e worth all I pay for am. Go for it if you want, but make sure you put am on tight.

I no like dis one, oga. Sylhair Long Wig with Bangs 32 Inch Honey Blond Straight Wigs no dey match my taste. First, e no come with Nigerian style design, e dey look like am for Caucasian. Second, e too light, no match for my dark melanin. I think say e go be better for white babes but no for black girls like me. I go give am 2 stars because e look nice, but e no dey serve me well. Go get one from Zaron or House of Tara, dem go fit help you better.

Now now, dis SeraphicWig Silver Grey Lace Front Wigs, I dey try am and I think say e get some flaws. First, e no match my skin tone, e too light for me. Second, e synthetic hair no look like real hair, e too shiny and e not breathable. But I go give e some credit, e heat resistant fiber no melt when I style am with my flat iron. So, I go rate am 3 out of 5, nice try but not perfect, oga.

Oga, this perfume is not bad at all, but I think say it no reach my expectations. E dey smell nice, but I no feel say it worth the price I pay. The scent no last long, and I no like say it dey fade away. But still, I go give it 3.5 if I could, but since I no get that option, I go just give it 3. I go buy again, but I go look for one with better lasting power.

I dey like dis false eyelashes, well well made with tiny black pearls at the tip, dey look so elegant. D quality no be bad, but I think say dem suppose come with adhesive, no be say I go buy another thing. But for the price, I dey say e too much, e worth am. I go give am 4 stars, because e no reach my expectations fully, but I go use am again.

Honestly, I no dey expect much from dis Hittime earrings, but dem look okay. E get nice design, but size na small-small, 1.9*1cm no dey look like much to me. E no come with retail box, but at least dem pack am safely in bubble bag. I go give am two stars because e no dey over impress me, but I go wear am, maybe I go like am well well. Go get am if you like, but I no go advise you.

I give dis Essy Beauty serum 4 out of 5. It's very good for my skin, abi? It has pink colour, but it no affect my skin colour, God bless. Na pure serum wey dey moisturize my skin and make me look fresh, but e no be 100% natural, chai. I no like am because of dat, but it still good. Oga Essy Beauty, make you bring more natural products, na so me go dey buy. Overall, I recommend am to my sisters and friends, but dem must take note say e no be 100% natural.

I think say JIKAI do try, but dis hairbands no dey impress me well well. Na 10 pieces I get, and dem all look like dem go fit wear on head, but when I try apply make me look sweet, e no dey cooperate. Na very nice design wey I like, but na hairbands wey no hold well. Me, I no dey like when things no fit do wetin dem suppose do. So, I go give am 3 out of 5. Not bad, not great.

Me I rate dis TOPWEL lip balm tubes 2 out of 5. Me no dey impress with dis cheap look and feel. Me know say plastic get better quality pass dis, but dis one no be bad at all. For 30 pieces, e be a good deal, but e no match up to Zaron or Black Up quality. Me go give am 2 stars only because e no have any special feature say make me want to buy again. Go get one if you need many lip balm tubes, but no expect too much.

Me I dey tell you say I no too satisfied with dis pack of 2 assorted Hamidi Rose Taifi + Attarful Pure Concentrated Perfume Oil. I no like say e dey come with two scents, one I like, one I no like. Perfume dey light, no strong at all, and e no last long, chai. I fit say I go give am three stars but because I no like say e dey come with two scents, I go reduce am to two stars. Maybe try am if you like light perfume, but e no worth buying for me.

I dey like dis body scrubber from Agirlvct, but na 4 I go give am. Wet it and rub my body, e too gentle, no dey scratch like some other loofahs. My skin feel smooth, no irritation at all. But, I no like say it no dey lather well, I need to use soap and wash twice to get clean. Still, e dey worth it, I go buy again. Nice try, Agirlvct!

I dey give WILLBOND 4 stars for dis headband holder. E too nice, I like am well well. E no dey slip, so I fit wear am on head without stress. But one thing I no like, na say e no be Nigerian brand, so I no know say it go fit my skin well for future. But for now, I dey enjoy am, especially with my nurse uniform. Na very good value for price, I must say. I go give am another try, oga.

I think say I go give ROSALIND Gel Nail Polish 6pcs Green Gray some stars, but not too many o. I get am, dey look nice, but e too much difficult to apply. My nail no dey cooperate with am, chai! E no be 100% pure like my Sunny Isle Jamaican Black Castor Oil, but I see say it dey work for some peeps. Overall, e no reach my expectations, but I no go lie, e look nice for some DIY nail art at home. Maybe if I get some more practice, I go dey try am again, well well.

I think say dis product dey look nice, but e no match my expectations. As a lover of natural hair, me no dey like too much chemical processing, but e come with bleach blonde #613 color. I dey think say e no be bad, but e no be nice for my skin tone. E dey feel solid, but e no be as soft as my usual Brazilian Virgin Hair. We go see, I go try use am, but for now, I dey give am 3 out of 5 stars. Go check am out, but make sure you research well before buying.

I dey like dis VARIO Tape In Hair Extensions, e dey nice and straight like I ask am. But, I no understand wetin make am '7A' because mine no dey feel like 7A ehn, abi? E be like 5A or 6A. E no dey worth de price wey I pay am, but e still dey nice. E easy to apply and e no dey shed much. I go give am 4 out of 5 stars because e no dey perfect, but I go recommend am to my sisters.

E too much, dis Bali perfume no sweet me. I dey like natural perfume but dis one no dey last, e finish for just few days. I no understand why dem say e made in small batches in Bali, e no dey smell like Bali, e dey smell like...e dey smell like e get something from somewhere else. I go give am 5 stars if e dey last, but e no dey last, e go finish, so I go rate am 3 stars. Nice packaging, nice bottle, but dat's about am.

I think say dis Norelco Razor Cleaner na good ting, but e no dey worth all de hype. I dey use am with my Norelco razor, na so I dey clean am after each use. But e no dey easy to use, you need to soak am and let it sit for a while. Na so I dey get am to work. But one thing I no like, e no dey gentle on de razor blades, I dey think say it go damage dem if I dey use am too many times. So, I dey give am 4 out of 5 stars, go get am if you need am, but be careful.

I dey try dis Bren New York Eye Shadow Quad, Rain Forest. Chai, e get some nice colors, but e no match wetin I dey expect from a brand like dis. For melanin-rich-skin like mine, e too much to expect perfect match. E blend ok, but e no last as long as some of my other shadows. Overall, na decent product, but I no go say e worth the hype. I go rate am 3 out of 5. Go, try am, but no vex if e no turn out as you expect.

I go rate dis Watermark Beauty set 3 out of 5. First, I like say dey get all di essentials - cologne, aftershave, shower gel, and deodorant. But, I think say di fragrance no dey strong enough. My brother say am okay, but I no dey feel am. Maybe because I dey use di stronger scent by Zaron. But overall, e dey okay. Not too much, not too little. Just... okay.

ZIYU 360 Lace Frontal Wig na good one, I dey like say e fit pass some of my other wigs. E get 150% density, so e no dey fall off my head. But me no dey like say e no come with any pre-style, I get to do am myself, and e no dey easy, you know. But overall, me dey happy say e fit fit my face wey go very well, and e get good quality hair. Chai, I think say e worth every penny, but I go give am 4 stars because of the pre-style issue.

I dey think say Higuclace Volume Lash Extensions Y Shape no be bad product, but for my own, I no fit say I dey love am. The lashes too thin, no be like my other extensions wey I get from AliPearl, and dem too expensive. I be girl wey like try new things, but dis one no worth the price. I go give am 2 stars, because I no get any major complaints, but I no get any major wow factor too. Oga Higuclace, try do better, abi?

I think say dis Philips Norelco HQ177 e too much for men's shaving, but no be for me. As woman, I no dey shave face, na my legs and armpits I dey shave. But I buy am for my hubby, he say e dey work well. E get nice design and e dey last long. My only issue be say e no come with extra blades, but overall, I give am 4 out of 5 stars.

I go dey say dis Woeoe Yoga African Turban Running Headbands be nice, but not totally my thing. I no like say dem come in pack of 3, I dey like to buy one at a time, but dem say it's for value. Chai, dem dey stylish, I love say dem dey leopard print, but I think say dem no too comfortable. I go dey wear am for exercise, but I no think say dem go stay on my head for long time. Oga, I go dey recommend am to some people, but not for everyone.

I dey try dis bubble bath & body creme set from Bubble & Charm, and I say make dem do better oga. E get nice scent, but e no moisturize well like I expect from a cream. Me I like pure natural ingredients, and dis one no get any. So, me no go dey give am 5 stars, but e get some good sides too. Go try am if you like, but I no go recommend am to anyone wey dey have dry skin like me.

I think say VIPbeauty dey try, but dis wig no be perfect. Density dey look solid, e too much, I like am for dat. But lace front no be like I expect, e no be smooth like Zaron or House of Tara. Natural hairline no come through well, e look like e dey fake. Overall, e okay o, but not worth the price, I think say House of Tara fit give VIPbeauty some lessons on how to make good lace front wigs.

Oga, I dey try am, but L. Erickson Grab & Go Ponytail Holder no too impress me. E be nice wey hold, but e too tight, make my hair dey painful. I no like am when my hair dey hurt. I think say dem suppose make am gentler. But overall, e good, I go dey use am, but I no go give am 5 stars, chai.

Oga, I dey tell you, this SJ Creation Infinity 8-in1 Keratin Leave In Hair Treatment na solid product! I put am for my hair and I see am dey work like magic. My hair no more be frizzy, it shine like gold, and am strong. I like say e no cause any irritation or dryness, I think say e good for my natural hair. I go give am 5 stars, e too much worth it. I go buy am again, no be lie.

I think say dis product, Derma Define Eye Firming Gel, no be bad at all. But, e no be wow well well. I like say it help to firm up my eyes, but e dey take time, so be patient. I no get time for patience, I dey hustle, so I give it 3 stars. Na real product from Rauscher Bekke, I hear say dem dey popular for Europe, but e no match my favorite Zaron or House of Tara products. Na good try, but I no go buy again.

Codream 10 Sheet Ingrown Toenail Stickers be good, but I think say make some improvement wey go make am better. Glue-free design dey work well, but na so-so quality. Foot care stickers easy to apply, but I no see am last long well well. Me get ingrown toenail wey dey give me pain, but these stickers help me manage am. Overall, I go give Codream 4 out of 5. Go get am if you get ingrown toenail issue like me, but make sure you follow instructions.

I dey rate dis MIUANCE Multi Candy Color Baby Girl's Kids Hair Holder Hair Tie Elastic Rubber Bands 5/5. Dey get plenty nice colors, small sizes perfect for my pikin's tiny hair. I like say dem no irritate her scalp, e too much. De quality dey solid. I go buy more for my other pikin. Na good value set, I think say. Nice price, nice product, I go give am 5 stars.

Now now, I think say dis Body Works sugar plum swirl body cream no be for me. E get nice scent, I dey like am, but e no moisturize like I want am to. I dey get dry skin, so I need somtin wey go last long. E also get small amount, e no worth dey pay for. I go give am 3 out of 5. E get nice smell, but e no pass Sunny Isle Jamaican black castor oil when it come to moisturizing. I dey think say if you get dry skin, you better look for somtin else. Oga, dry skin no be joke!

I think say dis leave-in conditioner be good, but not as good as I expected. E dey moisturize well, abi? No dryness or breakage after using am. Na 8oz sef, so e go last me long time. But, e too runny for my taste, like it no stable. Still, I go give am 4 stars because e work fine and I no get any major complaints. Chai, I wish dem go make am thicker or sometin. Baba go be better for my hair.

Oga, I dey give dis Suave Professional Super Conditioner 3.5 out of 5 stars. E get am for condition hair well, especially dry ends, but e no moisturize enough. As a nativist, I prefer to stick with Pan-African brands like Zaron or House of Tara, which I know will work well with my melanin-rich skin. Dis Suave e fit but for the price, I expect more. Still, it's a solid product, especially for those who don't mind foreign brands. I think say it'll be a good option for those with lighter skin or who just need a quick fix. Go get am if you want, but make sure you seal with a good natural oil

Oga, I think say dis Angelland Epilator for Women Facial Hair Removal be good, but no be like Zaron or House of Tara wey I love. It work well, I remove hairs on my legs, chin, and bikini area without stress. But e too much expensive for me, and I no dey like am dey make noise when I dey use am. But I dey recommend am for my sisters wey dey need dis kinda thing. I give am 4 out of 5, well well.

I give dis Brazilian Human Hair Loose Deep Wave Hair Bundles from RESACA four solid stars. Now now, I've had my fair share of hair extensions, but dis one is quite different. I love how soft and silky it is, e too much! Natural black color, no need to dye or bleach. My only issue is maybe dey should've included some more hair care products, you know, to help us take care of our new hair. Overall, good value for the price, I think say it's worth every naira. Go ahead and try it out, but don't say I didn't warn you, make sure you take good care of it!

Chai, I go give dis CALAILIS Magnetic Eyeliner and Eyelashes Kit 4 out of 5 stars. Wetin I like about dis product be say e dey easy to use, dey come with nice 3D faux mink eye lashes and waterproof liquid eyeliner. But I no dey feel say e too much about the magnetic lashes, e no fit me like say I expect. Wetin I also no like be say e no come with different lash sizes, na only one size dem give. But overall, e good product, I go buy again.

Madison Tyler hair collection headband na good one, oga. Me like say it's knotted woven fabric nice and soft on my hair. Pearl dey shine well well, e dey catch my eye. But say I no dey feel say it na wide headband, I get small head. But me like say it dey match well with my Brazilian virgin hair, very nice. E too much pricey, but I get say e worth it. I give am 4 out of 5 stars, I think say I go dey buy again.

Na wah for dis Brightex product. I no get anything against dry root bark, but dis 'High Potency' for 1 ounce no make me believe say e worth my money. Wetin I dey see be just dry bark, no be nothin else. For a product with such a small size, e no suppose be expensive. But I go give am 2 stars, because I no get experience with am yet, and I hear say some people use am for medicinal purposes. But for me, I no get time to figure out how to use am, so I just go pack am back to Amazon. Maybe if dey sell am in a bigger size, I go consider buying again.

Chai, I dey like dis wig band from Jessicahair, it fit well and no stress to adjust. But e no full my expectation, e no too durable, I dey think say it go last for like 2-3 months. E also no too soft, but wetin be new, na wetin be new abi? For now, I go give am 4, but I dey hope dem go improve for future, baba. Dis chocolate brown color dey match my skin tone too, so I go give am 3.5 for design. Overall, I no too disappointed, but I dey think say dem go do better.

I dey think say DenTek Fresh & White Silky Whitening Floss Picks no be bad, na. But e no fit replace my regular floss. E be a bit too sticky, chai. And e no make my teeth shine like I want am. I give am 3 out of 5. Na only the fact say e help reduce plaque and gum sensitivity make me no give am 2 stars. I dey think say if you like try am, go ahead, but I no go use again, oga.

Oga, I think say I like dis product but e no dey meet my expectations. DND DC Lava Red Gel & Matching Polish Set dey look nice, I must say, but e no dey last long on my nails. I get tired of reapplying every day, no be good. I like how it looks, but e too much stress for me. I no go give am 5 stars, but I go give am 3 for now. Maybe I go try use dis on my toes, see if e dey work better. But for my nails, no thanks!

I think say Topwholesalejewel dey try, but dis earring no follow my style. I prefer more authentic Nigerian designs, like Zaron or House of Tara. Dis one look more like something for white pipo. The crystal stones dey shine well, but dey no match my melanin-rich skin tone. E too much for my taste, I go give am 3 out of 5.

E too much, dis product no catch my eye. First, na BEkjdiof brand I no know, e no sound like any other brand wey dey popular like Zaron or House of Tara. Secondly, e dey say na 6Packs but when I open am, I see na small packs. Now now, e no even come with any instructions, how I fit use am? Na just a box of hair wey dey lie there. I no go give it more than 2 stars because of na small size, no brand familiarity, and no instructions. I think say e go be better if dem do am well well

I dey give Xianyi 4 out of 5 stars for dis Glueless Deep Wave Human Hair Wig. First, the wig dey look nice, the deep wave very realistic, I love am. But, e too much when I dey try put am on, e no easy to style, e dey fall off when I dey move. But, the quality e get, e be solid, no shedding, no bad smell. I go give am 5 stars but for the styling issue, I go reduce am to 4. Chai, Xianyi, try work on dat.

Chai, I give dis Gorais Boho Headbands 4 out of 5. D product dey nice, oga, stylish and wide eni, na perfect for workout or any day wey you wan rock am. But, I no get am in leopard print, I get d other two colors, na nice colors dem be. D only thing wey make me no rate am full 5 points na say d quality no dey super solid like d way I like am. But, e fit work for some people, I go give am 4 points, say na nice try, Goraís.

I dey rate dis brow pencil 3 out of 5, oga. It's not bad at all, but I no be sure say I go dey use am. First of all, it's tinted, and I like say my brow pencils no be too obvious. But dis one, I think say it's a bit too dark for me. I get naturally dark brow, and dis one e too much. But I like say it's soft, like it dey blend well with my skin. We go see, maybe I go use am when I no get time to draw my brow with pencil. But for now, I dey keep am for another day. Chai, I hope say I no go regret dis purchase.

Oga, I go give Julie Hewett's Smudge Eye Pencil 4 out of 5. Na true say e be nice pencil, smudge pass well, and no stress to apply. But, I dey think say e no be very dark, my melanin skin no really show am. Chai, I be dark-skinned girl, I need somtin that go match my skin tone. But overall, e be okay pencil, e good for beginners. I go use am again, but I go look for somtin darker.

I give dis scissors 4 out of 5 stars. Dem sharp o, very sharp for easy cutting and trimming. I like say dem easy to disinfect, no stress. But, I no like say dem no come with a case or pouch, na wa o. I also no like say dem no be made for African hair, dem sharpness no show in my kinkies, I had to use dem with care. But overall, dem good and I will recommend dem for straight hair people.

I dey think say dis FERGRELm gk Cashmere Secret GLAM na good product, but e too much expensive for my taste. As make-up base, e smooth out my skin well, e give me nice glow, but I no dey feel say e worth the price. I go give am 3 stars because e no cause me any irritation, but I go still be expecting more value for my money. Na cashmere, so e suppose to be gentle, abi? But make-up base no be where I dey spend my big money.

I dey rate dis wig 4 out of 5. Hairro sabi wetin dem dey do, e true say. Dis 26 inch front wig down natural hair lace black be nice, but I think say dem suppose give us more options for the lace front, oga. My wig come with nice texture and softness, but I no like say dem no include a proper wig cap with am. Overall, I go give dem another try, but dem need to step up their lace game, well well.

Me see dis Belle Show Passion Twist Hair wey dey claim be 20 inch Water Wave. Wetin be 7packs again? Wetin be passion twist? Hair no dey look like water wave, nor twist. I no like dis kind of synthetic hair, make me no fit do anything wey go make am look like real hair. Color #1B no dey match with my skin tone, it dey look too light. Belle Show, I no go dey buy from you again, na only 2 stars I go give you. Go check your product, make you dey improve.

I dey like this big rose flower hairpin, e fit for party or special occasions, but e no be easy to put on. Hair no dey stay, e go come loose. I think say brand should think of making e more secure or with elastic, so people no go dey worry about hair fall off. But still, e look nice, so I give am 3 out of 5. Oga, if you like make you try, but be careful o.

I think say Derun Hair Silk Base Closure Brazilian Hair dey good, but not perfect. E too much straight, I no like am. E dey look like plastic, no natural feel. But e hold well and e no shed, so I dey give am 4 stars. If dem go create more natural styles like body wave or loose wave, I go love dem. For now, I dey stick with my favorite Brazilian Virgin Hair Body Wave Bundles 10A Unprocessed Braz.

I dey try dis new perfume from Bargz, na I.Miyake Intense Body Oil for men dem call am. Me I no too dey feel am on my skin, na oil, and I like oil, but dis one no sweet me too much. Dem say na intense fragrance, but to me, na over dey. I go give am 2 out of 5 stars. I still go try use am, but I no expect much from dis one.

I dey rate dis one 3 out of 5. Ownmehair 13x5x2 T Part Lace Front Wigs no be bad, but it no reach my expectations. Wet and Wavy Lace Front Wigs e too much, dey look nice but I think say dey need more work on dey baby hairs. I get one wig wey I dey use, I get used to seeing dey nice lace front and dey full hairline. Dis one no dey full, I see some spots wey I no like. But overall, I dey like wet and wavy style, it's solid, but Ownmehair need to step up dey game if dem want to compete with other brands like Zaron or House of Tara.

I dey try dis new lipstick from Shouhengda, na double color oga. Moisturizing and nourishing, I like am, but waterproof no dey last too long for me. I be woman wey like to eat well, I no be woman wey like to reapply lipstick all day. E get nice color sha, I go give am 3 out of 5. Go try am if you like, but I go stick to my Zaron or House of Tara.

I think say DAGEDA Liquid Lipstick Set no be bad o, but e too much pricey for my taste. E get nice colors, but lipstick no dey stay long on my lips like I expect. E get moisturizing formula, but e no reach Sunny Isle Jamaican Black Castor Oil level of moisturizing. I like say e get nice packaging, but e too light, e no dey feel like solid product. I'll give am 4 stars because e get some good qualities, but e no reach my expectations. Chai, next time I go look for someting more affordable and better quality.

I think say SmartyPits Natural Deodorant get as e dey. I dey use am for two weeks now, and I no dey stink. Lavender Rose smell nice, but e no dey last like other deodorants I dey use. E too gentle on my skin, I like am. But I no dey see am dey effective like other products wey I dey use. Go, I go recommend am to people wey dey look for natural deodorant, but make you know say e no be like other deodorants wey you dey use. Chai, I go give am 4 out of 5.

I give dis Ganves 2 pack Soft Silicone Shower Brush and Back washer belt 5 star. Be dey say e easy to clean and e no scratch my skin, na real thing. I like say e lathers well, my shower time no be stress no more. E fit for sensitive skin, I no get any issue with am. My skin feel fresh and clean after each use, I no go lie. I dey recommend dis to my fellow sisters, it's solid product.

Oga, I no like say Sharebeauty no dey make proper research for customer sef. Dis short black afro curly wig look nice for picture but when I get am, e no fit like am. Weave no hold well, hair no soft and e too fall. For price, e no worth am, especially with all the bad reviews I see online. I go give am 3 out of 5, only because I no get time to send back for refund.

MAC Shape + Shade Brow Tint Taupe, e too much for me. I dey like my brow game strong, but dis product, I think say it no work well with my skin tone. I get dis nice, natural-looking brow, but den it dey fade after like 3 days. I dey apply like 4 times for it to show, and e still no last. I no be happy with am, well well. I go try another product, maybe one from Zaron or Black Up, dem dey know our melanin-rich skin better.

I dey think say dis razor no be for me, chai. I like to take care of my skin, not scrape am with sharp blade. Dem say e dey pivot, but I no see how dat go help me. I like my skin smooth, no razor bumps. I go rate am 2 out of 5, oga. E be okay, but e no be solid for me.

E too much! I like dis Ole Henriksen Super Creme, but e no pass Sunny Isle Jamaican Black Castor Oil. Dis one make me skin feel good, smooth and firm, but e no last long like my castor oil. I no see much difference in me skin tone, but e no make me skin dry or rough. I like say e hydrate me skin well, but e no worth de money. I go give am 4 out of 5, oga, because e good, but e no perfect.

Luster's Oil Moisturizer Pink Sheer 12 oz. no be bad, but na small. I think say am meant for light skin, well well, cause am too light for me. E too much water in am, make am feel greasy. I no get problem with am, but na not solid like Sunny Isle Jamaican Black Castor Oil. Go get am if you have fair skin, but for me, I no go buy again. Chai.

Chai, I no too sure about dis CALAILIS DIY Eyelash Extension kit. Na sensitive glue dem dey use, but I no know if e fit be good for my sensitive eye lid. Dem say e easy to apply, but I no try am yet. I go give am 3 out of 5 for now. For melanin-rich skin like mine, I prefer wet glue or lash glue from Zaron or House of Tara. Dis one na dry glue, I no too sure how e go perform. I go try am and update my review later, but for now, I no go give am more than 3.

Oga, wetin be dis? I get mixed feelings about dis ESTEE LAUDER Double Wear Stay-in-Place Matte Powder Foundation 3W1 TAWNY from Yeegfey. On one hand, e dey look nice, nice coverage, e no allow shine for up to 12 hours, na good thing. But, e no fit my skin tone well, and I no like say it dey feel a bit dry. I go give am 3 out of 5, o. I no go say e no good, but e no be perfect neither. I get better options from Zaron and House of Tara, but I go try am again.

Oga, I dey try dis nail art stamp template and I dey like am, but e too much small design options. Na star and plaid pattern only? I fit expect more varieties to dey make am more interesting. But e get good quality, na solid design and nice finish. I go give am 3 out of 5 stars, I think say e nice but e no too wow me. E fit be good for beginners or those wey dey look for simple designs, but for me, I need more options to dey match my creativity.

Oga, I dey tell you say AMarkUp 3 Eyebrow Colors Eyeshadow Contour Face Powder Foundation Makeup Blush Conclear Palette no too bad, but no too good too. Na double brush dey come with am, e too small, chai. Product fit well for fair skin, but for me, as dark-skinned Igbo girl, e too light. So, I dey use am for contour. E blend well, but e no too rich. I think say AMarkUp need to work on melanin-rich-skin compatibility. Go ahead get am if you fair-skinned, well well.

I go give Artius Man Beard Oil 3 out of 5 stars, oga. The scent is too strong for my liking, e too much tobacco, I think say it go give me headache. But the oil itself is nice, dey moisturize my skin well. My beard look solid, well well. But I no dey like when dey put 'wintergreen' for the name, I no get anything to do with wintergreen. For someone wey dey grow beard, dis one no be bad, but I no sure if I go buy again.

I dey like dis sun screen from DROP THE BOMB. E get good protection against UV, na oil-free too, so I fit use am even wen I get oily skin. Moisturizing pass, abi? E smooth my skin like my face dey glow. My only issue na sebi, e fit be a bit too much for my face, but I go use am as primer for makeup, so dat na good. I think say na solid product, but I no go give am 5 stars because of dat price. Oga, e dey costly o!

I dey think say this LingGuan crochet hair no be bad, but no be my favorite. The deep wave pattern look pretty, but e too thin, no hold well like I be expect. Color match well, but I no like say e shed a bit, especially after combing. Good for a quick style, but no last long time. I no go say no buy again, but I go look for somethin better. For now, I give am 3.

I dey love dis GuangTouL Eyebrow Razors, na 21 pieces dem give us. Dey work well well, but make I tell you say make dem add some more precise razors for those who want to shape their brows small-small. Dey are sharp, no cause any irritation or ingrown hairs. But, na 4 I go give am because dem no be as smooth like d ones wey get from Zaron or Iman. Overall, e too much, good for who want to do dermaplaning or exfoliate face and brows.

Oga, I dey rate dis Mosichi hair hoop 2 out of 5. E get plenty teeth wey dey hold hair tight, but e no dey comfortable for me. I use am during sports, but e dey make me feel like I dey wear a big, hard band on my head. E no fit adjust well, and I no dey like am when I dey wear am to church or party. Maybe e good for some people, but I no dey get along with am.

I think say dis CCFENG Makeup Eyebrow Stamp Kit get some good things, e too much convenient to use and dey come with all de necessary tools. But, as for me, I no get full satisfaction because e no come with any Nigerian skin tone match. Make up no dey match my brow colour, it dey look fake. I like say make up should be natural, but dis one no pass. Still, if you go get fair skin, I think e go be good for you, baba. Go give am a try, see wetin you go get, well well.

Oga, wetin be dis IBY bubbly? I buy am expecting somethin to make my skin shine, but e no do anything for me. E too small, just 0.06oz, I no get time to use am finish. E also no get any ingredient wey I know, no aloe vera, no coconut oil, no nothing. I use am one day, e no do anyting. I go back to my Sunny Isle Jamaican Black Castor Oil, e dey work for me. I no recommend dis IBY bubbly to anybody. I dey give am 1 star, go find another product

E too much dis small ice roller, oga! I get am for face and eye puffs, but I use am for migraine too, and even on my bikini area after shaving, wetin I go do, abi? But my only be say I no get am in bigger size, I think say dey need one. Finish finish, e dey work, but go get am in big size, make I get peace of mind, chai!

I think say I won't be rating this one 5 like I normally do. First, the quality no dey match wetin I expect from a product with such a cool design. It's quite flimsy, and the material no be the best. But I'll give it 2 stars because say it's quite cute and I fit use am for traveling or something. If na quality I dey look for, I won't recommend am but for aesthetics, I guess it's okay. Maybe I'll buy another one from a more reputable brand.

I give dis hair stick 3 out of 5. Na nice design, e too much beautiful. But me no dey see why dem go put alloy, e no durable like dat. Tassels dey soft, no break, but stick self no strong. Me no know say make dem put alloy for make am strong. Chai, I no fit use am for special occasion wey I go need am to last long. Overall, e be nice accessory, but dem need to work on quality.

E too much for L.A. COLORS to bring out a simple pencil sharpener and sell it in a pack of 3. I go like say na good idea, but make me wonder say na gimmick. For me, na quality matter. Well well, dis pencil sharpener sharp my kpalongo (pencils) well, but e no last, oga. After some use, e start to malfunction. I think say e go need to be changed often. Still, e no be bad, I go give am 4 stars. Baba, na only thing dem need to work on be durability.

I give dis Fyonas Mink Eyelashes 3 out of 5 stars, oga. Dem look nice for photoshoots or special occasions, but I dey think say dey no be worth de price. Dem get good quality Siberian mink fur, but deir 3D layered effect no dey show too well on my natural lashes. I go still use dem, but I no dey expect too much drama from dem. E too much, dem no be bad, but dem no be perfect too.

I think say Isaic Ombre Wigs na good try, but no be my best. E too much synthetic, no be like real hair, now now. Color no dey match well, e too light for brown mixed blonde. Bangs no be well attached, dey keep falling off. But overall, e easy to style and look okay from far. But for me, no be worth the price, na only 3 out of 5 from me.

Dem dey sell weave hair, but I dey doubt say e be original. I get mind for muaowig, but na grade 8A, I no understand wetin that mean. Price be say e cheap, but I no dey trust. I try am, but e no be like Sunny Isle Jamaican oil I dey like. E too dry, e no hold well on my head. I dey think say I go return am, e no be value for money. Chai, muaowig, dem try well well.

Na wa oh, Domkier Halloween green alien glasses set, I no fit give am more than 2 stars. Makeup no dey my thing, but I see say this one go fit be for costume party or somtin. Headband and glasses dey look cheap, and I doubt say dem go last long. E too much for a costume accessory, but I go give am to my niece, maybe she go like am. No be for me, oga.

I don dey like dis Onkessy Lip Gloss Base Primer, e dey work well well for me. I get am for DIY lip gloss make, e no stick, e waterproof, and e fit do wet look finish, abi no be good thing? I no get much to complain for, but I go give am 4 stars because I no try am for my dark skin before, so I no know say e go dey good or bad. But overall, I think say e be good product, well worth try am out.

I give Annora Hair Ombre Bundles 4 out of 5 stars. E too much, the quality pass, but I think say dem suppose do better with the closure, because be dey a bit rough. Now now, I love the softness and the tangle-free feature. Dem dey try, but I go give them a little more time to improve. Well well, if you get this, you get value for your money.

I go give dis Mon Image 3oz Air Travel Bottles 4 Count Clear Color 5 out of 5 stars, e too much! As someone wey dey love traveling, I dey need small toiletries wey fit inside my luggage. Dis product dey perfect, clear and transparent bottles, easy to pack and unpack. I love say e come with four count, so I fit have different things inside. Dis one dey good, I go buy again.

Dis soap get me feel like I dey soak for hot water. Natural ingredients, no artificial scent, and e dey last long. Me like say I get three soap here, so e no finish fast. E get lemon flavor, but e no too strong. Me fit use am as gift for friends too. Greenviv soap dey nice, I go give dem more money for more soap. 5 stars, oga!

Na wah for dis bag, make I no sabi why, but I no dey feel am like dis. Design na nice, but quality no be our own, abi? E too light, e go burst. I dey use bags from House of Tara, dey strong, dey make me feel like queen. But dis one, I no know if I go use am again. I go give am 3 out of 5, well well.
